data.title: Regional PMO & Strategy Manager IMEA
data.raw_snippet:
**About this Position** 
 Are you energized by solving complex project challenges within Operations \& Supply Chain? Do you enjoy bringing structure to ambiguity while staying agile and impact\-driven? As the Regional PMO \& Strategy Manager for the Operations \& Supply Chain team of Adhesive Techno
data.jd_text:
**About this Position** 
 Are you energized by solving complex project challenges within Operations \& Supply Chain? Do you enjoy bringing structure to ambiguity while staying agile and impact\-driven? As the Regional PMO \& Strategy Manager for the Operations \& Supply Chain team of Adhesive Technologies, you will play a key role in strengthening project excellence across the IMEA (India, Middle East, and Africa) region. This dynamic role combines capital project governance, strategic project support, cross\-functional collaboration, and capability building. You will partner closely with project teams, functional leads, and senior executives to ensure that capital initiatives are well\-planned, well\-governed, and aligned with strategic priorities. This role is ideal for someone with a structured and analytical mindset, strong communication skills, and a proactive, can\-do attitude.
   

  

**What You´ll Do**
* Lead and deliver strategic projects at regional and global levels, driving business impact and alignment
* Translate complex data into actionable insights and influence decision\-making through executive\-level presentations
* Strengthen cross\-functional collaboration through improved processes, governance, and communication frameworks
* Manage the capital project portfolio, including resource allocation, prioritization, and performance tracking
* Lead capital projects through initiation and feasibility phases, ensuring strong structure and team setup
* Drive continuous improvement through project audits, lessons learned, and implementation of best practices
* Identify capability gaps and deliver targeted training and coaching to enhance project management excellence
* Provide agile, hands\-on project support and promote a culture of continuous improvement across the organization


**What makes you a good fit**
* Minimum of 10 years of relevant professional experience in strategy, project management, or related fields
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (Chemical, Mechanical, or related disciplines) preferred
* MBA or equivalent advanced degree required
* Experience in chemical or process industries is an advantage
* Proven experience in strategy teams, strategy consulting, or strategic roles is highly valued
* Prior exposure to operations, supply chain, LEAN methodologies, robotics, or automation is a plus
* Proficiency in Power BI, SharePoint, Microsoft Office Suite, and Copilot tools is preferred


 At Henkel, we come from a broad range of backgrounds, perspectives, and life experiences. We believe the uniqueness of all our employees is the power in us. Become part of the team and bring your uniqueness to us! We look for a diverse team of individuals who possess different backgrounds, experiences, personalities and mindsets.

data.title: Technical Program Management Analyst I, Launch Graduate Program 2026 - Dubai, United Arab Emirates
data.raw_snippet:
**Our Purpose**
*Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200\+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, s
data.jd_text:
**Our Purpose**
*Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200\+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.*
**Title And Summary**
 Technical Program Management Analyst I, Launch Graduate Program 2026 \- Dubai, United Arab Emirates
   

  

 Technical Program Management Analyst I, Launch Graduate Program 2026 \- Dubai, United Arab Emirates (UAE Nationals preferred)
   

  

**Launch Program**
 Mastercard Launch is an 18\-month global development program providing recent graduates with opportunities and exposure. You will not only enhance your professional growth and skills in a global setting, you’ll launch your Mastercard career.
   

  

**Technical Program Management Analyst I**
 As a Technical Program Management Analyst, you will Work across teams to:
   

  

* Organize and accelerate delivery, ensuring all teams are delivering in a coordinated manner.
* Track and manage manifest definitions, release integration, timing, scope and delivery.
* Provide ongoing updates (with data) on the state of delivery.
* Proactively manage all dependencies, ensuring all outputs are production ready at launch.


**What you’ll need**
* To be available to start from 1st September 2026
* To be a Final Year Undergraduate/Masters students or to have graduated no earlier than September 2025
* Analytical and problem\-solving skills
* Strong strategic and conceptual aptitude
* Ability to multi\-task and prioritise multiple projects concurrently
* High\-energy, can\-do attitude, very strong sense of ownership


**Corporate Security Responsibility**
 All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:
   

  

* Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
* Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
* Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
* Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

data.jd_text:
**Position:** 
**PMO Assistant**
**Location: Riyadh**
**Saudization Commitment**
 In alignment with the Kingdom's Vision 2030 and national Saudization initiatives, this position is
 **open exclusively to Saudi nationals** 
 who are passionate about building careers in the energy and engineering sectors.
   

  

**About CSI Global**
**CSI Global** 
 is a multi\-disciplinary engineering and contracting group delivering advanced electromechanical, building MEP systems, testing and commissioning, contracting and construction solutions across the GCC and beyond. Through our group companies, we serve the power, utilities, and infrastructure sectors with full lifecycle capabilities—from tendering and design review to execution, commissioning, and handover. We combine engineering precision with commercial excellence to power progress across complex projects in the region.
   

  

**Position Overview**
 We are seeking a
 **PMO Assistant** 
 to support the Project Management Office in planning, tracking, and coordinating project activities. The ideal candidate will assist in ensuring projects are delivered on time, within scope, and in line with organizational standards.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Support PMO in project planning, scheduling, and progress tracking
* Prepare project reports, dashboards, and documentation
* Coordinate with project managers and stakeholders to collect updates
* Maintain project records, logs, and compliance documentation
* Assist in monitoring risks, issues, and action items
* Strong Organizational skills with attention to detail and ability to manage multiple tasks.
* Ability to work under pressure and meet deadlines with minimal supervision.
* Proficient in MS Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint); strong reporting and tracking skills
* Ability to coordinate with multiple departments and handle office tasks efficiently.
* Basic knowledge of procurement processes, contracts, and project lifecycles is an advantage.
* Strong ability to create, maintain, and manage structured filling systems.
* Good working knowledge of PDF editing tools.


**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Engineering, or a related field
* 3–5 years of experience in PMO or project support roles
* Strong organizational and documentation skills
* Proficiency in MS Office (Excel, PowerPoint, Word); Project Management tools are a plus
* Good communication skills in English
* Project management certifications and familiarity with project management tools such as (MS Project, Primavera P6, Jira, or similar) is a plus.

data.title: Program Management Information Systems Manager
data.raw_snippet: JASARA PMC is seeking an experienced Program Management Information Systems Manager to lead and enhance our program management information systems. In this pivotal role, you will be responsible for the strategic oversight of PMIS across various programs, ensuring that our data structures, tools, and
data.jd_text:
JASARA PMC is seeking an experienced Program Management Information Systems Manager to lead and enhance our program management information systems. In this pivotal role, you will be responsible for the strategic oversight of PMIS across various programs, ensuring that our data structures, tools, and processes support effective project execution and decision\-making. You will work closely with cross\-functional teams to implement innovative solutions and foster a culture of continuous improvement throughout the organization.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead the design, development, and implementation of program management information systems that align with organizational objectives
* Collaborate with key stakeholders to define system requirements and functionality, ensuring that the PMIS meets the needs of various program teams
* Oversee the integration of PMIS with other organizational systems and tools to enable seamless data flow and reporting
* Analyze program data and generate comprehensive reports to inform strategic decision\-making and program performance evaluation
* Manage PMIS\-related projects from inception to completion, ensuring timely delivery and adherence to quality standards
* Provide guidance, training, and support to users of the PMIS, promoting best practices and effective usage of the system
* Monitor industry trends and advancements in PMIS technologies to ensure the organization remains at the forefront of project management practices


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Information Technology, Project Management, Business Administration, or a related field
* Minimum of 15 years of experience in program management information systems, with at least 5 years in a management role
* Strong expertise in PMIS tools and software, preferably including Oracle products (e.g., Unifier, P6\) and other relevant PMIS platforms
* Demonstrated experience in data analysis, reporting, and performance measurement within a program management context
* Proven leadership skills and experience managing cross\-functional teams to achieve program objectives
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills to effectively collaborate with stakeholders at all levels
* Strong problem\-solving abilities and a proactive approach to addressing challenges
* Relevant certifications such as PMP, PRINCE2, or similar are highly desirable
* Familiarity with Agile methodologies and project management best practices

data.title: QNB3662 - Associate Strategy PMO (Qatarization)
data.raw_snippet:
**About QNB**
 Established in 1964 as the country’s first Qatari\-owned commercial bank, QNB Group has steadily grown to become the largest bank in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region.
   

  

 QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countri
data.jd_text:
**About QNB**
 Established in 1964 as the country’s first Qatari\-owned commercial bank, QNB Group has steadily grown to become the largest bank in the Middle East and Africa (MEA) region.
   

  

 QNB Group’s presence through its subsidiaries and associate companies extends to more than 31 countries across three continents providing a comprehensive range of advanced products and services. The total number of employees is more than 28,000 serving up to 20 million customers operating through 1,000 locations, with an ATM network of 4,300 machines.
   

  

 QNB has maintained its position as one of the highest rated regional banks from leading credit rating agencies including Standard \& Poor’s (A), Moody’s (Aa3\) and Fitch (A\+). The Bank has also been the recipient of many awards from leading international specialised financial publications.
   

  

 Based on the Group’s consistent strong financial performance and its expanding international presence, QNB currently ranks as the most valuable bank brand in the Middle East and Africa, according to Brand Finance Magazine.
   

  

 QNB Group has an active community support program and sponsors various social, educational and sporting events.
   

  

**Job Purpose Summary**
 Support the Strategy PMO (Senior) Managers in managing, monitoring, steering, and tracking projects in order to ensure implementation and successful completion within the defined time, budget, and scope. Support in the preparation of management information reports on all planned and ongoing projects on a continuous and ad hoc basis as directed. Assist in the day\-to\-day operations of the Group Project Management Office (PMO) for all planned, ongoing, and ad hoc projects in QNB. Assist in rolling out and championing the overall project management methodology, processes, procedures, tools and templates to manage the overall project portfolio within QNB Group Learn and acquire knowledge of comprehensive project management methodology and the associated standards, tools, templates and processes
   

  

**Essential Duties \& Responsibilities By Dimensions**
* Shareholder \& Financial:
* Assist in reporting against Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) to successfully monitor and track the Group’s portfolio of on\-going projects.
* Implements KPI’s and best practices for Associate Strategy PMO.
* Promote cost consciousness and efficiency and enhance productivity, to minimise cost, avoid waste, and optimise benefits for the bank.
* Customer (Internal \& External):
* Assist within the Group PMO in all project related matters (e.g., collection of data, liaison with project managers) and reporting of projects with regards Group PMO standards, processes, tools and templates
* Maintain issue/ risk logs, project plans, preparation of reporting, communication within the project team, and project meetings
* Support and manage the smooth planning, running and follow up of Group PMO meetings where necessary and act as an ambassador for the Group PMO in customer facing meetings and communication, promoting the professionalism and best practices of the Group PMO
* Support in the preparation of management information reports on all planned and ongoing projects on a continuous and ad hoc basis as directed
* Support in rolling\-out the new project management methodology within QNB Group where necessary \- Build and maintain strong and effective relationships with other related departments
* Internal (Processes, Products, Regulatory):
* Assist and support in the maintenance and development of Group PMO documentation, including processes and policies
* Support the day\-to\-day internal operational Group PMO processes as directed by the Strategy PMO (Senior) manager(s) and VP, Strategy PMO
* Assist in the maintenance of the inventory of projects including all related and necessary documentation and information within the appropriate Group PMO tools
* Regularly update project information through the preparation of project status reports, using a fact driven approach aligned against the original project scope, plan and objectives
* Support in the preparation of management information reports on all planned and ongoing projects on a continuous and ad hoc basis as directed
* Support the (Senior) Strategy PMO manager(s) and VP, Strategy, PMO as requested with additional mandates, and other ad hoc requests as necessary
* Participate and support in the set up and running of relevant project/ team meetings as and when required
* Support the development of training material and the rollout of training sessions to project managers
* Learning \& Knowledge:
* Possess a basic understanding of Project Management theory and practice
* Identify areas for professional and self\-development \- Strive to learn project management methodology


**Education/Experience Requirements**
* Bachelor degree from leading academic institution with focus on business administration, finance or science
* Fresh Qatari graduates, no previous experience required.
* Basic understanding of project methodology and approach, e.g., Prince II and/ or PMP is an advantage, as is any certification
* Proven academic track record or some work experience in a strategy consulting environment, or a similar environment of a well renowned international financial services related institution
* High degree of methodological\-conceptual skills \- Well\-developed numerical, analytical and evaluation skills


 Note: you will be required to attach the following:
   

  

* Resume/CV
* Copy of Passport or QID
* Copy of Education Certificate

data.title: Head of Project Management Office
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose** 




 To Direct, oversee and manage the delivery of construction projects (buildings and fit outs projects) of the group (new/ existing), ensuring completion of projects within the agreed specification/ quality standards, budgets and timelines.
 



  





**Essential Roles and Resp
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose** 




 To Direct, oversee and manage the delivery of construction projects (buildings and fit outs projects) of the group (new/ existing), ensuring completion of projects within the agreed specification/ quality standards, budgets and timelines.
 



  





**Essential Roles and Responsibilities** 



* Provides leadership and strategic guidance, and supporting the development of business strategies to deliver the required levels of productivity
* Contribute to the development of Project Management Department Strategy, in conjunction with Director, ensuring alignment to the objectives and strategy of the organization.
* Participate in the development, review and reporting of the policies and procedures framework (Audit, Document Control, Financial and Accounting, Design Compliance and Corporate Identity, QC, HSE) that allow the function to effectively meet its objectives and targets, in line with Project Management department policies and procedures in line with Group’s strategy and direction.
* Puts resource strategies in place and manages resource costs to overhead budgets.
* Review and report to Director on strategic decisions during the entire lifecycle of the projects.
* Contribute strategic support the group legal department in case of any necessity in terms of claim and disputes with consultants and contractors.
* Provide guidance to other internal business units and departments in terms of budget, timing and strategy throughout the project execution stage
* In conjunction with the other business units, develop a business plan setting out the strategies which will deliver the organizations longer\-term goals.
* Manage the design and project execution of projects with Al Tayer Real Estate, Al Tayer Motor and private projects getting developed by directors, by contracting external designers/consultants/contractors, finalize the same for implementation and ensure that the agreed design and project milestone deliverables are met in accordance with the project program.
* Implement approved procedures for tendering, selection and appointment of contractors, payment terms, dealings and communications between all parties in coordination with group legal functions.
* Implement internal processes and manage, to ensure that all contracts / agreements with contractors, suppliers and consultants are agreed, finalized and signed off before commencement of work, to avoid any legal dispute/claims etc. post execution.
* Oversee the development of project schedules, which include key project milestones and critical paths to ensure adherence and take corrective action as appropriate and work in consolidation with Operations, Business Units, and developer to accomplish its objectives within the constraints of time, quality and agreed cost.
* Liaise with Business units to understand the requirements and specifications of new projects and maintain an awareness of principle requirements in the design of the projects, ensuring they are considered in the execution stage.
* Review designs, recommend ideas/concepts to ensure that layouts effectively maximize functionality and aesthetic expectations of the projects by ensuring HSE compliance as per approved group policies.
* Oversee the Review and approve the drawings submitted by contractors and ensure that they are examined by all parties concerned.
* Manage the tender process effectively to ensure that all contractors, vendors, consultants selected are most capable of carrying out project requirements.
* Ensures that there are effective contract and documentation procedures in place to deliver legally complaint projects and minimize costs and risks.
* Ensure that CAPEX for all new projects are submitted to the business in a timely manner for review and approval.
* Monitors contractors’ work for compliance with schedule, budget, quality, safety, and overall conformance with the contract documents
* Owns the Health and Safety policy for Construction and puts processes and systems in place to monitor its compliance and share best practice.
* Oversee the changes process during project life cycle, which includes identifying, documenting, and controlling changes to the scope baseline, are validated and mechanism for the project management team to consistently communicate and seek approval of all changes from the stakeholders through set policies of using change control forms etc, is being adhered to.
* Identify possible risks for all upcoming and ongoing projects, ensure proactive risk plans to manage and mitigate risks and engage in a proactive communication strategy with clients and stakeholders. Puts in place effective risk management processes to identify, quantify, monitor and minimize risks in projects.
* Resolves field construction problems in coordination with engineering staff, third parties, and other agencies as necessary.
* Maintain updated projects matrix for current and upcoming projects based on agreed project master plan. Conduct quarterly audits on projects processes to ensure compliance and adherence to agreed policies and procedures.
* Identify opportunities to make use of external contractors and subcontractors, establish and maintain relationship with trusted organizations that meet the group requirements.
* Oversee the development of vendor and supplier list in database for the supply of right products for the projects.
* Oversee snagging and handover of projects by consultant and contractor to ensure the overall readiness of the project for commencement of business operations.
* To oversee the co\-ordination of the communication strategy within the project to ensure all stakeholders and interested concerned parties receive the information they want at the appropriate time.
* Establish a culture / process of value engineering within project team and look for more cost\-effective methods to achieve the same.
* Maintain an awareness of legislative and regulatory requirements and ensure conformance to all quality, health and safety regulations.
* Ensure effective and proper contract governance is implemented prior to project completion.
* Provide the director with advice and expertise on critical issues regarding the project, and implementation
* Liaises with the Finance Director to track the financial performance of Construction and ensures that Finance receive accurate information in a timely and organized manner
* Follow up and monitor the external governmental rules and regulations to ensure newly developing rules and regulations are well captured and implemented in projects
* Sets a culture of continuous improvement including the setup of processes and committees to learn and share best practice.
* Provide Leadership and direction to subordinate towards the achievement of goals and objectives.
* Guide and motivate subordinates to enhance performance and produce quality work, and ensure that they are continuously developed for higher level roles.
* Set targets, objectives and clear responsibilities for all supervised staff, progressively monitor individual performance against the agreed criteria and conduct formal appraisals in keeping with time frames
* Prepare performance evaluation and appraisal reports of direct reports to assess subordinates productivity and progress and identify training needs of team members to improve efficiency and ensure conformity with standard procedures and practices
* Provides mentoring support to direct team and other colleagues across the business in line with the succession plans



  





**Education, Skills and Experiences** 



* Degree in Civil Engineering or an equivalent technical qualification relevant to Construction Project Management.
* 15 years of experience in construction field

data.jd_text:
We are looking for a
 **Head of Project Execution** 
 who will be responsible for overseeing the execution teams of complex projects across the EMEA region, ensuring projects are properly staffed and delivered on time, within budget, and to the highest quality standards while meeting client expectations.
   

  

 This role requires strong leadership of cross\-functional local and regional teams, as well as close coordination with HQ teams.
   

  

**Your role in our team**
 People Leadership
   

  

  

* Oversee the execution of projects across multiple countries of the EMEA region.
* Ensure that project timelines, budgets, and deliverables are met, including monitoring the project lifecycle from initiation to completion.
* Lead Ensure coordination of the project teams (engineering, procurement, installation, commissioning and integration) in a matrix organization.
* Implement best practices in project execution, ensuring compliance with local and international standards and regulations.


 Management and processes
   

  

  

* Develop and manage detailed project schedules and roadmaps, ensuring smooth execution across regions and teams, always in alignment with Körber Group and BA Supply Chain objectives.
* Identify potential risks to project timelines, costs, and quality, and proactively develop mitigation strategies with coordination with the Project Management Teams.
* Lead the resolution of complex project issues together with the subject matter experts of the PMO, working with partners and external teams to deliver solutions.
* Ensure effective project risk management and reporting, escalate potential impacts and make recommendations for corrective actions. Propose respective mitigation plans.
* Create, plan, and follow up on project roadmaps and milestones.


 Operational Excellence \& Risk Management
   

  

  

* Facilitate best practices and continuous improvement processes in project execution.
* Foster transparency and usage of NCC and RC management tools.
* Identify underperforming projects, recommend actions and mitigation plans (e.g., corrective measures, escalation).
* Continuous improvement with focus in being better every day.


 Finance and Budget
   

  

  

* Responsible for Project Execution / Project Management budget and targets, set in accordance with EMEA regional Management.


 Legal, health and safety requirements
   

  

  

* Ensure all requirement with the assistance of the respective Körber AG and EMEA region.


**Your Profile**
* . 10 years of experience in Supply Chain management / Intralogistics, Project Execution, strategy and related methodologies
* Proven track record of managing complex projects across regions or business verticals in multicultural environment.
* Minimum 5 years leadership experience
* Experience in developing comprehensive project plans, including scope, timelines, and resource requirements. (P6, Jira, and digital tools desirable).
* Proficiency in resource management / resource allocation and utilization.
* Profound knowledge in risk and change management

data.title: Operational Excellence Lead (9 months contract)
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary**
 At Zurich Middle East, we’re committed to shaping a brighter future together. As part of Zurich Insurance Group, one of the world’s largest and most experienced insurers, our mission is to help communities understand and protect themselves from risk—locally and globally.
   

  

 A
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary**
 At Zurich Middle East, we’re committed to shaping a brighter future together. As part of Zurich Insurance Group, one of the world’s largest and most experienced insurers, our mission is to help communities understand and protect themselves from risk—locally and globally.
   

  

 Are you ready to drive transformation and help Zurich create brighter outcomes for everyone? Join our team and bring your passion for excellence to Zurich Middle East, delivering impactful results for clients, colleagues, and communities.
   

  

 As an interim Operational Excellence Lead, you will drive operational and process improvement, supporting the Head of Operations and the wider Operations management team. By leading transformation initiatives and embedding robust governance, you will accelerate automation and deliver consistent, data\-driven operational excellence that benefits both customers and colleagues. You will play a key role in enabling Operations to move beyond day\-to\-day business\-as\-usual, fostering innovation, scalability, and a brighter future for all.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Customer and Service Journey Transformation**
* Lead mapping and analysis of key customer, distributor, and service journeys to identify areas of improvement and standardization, pain points, inefficiencies, and opportunities for simplification and consistency.
* Translate journey insights into actionable improvements that enhance customer experience and operational effectiveness.


**Process Improvement and Standardization**
* Lead process improvement and standardization across core operational activities.
* Establish and maintain clear process documentation, governance, and controls to ensure consistency, compliance, and repeatability.
* Promote the adoption of new and improved ways of working across teams, encouraging a culture of continuous improvement.


**Automation and Digital Enablement**
* Identify and implement automation opportunities, in partnership with IT and Business Technology teams, across customer and service journeys.
* Support the definition and execution of digital roadmaps for operational systems and customer\-facing assets.
* Contribute to end\-to\-end ownership improvements across distributor and customer journeys.


**Operational Efficiency and Productivity**
* Lead targeted interventions to improve cycle times, reduce operational costs, strengthen quality, and enhance productivity.
* Introduce structured problem\-solving frameworks and continuous improvement practices to drive sustainable uplift.
* Partner with teams across Operations to embed performance discipline and process optimization.


**Data and Performance Insights**
* Develop and evolve operational dashboards and performance insights to monitor service levels and identify opportunities for improvement.
* Use data and analytics to support prioritization, diagnose issues, and validate the impact of improvement initiatives.


**Operating Model \& Change Enablement**
* Support operating model alignment and embed new ways of working, ensuring clarity of roles, responsibilities, and workflows.
* Foster collaboration and a customer\-centric mindset through change adoption initiatives.
* Ensure transformation activities are delivered with strong governance, tracking, and cross\-functional coordination.


**Strategic Delivery Support**
* Provide structured delivery support to the Head of Operations on priority and key strategic initiatives including planning, stakeholder management, risk tracking, and reporting.
* Enable disciplined execution of strategic initiatives that contribute to growth, cost rationalization, and operational scalability.


**Job Qualifications**
**Essential Requirements:**
* Education: Bachelor’s degree in Business, Operations, Engineering, or related field.
* Experience: Minimum 10 years’ progressive experience in insurance, financial services, or other regulated industries, ideally within a multinational environment.
* Professional Certifications (one or more of the following is essential):
+ Lean Six Sigma Black Belt (or Master Black Belt)
+ Certified Insurance Professional (e.g., CII, ANZIIF, LOMA, or similar)
+ Project Management Professional (PMP®) or PRINCE2® Practitioner
+ Certified Change Management Professional (e.g., Prosci® Change Management Certification)
+ Operational Leadership: Proven experience managing, mentoring, and inspiring large operations teams in a fast\-paced, matrixed environment.
+ Transformation Impact: Track record of leading structured operational transformation initiatives, delivering quantifiable improvements in efficiency, service, and productivity.
+ Global Perspective: Deep understanding of global insurance markets, regulatory requirements, and multi\-jurisdictional standards.
+ Multilingual Advantage: Fluency in English; proficiency in additional market\-relevant languages is highly valued.

**Skills and Competencies:**+ Continuous Improvement: Advanced knowledge of Lean, Six Sigma, or equivalent methodologies. Skilled in designing and deploying target operating models and process standardization at scale.
+ Process \& Digital Innovation: Strong experience leading digital transformation and automation projects across insurance operations, integrating InsurTech solutions.
+ Advanced Analytics: Expertise in developing and leveraging operational dashboards, predictive analytics, and business intelligence tools for data\-driven decision\-making.
+ Change Adoption: Exceptional capability in driving changes across diverse global teams, building resilience and a customer\-centric culture.
+ Stakeholder Management: Executive presence with outstanding communication skills; adept at influencing C\-level leaders, board members, and cross\-functional partners.
+ Governance \& Collaboration: Strong experience establishing governance frameworks, risk tracking, and compliance controls; able to foster integrated outcomes across departments.

**Additional Preferred Requirements:**

* Education: Master’s degree in Business, Operations, Engineering, or related discipline.
* Professional Certifications: (one or more of the following)
+ IT Service Management: ITIL Foundation or higher certification.
+ Quality Management: ISO 9001 Lead Auditor certification.
+ Risk Management: Risk Management Certification (e.g., CRM, IRM).


**Why Zurich**
 At Zurich, we like to think outside the box and challenge the status quo. We take an optimistic approach by focusing on the positives and constantly asking What can go right?
   

  

 We are an equal opportunity employer who knows that each employee is unique \- that’s what makes our team so great!
   

  

 Join us as we constantly explore new ways to protect our customers and the planet.
   

  

* Location(s): AE \- Dubai
* Remote working: No
* Schedule: Full Time
* Recruiter name: Leigh Jeremy Jaye Santander
* Closing Date: April 8, 2026

* **Team Leadership and Development:**
* **Team Management:** 
 Lead and motivate the local team, ensuring high performance, employee satisfaction and professional development.
* **Recruitment and Training:** 
 Oversee the recruitment of new staff and provide training and development programs to enhance their skills and knowledge.
* **Culture and Values:** 
 Foster a positive work culture that reflects the company’s values and promotes diversity and inclusion.
* **Regulatory Compliance and Risk Management:**
* **Legal Compliance:** 
 Ensure all operations comply with local laws and regulations, including labour laws, tax requirements, and industry\-specific regulations.
* **Risk Management:** 
 Identify and manage business risks, including market, financial, and operational risks and implement strategies to mitigate them.
* **Stakeholder Engagement:**
* **Stakeholder Communication:** 
 Act as the primary liaison between the country operations and the company’s global headquarters. Keep stakeholders informed about performance, challenges and strategic direction.
* **Public Relations:** 
 Lead engagements with the Ministry of Finance and any other government or quasi\-government agency.
* **Market Intelligence:**
* **Competitive Analysis:** 
 Continuously monitor the competitive landscape, industry trends and market conditions to adapt strategies accordingly.
* **Customer Insights:** 
 Gather insights on customer needs and preferences to inform product development and customer service strategies



  





  





**Qualifications** 




  




* Proven Executive Leadership Experience 7\+ years in senior leadership, including P\&L ownership, preferably as a Country Manager, Managing Director, or General Manager. Track record of scaling a business, especially in fintech, regtech, digital taxation, or public\-sector B2B SaaS in the UAE.
* Knowledge of UAE Taxation \& Regulatory Landscape Expertise in with Tax policies and/or VAT compliance regimes. Demonstrated ability to navigate public\-private partnerships, government contracts or digital transformation initiatives with ministries or tax authorities.
* Digital Transformation \& Tech Fluency Strong understanding of digital platforms, APIs and SaaS business models. Familiarity with digital systems, e\-filing, or electronic invoicing frameworks is a plus.



  





  





  





 AED 40,000/\-

data.title: Head of Strategy, Business Planning & Digital Transformation
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary** 




 The Head of Strategy, PMO \& Digital Transformation \& Business Planning is responsible for leading the organization’s strategic direction, enterprise project governance, digital transformation initiatives, and business planning processes. This role ensures alignment between co
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary** 




 The Head of Strategy, PMO \& Digital Transformation \& Business Planning is responsible for leading the organization’s strategic direction, enterprise project governance, digital transformation initiatives, and business planning processes. This role ensures alignment between corporate strategy, project execution, and operational planning while leveraging IT systems and data analytics to drive performance and sustainable growth. The role plays a critical part in enhancing organizational effectiveness by integrating strategy, PMO governance, digital capabilities, and structured planning frameworks.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Corporate Strategy \& Business Planning** 



* Lead the development and execution of corporate strategy aligned with organizational goals.
* Drive annual business planning cycles including budgeting, forecasting, and long\-term planning.
* Translate strategic objectives into actionable initiatives and measurable outcomes.



**PMO \& Project Governance** 



* Establish and lead the Project Management Office (PMO) to ensure effective project governance and execution.
* Define and standardize project management methodologies, tools, and reporting frameworks.
* Oversee the project portfolio to ensure alignment with strategic priorities, timelines, and budgets.



**Digital Transformation \& IT Enablement** 



* Drive digital transformation initiatives across the organization to enhance efficiency and innovation.
* Oversee implementation, optimization, and utilization of ERP systems (preferably SAP).
* Collaborate with IT teams to improve system integration, automation, and digital capabilities.



**Business Planning \& Performance Management** 



* Lead performance management frameworks including KPIs, dashboards, and reporting mechanisms.
* Monitor organizational performance and provide insights to senior leadership for decision\-making.
* Ensure alignment between strategy, planning, and execution across all business units.



**Operations \& Business Support** 



* Oversee business support functions to ensure efficient and effective operations.
* Manage budgeting, cost optimization, and resource allocation across functions.
* Support operational teams with tools, systems, and administrative services required for execution.



**Data \& Analytics** 



* Establish data\-driven decision\-making practices through analytics and reporting tools.
* Develop dashboards and performance tracking systems to support leadership insights.



**Risk, Compliance \& Governance** 



* Ensure compliance with regulatory, legal, and industry requirements.
* Identify strategic and operational risks and implement mitigation strategies.
* Maintain governance frameworks across strategy, PMO, and planning functions.



**Stakeholder Management** 



* Engage with senior leadership, internal stakeholders, and external entities including government and regulatory bodies.
* Ensure effective communication and alignment across all levels of the organization.



**Continuous Improvement \& Innovation** 



* Identify opportunities for process optimization, efficiency improvements, and cost savings.
* Promote innovation through digital tools, analytics, and best practices.



**Business Continuity** 



* Develop and implement business continuity and emergency response plans.
* Ensure organizational resilience and readiness for disruptions.



**Job Knowledge \& Skills** 



* Strong expertise in
 **strategy development, business planning, and execution frameworks** 
 .
* Advanced knowledge of
 **PMO governance and project portfolio management** 
 .
* Solid background in
 **IT systems, ERP (SAP preferred), and digital transformation initiatives** 
 .
* Strong analytical and data\-driven decision\-making capabilities.
* Excellent leadership, stakeholder management, and communication skills.
* Proven ability to manage cross\-functional teams and drive organizational change.



  





**Experience and Qualification:** 



* Minimum
 **12\+ years of experience** 
 , including:
* 5\+ years in a
 **senior leadership or head\-level role**
* Bachelor’s degree in business administration, Information Technology, Engineering, or related field or master’s degree (MBA or equivalent) is preferred
* Proven experience in
 **Strategy, PMO, Digital Transformation, and Business Planning**
* GCC experience is a strong advantage

 Reports to: CEO UAE

 Role Mandate
 



  





 The Commercial Director will own the growth, profitability, and customer strategy for the packaging business. The mandate is clear: drive profitable gro
data.jd_text:
Role: Commercial Director
 



 Reports to: CEO UAE
 



 Industry: Plastic Packaging (B2B, FMCG\-focused)
 



  





 Role Mandate
 



  





 The Commercial Director will own the growth, profitability, and customer strategy for the packaging business. The mandate is clear: drive profitable growth, deepen key customer relationships, and build a world\-class commercial organization tightly aligned with manufacturing execution.
 



  





 This is a senior leadership role with full accountability for revenue, margins, pricing discipline, and commercial strategy, working closely with the plant leadership and regional stakeholders.
 



  





**Core Outcomes** 




  




* Consistent top\-line growth with margin improvement
* Strong, sticky relationships with key FMCG/food/dairy/pharma customers
* Disciplined pricing, forecasting, and pipeline management
* A high\-performing, accountable sales and commercial team
* Tight alignment between commercial commitments and plant execution



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





 Commercial Strategy \& Growth
 



  




* Define and execute the commercial strategy for packaging in the UAE.
* Identify growth segments, key accounts, and portfolio opportunities.
* Drive long\-term customer partnerships rather than transactional sales.



  





 Sales Leadership \& Key Accounts
 



  




* Lead and develop the national sales organization.
* Personally manage and anchor strategic/top\-tier customers.
* Lead complex negotiations, long\-term contracts, and pricing frameworks.
* Own sales planning, forecasting accuracy, and pipeline discipline.



  





 Pricing, Margins \& Profitability
 



  




* Full ownership of pricing strategy, contribution margins, and discount governance.
* Work closely with Finance and Operations on costing, mix improvement, and profitability.
* Ensure commercial decisions are data\-driven and margin\-focused.



  





 Cross\-Functional Execution
 



  




* Partner closely with Operations, Supply Chain, Planning, Quality, and NPD teams.
* Ensure sales commitments are executable and aligned with capacity and cost structures.
* Act as the single point of accountability between customers and the plant.



  





 Leadership \& Team Building
 



  




* Build, coach, and retain a strong commercial leadership bench.
* Drive a culture of accountability, performance, and customer obsession.
* Establish clear KPIs, cadence reviews, and succession plans.



  





**Candidate Profile** 




  





 Experience
 



  




* 15–18\+ years of B2B commercial experience in manufacturing.
* Strong preference for plastic packaging/plastics/FMCG/Personal Care.
* Proven track record of managing large key accounts and sales teams.
* Direct experience working with manufacturing plants (not pure trading).



  





 Capabilities
 



  




* Strong commercial judgment and negotiation skills.
* Deep understanding of pricing, margins, and cost structures.
* Strategic thinker with hands\-on execution capability.
* Comfortable operating at Board/CEO level and on the shop\-floor.



  





 Leadership Style
 



  




* Direct, data\-driven, and accountable.
* Customer\-centric but operationally grounded.
* Able to challenge, align, and execute across functions.



  





 Education
 



  




* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Engineering, or related field.
* MBA or equivalent preferred but not mandatory.

 The Chief of Staff (CoS) has
data.jd_text:
Oliver Wyman is looking to hire a Chief of Staff for the Defense and Security global taskforce.
   

  

**Job Overview:**
 The Business Impact Team (BIT) supports the growth of Oliver Wyman by seamlessly enabling business development and management activities.
   

  

 The Chief of Staff (CoS) has a central role in the strategic and commercial development, operation and community building of Marsh’s and Oliver Wyman’s Defense \& Security (D\&S) task force. The role provides support to the Oliver Wyman Defense \& Security Leadership, in managing the day\-to\-day affairs of the task force and is a go\-to\-person for all colleagues for task force\-related topics.
   

  

 The role translates Marsh’s and Oliver Wyman’s Defense \& Security vision into clear strategic initiatives, performance metrics, and operational plans. The role is centered on Oliver Wyman’s D\&S strategy roll\-out but also supports Oliver Wyman’s leadership in their steering of the collaboration across Marsh businesses in the roll\-out of Marsh’s D\&S growth acceleration strategy. The CoS acts as a thought partner to leadership, orchestrates cross\-functional collaboration with Finance, Business Development, Marketing, Legal, Talent, IT, Knowledge, and Events, and ensures that commercial performance, investments, and people decisions are tightly aligned to the business’s strategic goals. This is a high\-visibility, high\-impact role suited to someone who combines strategic thinking, rigorous analytical skills, strong stakeholder management, and a deep interest in defense, national security, and government\-related clients.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
**Marsh strategy through implementation:**
* Implement the Marsh Defense and Security Strategy Initiative
* Stand up security clearance and security office functions in geographies for Marsh
* Refine Marsh six priority go to market propositions
* Manage monthly Marsh Defense SteerCos and governance
* Support the establishment of related risk \& compliance governance at Marsh level


**Practice management (commercial, people, capability):**
**Commercial**
* Global account planning
* Performance against plan tracking
* New global ventures


**People**
* Global \& regional pyramid forecasting (supply vs demand)
* Global \& regional recruitment coordination (external \& internal)
* Support to objective setting and professional development


**Capability**
* Global partnerships
* New methods/tools


**Business development coordination:**
 RFP and proposal planning, resourcing and submission ownership
   

  

 Global proposition development — alongside Partners and Principals
   

  

**Knowledge management:**
 Global primer development — content and process
   

  

 Global credentials management (e.g. for future projects, proposals)
   

  

 Onboarding of new D\&S\-affiliated consultants — primers, L\&D buddy, etc
   

  

**Research:**
 Support to project teams on high\-importance topics, coordinating with Knowledge Services
   

  

**Thought Leadership:**
 Publication drafting — content role, alongside Partners/Principals
   

  

 Global campaign management — working with Marketing
   

  

 Events planning \& management — working with Marketing
   

  

**Experience Required:**
* The ideal candidate will possess 6\+ years of experience at a leading management consulting firm; experience with Defense \& Security or government clients is strongly preferred.
* Experience dealing with confidential and business critical issues


**Skills and Attributes:**
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English. Further languages helpful, but not required
* Ownership mentality with a strong impact focus
* Initiative and a can\-do attitude, with a willingness to embrace new challenges.
* Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail.
* Ability to manage a varied workload with conflicting priorities and meet deadlines.
* Strong judgment and problem\-solving skills, particularly under pressure and adhoc tasks
* Excellent communication skills, with the ability to effectively interact with colleagues of all levels
* Collaborative team player with a positive attitude and adaptability to change.
* Experience dealing with confidential and business critical issues
* Advanced proficiency in Excel and PowerPoint; knowledge of advanced data analysis is a plus


 To learn more, please follow us on Facebook, LinkedIn or Twitter: OliverWyman. www.oliverwyman.com/careers.
   

  

 Oliver Wyman is a business of Marsh (NYSE: MRSH), a global leader in risk, reinsurance and capital, people and investments, and management consulting, advising clients in 130 countries. With annual revenue of over $27 billion and more than 95,000 colleagues, Marsh helps build the confidence to thrive through the power of perspective. For more information, visit oliverwyman.com, or follow us on LinkedIn and X.
   

  

 Marsh is committed to embracing a diverse, inclusive and flexible work environment. We aim to attract and retain the best people and embrace diversity of age, background, disability, ethnic origin, family duties, nationality, parental status, personal or social status, political affiliation, race, religion and beliefs, sex/gender, skin color, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law.
   

  

 Marsh is committed to hybrid work, which includes the flexibility of working remotely and the collaboration, connections and professional development benefits of working together in the office. All Marsh colleagues are expected to be in their local office or working onsite with clients at least three days per week. Office\-based teams will identify at least one “anchor day” per week on which their full team will be together in person.
   

  

**R\_343458**

**Role Overview**
 DEAL Holdings is building a best
data.jd_text:
Location: Dubai, UAE
   

  

 Reports to: Financial Controller / Group CFO / Group CEO
   

  

 Department: Central Services \- Finance
   

  

 Industry: Hospitality / Retail / Wellness / Lifestyle
   

  

 Employment Type: Full\-time
   

  

**Role Overview**
 DEAL Holdings is building a best\-in\-class finance function to support a fast\-scaling, multi\-brand portfolio across hospitality, wellness, retail, and lifestyle sectors.
   

  

 We are hiring across two levels within the finance function:
   

  

 Head of Finance (strategic leadership role)
   

  

 Finance Manager (operational and build\-focused role)
   

  

 This role sits at the centre of the business during its setup and expansion phase, with responsibility extending beyond traditional finance into systems, structure, governance, and cross\-functional integration.
   

  

 You will work closely with PMO, Operations, and Central Services, supporting new openings, project delivery, and long\-term scale.
   

  

 We are open to candidates at different levels of seniority, provided they bring strong SME experience, system implementation capability, and hands\-on execution.
   

  

 This is a build\-and\-lead finance role, combining:
   

  

* Financial operations and reporting
* Department setup and structure design
* Systems implementation and integration
* Project finance and PMO coordination
* Commercial and operational support
* Depending on experience, you will either:


 Lead and shape the finance function at group level, or dive execution, setup, and day\-to\-day operations within a growing structure.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities** 
**10\. Business Partnering** 
**B. Pre\-Opening \& Launch Support** 
**C. Scale\-Up \& Expansion**
* Finance Operations \& Control
* Oversee full accounting cycle: GL, AP/AR, payroll, treasury, reconciliations
* Lead month\-end, quarter\-end, and year\-end close across multiple entities
* Prepare consolidated financials and management reporting
* Implement and enforce financial controls, approval matrices, and reporting standards
* Budgeting, Planning \& Commercial Support
* Lead budgeting, forecasting, and reforecast cycles
* Develop financial models, feasibility studies, and scenario planning for new concepts
* Conduct variance analysis and provide actionable insights
* Support pricing, menu engineering, and cost optimisation across F\&B operations
* Tax, Compliance \& Governance
* Ensure compliance with UAE VAT, corporate tax, ESR, and IFRS
* Manage audits, filings, and regulatory requirements
* Establish internal controls, SOPs, and governance frameworks across all entities
* Cash Flow, Treasury \& Banking
* Oversee group\-wide cash flow planning and working capital management
* Lead setup and management of bank accounts across multiple entities
* Establish payment processes, signatory structures, and banking mandates
* Manage relationships with banks, lenders, and financial institutions
* Implement robust cash control and liquidity frameworks
* ERP, POS \& Financial Systems
* Lead implementation and optimisation of ERP and financial systems
* Ensure full integration across POS, inventory, procurement, and accounting systems
* Develop scalable reporting tools and dashboards
* Train teams on systems and financial processes
* Procurement, Purchasing \& Cost Control Oversight
* Oversee governance across procurement and purchasing functions
* Implement supplier onboarding, approval hierarchies, and purchasing controls
* Ensure integration between procurement, inventory, and finance systems
* Monitor supplier terms, pricing, and cost efficiency across all units
* Support margin optimisation and operational cost control
* Accounting Structure \& Financial Framework Setup
* Design and implement the full accountancy structure across all entities
* Develop and standardise the Chart of Accounts
* Establish reporting templates, consolidation frameworks, and intercompany structures
* Ensure scalability for multi\-brand and multi\-entity expansion
* Administration, PRO \& Corporate Structuring Oversight
* Provide financial oversight across administration and PRO functions
* Support company formation, trade licences, regulatory registrations, and renewals
* Ensure alignment between corporate structuring, licensing, and financial setup
* Track and manage costs related to government fees, licences, and compliance
* PMO Liaison \& Project Finance / Controls
* Work closely with the PMO and Project Delivery teams on all active developments
* Oversee financial management of projects, including budget tracking and cost control
* Support tender processes, bid evaluations, and commercial reviews
* Establish and manage project payment processes, including certifications and approvals
* Control financial documentation related to projects, contracts, and variations
* Monitor project cash flow, capex spend, and financial risk
* Ensure alignment between project delivery timelines and financial reporting
* Partner with Operations, PMO, HR, Procurement, and Brand teams
* Provide P\&L oversight and performance analysis across outlets and concepts
* Support new openings, commercial decisions, and strategic initiatives
* Evaluate investments, JV structures, and expansion opportunities
* Finance Function Setup \& Scale
* Foundation Phase
* Build finance department structure, roles, and reporting lines
* Establish SOPs, workflows, and approval frameworks
* Set up financial systems, banking structures, and reporting templates
* Recruit, onboard, and train finance and admin teams
* Lead financial setup for new outlets (costing, POS setup, reporting structures)
* Implement outlet\-level reporting from day one
* Support stocktakes, inventory controls, and operational stabilisation
* Prepare finance function for multi\-brand, multi\-entity growth
* Standardise reporting, controls, and cost structures across all units
* Support long\-term strategic planning and regional expansion


**Candidate Profile**
 We are intentionally open to both senior and mid\-level candidates, but the following is essential:
   

  

* Strong experience in SME or high\-growth environments
* Background in hospitality, F\&B, retail, or multi\-unit operations
* Proven ability to build systems, structures, and teams from scratch
* Hands\-on experience with ERP implementation and process design
* Experience working with PMO and project\-driven environments
* Strong understanding of UAE financial regulations and compliance frameworks
* Commercially minded with strong attention to detail and ownership


**Experience Guidelines**
 Finance Manager: 7\-10 years experience
   

  

 Head of Finance: 10\+ years with leadership and build experience
   

  

**Qualifications:**
 Degree in Finance / Accounting
   

  

 ACCA / CPA / CA preferred
   

  

**Why This Role**
* Opportunity to build a finance function from the ground up
* Direct involvement in projects, openings, and expansion strategy
* Exposure to a diversified, multi\-brand platform
* High level of ownership, autonomy, and impact


**Candidate Requirements**
* Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or related field; ACCA / CPA / CA preferred.
* 7–10 years of multi\-entity finance experience, ideally within hospitality, F\&B, retail, or lifestyle sectors.
* Strong experience in department setup, ERP implementation, and pre\-opening finance.
* Deep understanding of UAE VAT, corporate tax, IFRS, WPS, and governance frameworks.
* Proven leadership experience managing finance teams and cross\-functional stakeholders.
* High proficiency in Excel and financial modelling.
* Ability to work in fast\-paced environments with strong ownership and accuracy.
* Excellent communication, analytical, and problem\-solving skills.

data.title: Business Manager
data.raw_snippet:
**AED 20,000 to 25,000 Plus Benefits** 




  





 Charterhouse are currently supporting a family group client who are currently in the process of looking to recruit a Business Manager to sit within a corporate\-level role with oversight across a diversified portfolio of operations and market cove
data.jd_text:
**AED 20,000 to 25,000 Plus Benefits** 




  





 Charterhouse are currently supporting a family group client who are currently in the process of looking to recruit a Business Manager to sit within a corporate\-level role with oversight across a diversified portfolio of operations and market coverage.
 



  





 This Business Manager will become a critical “right hand” to the Chairman \& CEO across a range of disciplines linking to strategic support \& review, KPI \& performance analysis, financial reporting and governance control. These functional responsibilities shall be designed to ensure strong accountability and business measurement, across the organisation, to ensure continuity of operations, optimization of processes and a commercial review spanning both internal entities and external partnerships/ vendors.
 



  





 The role will also take responsibilities across areas of event management, logistics\-support whilst ensuring strong and binding corporate policies are designed and rolled out in conjunction with HR. In conjunction and at an operational level, the Business Manager will also work in a cross\-department role to ensure accurate and standardized reporting mechanisms and tools; to deliver both performance\-based reporting and KPI analysis \& commentary.
 



  





 The client will look to recruit a finance and operations professional whom is able to display commercial acumen, business support and strategic vision across a group of company structure and at an operational level, exposure to the real estate and investment\-related market sector. The successful candidate shall be required to demonstrate a track record within the UAE market, combined with an ability to manage and communicate with stakeholders, at all levels cross\-department, to ensure a strong and robust “value add” within the job role.
 



  





 The ideal candidate shall also be required to deliver detailed analytical capabilities, with a gearing towards Excel\-based tools, for presentations and MIS\-based reporting to meet any strategic financial reviews at both a corporate and project level. The candidate shall also be required to understand areas of HR policy, operational procedure and corporate governance in the support of teams/management\-in\-place across the existing organizational structure.

**4\. 经营分析与决策支持** 



* 定期输出经营分析报告，识别业务机会与风险

**6\. 跨部门协同** 



* 协同销售、服务、财务及人力资源等职能，推动业务高效运转
* 对接区域总部，推动各项管理要求在当地落地



**任职要求** 



* 本科及以上学历，工程类或商科相关专业优先

* 具备团队管理经验及较强的业务推动能力
* 英语可作为工作语言



  





**Job Overview** 




 As the core business partner of the country manager, responsible for collaboratively driving business development and organizational management in the country, focusing on achieving sales targets, team building, and implementing operational regulations, to ensure the effective realization of the country's overall business objectives.
 



**Main Responsibilities** 




**1\. Advancement of business objectives** 



* Collaboratively formulate and drive the implementation of annual/quarterly/monthly sales targets
* Follow up on the implementation of goals of each business unit and drive the progress of key projects
* Participate in the business advancement of key customers and major projects to ensure the rhythm of sales and payment collection



**2\. Team Management and Organization Development** 



* Assist in managing the sales team and business leaders to enhance the overall combat effectiveness of the team
* Promote the implementation and continuous optimization of the Performance Management system
* Participate in the recruitment of key jobs and the construction of talent echelon, and support the improvement of organizational capabilities



**3\. Market and Customer Management** 



* Maintain key customer relationships and expand core market resources
* Analyze market dynamics and competitive environment to support business strategies
* Support the construction of the channel system and partner management



**4\. Business Analysis and Decision Support** 



* Regularly produce business analysis reports to identify business opportunities and risks
* Provide data support and strategic advice to country managers to improve decision\-making quality



**5\. Operations and Compliance Management** 



* Ensure that business operations comply with company policies and local laws and regulations
* Supervise the execution of key business processes and control operational and compliance risks



**6\. XFN Collaboration** 



* Collaborate with functions such as sales, service, finance, and human resources to drive efficient business operations
* Connect with the regional headquarters to promote the implementation of various management requirements locally



**Job Requirements** 



* Bachelor's degree or above, with majors in engineering or business\-related fields preferred
* More than 8 years of relevant work experience, with a background in the heavy machinery industry preferred
* Has team management experience and strong business promotion capabilities
* English can be used as a working language



  





 This role is only for Chinese.

data.title: Head of Operations
data.raw_snippet:
**Head of Travel Operations \| High\-Growth Travel Tech \| Dubai or Remote (with Regional Travel)** 




  





 Lead the operational heart of a premier travel ecosystem, scaling seamless experiences for millions of users across the Middle East.
 



  





  





**The Opportunity** 




 Our Cl
data.jd_text:
**Head of Travel Operations \| High\-Growth Travel Tech \| Dubai or Remote (with Regional Travel)** 




  





 Lead the operational heart of a premier travel ecosystem, scaling seamless experiences for millions of users across the Middle East.
 



  





  





**The Opportunity** 




 Our Client is a high\-growth travel mini\-app integrated into a major digital ecosystem. They are redefining how millions of travellers across the region discover and book flights, hotels, and digital services. As we scale our footprint and onboard major corporate clients, we are looking for a world\-class Head of Travel Operations to lead our mission\-critical delivery functions.
 



 This is a high\-impact leadership role designed for a "builder" who thrives at the intersection of traditional travel expertise and modern startup agility. You will bridge the gap between legacy industry workflows and our digital\-first model, ensuring our operational backbone is as innovative as our technology.
 



 Reporting to the executive team, you will stabilize, scale, and professionalize our travel operations. You aren't just managing a team; you are protecting our reputation, nurturing critical supplier relationships, and architecting an operational playbook that can support our next phase of explosive growth.
 



  





  





 3️⃣
 **What You’ll Be Doing** 




  




* **Lead Regional Operations:** 
 Oversee the daily activities of travel consultants, ensuring peak productivity and service excellence.
* **Strengthen Partnerships:** 
 Act as the primary interface for key suppliers and airlines, managing high\-stakes communication with professional precision.
* **Drive Tech Adoption:** 
 Bridge the gap between GDS systems (Amadeus/Travelport) and our proprietary tech stack to automate and optimize workflows.
* **Coach \& Mentor:** 
 Foster a supportive, high\-performance culture by providing "over\-the\-shoulder" coaching and technical guidance.
* **Enforce Quality Standards:** 
 Implement and refine the Travel Operations Playbook, ensuring strict adherence to SOPs and Global Travel Policies.
* **Manage Escalations:** 
 Serve as the final point of resolution for complex flight disruptions, reissues, and high\-priority customer issues.
* **Orchestrate Projects:** 
 Collaborate across departments to lead strategic initiatives that improve conversion rates and reduce error\-related losses.
* **Monitor Performance:** 
 Use a 360\-degree view of team metrics to drive continuous improvement in response times and customer satisfaction.



  





  





 4️⃣
 **What They’re Looking For** 




  





**Essential** 



* **Linguistic Mastery:** 
 Native\-level Arabic and professional English fluency are non\-negotiable for this regional leadership role.
* **OTA Expertise:** 
 Significant experience within a high\-volume Online Travel Agency (OTA) or a modern TMC (e.g., Expedia, Booking.com, Almosafer).
* **GDS Mastery:** 
 Expert\-level proficiency in Amadeus or Travelport, including complex ticketing, reissuance, and EMD processing.
* **Startup DNA:** 
 Experience in an early\-stage startup environment (first 100 employees) with a solution\-oriented, "whatever\-it\-takes" mindset.
* **Technical Savvy:** 
 Deep familiarity with IRIX, CRM platforms (like Freshdesk), and back\-office admin panels.
* **Availability:** 
 Willingness to travel to Iraq for one week per month to provide on\-ground leadership (subject to regional travel guidelines).



  





  





**Nice to Have** 




  




* Experience managing B2B reseller workflows and corporate travel policies.
* A background in managing teams of 50\+ agents during periods of rapid scale.



  





  





 5️⃣
 **Why Join?** 




  





 This is an invitation to own the operational strategy of a platform that is actively shaping the future of travel in the Middle East.
 



  




* **Impact:** 
 You will have the autonomy to build and refine processes from the ground up, directly influencing our growth trajectory.
* **Growth:** 
 We are scaling fast; your career path evolves as the platform expands into new markets and services.
* **Culture:** 
 Join a modern, high\-performance brand that values responsiveness, transparency, and a supportive coaching style.
* **Flexibility:** 
 We offer a hybrid or remote\-first setup (depending on location) with the necessary travel to stay connected to our core operations.



  





  





 We believe that diverse perspectives fuel the innovation required to change an industry. If you have the technical travel expertise and the leadership drive we’re looking for, but don’t necessarily check every single box, we still encourage you to apply. We value capability, mindset, and the unique value you bring to the table.
