data.title: Chief Operating Officer - Dubai
data.raw_snippet:
**Who We Are**
 At OKX, we believe that the future will be reshaped by crypto, and ultimately contribute to every individual's freedom. OKX is a leading crypto exchange, and the developer of OKX Wallet, giving millions access to crypto trading and decentralized crypto applications (dApps). OKX is al
data.jd_text:
**Who We Are**
 At OKX, we believe that the future will be reshaped by crypto, and ultimately contribute to every individual's freedom. OKX is a leading crypto exchange, and the developer of OKX Wallet, giving millions access to crypto trading and decentralized crypto applications (dApps). OKX is also a trusted brand by hundreds of large institutions seeking access to crypto markets. We are safe and reliable, backed by our Proof of Reserves. Across our multiple offices globally, we are united by our core principles:
 *We Before Me* 
 ,
 *Do the Right Thing* 
 , and
 *Get Things Done* 
 . These shared values drive our culture, shape our processes, and foster a friendly, rewarding, and diverse environment for every OK\-er. OKX is part of OKG, a group that brings the value of Blockchain to users around the world, through our leading products OKX, OKX Wallet, OKLink and more.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We are seeking a highly experienced and strategic Chief Operating Officer (COO) to lead the operational and commercial functions of our UAE Business. This role will oversee the full operational lifecycle—including Sales, Trading, Customer Operations, and Business Support ensuring our business runs efficiently, compliantly, and in alignment with regulatory requirements. The COO will act as a key partner to the regional CEO and global leadership, driving growth, operational excellence, and cross\-functional collaboration across the organization.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
**Executive Operations \& Strategy**
* Oversee day\-to\-day business and commercial operations for the UAE\-regulated entity across Sales, Trading, and Operations.
* Implement scalable, efficient operational systems that align with global and regional business objectives.
* Track and report key KPIs across commercial performance, operational efficiency, customer satisfaction, and risk.
* Partner with the CEO of Middle East and collaborate closely with global leadership to shape and execute strategic initiatives.


**Sales, Trading \& Operational Oversight**
* Provide operational leadership across the sales processes, onboarding, and customer lifecycle management.
* Oversee trading operations, ensuring effective controls, timely issue escalation, and operational resilience.
* Optimize operational support for customer operations and post\-trade processes.
* Support commercial strategy through data\-driven insights, operational improvements, and performance management.


**Product Strategy \&** 
**Localization**
* Partner with global Product, Engineering, and Ops teams to tailor products for the UAE market.
* Ensure operational readiness and internal alignment for new product launches.
* Lead cross\-functional evaluations to confirm compliance with UAE regulatory standards.


**Compliance \& Risk Management**
* Embed UAE regulatory standards into operational workflows
* Act as the first line of defense, ensuring operational activities meet regulatory requirements.
* Maintain risk registers, lead incident reviews, and ensure internal governance discipline.
* Work closely with Legal, Compliance, and Risk teams to support regulatory reporting, audits, and supervisory engagement.


**Performance \& Metrics Monitoring**
* Build and monitor KPIs across commercial, operational, and risk domains.
* Produce regular performance reports for senior management and regulatory stakeholders.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance operational effectiveness.


**Cross\-Functional Collaboration**
* Work closely with Product, Engineering, Compliance, Legal, Marketing, Customer Ops, Sales, and Trading teams.
* Foster a culture of transparency, accountability, and high performance.


**What We Look For**
* Bachelor’s degree in Business, Finance, Economics, or related field; MBA preferred.
* 10\+ years of operational leadership within regulated financial services, fintech, trading, brokerage, or crypto.
* Strong experience operating in a similar role in a regulated UAE financial/fintech institution (SCA/VARA/FSRA/DFSA preferred).
* Proven ability to lead cross\-functional teams and develop scalable operational frameworks.
* Strong commercial acumen with demonstrated involvement in Sales and Trading operations.
* Exceptional leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to thrive in dynamic, high\-growth environments.


**What Will Make You Stand Out**
* Experience in a regulated UAE financial institution, or equivalent international markets..
* Strong understanding of blockchain, digital assets, trading infrastructure, and market structure.
* Demonstrated success in scaling operations and driving regulatory compliance transformation.
* Entrepreneurial mindset with passion for innovation and operational excellence.


**Perks \& Benefits**
* Competitive total compensation package
* L\&D programs and Education subsidy for employees' growth and development
* Various team building programs and company events
* Wellness and meal allowances
* Comprehensive healthcare schemes for employees and dependants
* More that we love to tell you along the process!


**Notice**
 All official OKX vacancies are published on this website. While roles may appear on selected third\-party platforms from time to time, information on other sites may be inaccurate or outdated.
 **If in doubt, please apply directly through our official careers website.**
 Information collected and processed as part of the recruitment process of any job application you choose to submit is subject to OKX's Candidate Privacy Notice.

data.title: KSA B&I Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Location \-** 
 Al Khobar/Riyadh
   

  

**Role Overview**
 The KSA Buildings \& Infrastructure (B\&I) Director is responsible for leading, growing, and elevating Bureau Veritas’ B\&I portfolio across the region. This strategic leadership role oversees the full product line performance—shaping th
data.jd_text:
**Location \-** 
 Al Khobar/Riyadh
   

  

**Role Overview**
 The KSA Buildings \& Infrastructure (B\&I) Director is responsible for leading, growing, and elevating Bureau Veritas’ B\&I portfolio across the region. This strategic leadership role oversees the full product line performance—shaping the long‑term vision, delivering the annual P\&L, and ensuring excellence across all operations.
   

  

 The Director drives topline and gross margin delivery in close partnership with regional leadership, steering commercial strategy, optimizing delivery models, and ensuring high‑quality, efficient, and client‑centric execution. The role leads multidisciplinary teams across
 **Asset Management, Infrastructure Technical Inspections, Project \& Program Management, Environmental Services, and Commissioning** 
 , ensuring cohesive, high‑value solutions for clients.
   

  

 The Director also strengthens BV’s market presence across major sectors including
 **Hospitality, Entertainment, Tourism, Mega Projects, Developers, Contractors, Government Authorities, Urban Development, Smart Cities, Transportation Infrastructure, and Aviation** 
 , building trusted relationships and expanding BV’s impact on safe, sustainable, and resilient built environments.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Develop and implement the regional B\&I growth strategy aligned with regional and global Product Line priorities.
* Drive portfolio expansion, commercial performance, and market penetration across all B\&I service domains.
* Lead the annual budgeting cycle and manage end‑to‑end P\&L accountability for revenue, sales, and gross margin.
* Ensure delivery quality in line with BV’s Operational Excellence standards and performance KPIs.
* Oversee regional commercial activities and support major pursuits, tenders, and key account development.
* Build and maintain strategic relationships with key customers across priority sectors.
* Lead operational governance through structured meetings, reviews, and performance follow‑up.
* Coach and develop teams, drive a high‑performance culture, and lead recruitment and performance assessments.
* Collaborate with Product Line and Area leadership to build a strong B\&I talent pipeline.
* Uphold BV’s Core Values, Code of Ethics, and the 3 Absolutes.
* Ensure rigorous compliance with BV procedures for technical governance, risk, and quality.


**Core Competencies**
**Leadership \& Strategy**
* Strategic thinker with strong decision‑making, accountability, and change‑leadership capability.
* Effective people leader who empowers teams and navigates matrix environments with ease.


**Commercial \& Client Excellence**
* Strong commercial acumen and ability to drive growth across diverse B\&I markets, including Transportation Infrastructure and Aviation.
* Skilled at long‑term client relationship development and key account management.


**Operational Excellence**
* Proven ability to ensure consistent quality, compliance, and operational performance.
* Experience managing complex, multi‑disciplinary programs.


**Technical \& Market Insight**
* Solid understanding of B\&I service lines including inspections, commissioning, and asset management.
* Strong knowledge of regional standards, regulations, and industry dynamics across built‑environment and infrastructure sectors.


**Personal Attributes**
* High integrity, resilient, client‑centric, with strong communication and stakeholder influence.

data.title: Country Manager - Saudi Arabia (Riyadh)
data.raw_snippet:
We are seeking an entrepreneurial Country Manager to establish and scale our operations in Saudi Arabia. Based in Riyadh, you will build and lead the local organization, drive market entry and growth, and develop strategic partnerships.
   

  

 You will own all in\-country activities, including op
data.jd_text:
We are seeking an entrepreneurial Country Manager to establish and scale our operations in Saudi Arabia. Based in Riyadh, you will build and lead the local organization, drive market entry and growth, and develop strategic partnerships.
   

  

 You will own all in\-country activities, including operations, commercial performance, and stakeholder engagement, while working closely with global teams and following central playbooks, policies, and best practices.
   

  

****Who are we?****
 At Verne, we're building an ecosystem to progress our society through a journey of curiosity and innovation. Named in honor of Jules Verne "the man who invented the future,". We are the first European solution for autonomous journeys. We adopt an integrated approach, including vehicle design, infrastructure development, and the full digital experience.
   

  

**As a growing startup, we thrive on curiosity, innovation, and bold ideas. If you’re ready to make your mark in a fast\-paced, dynamic environment, this could be the role for you.**
****What will you do?****
 Market Execution \& Growth
   

  

* Execute the go\-to\-market strategy, adapting global frameworks to local conditions.
* Drive activation of priority locations, partners, and customer segments.
* Own delivery against KPIs and performance targets.


 Operations
   

  

* Establish and scale local operations, including team, structure, and infrastructure.
* Implement processes and governance aligned with central playbooks.
* Ensure high standards of safety, quality, and operational performance.


 Government \& Stakeholder Engagement
   

  

* Build and manage relationships with government entities, regulators, and public stakeholders.
* Represent the company in regulatory and operational discussions, with support from central teams.


 Partnerships \& Commercial
   

  

* Develop and manage partnerships supporting deployment and growth.
* Own country P\&L and drive revenue and operational performance.


 Leadership \& Collaboration
   

  

* Hire and lead a high\-performing local team.
* Collaborate closely with global teams to ensure alignment and execution.


 Representation
   

  

* Represent the company with partners, stakeholders, and at industry events.
* Build strong local presence and brand credibility.


****What do you need to succeed?****
* Proven experience building and scaling operations in Saudi Arabia is strongly preferred (mobility, tech, infrastructure or similarly complex sectors).
* Strong track record in developing and managing strategic partnerships.
* Experience working with government stakeholders or within regulated environments.
* P\&L ownership and operational team leadership experience.
* Broader GCC experience is a plus.
* Fluent in English and Arabic.


 Key Competencies
   

  

* Execution\-driven and entrepreneurial.
* Strong stakeholder management.
* Comfortable in complex regulatory environments.
* Strategic with strong operational focus.
* Strong leadership and problem\-solving skills.


 What’s In It For You?Joining Verne Means Becoming Part Of a Team Shaping The Future Of Autonomous Mobility. Here’s What We Offer
   

  

* The chance to collaborate with experts from 20\+ industries.
* Ownership of your projects, with the freedom to innovate and take initiative.
* A culture of transparency, feedback, and open communication.
* Comprehensive financial and wellbeing support designed to meet diverse needs.
* The excitement of working in a fast\-growing startup where your ideas truly matter.


****How can you apply?****
 If this role and our mission resonate with you, hit the
 *Apply* 
 button! We typically review applications within 3\-4 business days, but since we want to give each one the attention it deserves, please allow a little extra time if needed. Once we've had a chance to fully evaluate your submission, we’ll reach out with details about the next steps.
   

  

**If Shortlisted, Here’s What To Expect**
* An initial HR interview focused on culture fit.
* A technical interview with the Hiring Manager.
* A final interview with C\-level.


****Not sure if this role is the right fit?****
 We’re always looking for creators who challenge the status quo and aren’t afraid to take the lead. If that’s you, explore our story \- we might have other opportunities that spark your interest.
   

  

*Verne (Project 3 Mobility) is a company comprised of people with different qualities and backgrounds, because we believe our differences make us stronger. That is why we evaluate qualified applicants fairly and equally, without regard to race, colour, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, veteran status, age, familial status, and other legally protected characteristics. All applications will be considered in accordance with the regulations of personal data protection.*

data.title: EPMO Director
data.raw_snippet:
**Company Description** 




 Thameen Real Estate is a Saudi\-based company specializing in delivering high\-quality projects across residential, commercial, hospitality, and mixed\-use sectors. With its expertise in managing the entire development journey, Thameen focuses on providing value\-driven
data.jd_text:
**Company Description** 




 Thameen Real Estate is a Saudi\-based company specializing in delivering high\-quality projects across residential, commercial, hospitality, and mixed\-use sectors. With its expertise in managing the entire development journey, Thameen focuses on providing value\-driven developments with an emphasis on quality, feasibility, and sustainable, long\-term value creation. The company is committed to shaping landmark projects that cater to modern lifestyles and business needs in Saudi Arabia.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 Thameen is seeking an experienced and highly capable EPMO Director to lead the Enterprise Project Management Office function across our real estate development portfolio. The role is responsible for establishing and maintaining strong project governance, standardizing controls and reporting, driving stage\-gate compliance, and ensuring effective coordination across development, design, delivery, and support functions.
 



 The EPMO Director will play a critical role in improving visibility, accountability, consistency, and decision\-making across projects, while enabling successful execution from early\-stage feasibility through handover and close\-out.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Lead and manage the Enterprise PMO function across the company’s development portfolio.
* Establish and continuously improve project governance frameworks, policies, procedures, templates, and controls.
* Oversee project planning, scheduling, reporting, risk management, issue escalation, and performance tracking across all active projects.
* Ensure compliance with Thameen’s development stage\-gate process and control framework across the full project lifecycle.
* Standardize portfolio reporting and provide executive\-level dashboards to support decision\-making by senior management.
* Monitor project health in terms of schedule, cost, quality, risk, and resource utilization.
* Drive cross\-functional coordination between Development Management, Design \& Studies, Delivery, Projects Control, Documents Control, Commercial, Technical, and other business units.
* Support project prioritization, resource planning, and alignment of projects with strategic objectives.
* Review and challenge project baselines, recovery plans, milestones, and key assumptions.
* Lead portfolio\-level risk identification and mitigation, ensuring timely escalation of critical issues.
* Promote a culture of accountability, transparency, performance management, and continuous improvement.
* Support the implementation and optimization of digital PMO tools, reporting systems, and document control practices.
* Mentor and develop PMO, planning, project controls, and reporting teams to build a high\-performing function.
* Ensure lessons learned are captured and embedded into future projects and governance practices.
* Strong analytical mindset with the ability to convert project data into clear management insights and actions.
* Fluency in English is required; Arabic is highly preferred.



  





**Preferred Profile** 



* Experience in Saudi Arabia or GCC real estate development environment.
* Familiarity with governance structures in owner/developer organizations rather than contractor\-only environments.
* Ability to operate strategically while maintaining strong execution discipline and attention to detail.
* Experience working in fast\-growing organizations building systems, structure, and operational maturity.



  





**What Success Looks Like in This Role** 



* Clear project governance is applied consistently across the portfolio.
* Executive management has accurate, timely, and decision\-oriented reporting.
* Projects are monitored proactively with stronger control over schedule, cost, risk, and deliverables.
* Stage\-gate compliance and cross\-functional coordination improve significantly.
* The EPMO becomes a value\-adding business function, not only an administrative reporting unit.

data.title: Project Controls Director
data.raw_snippet:
In a world of possibilities, pursue one with endless opportunities. Imagine Next!
   

  

 At Parsons, you can imagine a career where you thrive, work with exceptional people, and be yourself. Guided by our leadership vision of valuing people, embracing agility, and fostering growth, we cultivate a
data.jd_text:
In a world of possibilities, pursue one with endless opportunities. Imagine Next!
   

  

 At Parsons, you can imagine a career where you thrive, work with exceptional people, and be yourself. Guided by our leadership vision of valuing people, embracing agility, and fostering growth, we cultivate an innovative culture that empowers you to achieve your full potential. Unleash your talent and redefine what’s possible.
   

  

**Job Description**
 Parsons is looking for an amazingly talented
 **Project Controls Director** 
 to join our team!
   

  

 The Project Controls Director will lead all aspects of cost, schedule, risk, and change management across a complex development program. This role requires extensive experience, strong leadership capabilities, and deep technical knowledge of project controls best practices.
   

  

 The Director will ensure robust governance, accurate forecasting, transparent reporting, and high\-performance execution to support successful project delivery while maintaining schedule certainty and financial control.
   

  

 What You'll Be Doing;
   

  

* Establish, manage, and enforce the overall project controls strategy, systems, procedures, and reporting frameworks across the program.
* Develop project control plans, governance models, and performance measurement systems aligned with client and program objectives.
* Ensure integration of cost, schedule, risk, and change management across all phases of the project lifecycle.
* Implement best practices, policies, and standards for project controls across all project packages and delivery teams.
* Oversee the preparation, review, and approval of the integrated master schedule, ensuring alignment across engineering, procurement, construction, commissioning, and handover activities.
* Monitor schedule progress and performance, identifying delays, potential impacts, and mitigation strategies.
* Evaluate contractor schedules to ensure compliance with contractual obligations and project milestones.
* Implement advanced scheduling methodologies such as critical path analysis, schedule risk assessment, and resource\-loaded scheduling.
* Provide schedule forecasts and recovery strategies to support proactive project management.
* Direct all cost engineering functions including cost estimating, cost control, cash flow forecasting, and budget monitoring.
* Establish project cost baselines and ensure accurate tracking of expenditures against approved budgets.
* Lead monthly cost reporting, forecasting, and variance analysis to ensure financial transparency and control.
* Analyze cost trends and recommend corrective actions to maintain financial performance.
* Ensure alignment with performance measurement frameworks such as Earned Value Management (EVM).
* Lead the development and implementation of comprehensive project risk management frameworks.
* Facilitate risk identification workshops, qualitative and quantitative risk assessments, and mitigation planning.
* Oversee schedule and cost risk modeling to support decision\-making and contingency allocation.
* Monitor risk exposure, mitigation effectiveness, and escalation of critical risks to senior leadership.
* Maintain an active risk register and ensure proactive management of project uncertainties.
* Direct the management of project changes and variations to ensure proper evaluation, documentation, and integration into project baselines.
* Establish and maintain structured change control processes and governance.
* Facilitate Change Control Board (CCB) meetings and ensure transparent decision\-making.
* Collaborate with commercial and contract teams in evaluating claims, entitlement assessments, and negotiation strategies.
* Ensure accurate tracking of project trends, early warning notices, and potential claims exposure.
* Oversee preparation of executive\-level reports, dashboards, and key performance indicators (KPIs).
* Ensure consistent, transparent, and timely reporting of project performance, risks, and opportunities.
* Present complex project performance data in clear and actionable formats for executive leadership and stakeholders.
* Provide strategic insights to support informed decision\-making at program level.
* Lead the evaluation, implementation, and optimization of project controls systems and digital platforms.
* Promote continuous improvement through automation, advanced analytics, and performance monitoring tools.
* Ensure data accuracy, consistency, and integrity across all project controls systems.
* Establish standardized processes and documentation practices to maintain audit readiness.
* Introduce innovative technologies and methodologies to enhance forecasting accuracy and reporting efficiency.
* Lead and manage a multidisciplinary project controls team including planners, schedulers, cost engineers, risk specialists, and reporting analysts.
* Build and maintain high\-performing teams focused on collaboration, accountability, and technical excellence.
* Conduct performance evaluations and support professional development and training initiatives.
* Foster a culture of data accuracy, continuous improvement, and operational discipline.
* Collaborate closely with engineering, construction, procurement, contracts, finance, and operational teams to ensure alignment across the project lifecycle.
* Coordinate with senior stakeholders, project partners, contractors, and consultants.
* Proactively identify and resolve project issues to ensure seamless integration of project controls strategies.
* Ensure effective cross\-functional communication and coordination across all project delivery teams.


 What Required Skills You'll Bring;
   

  

* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Construction Management, Project Management, or a related discipline.
* Master’s degree in Project Management, Engineering, or Business Administration is preferred.
* Minimum 25 years of experience in project controls within major capital projects.
* At least 15 years in senior leadership roles managing large project controls teams.
* Extensive experience in cost control, planning \& scheduling, risk management, and performance reporting.
* Demonstrated experience managing complex, multi\-contractor programs with significant budgets.
* Expert proficiency in Primavera P6, cost management systems, and project performance analytics tools.
* Strong understanding of project lifecycle management, construction sequencing, and design\-development processes.
* Proven leadership capabilities managing large multidisciplinary teams.
* Advanced analytical and problem\-solving skills with strong attention to detail.
* Excellent organizational and decision\-making abilities.
* Strong communication and presentation skills, particularly in executive\-level reporting.
* Comprehensive understanding of contract management, procurement processes, and claims evaluation.
* Professional certifications such as PMP, PSP, CCP, EVP, PMI\-SP, RMP, or equivalent.
* Experience leading project controls functions on large and complex programs.
* Expertise in digital project controls platforms and data visualization tools such as Power BI or Tableau.
* Experience working under international contract frameworks such as FIDIC.
* Strong business acumen with the ability to interpret project performance data and guide strategic decisions.
* Ability to operate effectively in fast\-paced, high\-pressure environments with multiple stakeholders.


 Parsons equally employs representation at all job levels no matter the race, color, religion, sex (including pregnancy), national origin, age, disability or genetic information.
   

  

 We truly invest and care about our employee’s wellbeing and provide endless growth opportunities as the sky is the limit, so aim for the stars! Imagine next and join the Parsons quest—APPLY TODAY!
   

  

 Parsons is aware of fraudulent recruitment practices. To learn more about recruitment fraud and how to report it, please refer to https://www.parsons.com/fraudulent\-recruitment/.

data.jd_text:
**Commercial Director**
 Doha Golf Club – Doha, Qatar
   

  

**Position Overview**
 The Commercial Director is responsible for leading the commercial strategy and revenue growth of Doha Golf Club by maximizing the value of its assets, partnerships, and customerexperience offerings. The role will oversee all revenue generating functions including membership, hospitality, events, partnerships, sponsorships, retail, and commercial leasing, while supporting the club’s strategic transformation into a multi\-sport, lifestyle, and tourism destination operating year\-round.
   

  

 The Commercial Director will work closely with the General Manager, Board, and key stakeholders to drive sustainable financial performance, expand the club’s market reach, and position Doha Golf Club as a premier destination for sports, leisure, and community engagement in Qatar.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Commercial Strategy \& Revenue Growth**
* Develop and implement the club’s commercial strategy aligned with long\-term growth objectives.
* Identify and activate new revenue streams including hospitality, sports facilities, retail, events, tourism partnerships, and land utilization opportunities.
* Drive membership growth, retention, and premium member experiences.
* Optimize pricing strategies, packages, and offerings to maximize revenue across all business units.


**Partnerships, Sponsorships \& Business Development**
* Secure and manage strategic partnerships, sponsorships, and commercial colla


 borations.
   

  

* Develop relationships with corporates, institutions, hospitality brands, sports or


 ganizations, and tourism stakeholders.
   

  

* Structure and negotiate commercial agreements, joint ventures, and long\-term leasing opportunities.Events, Hospitality \& Destination Programming
* Lead the commercial development of sports tournaments, corporate events, entertainment programming, and lifestyle experiences.
* Position the club as a year\-round destination for sports, leisure, and community engagement.
* Develop partnerships with hospitality operators, event organizers, and tourism bodies.


**Asset \& Land Commercialization**
* Identify opportunities to activate underutilized land and facilities through commercial developments, partnerships, or events.
* Support projects related to sports academies, wellness, hospitality, and destinat


 ion experiences.
   

  

* Ensure optimal return on investment (ROI) from club assets.


 Financial Performance \& Reporting
   

  

* Manage revenue targets, budgets, and commercial performance metrics.
* Provide regular financial forecasts, performance analysis, and strategic recommendations to senior management and the board.
* Monitor profitability across business units and identify opportunities for optimization.


**Marketing, Branding \& Customer Experience**
* Work with marketing teams to strengthen the club’s brand positioning locally and internationally.
* Ensure the club delivers premium customer experiences aligned with its positioning as a flagship golf and lifestyle destination.
* Support initiatives that enhance community engagement and tourism appeal.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Hospitality Management, Sports


 Management, or a related field.
   

  

**Experience**
* 10\+ years of senior commercial leadership experience, preferably within:
* Hospitality
* Sports and leisure
* Destination developmento Private clubs or golf operations
* Luxury lifestyle sectors
* Proven experience in:
* Revenue growth and commercial strategy
* Sponsorship and partnership development
* Large\-scale events and hospitality operations
* Negotiation and contract management


**Key Competencies**
* Strategic thinking and commercial acumen
* Strong leadership and stakeholder management
* Business development and partnership negotiation
* Financial and operational management
* Customer\-centric mindset
* Ability to operate in a dynamic, high\-profile environment


**Key Success Indicators**
* Growth in commercial revenue streams
* Expansion of strategic partnerships and sponsorships
* Increased membership engagement and visitor footfall
* Successful activation of events, hospitality, and lifestyle offerings
* Enhanced asset utilization and enterprise value


**Reporting Structure**
**Reports to: General Manager**
**Strategic Impact**
 The Commercial Director will play a critical role in supporting Doha Golf Club’s transformation into a leading multi sport, lifestyle, and tourism destination, ensuring sustainable growth and long\-term value creation.

data.jd_text:
**Primary Purpose Of The Job**
 Lead and supervise the Project Services team in delivering comprehensive Cost Estimation, Cost Monitoring and Control (including budget management), Planning and Scheduling, Invoice Processing and Monitoring, and Document Control services. Ensure all activities support the successful execution of projects on schedule, within budget, and in full alignment with project requirements. Promote and uphold the highest standards of Quality, Health, Safety, and Environment (QHSE) in strict compliance with the QHSE Management System.
   

  

**Required Experience And Skills**
* Minimum of 15 years’ relevant experience in the Oil \& Gas industry with an IOC, NOC, EPIC contractor, or major Oil \& Gas company, focused on large\-scale project execution. At least 5 of those years must be in a Head or Lead Project Control Engineer role within an IOC/NOC or EPIC contractor environment.
* Proficient, hands\-on experience with planning and scheduling software including Primavera P6, P6 Analytics, Primavera Risk Analysis, MS Project, MS Office, and SAP.
* Demonstrated expertise in Cost Monitoring, Cost Control, and Reporting processes.
* Proven capability in implementing industry best practices along with company systems, standards, and processes.
* Experience supporting the development of project execution strategies, engineering workflows, project management processes, and detailed project execution plans.
* Strong familiarity with activities related to engineering, procurement, fabrication, installation, commissioning, and start\-up of major onshore projects.
* Possesses strong management, communication, conflict resolution, and presentation skills.


**Educational Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in an Engineering discipline from a recognized university; a higher academic qualification is considered an advantage.
* Membership in a recognized professional engineering association or institution is required.
* Project Management Professional (PMP) certification or equivalent is an added advantage.

data.jd_text:
**الهدف العام من الوظيفة:** 



* الانابة عن الرئيس التنفيذي في حضور الاجتماعات ومتابعة الاعمال
* إعداد التقارير الدورية للإدارة العليا حول الأداء الإداري والتحديات والحلول المقترحة
* تنظيم ومتابعة العمليات اليومية داخل المؤسسة لضمان سير العمل بشكل منظم وفعّال
* تحسين العمليات، وتوجيه الفرق لتحقيق الأهداف المؤسسية، مراقبة الأداء، تنظيم الموارد، وضمان تنفيذ السياسات بشكل دقيق



**المسؤوليات والمهام الرئيسية:** 



* الإشراف على العمليات الإدارية اليومية وضمان تنفيذها بكفاءة ووفق السياسات المعتمدة
* تنسيق العمل بين الأقسام المختلفة لتعزيز التكامل المؤسسي وتحقيق الأداء الأمثل
* إعداد ومتابعة الميزانيات الإدارية، ومراقبة النفقات لضمان الاستخدام الأمثل للموارد المالية
* تطوير وتحديث السياسات والإجراءات الإدارية بما يتوافق مع النمو التنظيمي وأفضل الممارسات
* ضمان الالتزام بالقوانين واللوائح المحلية ومعايير الحوكمة وإدارة المخاطر وتطبيق معايير السلامة المهنية
* الإشراف على الخدمات المساندة مثل المرافق، الصيانة، الأمن، والمشتريات الإدارية
* قيادة مبادرات التحسين المستمر والتحول الرقمي لرفع كفاءة العمليات

data.title: Project Director – Aviation
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for a Project Director – Aviation to join our team in Dammam, Eastern Province, KSA.
   

  

 The Project Director holds full accountability for the successful delivery of a major aviation programme within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia,
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for a Project Director – Aviation to join our team in Dammam, Eastern Province, KSA.
   

  

 The Project Director holds full accountability for the successful delivery of a major aviation programme within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, with a strong emphasis on airport design modernisation and infrastructure enhancement. This senior leadership role provides strategic direction to multi ‑ disciplinary teams, ensures strict alignment with client and contractual expectations, and represents WSP at the highest levels with authorities, stakeholders, and executive decision ‑ makers. The position carries responsibility for the complete spectrum of project performance, including schedule management, technical delivery, quality assurance, risk mitigation, and commercial governance.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Strategic Leadership \& Governance**
* Provide strategic direction and leadership to all project teams operating on\-site and across remote support functions.
* Establish and maintain a strong governance framework ensuring clarity of roles, responsibilities, reporting lines, and escalation protocols.
* Drive a culture of delivery excellence, safety, compliance, and continuous improvement.


**Client \& Stakeholder Management**
* Serve as the primary point of contact for the client, ensuring transparent communication, alignment on objectives, and proactive issue resolution.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with senior client representatives, aviation authorities, regulatory bodies, and key external stakeholders.
* Represent WSP in high\-level steering committees, progress reviews, and commercial discussions.


**Project Delivery \& Execution**
* Lead the overall delivery of the aviation project from initiation to handover, ensuring compliance with contractual, technical, and statutory requirements.
* Oversee planning, design, construction, and commissioning phases, ensuring deliverables meet required standards.
* Monitor schedule performance, identify critical paths, and implement recovery plans when required.


**Quality Assurance \& Technical Oversight**
* Ensure adherence to WSP quality frameworks, aviation standards, and global best practice.
* Drive technical excellence across all engineering, design, and operational workstreams.
* Review and validate key technical submissions, design packages, and project deliverables.


**Risk, Safety \& Compliance**
* Establish and manage a robust risk management strategy, covering technical, commercial, operational, and external risks.
* Champion a strong safety culture, ensuring compliance with HSE regulations and WSP safety principles.
* Implement proactive measures to mitigate project risks and ensure long\-term programme stability.


**Commercial, Financial \& Contract Management**
* Provide oversight of all commercial activities including contract performance, change management, claims avoidance, and budget control.
* Ensure financial integrity through accurate forecasting, cost monitoring, and commercial reporting.
* Lead commercial negotiations where required, safeguarding WSP’s contractual and financial position.


**Team Leadership \& People Management**
* Lead, mentor, and develop a high\-performing multi\-disciplinary project team.
* Ensure optimal resource planning, performance management, and succession planning.
* Promote collaboration across WSP teams in KSA, the UAE, and global support offices.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Construction Management, Aviation Management, or related discipline (Master’s preferred).
* 20\+ years of experience in project and programme delivery, with significant exposure to large\-scale aviation, airports, or complex infrastructure programmes.
* Proven track record in leading multi\-billion SAR aviation or transport projects in the Middle East (KSA experience preferred).
* Strong background in PMC/consultancy environments with familiarity in contract administration (FIDIC or similar).


**Technical \& Leadership Competencies**
* Deep understanding of aviation standards, airport systems, airside/landside operations, and regulatory frameworks.
* Exceptional stakeholder management and executive communication skills.
* Strong commercial acumen with experience managing large budgets and complex contracts.
* Ability to lead diverse teams across multiple geographies and disciplines.

data.title: Senior PMO Project Coordinator | Strategic Project Management & Stakeholder Leadership
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Summary**
 Synechron is seeking a skilled and dedicated PMO (Project Management Office) professional to lead our project coordination efforts. The key purpose of this role is to ensure the smooth delivery of projects through the development, implementation, and management of project management
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary**
 Synechron is seeking a skilled and dedicated PMO (Project Management Office) professional to lead our project coordination efforts. The key purpose of this role is to ensure the smooth delivery of projects through the development, implementation, and management of project management processes, methodologies, and tools. This role is vital in aligning projects with organizational goals, managing stakeholder engagement, and fostering a culture of continuous improvement. The successful candidate will contribute significantly to the organization’s ability to deliver projects on time, within scope, and within budget, thus supporting business growth and operational excellence.
   

  

**Software Requirements**
* Required: Microsoft Project, Jira, MS Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint), SharePoint
* Preferred: Power BI, MS Project Server, VersionOne, Confluence
* Experience Level: Intermediate to Advanced proficiency, with a strong understanding of project management tools and platforms


**Overall Responsibilities**
* Lead the PMO function to ensure efficient project delivery across all organizational units
* Develop, execute, and refine project management processes, methodologies, and standards to optimize project outcomes
* Manage project delivery teams, ensuring adherence to timelines, budgets, and project scope
* Collaborate proactively with stakeholders to identify potential issues and risks, implementing mitigation strategies
* Promote a culture of continuous improvement by integrating best practices and lessons learned into project workflows
* Ensure compliance with PMO governance, quality standards, and regulatory requirements
* Provide regular project status updates, reports, and insights to stakeholders and senior management
* Drive the adoption of standardized project management tools and techniques organization\-wide


**Technical Skills (By Category)**
* Programming Languages: Not typically required for this role
* Databases/Data Management: Basic familiarity with data management principles preferred
* Cloud Technologies: Not required
* Frameworks and Methodologies: Agile, Waterfall, Scrum, PMP standards
* Development Tools and Methodologies: MS Project, Jira, Confluence, SharePoint
* Security Protocols: Not applicable


**Experience Requirements**
* Minimum of 8\+ years of experience in project management roles, with at least several years in a PMO lead or senior project coordination position
* Proven experience managing large and complex projects, ensuring on\-time, within\-budget, successful delivery
* Demonstrated success in implementing and managing project management processes and frameworks
* Experience working with cross\-functional teams across multiple locations and cultural contexts
* Industry experience in finance, technology, or consulting services is preferred but not mandatory


**Day\-to\-Day Activities**
* Develop and refine project management processes, tools, and templates
* Lead and coordinate project delivery teams, tracking progress and resolving issues
* Conduct regular meetings with project teams and stakeholders to review status and risks
* Monitor project performance metrics and generate performance reports for leadership
* Identify areas for process improvement and implement best practices
* Escalate project risks and issues promptly, providing strategic solutions
* Ensure all projects comply with organizational governance and quality standards


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Project Management, or related field; Master’s degree preferred
* Certification such as PMP, PMI\-ACP, or equivalent is highly desirable
* Ongoing professional development in project management methodologies and tools


**Professional Competencies**
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills with a focus on solutions\-oriented outcomes
* Demonstrated leadership and team management abilities
* Excellent communication skills, with the ability to engage and influence stakeholders at all levels
* Flexibility and resilience to adapt to changing priorities and manage multiple projects simultaneously
* Commitment to high standards of quality and a continuous improvement mindset
* Ability to work effectively under pressure and meet strict deadlines


***S***
***YNECHRON’S DIVERSITY \& INCLUSION STATEMENT***
 Diversity \& Inclusion are fundamental to our culture, and Synechron is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. Our Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) initiative ‘Same Difference’ is committed to fostering an inclusive culture – promoting equality, diversity and an environment that is respectful to all. We strongly believe that a diverse workforce helps build stronger, successful businesses as a global company. We encourage applicants from across diverse backgrounds, race, ethnicities, religion, age, marital status, gender, sexual orientations, or disabilities to apply. We empower our global workforce by offering flexible workplace arrangements, mentoring, internal mobility, learning and development programs, and more.
   

  

 All employment decisions at Synechron are based on business needs, job requirements and individual qualifications, without regard to the applicant’s gender, gender identity, sexual orientation, race, ethnicity, disabled or veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law.

data.title: Senior Manager- Delivery
data.raw_snippet:
**Who We Are** 




 Welcome to TELUS Digital — where innovation drives impact at a global scale. As an award\-winning digital product consultancy and the digital division of TELUS, one of Canada’s largest telecommunications providers, we design and deliver transformative customer experiences throug
data.jd_text:
**Who We Are** 




 Welcome to TELUS Digital — where innovation drives impact at a global scale. As an award\-winning digital product consultancy and the digital division of TELUS, one of Canada’s largest telecommunications providers, we design and deliver transformative customer experiences through cutting\-edge technology, agile thinking, and a people\-first culture.
 



 With a global team across North America, South America, Central America, Europe, and APAC, we offer end\-to\-end expertise across eight core service areas: Digital Product Consulting, Digital Marketing Services, Data \& AI, Strategy Consulting, Business Operations Modernization, Enterprise Applications, Cloud Engineering, and QA \& Test Engineering.
 



 From mobile apps and websites to voice UI, chatbots, AI, customer service, and in\-store solutions, TELUS Digital enables seamless, trusted, and digitally powered experiences that meet customers wherever they are — all backed by the secure infrastructure and scale of our multi\-billion\-dollar parent company.
 



  





**Location and Flexibility:** 




 The
 **Senior Manager, Delivery** 
 is an integral part of our Dubai team at TELUS Digital. This is an onsite (in\-office) role, located in Dubai, UAE, with travel expected within the GCC.
 



**The Opportunity** 




 As a
 **Senior** 
**Manager, Delivery** 
 , you will be a core member of our Middle East team, accountable for leading end\-to\-end delivery across complex, multidisciplinary engagements. Acting as the primary client\-facing lead, you will own the overall program narrative, ensure alignment between strategy, design, and execution, and drive clear decision\-making with senior stakeholders. You will orchestrate cross\-functional teams across Engineering, Product, Strategy, Research, and Design to deliver high\-quality outcomes, while establishing strong, trusted client partnerships on the ground. This role requires both hands\-on program leadership and the ability to challenge, shape, and guide clients to achieve meaningful impact.
 



**Responsibilities** 



* Act as a core founding team member of TELUS Digital in the Middle East, partnering closely with the Managing Director to build and scale the regional delivery capability, including ways of working, governance, and team culture.
* Own end\-to\-end delivery across engagements, acting as the single point of accountability for client outcomes, quality, timelines, and overall program success.
* Serve as the primary client\-facing lead, building strong, trusted relationships with senior stakeholders and confidently guiding, challenging, and influencing client decisions.
* Drive the overall product vision and program narrative, ensuring a clear and compelling connection between research, strategy, design, and execution.
* Lead multidisciplinary teams across Engineering, Product, Strategy, Research, and Design, ensuring tight alignment, accountability, and seamless collaboration across practices.
* Establish and enforce strong delivery governance, including clear cadences, decision\-making frameworks, escalation paths, and approval mechanisms to maintain momentum and clarity.
* Lean on your deep client services experience to drive effective decision\-making on complex issues of scope, design, architecture, and process.
* Create and continuously evolve the integrated TELUS Digital project plan, aligning stakeholders around priorities and driving focused, convergent execution.
* Identify risks early and proactively course\-correct, ensuring issues are surfaced, understood, and resolved before impacting delivery or client confidence.
* Engage directly with clients on a regular basis, managing day\-to\-day interactions, scope, and overall relationship, with an expectation of meaningful on\-site presence during key phases of delivery.
* Proactively build and deepen relationships across client stakeholders and functions, expanding engagement beyond initial points of contact to strengthen influence, unlock opportunities, and drive long\-term partnership growth.



**Qualifications** 



* 7\+ years of experience in digital delivery, product, program, or consulting roles within a client services environment, leading complex, client\-facing engagements.
* Experience delivering multidisciplinary digital products from discovery through UX design, implementation, and deployment for large enterprise clients.
* Proven ability to manage complex programs involving multiple senior client stakeholders, driving alignment, decisions, and outcomes.
* Strong blend of business, user experience, and software delivery acumen, with the ability to connect strategy, design, and execution.
* Excellent communication skills, with experience structuring and leading workshops, working sessions, and executive\-level discussions.
* Ability to align and mobilize clients and third\-party partners around shared goals and delivery outcomes.
* Strong technical problem\-solving skills, with the ability to diagnose and clearly communicate system, integration, and delivery issues (e.g., APIs, client vs backend, bug management).
* Experience leading and mentoring cross\-functional teams across product, engineering, design, and QA.
* Experience building and expanding relationships across multiple client stakeholders and functions.
* Comfortable operating in fast\-paced, ambiguous environments with a high degree of ownership and accountability.
* Experience or interest in leveraging AI tools within delivery, product, or operational workflows.



**Bonus Points** 



* Experience working in the Middle East for 5\+ years, with a strong understanding of regional business culture, stakeholder dynamics, and operating environments.
* Professional experience within a leading consulting firm or digital agency, delivering large\-scale digital or transformation programs.
* Industry experience in Financial Services and/or Telecommunications.
* Experience leading or operating within Agile environments, including applying or scaling Agile methodologies (Scrum, Kanban, etc.)
* Relevant certifications (e.g., CSM, CSPO, PMP, SAFe).
* Proficiency in both English and Modern Standard Arabic.



  





**Equal Opportunity Employer** 




*At TELUS Digital, we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer and are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace. All aspects of employment, including the decision to hire and promote, are based on applicants’ qualifications, merits, competence, and performance without regard to any characteristic related to diversity.* 




 We will only use the information you provide to process your application and to produce tracking statistics. Since we do not request personal data deemed sensitive, we ask you to abstain from sharing that information with us.
 



 For more information on how we use your information, see our Privacy Policy.

data.jd_text:
****Contexte et environnement****
**Internal \& External**
 Types of contacts associated with the position:
   

  

**Context:**
* The position is an important link between the users and suppliers for key goods and services requirements.
* Requires very high commitment to ensure supply of goods and services as it involves activities which directly impact the affiliate operations.


**Internal:**
* Interaction with MD, VP’s, Managers \& Supervisors from other departments in UAE \& Qatar \& KAZ \+ Global Procurement Office in Paris \+ Other TE Affiliates Worldwide and BCP teams supply chain


**External:**
* External Interactions with suppliers .


 Framework for the position's reflections
   

  

* Implement instructions by optimizing processes
* Strict implementation of instructions


 Nature of the position's interactions
   

  

* :The position requires precise communication skills
* The position requires the ability to influence and convince
* The position requires negotiation skills


 Position's operations
   

  

* Operations in UAE \+ Qatar \+ KAZ; highly competitive markets


****Activités****
 SUPPLY CHAIN CRISIS MANAGEMENT
   

  

* Support VP\-Aftersales in crisis organization and determine new supply scheme including follow\-up of shipments and set up of new route including all the HSSEQ standards’s application.
* Support VP\-Aftersales in Kazakstan to reduce the current stock quantities and reduce storage to 1 location
* Launch tender with VP\-Aftersales and Logistic director in KAZ for new warehousing and logistic provider
* Support VP\-Aftersales in crisis allocation of products and set up daily KPI on product’s delivery, costs, …


 CATEGORY LEAD (PROCUREMENT)
   

  

* Support procurement activities for TEMME \& TEMQ across assigned categories: Logistics and Warehousing.
* Support the Procurement Manager in implementation of purchasing and sourcing strategies and contribute inputs to category and sourcing initiatives.
* Support the analysis and review of purchasing data to help identify opportunities for cost optimization, synergies, and process improvements.
* Assist in the end ‑ to ‑ end tender process, including bid preparation, coordination with stakeholders, evaluation support, and documentation, up to contractual finalization.
* Participate in tender processes, negotiations, tender committees, and contract preparation activities as required, under supervision.
* Provide operational support to stakeholders in supplier management activities following contract award.
* Maintain professional and constructive working relationships with internal customers and suppliers, ensuring timely communication and follow‑up.
* Act in accordance with the organization’s standards on business ethics, compliance, HSSEQ, and sustainability, demonstrating professionalism and integrity in all activities.


 PURPOSES
   

  

* Ensure that purchases are made within the budgeted value per the purchasing plan, in accordance with the purchasing procedures.
* Ensure the timely availability of goods and services to the end users.
* Respect deadlines and financial targets.
* Adapt the supply chain crisis mode with clear KPI and streamline communication


**Compliance Objectives:**
* Ensure full adherence to the company’s compliance program, encompassing economic sanctions and export control program, anti\-corruption and fraud policies, procedures, and the Code of Conduct in all professional activities.
* Promptly notify the compliance officer/economic sanctions referent to any instances of noncompliance or breaches of economic sanctions or export control that comes to my attention. Any other compliance risks identified during day\-to\-day activities should also be reported immediately.


**HSSEQ Objectives**
* Strictly comply with TEMME HSSEQ policies, procedures, and applicable regulations at all times.
* Participate in HSSEQ training, promote HSSEQ awareness, and support knowledge sharing when required.
* Promptly report incidents, near misses, hazards, and injuries in line with HSSEQ requirements.
* Participate in safety tours, incident investigations, and follow ‑ up actions as required.
* Adhere to vehicle management and sustainability requirements, with the authority to stop unsafe operations.
* Demonstrate exemplary professionalism, vigilance, and commitment to HSSEQ in all activities


****Profil du candidat****
**Qualification**
* Minimum Master degree, preferably from the following disciplines: Business Economics, Engineering, Manufacturing, Procurement and Supply Chain Management.


**Technical Skills**
* Preferred \- Experienced in the use of ERP systems \& MS Suite (SAP, Ariba, Excel, Word, Power Point, Power BI).
* Required \- High proficiency in MS Office for data analysis. Basis legal knowledge to read and understand agreements.


**Soft Skills**
* Strong negotiation and commercial awareness, with the ability to anticipate issues and support strategic decision‑making.
* Solid professional skills, including project coordination, compliance with business policies, and strong PC literacy.
* Good influencing and communication skills, with the ability to support discussions, facilitate collaboration, and contribute to change initiatives.
* Clear and effective communicator, able to engage constructively with stakeholders at different levels of the organization.
* Customer‑service\-oriented team player with a collaborative mindset.
* Results‑focused, proactive, and self‑motivated.


**Knowledge**
* Experience supporting supply market research, supplier identification and qualification, tender processes, contract management, and performance tracking.
* Proficient in the use of procurement tools and systems, including spend analysis, e‑procurement platforms, electronic tendering, e‑auctions, and contract management tools.


**Language Skills**
* English level: fluent


**Experience**
* Mandatory 10\+ years’ experience in Procurement with supply chain complexity, with exposure to strategic sourcing or category management.
* Experience supporting complex tenders, contracts, and supplier management.
* Strong working knowledge of logistics procurement (Incoterms, HS Codes, local regulations, HSSEQ)
* Experience supporting stakeholder engagement with strong contribution to issue and risk management activities.


****Informations supplémentaires****
* As it is a Project Based Temporary role of 6 months, no benefits are provided.


**TotalEnergies valorise la diversité, promeut le développement individuel et offre des opportunités d'emploi égales à tous les candidats.**

**Position Title:** 
 Senior Project Manager – Design \& Build Firm
 



**Employment Type:** 
 Full Time
 



**Salary:** 
 up to 30K\- 35K AED all\-inclusive depending on experience and qualifications
 



**Benefits:** 
 Family visa, insurance, and yearly airline ticket
 



**Job Location:** 
 Abu Dhabi, UAE
 



  





**About the Company:** 




 A leading Abu Dhabi based interior design and fit\-out company with over 25 years of experience delivering high\-end, turnkey interior solutions across diverse industries.
 



  





**Job Description:** 



* Project Leadership \& Delivery: Oversee end\-to\-end project execution from concept through handover, ensuring alignment with client objectives, timelines, and budgets.
* Stakeholder \& Client Management: Serve as the primary point of contact for clients, consultants, contractors, and internal teams, maintaining strong relationships and clear communication throughout the project lifecycle.
* Cost \& Risk Management: Develop and manage project budgets, monitor expenditures, control variations, and proactively identify and mitigate risks.
* Team \& Site Oversight: Lead multidisciplinary teams including designers, engineers, subcontractors, and site staff to ensure quality control, compliance, and operational efficiency.



  





**Qualifications:** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Construction Management, Civil Engineering, Architecture, or a related field.
* Minimum 10\+ years of project management experience, with proven delivery of commercial, residential, and hospitality projects.
* Strong knowledge of fit\-out processes, local regulations, and authority approvals and demonstrated experience managing budgets, contracts, procurement, and subcontractors.
* Proficiency in project management software (e.g., MS Project, Primavera) and AutoCAD. PMP certification or equivalent is an advantage.
* Must have current or previous experience with reputable Interior Design/ Fit\- Out companies

 The Senior Project Manager\- Learning Experience on the Telehealth team oversees all aspects of online course development for medical professionals. Responsibilities include prioritizing new courses, coordinating subject\-matter experts, and managing course creation, updates, and
data.jd_text:
**Job Summary .**
 The Senior Project Manager\- Learning Experience on the Telehealth team oversees all aspects of online course development for medical professionals. Responsibilities include prioritizing new courses, coordinating subject\-matter experts, and managing course creation, updates, and translations.
   

  

**LOCATION**
 Global remote
   

  

**REPORTING \& WORKING RELATIONSHIPS**
 The Senior Project Manager\- Learning Experience reports to the Associate Director, Program Technology. Works closely with an in\-house team of clinical training specialists and course developers, along with contracted subject\-matter experts.
   

  

**Essential Job Functions / Key Areas Of Responsibility**
**Course Planning \& Governance**
* Lead and maintain a structured intake and prioritization process for new course concepts, working closely with diverse stakeholders to balance donor priorities, Orbis program needs, and the evolving needs of Cybersight learners.
* Facilitate requirements gathering and alignment on goals across stakeholders.
* Establish project governance frameworks including documentation standards and QA checkpoints.
* Establish a systematic audit process with clinical experts and instructional designers to review existing courses and plan updates based on new evidence, evolving techniques, and learner needs.


**Project Management**
* Manage end\-to\-end projects for approximately 5 new online courses per year and for course localization initiatives.
* Create detailed project schedules, risk logs, and communication plans; mitigate risks and maintain momentum.
* Coordinate cross\-functional contributors including SMEs, content creators, designers, translators, and vendors, including managing contracts and payments.
* Serve as the central communication point for all course development activities.
* Manage project budgets and track spending.


**Learning Experience \& Content Development**
* Partner with instructional designers and clinical experts to shape course objectives and structure.
* Ensure all learning content meets quality, accessibility, and relevance standards for global LMIC contexts.
* Support development and/or sourcing of multimedia components (images, illustrations, video, assessments).


**Technical Coordination \& LMS Integration**
* Coordinate with course developers to test, upload, and configure courses in the LMS.
* Validate course usability across devices and connectivity conditions.
* Collaborate on process improvements and relevant platform enhancements.
* (NOTE: Role requires familiarity with e\-learning environments, but does not require deep technical work such as SCORM/xAPI authoring.)


**Launch, Evaluation \& Continuous Improvement**
* Oversee coordinated launch plans including communications and stakeholder alignment.
* Monitor early performance, troubleshoot issues, and guide post\-launch updates.
* Use learner analytics and feedback to refine development processes and inform future strategy.


**Cross\-Team Collaboration \& Capacity Building**
* Lead and model best\-practice project management approaches for Orbis staff involved in course development, ensuring teams adopt effective workflows and high standards.
* Contribute to organizational learning around digital education trends and tools.
* Support hybrid or fully online Orbis training programs as needed.


**Qualifications \& Experience**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience in project management, instructional design, education technology, public health, or related fields.
* Minimum 5 years of experience managing digital content or educational media projects.
* Experience in online learning, instructional design, or medical/clinical education preferred.
* Demonstrated experience leading cross\-functional teams in a remote setting.
* Familiarity with LMS platforms and digital course development processes.
* Project management certification (PMP, PRINCE2, Scrum) desirable.


**Skills \& Abilities**
* Strong organizational and planning skills; proven ability to manage multiple projects and wrangle stakeholders.
* Excellent communication and interpersonal skills across cultures and disciplines.
* Proactive problem\-solving and risk mitigation skills.
* Ability to work independently and exercise sound judgment.
* Enthusiasm for technology\-enabled learning, global health, and “technology for good.”
* Fluency in additional languages is a plus.
* Ability to travel internationally 1–2 times per year.


 To learn more about Orbis, go to http://www.orbis.org
   

  

 Orbis is an Equal Opportunity Employer.
   

  

 As a global organization, we welcome qualified applicants from diverse backgrounds, cultures, and marginalized communities who are underrepresented in the international NGO sector who reflect the five Orbis values of Accountability, Commitment, Innovation, Integrity and Equity.

STRUCTURAL offers a wide range of specialty repair and maintenance services and i
data.jd_text:
STRUCTURAL integrates technology\-driven solutions with specialty contracting services to improve, protect, and enhance the existing infrastructure of owners directly, and in partnership with designers and contractors. STRUCTURAL offers a wide range of specialty repair and maintenance services and is the largest concrete repair contractor in the United States, with roughly 2,500 employees working from locations nationwide and in select international markets. STRUCTURAL is the open\-shop contracting business line of Structural Group.
   

  

 STRUCTURAL integrates technology\-driven solutions with specialty contracting services to improve, protect, and enhance the existing infrastructure of owners directly, and in partnership with designers and contractors. STRUCTURAL offers a wide range of specialty repair and maintenance services and is the largest concrete repair contractor in the United States, with roughly 4,500 employees working from locations nationwide and in select international markets. STRUCTURAL has been established in UAE since 2008 and has offices/operations in Qatar and KSA.
   

  

 We are currently recruiting for a Senior Project Manager to be based in our Dubai office supporting projects throughout the UAE. As a Senior Project Manager for STRUCTURAL, you will be responsible for managing complex construction projects that make the structures of the UAE and GCC stronger and last longer.
   

  

**As a Successful Candidate, You Will Be Responsible For**
* Managing self\-performed complex repair and restoration projects
* Preparing contracts and negotiating revisions while working with internal contracts teams as needed
* Developing and managing schedules in collaboration with field leadership
* Maintaining profit \& loss responsibility as well as other project financials including projections, etc.
* Providing strong leadership, mentorship and supervision to Project Managers, Field Managers, Project Engineers, and subcontractors
* Working closely with in\-house Estimators and Sales teams to assist in reviewing bids and developing proposals.
* Evaluating risk and loss exposure on projects managed
* Developing and maintaining strong customer relationships
* Demonstrating dedication to safety and quality control on all projects


 Candidates who meet the following criteria may be considered for this exciting position:
   

  

* Excellent written and verbal English communication and technical writing
* Bachelor’s degree in Civil/Structural Engineering/construction management or related field of study
* 12\+ years of relevant experience within the Commercial construction and / or restoration industry
* Ability to speak and write in Arabic preferred
* Demonstrated capability to successfully manage construction projects.
* Previous experience managing projects that include structural concrete repair, waterproofing, façade repair and/or historic restoration.
* Proven knowledge of computer\-based programs including Microsoft Office as well as project management and forecasting tools
* Strong leadership skills to effectively train and mentor others.
* The ability to work effectively with a team
* Capable of managing multiple projects and ensuring successful and on\-time delivery
* Job location is in the UAE with flexibility to travel within the GCC


 Our ideal candidate is an innovative but decisive individual who can work effectively in a highly collaborative, team\-based environment; has the ability to set goals and expectations and hold others accountable; can encourage and mentor others; is approachable, empathetic and outgoing; can quickly gain trust and respect; and is able to establish and maintain relationships.
   

  

 STRUCTURAL is proud of a company culture that promotes 24/7 safety and quality. We offer competitive compensation and benefits including medical and dental insurance, 401(k), paid holidays, vacation, tuition reimbursement, career development and growth opportunities, and a caring work environment.
   

  

 STRUCTURAL is committed to a Safety 24/7 culture and offers competitive compensation and benefits including medical, dental insurance, 401(k), paid holidays \& vacation, tuition reimbursement, career development and growth opportunities, and a caring work environment. EOE/M/F/D/V

**CARMA** 
 is a global leader in media intelligence, committed to helping organisations harness the power of data and insights to drive impactful communication strategies and business growth. Our AI\-enabled media monitoring and analytics solutions cover a wide spectrum of channels and languages, e
data.jd_text:
**CARMA** 
 is a global leader in media intelligence, committed to helping organisations harness the power of data and insights to drive impactful communication strategies and business growth. Our AI\-enabled media monitoring and analytics solutions cover a wide spectrum of channels and languages, empowering clients to stay ahead in an ever\-evolving market.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We are seeking a Business Development Manager with a strong understanding of IT software development, specialising in Government IT Projects, to spearhead CARMA Media Insights' expansion in this critical sector throughout the UAE. The successful candidate will be responsible for increasing company sales by securing new government projects and expanding business opportunities.
   

  

 The role involves identifying, developing, and securing new business opportunities with government entities throughout the UAE, leveraging strong knowledge of government IT initiatives and public\-sector procurement processes.
   

  

**Role \& Responsibilities**
* Identify, develop, and close new sales opportunities with UAE government and semi\-government entities
* Represent and promote CARMA Media Insights' software development, system integration, and IT outsourcing services
* Leverage the company's existing project portfolio and government experience to win new contracts
* Build and maintain strong relationships with government decision\-makers, procurement teams, and key stakeholders
* Manage the complete sales cycle: lead generation, meetings, solution presentations, proposal preparation, negotiations, and contract closure
* Work closely with technical and delivery teams to ensure accurate solution positioning and scope definition
* Track government tenders, RFPs, and RFQs, and lead the response and submission process
* Consistently achieve and exceed sales targets and revenue objectives


**Requirements**
* Proven experience in IT sales or business development
* Strong experience dealing with UAE government entities
* Solid understanding of software development projects, government systems, and IT outsourcing models
* Proven ability to secure government contracts and long\-term projects
* Excellent communication in both English as wel as Arabic, negotiation, and relationship\-building skills
* Existing government network in the UAE is a strong advantage
* Knowledge of UAE government procurement and tendering processes
* Ability to convert technical solutions into clear business value
* Strategic, results\-driven, and growth\-oriented mindset

This role involves end\-to\-end project management, from planning and execu
data.jd_text:
Qiddiya Investment Company is seeking a highly experienced and results\-driven Senior Manager \- Projects to lead and manage key projects across various sectors within our dynamic and fast\-growing entertainment destination. This role involves end\-to\-end project management, from planning and execution through to successful delivery, ensuring alignment with our strategic objectives and commitment to excellence.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead the full project lifecycle, including initiation, planning, execution, monitoring, and closure of projects across different domains
* Develop comprehensive project plans, allocate resources efficiently, and establish clear timelines and milestones
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams, stakeholders, and external partners to ensure seamless project integration and communication
* Manage project budgets, mitigate risks, and resolve any issues to keep projects on track
* Implement best practices and project management methodologies to improve project performance and delivery quality
* Provide regular progress updates and reports to senior management, ensuring transparency and informed decision\-making
* Ensure compliance with all relevant regulations, standards, and company policies throughout project execution
* Mentor and lead project teams to foster a collaborative and high\-performance work environment
* Stay abreast of industry trends and innovations to continuously enhance project outcomes and add value


**Requirements**
* Bachelor's degree in Project Management, Business Administration, Engineering, or a related field; Master's degree preferred
* At least 10 years of progressive experience in project management, preferably within real estate development, hospitality, or entertainment sectors
* Proven track record of successfully managing large, complex projects
* Strong leadership and team management skills with the capability to drive cross\-functional collaboration
* Excellent communication, organizational, and problem\-solving skills
* Proficient in project management software and tools
* Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple projects simultaneously
* Keen attention to detail and a results\-oriented mindset
* Knowledge of industry best practices, regulatory requirements, and emerging trends in project management
