data.title: Senior Project Manager - Offshore
data.raw_snippet:
**Building on our past. Ready for the future**
 Worley is a global professional services company of energy, chemicals and resources experts. We partner with customers to deliver projects and create value over the life of their assets. We’re bridging two worlds, moving towards more sustainable energy
data.jd_text:
**Building on our past. Ready for the future**
 Worley is a global professional services company of energy, chemicals and resources experts. We partner with customers to deliver projects and create value over the life of their assets. We’re bridging two worlds, moving towards more sustainable energy sources, while helping to provide the energy, chemicals and resources needed now.
   

  

**Responsibilities:\-**
* Leads budgeting and manages project operations to the budget. Controls project staffing levels, organizational structure, and monitors project discipline structures.
* Ensures project work and team activities meet all health, safety, environmental, and security requirements.
* To plan, co\-ordinate and manage the design, procurement, construction and commissioning of assigned projects, including taking a leadership role in the preparation of proposals.
* To ensure clear agreement of client objectives and that these are met or exceeded
* To achieve or better the budgeted gross margin.
* Effective management of Worley/Client contract, including delivery of the budget gross margin.
* Manage and monitor project performance on an ongoing basis to identify issues and opportunities early and take pre\-emptive action.
* Effectively manages project interfaces, including use of High Value Engineering centres.
* Develop resource \& financial requirements from the project plan.
* Manage the design, procurement and construction activities to meet the project schedule.
* Project Manager ownership of the project schedule.
* Routine monitoring of the key reports and development of corrective action plans.
* Monitoring and control of all cost aspects of the project to forecast costs, obtain approvals, identify trends and take action to avoid cost overruns and take advantage of opportunities.
* Provide clear and focused leadership for the project team to create a vision for project success and a strategy to fit that vision.
* Assess procurement process throughout the project to ensure goods meet specification, are delivered on time and are within budget.
* Monitor the Construction Management function to ensure safe delivery of the project within cost and schedule objectives.


**Quality Assurance**
* Responsible for working within the provisions and guidelines of the Quality Assurance systems.
* Work with project managers/project engineers to ensure all projects are set up and executed in full compliance with all the requirements of the Worley Project Management Process (WPMP) and General Management System (EMS) using consistent approaches, Work Breakdown Structures, work methodologies and reporting systems.
* Monitors the closure of all identified risks and opportunities.


**Safety**
* Responsible for personal safety safe working practices. Understand and follow OH\&S procedures
* Promoting health, safety and environmental awareness.


**Education – Qualifications, Accreditation, Training**
* Full\-Time Bachelor’s Degree in Engineering from an accredited university.
* Chartered Professional Engineer (CPEng) status or undertaking the same will be an advantage


**Industry Specific Experience**
* Prior experience must include significant project experience and successful project management.
* Vast relevant experience in a supervisory and/or project management role including technical expertise.
* Strong experience in Offshore experience on Brownfield projects.
* Mandatory experience in Pre\-FEED and FEED phase


**HSE Capability**
* Maintain HSE focus with the team to ensure OHSE requirements.
* Demonstrate behavior and business practices commensurate with a culture of world’s best health, safety and environmental performance.
* Demonstrate a visible and active commitment to:
+ personal well\-being;
+ healthy and safe workplaces and activities; and
+ continuously improve Worley health, safety and environmental performance.
+ Identify and report work hazards and incidents


**IT Skills**
* MS Office Suite


**People Skills**
* Able to work in diverse team.
* Able to make difficult decisions and lead and manage others in changing business conditions.
* Highly effective people management skills such as leadership, team, interpersonal, coaching, mentoring and supervisory skills. Must be able to build, motivate, develop and manage an effective team.

data.raw_snippet:
**Senior Delivery Manager** 



* **FinTech \- Bahrain (Onsite)**



  





 A growing fintech in Bahrain is looking for someone to bring more structure and control to the way software gets delivered.
 



  





 They’re building customer\-facing products in a regulated environment, while also pu
data.jd_text:
**Senior Delivery Manager** 



* **FinTech \- Bahrain (Onsite)**



  





 A growing fintech in Bahrain is looking for someone to bring more structure and control to the way software gets delivered.
 



  





 They’re building customer\-facing products in a regulated environment, while also putting the internal foundations in place for the next stage of growth. The engineering team is growing, priorities are moving quickly, and they need someone who can create clarity across the work, keep delivery on track, and make sure the wider business has confidence in what’s happening.
 



  





 This is a role for someone who is organised, proactive, and comfortable sitting in the middle of moving parts.
 



  





**The Role:** 




 We’re supporting a client hiring a
 **Senior Delivery Manager** 
 to help tighten up delivery across the engineering function.
 



  





 This is not a role for someone who only wants to run stand\-ups and update tickets. They need someone who can bring shape to the day\-to\-day, keep teams aligned, surface issues early, and make it easier for engineering, product, and leadership to stay on the same page.
 



  





 You’ll be working across different areas of the tech team and helping create a more joined\-up way of planning, tracking, and communicating work. If things are unclear, you bring clarity. If something is drifting, you spot it early. If leadership asks where things stand, you can give a straight answer.
 



  





**What You’ll Be Doing:** 



* Driving day\-to\-day delivery coordination across the engineering team.
* Keeping work visible, organised, and moving in the right direction.
* Working closely with engineering and product to improve planning and follow\-through.
* Making sure blockers, risks, and dependencies are surfaced early.
* Helping teams stay aligned on priorities, timelines, and ownership.
* Building a clearer reporting rhythm so leadership can see progress without chasing updates.
* Supporting better sprint planning, estimation, and delivery habits over time.
* Facilitating the meetings that matter and keeping them useful.
* Using data, trends, and delivery patterns to improve how the team operates.
* Helping put better structure in place as the company continues to grow.



  





**What’s In It For You:** 



* A role with real visibility and real influence.
* The chance to help shape how a scaling fintech delivers software.
* Direct interaction with decision\-makers across the business.
* A fast\-moving environment where good work is noticed quickly.
* The opportunity to build structure that actually improves how people work day to day.



  





**What You’ll Need to Succeed:** 



* 5\+ years in delivery, project, or technical program management
* Experience working closely with software engineers and product stakeholders.
* Strong organisational skills and the ability to stay on top of multiple moving pieces.
* Confidence bringing structure into environments that are still evolving.
* A proactive mindset, you don’t wait for problems to become obvious.
* Strong communication skills and the ability to keep both technical and non\-technical people aligned.
* Comfort working in agile environments, but with a practical approach rather than rigid process.
* A good eye for where delivery is getting stuck and what needs to change.
* Enough technical understanding to follow engineering discussions and ask the right questions.
* A calm, hands\-on style and the credibility to work across teams.



  





**Nice to Have:** 



* Experience in fintech, financial services, or another regulated environment.
* Exposure to startup or scale\-up businesses.
* Familiarity with tools like Jira, Linear, and GitHub.
* An understanding of modern engineering workflows and release cycles.
* Arabic language skills.
* A technical background or some previous coding exposure.



  





**Next Steps:** 




 If you’re good at bringing order to moving parts, keeping teams coordinated, and helping software get delivered with more confidence and less noise, this is worth a look.
 



  





 The client is keen to hire someone who can come in, take ownership, and make a difference quickly.
 



  





*nineDots is a specialist technology \& outsourcing recruitment agency advertising this role on behalf of our client.*

 We are currently recruiting for a

data.jd_text:
Transguard Workforce Solutions is the UAE’s leading provider of unique and innovative HR solutions. With a decade of experience in the region and a team that possesses extensive knowledge of the market, we provide a fully integrated HR solution.
 



  





 We are currently recruiting for a
 **Head of Procurement\- Contracting \& Services** 
 or our client to be based out of their Dubai Office.
 



  





**Purpose\-** 




  





 Leads the procurement function of Contracting and Services Sector, including development and implementation of strategic and operational sourcing, procurement, planning, subcontracting and supply management strategies, and operations processes to ensure the organization attains the best value in the goods and services required to enable achievement of its goals.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities\-** 




  




* Develop and implement organizational procurement policies and processes to ensure a consistent and standardized approach across all the Business Units withing the Contracting and Services Divisions; and to drive and establish a long\-term goals for the department in order to promote improvements and efficiencies in procurement activities.
* Design and execute an organizational procurement strategy, supported by tactical and innovative procurement programs, to deliver enhanced benefits and value to the stakeholders/ end user and to support service delivery aims.
* Manage a centralized budget to ensure that all the procurement activities within the contracting and services sector are cost effective and efficient.
* Lead the research and analysis of market trends and best practice in order to develop procurement technologies and processes that support those trends; and ensure sourcing and procurement strategies and approaches are current, risks are identified, and governance frameworks are effective, and insight is gained through the analysis of costs, benefits and supply markets.
* Build and manage relationships with key stakeholders/BU Heads to provide strategic insights on business needs, resolve complex issues and deliver high performance cost, service, and quality outcomes Conduct business reviews and meet regularly with respective departments to provide recommendations to enhance and implement new/revised policies and procedures based on changing market conditions. Assess risk, review future strategies, and identify potential cost down and improvement opportunities.
* Identify and manage commercial, contractual, operational, financial, reputational, ethical and supply chain risks to minimize negative impacts on organizational objectives while encouraging opportunity and innovation Lead rigorous contract negotiations with key suppliers and internal stakeholders, legal department, and support groups.
* Establish performance standards and evaluation processes to assess and report on procurement activity in terms of progress, results, customer satisfaction, value, and cost.
* Create understanding and engagement in the value of procurement management and ensuring adherence to policies and processes despite the need for agility in time\-pressured and demanding operating environments.
* Provide leadership, direction and effective management of the procurement team and crossfunctional working groups to achieve a high\-level of performance in procurement and deliver high quality advice and service to stakeholders.
* Develop, communicate, and administer procurement team performance and development plans and appraisals. Develop and implement procurement\-related training programs for the procurement team and organization.
* Serve as the primary contact for procurement related questions, training, policy and procedure interpretation and alignment by all departments.
* Lead, evolve and continuously review a seamless service level agreement (SLAs) with all Business Units (BU) and specific projects, giving priority to internal cost control and client required deliverables.
* Develop an annual procurement budget and strategies and report periodically on all agreed KPl's.
* Establish long term strategic relationship with original manufacturers and specialist subcontractors.
* Promote a partnering approach with key vendors and assist Estimation Heads on special pricing.
* Develop and well\-defined vendor management program.
* Adopt, promote, and ensure an above\-board ethical relationship with all stakeholders with emphasis on strong governance.
* Evolve global sourcing strategies, utilize e\-procurement to obtain maximum benefits.
* Strive and ensure an appropriate and proportionate risk transfers with major suppliers and subcontractors based on the risks and contract conditions, the respective BUs have with their customers.
* Develop and manage strong relationship with all our principals.
* Evolve with BU Heads, operation managers and warehouse managers, the strategy of inventory levels and controls appropriate to our business plans.
* Oversee the end\-to\-end inventory management framework across all Business Units, ensuring alignment between procurement, engineering, warehouse, and operations teams to maintain optimal stock levels, minimize obsolescence, and support project delivery schedules.
* Establish and monitor key inventory performance indicators (KPIs) — including inventory turnover, stock accuracy, and material utilization — to ensure effective control, visibility, and cost efficiency across all engineering and service divisions.
* Implement digital inventory management systems and automation tools (e.g., ERP, e\-procurement, warehouse automation) to enhance transparency, traceability, and data\-driven decision\-making across all locations and project sites.



  





**Requirements\-** 




  




* Master’s degree in business, Supply Chain Management, Logistics, or related field. Basic
* Engineering degree in Electrical or Mechanical discipline is highly desired.
* 12 \+ years of experience within construction and Contracting Industry with hands on
* experience in managing multiple business units in a large size corporation.
* 6 years of experience in a Managerial/ Head role .
* Results\-oriented, metrics\-driven leader with expertise in purchasing, supplier collaboration,
* development, and compliance.
* Experience with sourcing and procurement and building a vendor program.
* Solid analytical and negotiation skills.
* Proven track records in global relationship with major suppliers/specialist subcontractors.

data.title: Production Supervisor - Aerospace / UAV
data.location: Sharjah, Sharjah Emirate, United Arab Emirates
data.raw_snippet:
**Company Description** 




 This job listing is connected to the aerospace industry, specifically focusing on UAV (Unmanned Aerial Vehicle) production and management. The position is associated with an organization that provides innovative solutions in aerospace manufacturing and operations, offer
data.jd_text:
**Company Description** 




 This job listing is connected to the aerospace industry, specifically focusing on UAV (Unmanned Aerial Vehicle) production and management. The position is associated with an organization that provides innovative solutions in aerospace manufacturing and operations, offering high\-quality and cutting\-edge technology. The company emphasizes precision, efficiency, and excellence in production processes, contributing to advancements in the aerospace and UAV sectors. Applicants are encouraged to confirm employment details as they proceed through the application process.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 This is a full\-time, on\-site role located in Sharjah for a Production Manager specializing in Aerospace/UAV. The Production Supervisor will oversee daily manufacturing operations, including production planning, scheduling, and quality control. Key responsibilities involve coordinating with cross\-functional teams, optimizing manufacturing workflows, ensuring compliance with safety and quality standards, and managing resources effectively to meet production goals.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 




**Production Management** 



* Supervise daily composite production activities including layup, vacuum bagging, curing (autoclave/oven), trimming, and assembly.
* Ensure production schedules are met in line with delivery commitments.
* Monitor workflow, manpower allocation, and machine utilization to maximize efficiency.
* Coordinate with planning and engineering teams for smooth production execution.



  





**Team Leadership** 



* Lead, train, and supervise composite technicians and operators.
* Conduct performance evaluations and provide continuous coaching.
* Ensure workforce discipline, attendance, and adherence to company procedures.
* Promote a culture of accountability, teamwork, and continuous improvement.



  





**Quality \& Compliance** 



* Ensure compliance with aerospace standards and internal quality systems (e.g., ISO 9001 / AS9100\).
* Oversee implementation of:



 1\.FAI (First Article Inspection)
 



 2\.PPAP (Production Part Approval Process)
 



 3\.MSA (Measurement System Analysis)
 


* Ensure traceability of materials and production processes.
* Support internal and external audits.



  





**Process Optimization** 



* Identify production bottlenecks and implement corrective actions.
* Develop and improve work instructions and SOPs.
* Collaborate with engineering on process validation and improvements.
* Support introduction of new products and technologies.



  





**Health, Safety \& Environment (HSE)** 



* Ensure compliance with HSE policies and safe handling of composite materials and chemicals.
* Conduct regular safety inspections and toolbox talks.
* Enforce PPE usage and safe work practices.



  





**Technical Oversight** 



* Supervise processes including:
* layups techniques
* Core bonding (honeycomb, foam)
* Autoclave and oven curing cycles
* Composite repair techniques
* Review and interpret engineering drawings and technical specifications.
* Reporting \& Coordination
* Prepare daily/weekly production reports.
* Track KPIs: productivity, scrap rate, rework, on\-time delivery.
* Coordinate with Quality, Engineering, Supply Chain, and Maintenance departments.

data.jd_text:
**About This Opportunity**
 Ericsson is looking for a Head of Integration Services Hub1 within Service Line (SL) Business and Operations Systems (BOS) as a key leadership role part of BOS Delivery Excellence, responsible for leading the service excellence. The role focuses on services business pre\-sales and overlooks integrated delivery models setup including System Integration, Application Development \& Maintenance , and IT Managed Services.
   

  

 This role reports to the Head of SL BOS Delivery Excellence for MEMA and will be part of BOS Delivery Excellence Leadership team.
   

  

 What You Will Do:
   

  

* Lead BOS service excellence, managing team of senior services professionals.
* Accountable for services engagement and pre\-sales including target topline and profitability.
* Responsible for aligning with Solution Area on Services GTM and drive services offering build up , presales and delivery engagements for the EMEA region.
* Secure service delivery readiness through competence planning inline with business and portfolio evolution.
* Senior People Manager of own unit and a senior Leader across matrixed organization extending to solution line professionals in other CU BOS, BOS solution lines and SD/SDU units.
* Adopt, position and expand integrated service delivery offerings; with focus on customer value realization, delivery efficiency, and adapting to different commercial models.
* Champion delivery efficiency initiatives in collaboration with program management, CU BOS SL and SD/SDU.
* Set Individual Performance and Development goals for members with regular check\-ins.
* Responsible for team dimensioning; and Cost Center Responsible to deliver over\-Absorption target and required Utilization/Billability.
* Drive a Knowledge Sharing and Asset building culture across their community.
* Instill a culture of add\-on sales and customer value maximization.


 What You Will Bring:
   

  

* 12\+ years of experience in telecom industry with leadership track record in professional services including system integration, application development \& maintenance, and IT managed services.
* Deep understanding of BOS portfolio including products and services.
* University degree in ICT/Engineering. A graduate degree such as an MBA is a plus.
* Strong People Manager track record leading Senior Team members and leading Leaders.
* Deep Telecom knowledge including understanding of Telecom networks, OSS \& BSS components and familiarity with TmForum (eTOM, SID, TAM)
* Advanced experience with IT Systems and Integration
* OSS and BSS full stack integrations and surrounding ecosystems
* API management \& microservice architecture
* Cloud\-Native \& Platform transformation
* Data analytics, AI/ML applications in service operations
* In depth knowledge of different SDLC methodologies including Agile, Waterfall and DevOps approaches.
* Proven experience with MS IT and ADM related frameworks – ITIL, COBIT \& SAFe
* Demonstrated experience leading cross\-functional highly matrixed and globally distributed teams.
* Recommended certifications (external): ITIL, Lean Six Sigma, PMP
* Recommended certifications (internal): MSCOO, ICT PD JS8 GIAP certification
* Strong consultative, presentation, and communication skills
* Proven track record to deliver results within a time sensitive and high\-pressure environment.
* Highly proficient collaboration skills
* Solid ability to communicate effectively at executive levels.
* In\-depth knowledge of running Organizational and Solution Level Governance.
* Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus.


 Note: There are a total of 4 Head of Integration Services Hub vacancies with the same responsibility and skills requirements.
   

  

 Ericsson South Africa recruits in line with its Employment Equity plan and will therefore give preference to suitably qualified candidates who are members of designated groups. Would you like to take a tour to “Life at Ericsson MEA”, visit short video Click Here
   

  

**Why join Ericsson?**
 At Ericsson, you´ll have an outstanding opportunity. The chance to use your skills and imagination to push the boundaries of what´s possible. To build solutions never seen before to some of the world’s toughest problems. You´ll be challenged, but you won’t be alone. You´ll be joining a team of diverse innovators, all driven to go beyond the status quo to craft what comes next.
   

  

**What happens once you apply?**
 Click Here to find all you need to know about what our typical hiring process looks like.
   

  

 Encouraging a diverse and inclusive organization is core to our values at Ericsson, that's why we champion it in everything we do. We truly believe that by collaborating with people with different experiences we drive innovation, which is essential for our future growth. We encourage people from all backgrounds to apply and realize their full potential as part of our Ericsson team. Ericsson is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. learn more.

data.raw_snippet:

**Who are we?** 




 ALEC Holdings PJSC, part of the Investment Corporation of Dubai (ICD), is a
data.jd_text:
Are you a proactive IT Engineer with strong Microsoft 365 and modern workplace expertise, ready to support executives with reliable, secure, and uninterrupted technology wherever they work?
 



  





**Who are we?** 




 ALEC Holdings PJSC, part of the Investment Corporation of Dubai (ICD), is a leading GCC construction group with over two decades of success delivering some of the region’s most complex and high\-profile projects. As a proudly publicly listed company, ALEC continues to raise the bar for quality, innovation, and excellence in construction, driving iconic developments that shape skylines across the Middle East.
 



  





 In the UAE, ALEC has delivered many of the nation’s most iconic developments, operating as a fully integrated contractor through specialist business units that provide end\-to\-end construction solutions.
 



  





 ALEC provides strategic leadership, operational oversight, and shared services that support the performance and growth of all businesses within the Group. From governance, finance, and talent to innovation, digital systems, and sustainability, the Head Office acts as the central hub that enables each business unit to deliver with confidence, consistency, and excellence across the construction and engineering value chain.
 



  





**Why Join Us?** 




 As an IT Engineer based at ALEC, you’ll play a vital role in enabling our diverse businesses to succeed. From strategy and governance to enabling services and shared expertise, you’ll help shape the operational backbone that empowers our teams to deliver exceptional outcomes for clients across the region.
 



  





 At ALEC, we’re about more than just building iconic structures \- we’re about building exceptional careers. As a trusted partner to some of the region’s most ambitious projects, we value innovation, operational excellence, and our people. Join us to deliver Information Technology initiatives that directly shape our business success, from sourcing candidates to enhancing candidate experiences.
 



  





**About Your Team** 




 Our IT team is dedicated to delivering exceptional, proactive technology support to senior leaders across the organization. Working closely with C‑level executives and key stakeholders, we ensure their technology environment is secure, reliable, and always ready to perform whether in the boardroom, office, or remote setting. Through discretion, technical excellence, and a service‑first mindset, our team enables uninterrupted workflows, seamless collaboration, and confidence in every critical interaction.
 



  





**Your Role** 




 As an IT Engineer, you will
 


* Delivers immediate and proactive assistance for all IT\-related issues (devices, connectivity, applications), minimizing downtime for executives.
* Manages laptops, mobile devices, tablets, and collaboration tools to ensure they are always optimized, updated, and ready for use.
* Ensures seamless functioning of video conferencing, presentations, and boardroom technology, avoiding delays during critical meetings.
* Provides secure and reliable access to systems while executives are traveling or working remotely.
* Maintains strict handling of executive data with enhanced security controls and discretion, reducing risk of data breaches.
* Identifies and resolves potential issues before they impact executives, ensuring uninterrupted workflow.
* Understands individual executive preferences and workflows to provide tailored, efficient support.
* Supplements the Service Desk team by handling escalated tickets, contributing to the general queue during peak periods, and supporting colleagues across IT operations.
* Acts as a trusted, approachable point of contact for C\-level users, demonstrating professionalism, discretion, and the ability to communicate technical matters in non\-technical terms.
* Serves as the dedicated IT support for the Executive Boardroom, ensuring AV systems, video conferencing, and presentation technology are fully operational ahead of scheduled meetings.
* Undertake any other reasonable duties and/or responsibilities as required by management, to meet the needs of the business.



  





**What We’re Looking For** 



* Proficiency in troubleshooting IT software and hardware issues across end\-user and infrastructure environments.
* Excellent Written \& Verbal Communication Skills.
* Confident and professional demeanour when engaging with C\-level executives and senior stakeholders.
* Strong understanding of Microsoft 365, Intune, and modern workplace technologies.
* Hands\-on experience with boardroom AV systems, video conferencing platforms (Teams, Zoom, Barco ClickShare), and presentation technology.
* High level of discretion and confidentiality when handling executive information and environments.
* Ability to work independently, priorities competing demands, and exercise sound judgement under pressure.
* Experience supporting VIP or C\-level users in a corporate environment.
* Managing and maintaining IOS and Android devices
* Familiarity with boardroom AV and video conferencing technology
* ITIL V4 Certified



  





**What We Offer** 



* The chance to contribute to some of UAE most iconic projects.
* A collaborative, supportive environment that values innovation and excellence.
* Opportunities for professional growth and career progression.



  





**Ready to keep the business connected, secure, and running at its best?** 




 If you’re inspired by what you’ve read and believe you’re the right fit, we’d love to hear from you.
 



  





 Join ALEC Holdings and play a pivotal role in shaping a high\-performing team that drives our success.
 



  





 Apply today and be part of something excellent!
 



  





 Please note we encourage you to apply as soon as possible, as this advert may close once, we’ve found the right candidate. Although we can’t respond to every application, we want to thank you for taking the time to apply and for considering a future with us.

 Hermès is looking for a Retail Excellence Manager to develop and implement data\-driven analysis to contribute to the definition of the retail strategy and bolster the company’s ability to achieve growth. This role involves close collaboration with the stores in the Middle East
data.jd_text:
**GENERAL MISSION**
 Hermès is looking for a Retail Excellence Manager to develop and implement data\-driven analysis to contribute to the definition of the retail strategy and bolster the company’s ability to achieve growth. This role involves close collaboration with the stores in the Middle East and all Head Office functions to ensure the alignment of the retail strategy with overall business objectives.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Retail excellence \& Business performance**
* Study analytics and financial information to identify areas of business opportunity and connect these opportunities to larger strategic initiatives
* Ensure harmonization and alignment of performance indicators across teams and stores, aligned with the Group
* Analyse on a regular basis (e.g. weekly, monthly) the retail performance and key KPIs (e.g. sales, sales per metiers, traffic, conversion rate, UPT, average basket)
* Propose recommendations and build action plans
* Lead selected retail projects following the Group roadmap (new processes, tools, etc), providing regular feedback to the key stakeholders
* Coordinate retail initiatives with all relevant stakeholders in the Head Office
* Support the Senior Retail Excellence Manager with benchmarking and trend analysis to inform key projects
* Coordinate regular retail team meetings (propose strategic topics, content etc)
* Support on monthly business reviews
* Support in organizing quarterly retail management team off sites aligned with the retail strategy


**RETAIL PROJECTS**
* Lead selected retail projects following the Group roadmap (new processes, tools, etc), providing regular feedback to the key stakeholders
* Coordinate retail initiatives with all relevant stakeholders in the Head Office
* Support the Senior Retail Excellence Manager with benchmarking and trend analysis to inform key projects
* Coordinate regular retail team meetings (propose strategic topics, content etc)
* Support on monthly business reviews
* Support in organizing quarterly retail management team off sites aligned with the retail strategy


**RETAIL COMMUNITY ANIMATION**
* Coordinate regular retail team meetings (propose strategic topics, content etc)
* Support on monthly business reviews
* Support in organizing quarterly retail management team off sites aligned with the retail strategy


**KEY PRESENTATION MATERIALS**
* Support the Senior Retail Excellence Manager by preparing analytical reports and insights for board meetings and strategic review meetings
* Contribute to the preparation of business reviews, strategic committees, and management presentations, providing clear and data\-backed narratives
* Provide intelligence and data support for executive visits and presentations


**Experience \& Requirements**
* Bachelor’s degree in strategy, finance, business studies, or a related field
* 5\+ years of experience in a retail performance management or related analytical position (consulting, etc).
* Strong analytical skills with proficiency in data analysis tools and software
* Strong presentation skills
* Proven experience managing multiple projects simultaneously, from concept to completion
* Excellent communication and leadership abilities to collaborate across teams
* Customer and business orientated mindset
* Curiosity and adaptability
* Fluent preferably in multiple languages with spoken and written English mandatory. French \& Arabic are a plus.

data.jd_text:
**Company Description** 




 Earnest Insurance Brokers LLC is a General Insurance Broking firm specializing in a wide range of insurance solutions, including Property, Liability, Marine Cargo, Engineering, Automobiles, Home, Health, and Life insurance. The company is committed to delivering innovative and reliable insurance products tailored to meet diverse client needs. Recognized for its expertise and customer\-centric approach, Earnest Insurance Brokers LLC builds trust through personalized service and industry knowledge. With a focus on comprehensive protection, the company continually strives to exceed client expectations.
 



  





**Position Details** 




 · Job Title: Manager
 



 · Department / Team: Medical \& Group Life
 



 Report directly to the Head of Department (HOD)
 



  





**Role Purpose / Summary** 




 · Client Relationship Management
 



 · Policy Placement \& Renewals
 



 · Insurer \& Market Management
 



 · Business Development Support \& Retention
 



 · Policy Administration \& Compliance
 



 · Claims \& Service Oversight
 



 · Team Management
 



 · Compliance \& Documentation
 



 · Reporting
 



 · Monitor Overall Team performance
 



 This role is responsible for servicing corporate clients, designing and administering group insurance programs (e.g., medical, life, disability), coordinating with insurers, and ensuring operational excellence. The Manager assists the Head of Department in achieving revenue targets, maintaining client satisfaction, and ensuring regulatory compliance.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




 · Manage a portfolio of corporate clients for group health, life, disability, and other employee benefit schemes.
 



 · Act as the primary point of contact for assigned accounts.
 



 · Conduct client meetings, renewal presentations, and benefit reviews.
 



 · Address client inquiries, claims issues, and service escalations promptly.
 



 · Support new client onboarding and benefit implementation.
 



 · Assist in achieving departmental revenue and growth targets.
 



 · Prepare proposals, quotations, and benefit comparisons.
 



 · Identify cross\-selling and upselling opportunities within existing accounts.
 



 · Support tender submissions and participate in prospect meetings.
 



 · Maintain high client retention through proactive service and strategic advisory.
 



 · Liaise with insurance companies to negotiate terms, pricing, and coverage.
 



 · Monitor insurer performance and service level agreements (SLAs).
 



 · Coordinate with third\-party administrators (TPAs) and service providers.
 



 · Ensure timely renewal processing and documentation.
 



 · Oversee policy issuance, endorsements, renewals, and documentation accuracy.
 



 · Ensure compliance with insurance regulations and internal brokerage policies.
 



 · Maintain accurate records in CRM and policy management systems.
 



 · Assist in preparing compliance and audit reports.
 



 · Monitor claims performance and loss ratios.
 



 · Support clients with complex claims cases and escalations.
 



 · Analyze claims data to provide recommendations for cost control.
 



 · Coordinate wellness initiatives and employee communication sessions.
 



 · Supervise executives or account handlers.
 



 · Provide training and guidance on employee benefits products.
 



 · Support the HOD in strategic planning and departmental initiatives.
 



 · Act as department lead in the HOD’s absence.
 



  





**Qualifications \& Experience** 




 · Bachelor’s degree in Business, Insurance, Finance, or related field.
 



 · Professional insurance certifications (e.g., ACII, ANZIIF, or equivalent) preferred.
 



 · 12\-15 years of experience in employee benefits insurance, preferably within a brokerage.
 



 · Strong knowledge of group medical, life, disability, and pension products.
 



 · Experience handling corporate clients and renewals.
 



  





**Skills \& Competencies** 




 · Strong negotiation and presentation skills.
 



 · Excellent client servicing and relationship management abilities.
 



 · Analytical skills with the ability to interpret claims and financial data.
 



 · Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.
 



 · Ability to work under pressure and manage multiple renewals simultaneously.
 



 · Proficiency in Microsoft Office and insurance management systems.
 



  





**Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)** 




 · Client relationship management
 



 · Negotiation and insurer management
 



 · Claims and renewal analysis
 



 · Leadership and team supervision
 



 · Strong communication and presentation skills
 



 · Portfolio growth and retention rate.
 



 · Renewal success ratio and premium volume achieved.
 



 · Claims ratio management and cost containment.
 



 · Client retention rate

data.title: Director of Digital Asset Trading & Exchange Operations
data.raw_snippet:
**Role Overview:** 




 We are seeking a senior crypto trading leader to build, lead, and scale a new chapter in our digital asset trading capabilities. This is a strategic and hands\-on role responsible for shaping and advancing the firm’s crypto trading, liquidity, exchange infrastructure, and de
data.jd_text:
**Role Overview:** 




 We are seeking a senior crypto trading leader to build, lead, and scale a new chapter in our digital asset trading capabilities. This is a strategic and hands\-on role responsible for shaping and advancing the firm’s crypto trading, liquidity, exchange infrastructure, and derivatives capabilities. The role spans
 **OTC, perpetuals, funding logic, market making, liquidity sourcing, hedging, and market structure design** 
 , while also playing an important part in the strategy surrounding token\-related initiatives, exchange engagement, and broader platform growth.
 



  





 The ideal candidate will bring a strong combination of
 **trading leadership, derivatives expertise, liquidity and market\-making experience, token exposure, and operational depth** 
 . They should understand how to build and scale a crypto trading function that is commercially effective, technically sound, and aligned with a more structured and institutional operating environment.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




**Trading Leadership \& Strategy** 



* Lead and scale the crypto trading function across Spot, Derivatives, OTC, and Market Making.
* Define and execute the overall trading strategy in alignment with the company’s growth plans, platform roadmap, and commercial objectives.
* Take ownership of the trading desk’s performance, operating model, and long\-term capability buildout.
* Develop a clear framework for how the business prices risk, sources liquidity, manages execution, and supports product growth.



**Derivatives, OTC \& Pricing** 



* Lead the design and launch of the derivatives trading capability from the ground up, including perpetual products, funding logic, hedging frameworks, and exposure management — this is a greenfield build requiring someone who has stood up a derivatives desk before.
* Lead the development of OTC pricing and execution frameworks, including liquidity sourcing, cross\-venue hedging logic, and real\-time pricing across crypto and fiat pairs.
* Ensure pricing, execution, and risk systems reflect actual market behaviour and support sustainable commercial performance.
* Improve the desk’s ability to manage complex market conditions, funding dynamics, and non\-linear risk.



**Market Making, Liquidity \& Market Structure** 



* Design and oversee
 **market\-making strategies** 
 to optimise liquidity, spreads, order book depth, and execution efficiency.
* Define and execute
 **liquidity strategy across exchanges and providers** 
 , improving access, reducing slippage, and enhancing execution quality.
* Shape
 **market structure, execution workflows, and venue strategy** 
 to support client flow and platform growth.
* Develop frameworks to manage
 **flow dynamics, adverse selection, and client behaviour** 
 effectively.
* Manage liquidity across
 **CEX and DEX environments (including AMMs)** 
 , optimising execution in both off\-chain and on\-chain markets.
* Oversee integration with
 **custodial providers (e.g. Fireblocks)** 
 , addressing latency, settlement, and operational coordination.
* Drive
 **end\-to\-end latency optimisation** 
 across order routing, signing, and on\-chain settlement.
* Maintain
 **tight spreads and consistent market depth across venues** 
 , managing fragmented liquidity and multi\-exchange listings.



**Token Strategy \& Exchange Engagement** 



* Lead token trading and liquidity strategy, including managing simultaneous listings across multiple Tier 1 CEXs, coordinating with exchange listing teams, meeting liquidity requirements, and managing launch windows and post\-listing market support.
* Manage cross\-exchange price consistency, arbitrage mitigation, and unified order book strategy to minimise price discrepancies and adverse arbitrage pressure when the token is live on multiple venues.
* Work closely with relevant stakeholders on exchange relationships, listing processes, and ongoing liquidity support across key venues.
* Ensure token and exchange strategy are underpinned by strong compliance awareness, including wash trading monitoring, market manipulation prevention, and adherence to exchange\-specific listing rules and regulatory requirements.



**Spot Platform \& Exchange Infrastructure** 



* Oversee spot trading pair selection, curation, and lifecycle management on the platform, ensuring pairs are commercially viable and supported by adequate liquidity.
* Bring hands\-on experience with
 **matching engine architecture, order book design, and trade settlement workflows** 
 , working with technology teams to deliver best\-in\-class execution and liquidity on the platform.
* Optimise on\-platform settlement processes and ensure seamless integration between the matching engine, custodial layer, and external liquidity sources.



**Risk, Governance \& Infrastructure** 



* Own risk management across trading books, liquidity operations, token\-related exposure, and counterparty activity.
* Build robust controls around inventory, hedging, funding, execution, liquidity, and operational escalation.
* Partner with technology teams on execution tools, APIs, pricing systems, automation, and trading infrastructure.
* Ensure that trading activity operates within a strong governance and compliance framework suitable for a serious and growing platform.



**Cross\-functional Leadership** 



* Work closely with Product, Technology, Risk, Compliance, Operations, and senior management to align trading strategy with business objectives.
* Act as the senior internal owner for all matters related to trading logic, liquidity architecture, market structure, and execution design.
* Support decisions that sit across commercial strategy and trading reality, ensuring the platform is built in a way that is both scalable and market\-relevant.



**Reporting \& Senior Management Communication** 



* Establish and maintain
 **structured reporting frameworks** 
 covering trading performance, P\&L, risk exposure, liquidity metrics, and market conditions, ensuring senior management has full visibility at all times.
* Deliver regular dashboards, commentary, and strategic updates to the executive team, translating complex trading dynamics into clear, actionable insights.
* Proactively escalate material risks, market events, or operational issues with clear recommendations and proposed action plans.



**Team Building \& Management** 



* Build, lead, and mentor a high\-calibre trading team and supporting trading operations capability.
* Create a culture of accountability, speed, analytical rigour, and disciplined execution.
* Strengthen the function in a way that supports scale without compromising control, performance, or market edge.'



  





**Candidate Profile:** 



* 7\+ years of experience in crypto trading, derivatives, OTC, liquidity management, or market making.
* Proven track record of building or leading a crypto trading function within a structured or institutional environment.
* Strong expertise in derivatives trading, including perpetuals, funding, hedging, pricing, and risk management.
* Solid experience in OTC execution, liquidity sourcing, market making, and cross\-venue trading strategies.
* Deep understanding of market structure, liquidity dynamics, exchange microstructure, and client flow behaviour.
* Experience working with tier\-1 crypto exchanges, liquidity providers, and token\-related trading environments (including listings or post\-launch support).
* Good command of quantitative or systematic trading concepts, with the ability to collaborate with technical teams.
* Hands\-on experience with DEXs (e.g. Uniswap), custodial platforms (e.g. Fireblocks), and hybrid CEX/DEX environments, including latency and settlement considerations.
* Familiarity with trading infrastructure, including matching engines, order books, and execution systems.
* Proven ability to manage fragmented liquidity, cross\-exchange pricing, and arbitrage dynamics.
* Strong leadership, judgment, and crisis management skills in high\-pressure market conditions.



  





**Preferred Background:** 



* Experience within a crypto exchange, market maker, liquidity provider, prop trading firm, or institutional digital asset platform.
* Exposure to both centralised and decentralised trading environments.
* Experience supporting token listings, launches, or liquidity programmes.
* Familiarity with trading infrastructure, including pricing systems, funding mechanisms, and execution frameworks.
* Experience operating in institutional or regulated environments with strong governance and controls.
* Proven ability to manage external partners and counterparties, including exchanges, custodians, and liquidity providers.
* Understanding of exchange requirements, market\-making obligations, and multi\-jurisdictional considerations.

**We are IMETA**
 ROPU IMETA is a Regional Operating Unit consisting of 6 mid\-sized Operating Units: India, Turkey, Southern Africa (South Africa \& Sub Sahara Africa) Northeast \& West Africa, Near East \& UAE, Saudi Arabia, Gulf \& East Africa (SAGEA).
   

  

 IMETA is home to more than 47 nati
data.jd_text:
**We are IMETA**
 ROPU IMETA is a Regional Operating Unit consisting of 6 mid\-sized Operating Units: India, Turkey, Southern Africa (South Africa \& Sub Sahara Africa) Northeast \& West Africa, Near East \& UAE, Saudi Arabia, Gulf \& East Africa (SAGEA).
   

  

 IMETA is home to more than 47 nationalities. We are a myriad of color and culture and embracing this diversity is one of our greatest opportunities.
   

  

 We are a powerhouse of talent, and we work together to ensure that we grow, nurture, and retain our talent. Uniting and working together is the key to our success.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 We are hiring a Lead Counsel for IMETA, based in Dubai, to join our dynamic and purpose\-driven team. Reporting to the Head of Legal \& Compliance IMETA, this is a high\-impact role where you will suppport our Animal Health business and partner closely with business leaders to shape strategic decisions, manage legal risk, and drive operational excellence across a diverse and fast\-evolving region.The role primarily supports our Animal Health business.
   

  

**Role \& Responsibilities**
* Negotiate complex commercial and strategic relationships together with business counterparts.
* Prepare, draft, review, negotiate, and finalize legal documents including bespoke commercial contracts and templates.
* Support the development and implementation of standard operating procedures (SOPs).
* Manage contentious matters, commercial disputes, and litigation with timely risk mitigation strategies.
* Monitor legislative and regulatory changes and implement proactive mitigation plans.
* Drive local implementation of corporate legal and compliance processes, in close collaboration with colleagues from the Compliance function.
* Lead legal projects aligned with ROPU strategic goals and legal department improvements.


**Requirements**
* Degree in Law; LLM and bar admission (qualified lawyer) required.
* Minimum 7 years’ experience as an in\-house lawyer, preferably in life sciences or other highly regulated sectors.
* Fluent in English; Arabic and French language skills preferred.
* Regional experience in within IMETA is a plus.
* Strong risk\-adjusted decision\-making and judgment across diverse legal areas.
* Excellent analytical, influencing, and communication skills.
* Demonstrated gravitas and ability to build trust.
* Proven ability to manage multiple tasks and stakeholder demands simultaneously.
* Resilient and confident in providing independent legal advice.
* Experience representing legal in region\-wide strategic initiatives.
* Skilled in managing external counsel relationships.


**What’s Next?**
 We are looking forward to receiving your application! We will then have a look at your profile. If we see a match, we will invite you for a screening interview.
   

  

**Screening:**
 In order to comply with applicable export control laws, Boehringer Ingelheim periodically screens business relations (including job applicants) against sanctioned party lists (“SPL”). These checks may be performed by Boehringer Ingelheim or by any of its Affiliates. You acknowledge that Boehringer Ingelheim and/or its Affiliates will screen you against SPL and that for this purpose your personal data may be processed in relevant databases, including databases of third\-party vendors that perform SPL screening for or on behalf of Boehringer Ingelheim or its Affiliates which may be located or accessible outside the EU. Boehringer Ingelheim is committed to ensuring an adequate level of protection of your personal data.
   

  

 Our Company
   

  

**Why Boehringer Ingelheim?**
 With us, you can develop your own path in a company with a culture that knows our differences are our strengths \- and break new ground in the drive to make millions of lives better.
   

  

 Here, your development is our priority. Supporting you to build a career as part of a workplace that is independent, authentic and bold, while tackling challenging work in a respectful and friendly environment where everyone is valued and welcomed.
   

  

 Alongside, you have access to programs and groups that ensure your health and wellbeing are looked after \- as we make major investments to drive global accessibility to healthcare. By being part of a team that is constantly innovating, you'll be helping to transform lives for generations.
   

  

 Want to learn more? Visit https://www.boehringer\-ingelheim.com

 **supply planning, demand planning, warehousi
data.jd_text:
**About the Role** 




 We are seeking an experienced and strategic
 **Director of Operations** 
 to lead and optimize our client's end\-to\-end supply chain and operational functions across the region. Based in Dubai, this leadership role will oversee
 **supply planning, demand planning, warehousing, and logistics operations** 
 to ensure operational excellence, efficiency, and scalability in a fast\-growing luxury beauty and cosmetics environment.
 



  





 The Director of Operations will play a key role in ensuring product availability, optimizing inventory levels, and maintaining the high service standards expected within the luxury beauty sector. This role will partner closely with commercial, retail, finance, and brand teams to align operational capabilities with business growth and customer expectations.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Lead and manage
 **end\-to\-end operations** 
 , including supply planning, demand planning, warehousing, and logistics across the region.
* Develop and implement operational strategies that support
 **business growth, product launches, and market expansion** 
 .
* Oversee
 **demand forecasting and supply planning processes** 
 to ensure optimal inventory levels and minimize stockouts or excess inventory.
* Manage relationships with
 **third\-party logistics providers (3PLs), freight partners, and distribution centers** 
 .
* Optimize
 **warehouse operations, inventory management, and distribution processes** 
 to ensure efficiency and accuracy.
* Drive improvements in
 **S\&OP (Sales \& Operations Planning)** 
 processes and cross\-functional collaboration with commercial and marketing teams.
* Ensure seamless execution of
 **new product launches and seasonal campaigns** 
 , critical in the beauty and cosmetics industry.
* Monitor operational KPIs including
 **service levels, fulfillment rates, logistics costs, and inventory turnover** 
 .
* Implement best practices in
 **supply chain planning, automation, and operational technology** 
 where relevant.
* Ensure compliance with
 **regional regulations, import/export requirements, and quality standards** 
 .
* Lead, develop, and mentor the operations team while building scalable processes for regional growth.



  





**Requirements** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain Management, Operations Management, Business Administration, or a related field (MBA is a plus).
* 10–15\+ years of experience in
 **operations or supply chain leadership** 
 , ideally within
 **luxury beauty, cosmetics, FMCG, or premium retail** 
 .
* Strong expertise in
 **demand planning, supply planning, logistics, and warehouse management** 
 .
* Proven experience managing
 **regional distribution networks and 3PL partnerships** 
 .
* Deep understanding of
 **inventory optimization, forecasting, and operational planning processes** 
 .
* Experience working in a
 **fast\-paced, brand\-driven environment with frequent product launches** 
 .
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills with a data\-driven mindset.
* Excellent leadership and stakeholder management abilities.
* Experience with
 **ERP systems and supply chain planning tools** 
 .



  





**What our Client Offers:** 



* Opportunity to lead operations for a
 **high\-growth luxury beauty and cosmetics brand** 
 .
* Strategic leadership role with significant impact on regional expansion.
* Dynamic, multicultural environment based in Dubai.
* Competitive executive compensation and benefits package.

data.title: Head of Procurement
data.raw_snippet:
***About the Company***




 The Kleindienst Group is committed to pushing the boundaries of what has been achieved, pioneering new concepts in real estate and hospitality to deliver excellence. Established over 30 years ago in Austria and Hungary and present in Dubai since 2003, The Kleindienst Gro
data.jd_text:
***About the Company***




 The Kleindienst Group is committed to pushing the boundaries of what has been achieved, pioneering new concepts in real estate and hospitality to deliver excellence. Established over 30 years ago in Austria and Hungary and present in Dubai since 2003, The Kleindienst Group is the largest European real estate company in Dubai with more than 1,200 employees over its diverse portfolio of businesses which include property development, construction, hospitality, property brokerage, shipbuilding and corporate business centres. The Heart of Europe is the flagship masterplan of the developer in Dubai, in The World island 4km from the Dubai coastline. The Heart of Europe is an upscale, sustainable and visionary island mixed\-used destination comprising of 15 hotels and resorts, 4,000 holiday homes and hotel units, the iconic Floating Seahorse Villas, white sandy beaches, and the word’s first climate controlled rainy street and snow plaza. The Heart of Europe is committed to deliver exceptional sustainability and European culture, heritage and lifestyle experiences through architecture, events and innovative technology.
 



 The Heart of Europe, is one of the most intriguing and exciting investments in Dubai today.
 



  





**Essential Requirements**




 • Master’s degree in Finance, Supply Chain Management, Procurement, Business Administration, or a related field is required.
 



 • Minimum 12 years of experience in commercial and procurement roles in contracting or construction companies, with 7\+ years in leadership.
 



 • CMA /CPA/CIPS/CPSM Certifications
 



 • Proven expertise in contract administration, cost control, claims, and procurement strategy.
 



 • Strong knowledge of FIDIC, UAE construction laws, and commercial governance
 



 • Experience managing procurement across diverse categories
 



 • Deep knowledge of procurement best practices, category management and supplier negotiations
 



 • Ability to think strategically and align procurement goals with long\-term business objectives
 



 • Excellent experience working closely with senior management and leading cross\-functional teams
 



 • Strong leadership and team management skills, with the ability to mentor and develop staff
 



 • Highly proficient in procurement software systems
 



  





**Key Responsibilities**




 • Develop and implement the organization's procurement strategy aligned with business goals and objectives
 



 • Lead the procurement department in delivering value\-driven outcomes
 



 • Oversee procurement activities across multiple categories. Ensure alignment of category strategies with overall business goals and actively seek opportunities for cost savings and efficiency improvements
 



 • Build and maintain strong relationships with key suppliers and fostering collaboration for long\-term partnerships
 



 • Develop strategies to ensure the procurement of qualitative products at competitive prices while managing supplier performance and risk
 



 • Lead contract administration for the organization
 



 • Develop and/or enhance Procurement policies and processes to increase efficiency and effectiveness
 



 • Ensure procurement activities comply with company policies and best practices. Develop and maintain governance frameworks that safeguard procurement integrity
 



 • Drive the adoption of optimal procurement technologies and systems to improve efficiency, transparency and accountability
 



 • Work closely with internal stakeholders, including project managers, operations, and finance teams to ensure procurement activities align with project objectives
 



 • Lead, mentor, and manage a team of procurement professionals
 



  





**Commercial Responsibilities:**




 • Develop and implement the commercial strategy aligned with project delivery goals and company business objectives.
 



 • Ensure FIDIC and UAE compliance in all contractual documentation.
 



 • Lead commercial negotiations with suppliers, vendors, and subcontractors to secure favourable terms and conditions.
 



 • Oversee claims management, variations, and value engineering opportunities to protect margins and control costs.
 



 • Coordinate with Legal and Project Controls for dispute resolution, risk mitigation, and contract enforcement.
 



 • Review and approve contractual documentation ensuring alignment with risk management frameworks and company policies.
 



 • Ensure supplier and subcontractor contracts are compliant with regulatory standards and internal governance procedures.
 



 • Establish and maintain internal controls and commercial approval workflows to ensure transparency and accountability.
 



 • Support tendering teams with pricing strategies, subcontractor package analysis, and contract structuring.
 



 • Ensure accurate variation and change order management, including timely documentation and commercial closeouts.
 



 • Oversee claims evaluation, negotiation, and settlement to minimize disputes and financial exposure.
 



 • Maintain auditable records for all commercial agreements, claims, and variations.
 



 • Implement contract governance frameworks that align with project and legal requirements.
 



 • Collaborate closely with Finance for cash flow planning, payment schedule control, and commercial reporting.

data.title: Maintenance Supervisor - Manufacturing
data.raw_snippet:
A Maintenance Supervisor in a joinery or aluminum factory ensures the efficient operation of production machinery and the overall facility. Their role bridges technical oversight and team leadership to minimize downtime and maintain high\-quality manufacturing standards.
 



  





**Core Responsi
data.jd_text:
A Maintenance Supervisor in a joinery or aluminum factory ensures the efficient operation of production machinery and the overall facility. Their role bridges technical oversight and team leadership to minimize downtime and maintain high\-quality manufacturing standards.
 



  





**Core Responsibilities** 



* **Machinery Maintenance:** 
 Oversee the preventive and corrective maintenance of specialized equipment such as CNC machines, panel saws, edge banders (joinery), or extrusion and cutting machines (aluminum).
* **Team Leadership:** 
 Supervise a team of technicians and mechanics, assigning daily tasks and ensuring compliance with safety standards.
* **Resource Management:** 
 Coordinate with production managers to schedule maintenance during off\-peak hours to avoid disrupting factory KPIs.
* **Safety \& Compliance:** 
 Ensure all workshop activities adhere to HSE (Health, Safety, and Environment) regulations.
* **Problem\-Solving:** 
 Troubleshoot technical issues related to fabrication or site installation as they arise.



**Key Qualifications** 



* **Experience:** 
 5\+ years of supervisory experience within the joinery, aluminum, or fit\-out industries in the UAE.
* **Technical Knowledge:** 
 Deep understanding of hydraulics (for heavy machinery) and specific materials (finishes for wood or structural properties of aluminum).
* **Administrative Skills:** 
 Ability to maintain accurate documentation of maintenance records, reports, and compliance certificates.
* **Licensing:** 
 A valid UAE driving license is frequently required for site\-based coordination.

 ALEC Engineering and Contracting L.L.C. (ALEC), part of ICD, is a le
data.jd_text:
Are you a reliable and skilled driver with experience operating vehicles? ALEC FITOUT is looking for a Driver to support transportation and logistics for a prestigious high\-end fit\-out projects.
 



  





**Who We are?** 




 ALEC Engineering and Contracting L.L.C. (ALEC), part of ICD, is a leading GCC construction company known for delivering complex, high\-profile projects. With 20\+ years of experience, ALEC builds across sectors including airports, hospitality, retail, and high\-rises.
 



 In the UAE, ALEC has delivered many of the nation’s most iconic developments, operating as a fully integrated contractor through specialist business units that provide end\-to\-end construction solutions.
 



 ALEC provides strategic leadership, operational oversight, and shared services that support the performance and growth of all businesses within the Group. From governance, finance, and talent to innovation, digital systems, and sustainability, the Head Office acts as the central hub that enables each business unit to deliver with confidence, consistency, and excellence across the construction and engineering value chain.
 



  





**What You’ll Do** 




 As Driver, you will:
 


* Operate company vehicles safely to transport staff, materials, and equipment to and from project sites
* Follow assigned routes and schedules to ensure timely pickups and deliveries
* Assist with loading and unloading materials when required
* Perform daily vehicle inspections (fuel, oil, brakes, tires) and report any issues
* Maintain cleanliness and basic upkeep of the assigned vehicle
* Keep accurate records of trips, mileage, and fuel usage
* Ensure compliance with UAE traffic laws and company safety standards
* Support site teams with logistics and transportation needs



  





**What We’re Looking For** 



* Valid UAE driving license (manual preferred)
* Proven driving experience
* Good knowledge of UAE roads and traffic regulations
* Clean driving record
* Ability to work flexible hours, including weekends if needed
* Basic vehicle maintenance knowledge is an advantage
* Good communication and time management skills
* Previous experience in construction or site support is a plus



  





**Why Join Us?** 




 Opportunity to support delivery on our landmark projects.
 



 Work with a respected team that values innovation, safety, and excellence
 



 Be part of a company that develops people and delivers iconic results
 



  





**What We Offer** 




 The chance to contribute to some of UAE’s most iconic projects
 



 A collaborative, supportive environment that values innovation and excellence
 



 Opportunities for professional growth and career progression
 



  





 Ready to elevate your career? Join ALEC and play a key role in delivering iconic projects while growing in a dynamic and supportive team environment. We’re excited to hear from you!
 



  





 If you’re inspired by what you’ve read and believe you’re the right fit, we’d love to hear from you.
 



 Join ALEC Fitout and play a pivotal role in shaping a high\-performing team that drives our success.
 



  





 Apply today and be part of something excellent!

data.title: Experience Operations Director - Dubai
data.raw_snippet:
**About Valtech**
 At Valtech, we are reshaping the way brands connect with their customers. As a global digital innovation company, we fuse creativity, technology, and strategy to solve complex business challenges and deliver exceptional experiences.
   

  

 With over 6,500 experts in 60\+ office
data.jd_text:
**About Valtech**
 At Valtech, we are reshaping the way brands connect with their customers. As a global digital innovation company, we fuse creativity, technology, and strategy to solve complex business challenges and deliver exceptional experiences.
   

  

 With over 6,500 experts in 60\+ offices across 20\+ countries, we are expanding our footprint in MENA with Dubai as the strategic hub. At Valtech we thrive on driving business transformation as trusted partners to the world’s most recognized brands. To our people we offer growth opportunities, a values\-driven culture, international careers and the chance to shape the future of experience.
   

  

**About The Team**
 We are part of Valtech MENA, the experience innovation company, combining the uncommon to unlock a better way for people to experience the world. We work at the intersection of disciplines, cultures, and perspectives to create solutions that go beyond expectations, helping brands move ahead and lead in a digital world.
   

  

 We value clarity, collaboration, and a strong respect for craft. That mindset shapes both what we create and how we work together.
   

  

**Overview**
 We are looking for an Experience Operations Lead to take ownership of how experience design is delivered across projects.
   

  

 This role focuses on turning strong experience direction into high quality, well structured delivery. You will ensure that ideas hold up through the realities of timelines, tools, team dynamics, and technical constraints, without losing clarity or intent.
   

  

 You will define how delivery works, support teams in executing it, and ensure a consistent standard across all work.
   

  

**The role**
 You are responsible for making sure that experience design is delivered properly, consistently, and at a high level of quality.
   

  

 You work from a clear experience direction and help shape how it is delivered in practice. You are not solely responsible for defining the vision, but you contribute to how it evolves through real delivery.
   

  

 You create clarity where there is complexity and structure where there is ambiguity. You care about craft and about the systems that allow that craft to scale.
   

  

**What You Will Own**
**Delivery and execution**
* Own the delivery of experience design work across projects and clients
* Translate experience direction into clear and actionable plans
* Ensure UX, UI, motion, and content outputs are consistent and high quality
* Make decisions to maintain quality under real constraints
* Protect the integrity of the experience through handover to engineering


**Delivery strategy and standards**
* Define how experience design is delivered across projects and programs
* Establish clear standards for workflows, documentation, and quality
* Work closely with leadership to shape delivery approaches
* Balance quality, speed, and feasibility in day to day work


**Design operations and workflow**
* Establish scalable ways of working across teams and projects
* Improve collaboration between design, product, and engineering
* Define and apply documentation standards that teams can follow
* Support delivery across geographies and with external partners
* Create clarity in how work moves from concept to execution


**Team support and production**
* Support designers in their day to day work
* Manage resourcing, timelines, and coordination
* Remove blockers so teams can focus on design
* Help maintain consistency and quality across the team


**AI and operational improvement**
* Explore how AI and tools can improve workflows and delivery
* Identify opportunities to automate and simplify work
* Support the team in adopting new tools in a practical way
* Continuously improve how the team works


**How You Work With Others**
 You work from clear experience direction while collaborating closely with design, product, and engineering teams.
   

  

 You are the point of authority for experience delivery within projects. You guide teams and stakeholders toward decisions that support both quality and feasibility.
   

  

 You work closely with the Head of Experience and other leads, contributing to how the department evolves while owning delivery within your scope.
   

  

**Experience**
**What we are looking for**
* 8 or more years in digital design, product, or experience delivery
* Strong hands on background across UX and UI
* Experience leading delivery or improving design operations
* Comfortable working with cross functional teams and clients


**Core Skills**
* Strong understanding of UX and UI in real delivery environments
* Clear sense of quality and attention to detail
* Ability to structure work and create clarity in complex situations
* Confident working with tools, documentation, and workflows
* Calm and organized under pressure


**Additional Strengths**
* Experience with design systems and scalable approaches
* Understanding of front end, motion, or interaction design
* Interest in using AI and modern tools to improve delivery


**Your application process**
 Once you apply, our Recruitment team will review your application. If your skills and experience align with the role, we’ll reach out for next steps. ⚠️ Beware of recruitment fraud: Only engage with official Valtech email addresses ending in @valtech.com. We are committed to inclusion and accessibility. If you need reasonable accommodations during the interview process, please either indicate it in your application or let us know.
   

  

**Commitment to reaching all kinds of people**
 We design experiences that work for all kinds of people \- and that starts with our own teams. At Valtech, we’re intentional about building an inclusive culture where everyone feels supported to grow, thrive and achieve their goals. No matter your background, you belong here. Explore our Diversity \& Inclusion site to see how we’re creating a more equitable Valtech for all.

data.title: Site Manager
data.raw_snippet: We’re seeking a dynamic and hands\-on Operations Leader/Site Manager to spearhead production ramp\-up, drive process excellence, and lead a high\-performing team in a fast\-paced manufacturing environment. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring the smooth function of production and maint
data.jd_text:
We’re seeking a dynamic and hands\-on Operations Leader/Site Manager to spearhead production ramp\-up, drive process excellence, and lead a high\-performing team in a fast\-paced manufacturing environment. In this role, you will be responsible for ensuring the smooth function of production and maintaining the highest quality standards in your output, while maintaining a safe environment for the company. You will leverage your knowledge to drive efficiency and productivity by motivating personnel towards safety, quality, and productivity goals to meet company and customer expectations. This position is pivotal to the growth and expansion of our business processes.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Essential Duties and Responsibilities:
   

  

* Lead and manage plant operations including production, maintenance, and logistics.
* Recruit, train, and develop plant staff to build a high\-performing team.
* Setup materials, machinery, and personnel, to create strong production lines.
* Develop and implement strategies to improve productivity, efficiency, and profitability.
* Ensure compliance with local health, safety, and environmental regulations.
* Monitor key performance indicators (KPIs) and drive continuous improvement initiatives.
* Manage budgets, forecasts, and cost controls.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams including engineering, supply chain, project management, and HR within Saudi and US sites to influence CSI Ametek goals.
* Maintain strong relationships with vendors, customers, and corporate leadership.
* Implement lean manufacturing and Six Sigma principles where applicable.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Business Administration, or related field (Master’s preferred).
* 7\+ years of experience in manufacturing or industrial operations, with at least 3 years in a leadership role.
* 3 years of manufacturing experience with welding, cutting, forming, fabrication and quality specifications.
* Strong knowledge of production management, safety standards, and quality systems.
* Excellent leadership, communication, and problem\-solving skills.
* Proficiency in ERP systems and Microsoft Office Suite.
* Experience with lean manufacturing, Six Sigma, or other continuous improvement methodologies.


**Working Conditions**
* Full\-time position with occasional extended hours based on operational needs.
* On\-site role in a manufacturing environment with exposure to machinery and production processes.


 Language Skills
   

  

* Must be able to communicate in English.
* Needs to be able to communicate and function within Saudi Arabia.
* Ability to communicate with diverse mix of nationalities coming to Saudi preferred.


 Mathematical Skills
   

  

* Basic math skills required with Algebra and Trigonometry preferred.


 Reasoning Ability
   

  

* Must be able to understand and solve problems and situations in the best interest of all parties involved.


 Computer Skills
   

  

* Basic computer skills required such as Microsoft Word, Excel and Outlook.
* Ability to be trained and operate within CSI Ametek ERP system.


**Other Skills And Abilities**
* Highly motivated individual willing to take on additional responsibilities and duties under a challenging and compressed schedules.


 AMETEK, Inc. is a leading global provider of industrial technology solutions serving a diverse set of attractive niche markets with annual sales over $7\.5 billion.
   

  

 AMETEK is committed to making a safer, sustainable, and more productive world a reality. We use differentiated technology solutions to solve our customers’ most complex challenges. We employ 22,000 colleagues, in 35 countries, that are grounded by our core values: Ethics and Integrity, Respect for the Individual, Inclusion, Teamwork, and Social Responsibility. AMETEK is a component of the S\&P 500\. Visit https://www.ametek.com/careers for more information.
