data.raw_snippet:
**About This Opportunity**
 Ericsson is looking for a Head of Integration Services Hub1 within Service Line (SL) Business and Operations Systems (BOS) as a key leadership role part of BOS Delivery Excellence, responsible for leading the service excellence. The role focuses on services business pre\-
data.jd_text:
**About This Opportunity**
 Ericsson is looking for a Head of Integration Services Hub1 within Service Line (SL) Business and Operations Systems (BOS) as a key leadership role part of BOS Delivery Excellence, responsible for leading the service excellence. The role focuses on services business pre\-sales and overlooks integrated delivery models setup including System Integration, Application Development \& Maintenance , and IT Managed Services.
   

  

 This role reports to the Head of SL BOS Delivery Excellence for MEMA and will be part of BOS Delivery Excellence Leadership team.
   

  

 What You Will Do:
   

  

* Lead BOS service excellence, managing team of senior services professionals.
* Accountable for services engagement and pre\-sales including target topline and profitability.
* Responsible for aligning with Solution Area on Services GTM and drive services offering build up , presales and delivery engagements for the EMEA region.
* Secure service delivery readiness through competence planning inline with business and portfolio evolution.
* Senior People Manager of own unit and a senior Leader across matrixed organization extending to solution line professionals in other CU BOS, BOS solution lines and SD/SDU units.
* Adopt, position and expand integrated service delivery offerings; with focus on customer value realization, delivery efficiency, and adapting to different commercial models.
* Champion delivery efficiency initiatives in collaboration with program management, CU BOS SL and SD/SDU.
* Set Individual Performance and Development goals for members with regular check\-ins.
* Responsible for team dimensioning; and Cost Center Responsible to deliver over\-Absorption target and required Utilization/Billability.
* Drive a Knowledge Sharing and Asset building culture across their community.
* Instill a culture of add\-on sales and customer value maximization.


 What You Will Bring:
   

  

* 12\+ years of experience in telecom industry with leadership track record in professional services including system integration, application development \& maintenance, and IT managed services.
* Deep understanding of BOS portfolio including products and services.
* University degree in ICT/Engineering. A graduate degree such as an MBA is a plus.
* Strong People Manager track record leading Senior Team members and leading Leaders.
* Deep Telecom knowledge including understanding of Telecom networks, OSS \& BSS components and familiarity with TmForum (eTOM, SID, TAM)
* Advanced experience with IT Systems and Integration
* OSS and BSS full stack integrations and surrounding ecosystems
* API management \& microservice architecture
* Cloud\-Native \& Platform transformation
* Data analytics, AI/ML applications in service operations
* In depth knowledge of different SDLC methodologies including Agile, Waterfall and DevOps approaches.
* Proven experience with MS IT and ADM related frameworks – ITIL, COBIT \& SAFe
* Demonstrated experience leading cross\-functional highly matrixed and globally distributed teams.
* Recommended certifications (external): ITIL, Lean Six Sigma, PMP
* Recommended certifications (internal): MSCOO, ICT PD JS8 GIAP certification
* Strong consultative, presentation, and communication skills
* Proven track record to deliver results within a time sensitive and high\-pressure environment.
* Highly proficient collaboration skills
* Solid ability to communicate effectively at executive levels.
* In\-depth knowledge of running Organizational and Solution Level Governance.
* Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus.


 Note: There are a total of 4 Head of Integration Services Hub vacancies with the same responsibility and skills requirements.
   

  

 Ericsson South Africa recruits in line with its Employment Equity plan and will therefore give preference to suitably qualified candidates who are members of designated groups. Would you like to take a tour to “Life at Ericsson MEA”, visit short video Click Here
   

  

**Why join Ericsson?**
 At Ericsson, you´ll have an outstanding opportunity. The chance to use your skills and imagination to push the boundaries of what´s possible. To build solutions never seen before to some of the world’s toughest problems. You´ll be challenged, but you won’t be alone. You´ll be joining a team of diverse innovators, all driven to go beyond the status quo to craft what comes next.
   

  

**What happens once you apply?**
 Click Here to find all you need to know about what our typical hiring process looks like.
   

  

 Encouraging a diverse and inclusive organization is core to our values at Ericsson, that's why we champion it in everything we do. We truly believe that by collaborating with people with different experiences we drive innovation, which is essential for our future growth. We encourage people from all backgrounds to apply and realize their full potential as part of our Ericsson team. Ericsson is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer. learn more.

data.title: SUPERVISOR, PLANT
data.raw_snippet:
Job description:
   

  

 Job Purpose
 
 Ensure to the smooth running of processes on a production floor. Overseeing routine production activities, troubleshooting and solving issues that arise on a production floor and ensuring a safe and clean production workspace.
 


 Key Accountability Areas
data.jd_text:
Job description:
   

  

 Job Purpose
 
 Ensure to the smooth running of processes on a production floor. Overseeing routine production activities, troubleshooting and solving issues that arise on a production floor and ensuring a safe and clean production workspace.
 


 Key Accountability Areas
 
 Skills, Training \& Guidance.
 


* Excellent organizational skills to plan production schedules and ensure the availability of necessary materials and equipment.
* strong communication skills to actively listen to stakeholders and clearly verbalize ideas and action plans.
* Strong analytical skills to determine problems within the production process and take appropriate action.
* Good time\-management skills to minimize downtime and ensure a team works efficiently.
* The ability to cope with pressure and make sound decisions quickly.
* Informing a production team of preferred occupational health and safety practices.



 Coordination with Production Team:
 


* Closely coordinate with the Production Team and ensure that production flows according to schedules.
* Together with Production Team, determine bottlenecks and find solutions to address issues.
* Ensure to Check production output according to specifications.
* Identify issues in efficiency and suggest improvements.
* Enforce strict safety guidelines and company standards.



 Achievement Report Analyses:
 


* Prepare Shift productivity and quality achievement report with Breakdown in comparison with the pre\-determined budget.
* Analyze actual productivity against the target. Investigate reasons/justifications for considerable variances.
* Control and update Work Centers according to capacity utilization to utilize maximum manpower capacity.
* Ensure that all reports are properly and accurately prepared and reports that must be published are circulated in a timely manner to the Production Manager.
* Ensure implementation of management systems adhere to quality, safety, and environmental policies.



 Quality Management.
 


* Ensure Quality Management System processes are well established, implemented, maintained and documented.
* report to Manager on the QMS performance and where improvements are needed,



  
 


 Role Accountability
 
 HR Proficiency:
 


* Ability to recruit, recognize and cultivate high performers and expose them in order to create a robust second line of management.
* Ability to recognize low performers and guide them to improve or release them.
* Ability to treat subordinates equally without any discrimination.
* Assessment criteria of subordinates is performance that leads to planned results.
* Ensure availability of delegation of authority matrix to have sufficient delegations as per company policy.



 Responsibility:
 


* Must take full responsibility for his operation as per the job description and the required deliverables from this position, taking into consideration the general company guidelines.
* Able to anticipate problems and make the necessary proactive steps to prevent them
* Ability to take necessary and proper timely decisions.



 Delivery:
 


* Deliver the required results in timely manner with required quality and cost.
* Making a Tangible Difference:
* Must make a tangible difference to his area of operation. and exceed business expectations.



 Business Planning and Performance:
 


* Able to transform the corporate goals into business plans.
* Able to Plan, follow\-up and execute those plans, whether they are annual or development plans.
* Monitor the plan performance and initiate action to strengthen results and take the corrective action accordingly.
* Provide periodic work progress reports.
* Responsible for monitoring and controlling budgets and expenses to achieve the optimum cost efficiency.



 Organizational Development:
 


* Develop the organizational structure according to the current requirements taking into consideration future and development plans.
* Ensure availability of job descriptions for all job roles and deployment.



 Business Process Improvements:
 


* Develop, coordinate well\-defined written systems, policies, procedures, and seek automations opportunities as much as possible.
* Should be conversant and able to navigate through IT solutions especially those relevant to his job and business.
* Promote the automated systems and using them fully, to spread its culture.



 Quality:
 


* Quality is considered as alfanar’s prime competitive advantage as such, managers are expected to act accordingly.



 Adaptation:
 


* Adapt to new and alternative techniques, technologies, management structures, and business models.



 Health, Safety and Environment:
 


* Ensure a safe, secure, and legal work environment as per the standard regulations.


 Academic Qualification Bachelor DegreeWork Experience 4 to 6 YearsTechnical / Functional Competencies Production LogsQuality Control
   

  

 Profile description:
   

  


 Alfanar is a Saudi company with an international presence, primarily engaged in the manufacturing and trading of a wide variety of low, medium, and high voltage electrical products, in addition to its portfolio of conventional and renewable energy solutions, oil and gas, water treatment, infrastructure, technical services, and digital solutions.
 



  
 



 The hub of alfanar’s manufacturing operations is Medinet alfanar Alsinaiya, a 700,000 square\-meter complex located in Riyadh. The complex houses an array of ultra\-modern manufacturing facilities and laboratories equipped with state\-of\-the\-art technologies and staffed with highly skilled professionals.
 



  
 



 alfanar derives its success from its commitment to providing the highest quality standards to its customers, and the continuous development of its human capital, who alfanar considers its most valuable asset. With this in mind, alfanar promotes a proactive work environment where its employees are always valued, nurtured, and empowered to fuel their pride in being part of alfanar.
 



  
 



 For more information about alfanar, please visit alfanar.com

data.title: Head of Operations - KSA
data.raw_snippet:
**HOW WILL YOU MAKE AN IMPACT?**
 As Cartier's Head of Operations for the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia (KSA), you will manage the market’s end\-to\-end supply chain activities with the objective of enabling sustainable business growth while improving profitability. Leveraging your strong leadership skill
data.jd_text:
**HOW WILL YOU MAKE AN IMPACT?**
 As Cartier's Head of Operations for the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia (KSA), you will manage the market’s end\-to\-end supply chain activities with the objective of enabling sustainable business growth while improving profitability. Leveraging your strong leadership skills, you will engage stakeholders and drive business performance.
   

  

 In this role, you will evolve in complex, dynamic environments and excel at prioritization, time, and people management.
   

  

**WHAT WILL BE YOUR MISSION?**
 As a key member of the KSA Exco, you will contribute to strategic vision of the market, ensuring these are achieved for the local operations in alignment with key market priorities, while considering the global Cartier supply chain context.
   

  

**Your Main Responsibilities Will Cover The Following**
**Supply Chain Planning**
* Review the POS assortments monthly in collaboration with the market’s commercial and marketing teams to optimize stock availability, enhance brand image and representation and uncover potential sales opportunities.
* Review the market’s sales forecasts quarterly with the local commercial team and with the regional supply team to update the market’s stock policy.
* Monitor the Model Stock to ensure products replenishment and escalate alerts in case of issue.
* Monitor inventory levels to ensure stock right\-sizing across all local distribution channels.
* Collect local qualitative feedback on novelties from the local marketing and commercial teams and coordinate with the regional supply team to define the market’s feedback on novelties.
* Communicate the consensus results to relevant stakeholders to build consistent and efficient marketing and communication plans.
* Monitor the replenishment of novelties and escalate alerts in case of issue.


**Supply Chain Execution**
* Develop a close and trustworthy relationship with central logistics teams (RID VsG export team, RID Fastlog team, Group Logistics BPI, etc.) based on regular and constructive feedback.
* Provide visibility on market activities requiring specific/tailored services from central logistics (events, high season, special orders/occasions, etc.).
* Work on taskforce mode on all performance improvement related topics (lead time, quality, cost efficiency).
* Collaborate closely with the head of local logistics to ensure timely importation and distribution in adherence to local customs, trade regulations, and compliance of KSA, co\-jointly develop mitigation plans in case of business risks.
* Provide visibility on market activities requiring specific/tailored services from local logistics (events, special orders/occasions, etc.).
* Maximize client experience by bringing together local logistics and boutiques back of house teams. Understand each other’s constraints and develop a shared roadmap towards operational excellence, including all product categories and Care services.
* Follow\-up closely with the commercial teams on the local commercial performance across all distribution channels and each product category and suggest relevant areas to improve commercial performance while enhancing product representation and potential exploration.
* Monitor the sell\-through for novelties and provide feedback to local marketing and to regional supply team for better forecasting.
* Partner with the retail teams to drive yearly cleaning of obsolete stocks.


**Team management: People and leadership**
* Recruit and lead the local operations team by providing clear vision and strategy to achieve local business objectives and foster client centricity through operational excellence.
* Ensure individual development plans are in place for key talents, as well as with a clear career path for each team member, developing our Cartier people engagement culture (leveraging internal engagement tools).
* Drive change management across the team during key business changes.


**Performance, Process Excellence \& Project Management**
* Implement a local dashboard to pilot the local operations team for an optimal workload/capacity management.
* Maintain and share the market supply chain KPIs dashboard with key stakeholders.
* Promote and enforce a data\-driven decision\-making approach across all local teams.
* Co\-build with COP and the region the local operations portal, serving as repository for all processes and procedures.
* Establish a roadmap to continuously improve the local operations performance locally across 4 key areas: speed, efficiency, quality and sustainability.
* Position the market as pilot for key HQ/regional supply chain initiatives to benefit from enhancement/new services and proactively suggest relevant initiatives to region/HQ.


**HOW WILL YOU EXPERIENCE SUCCESS WITH US?**
 At Cartier, we believe passion and expertise are the sparks that create extraordinary success.
   

  

**To Truly Thrive In This Role, You’ll Bring**
* A Master’s degree in supply chain or engineering
* Minimum 12 to 15 years’ experience in Operations, Logistics, and Supply chain
* Experience with SAP SD/LE/MM modules
* You are proficient in Anaplan and Looker
* A proven track record in leading teams and collaboration in a matrix set\-up
* Business Partner acumen paired with the drive to find solutions to challenges that may arise
* Ability to prioritize and to separate noise from essential information
* Impeccable communication skills with fluency in English; additional languages are a plus.


**What Do We Offer**
 At Cartier, you will be part of a community bound by a strong sense of responsibility, where connection, collaboration, and collective spirit thrive.
   

  

 We empower individual talents, united by a shared commitment to excellence, inspired by the world's diverse cultures, to respect and enrich our unique heritage. We believe that different perspectives fuel innovation and drive us to create exceptional experiences.
   

  

 We offer an energizing environment for career growth and the opportunity to contribute your individual vision to a legacy of creativity.
   

  

 We celebrate every achievement, big or small, fostering meaningful connections through gratitude and mutual support, nurturing a sense of belonging.
   

  

**Join us at Cartier, a place like no other, forever moving forward.**
**YOUR JOURNEY WITH US**
 If your application is selected, you will receive an introductory call from a member of our Talent team to explain further steps and discuss the opportunity. If there is a match from both sides, you will have a chance to meet with the Managing Director, Regional Head of the Function, and HR Team as part of a video or in\-person interview. If we are positive from all sides and this is an exciting challenge for you, you will receive a job offer to join Cartier and a warm invitation to the team!
   

  

**Take your next step with Cartier, we look forward to hearing from you!**

data.jd_text:
**Ciudad :** 
 Quequen
 **Estado :** 
 Buenos Aires (AR\-B)
 **País :** 
 Argentina (AR)
 **Número de Requisición :** 
 44502
   

  

**Principales responsabilidades:**
* Implementación y seguimiento del Programa de Confiabilidad \[ARROP].
* Mantener las estrategias de mantenimiento de equipos (Planes de mantenimiento y repuestos) bajo un proceso de mejora continua.
* Controla que se sigan los procedimientos de flujo de trabajo en SAP. Uno de los programas para planificar, gestiona el movimiento de la posicion para llegar a eso.
* Asegura calidad de datos ingresados al sistema SAP, genera y reporta métricas de mantenimiento, y hace seguimiento de las mismas.
* Análisis de fallas de equipos (RCA), identificando aquellas que superan los umbrales que requieren Análisis de Causas Raíz y los lidera. Posteriormente hace seguimiento de cumplimiento de los planes de acción resultantes.
* Trabaja con los proveedores de tecnología predictiva para asegurar la calidad y optimización de su prestación.
* Supervisa las tareas de los Planificadores y Programadores
* Cumplir con los requerimientos y responsabilidades de los sistemas de gestión implementados por la compañía
* Revisión de Confiabilidad de cada modificación o cambio de diseño de las instalaciones. (Management of Change \- MOC)(Aplica a proyectos de Oficina Técnica y/o proyectos de Mantenimiento)
* Velar por las Buenas Prácticas de Manufactura e informar desvíos de calidad e inocuidad del sector.
* Realizar las tareas operativas cumpliendo con la política de calidad e inocuidad alimentaria


**Perfil Tecnico Requerido:**
* Formación de Grado en Ingeniería Mecánica, Eléctrica, Electrónica o Industrial (excluyente).
* Conocimientos sólidos en Confiabilidad (deseable)
* Buenas habilidades de comunicación y liderazgo (excluyente)
* Experiencia en el área de Mantenimiento industrial (desebale)
* Conocimientos Técnicos Industriales.
* Conocimientos en técnicas predictivas y preventivas.
* Manejo de PC: Sistema SAP, Microsoft Excel (excluyente).
* Idioma: Inglés oral y escrito intermedio (deseable)


**Ubicacion:**
 Quequen
   

  

 En Bunge (NYSE: BG), nuestro propósito es conectar a los agricultores con los consumidores para entregar alimentos, piensos y combustibles esenciales al mundo. Como proveedor líder de soluciones agroindustriales, nuestro equipo de :37,000 empleados dedicados se asocia con agricultores de todo el mundo para trasladar los productos agrícolas desde donde se cultivan hasta donde se necesitan, de manera más rápida, inteligente y eficiente. Somos un líder mundial en originación, almacenamiento, distribución, procesamiento y refinación de oleaginosas, que ofrece una amplia cartera de aceites, grasas y proteínas de origen vegetal. Trabajamos junto con nuestros clientes en ambos extremos de la cadena de valor para ofrecer productos de calidad y desarrollar soluciones innovadoras y personalizadas que aborden las necesidades cambiantes de los consumidores. Con más de 200 años de experiencia y presencia en más de 50 países, estamos comprometidos a fortalecer la seguridad alimentaria mundial, promover la sostenibilidad y ayudar a las comunidades a prosperar donde operamos. Bunge tiene su domicilio social en Ginebra, Suiza, y su sede corporativa en St. Louis, Missouri. Obtenga más información en Bunge.com.
   

  

 Cada día, nuestra gente ejemplifica estos valores, que representan la esencia de Bunge:
   

  

* SOMOS UN ÚNICO EQUIPO – Colaborativos, respetuosos, inclusivos
* LIDERAMOS EL CAMINO – Ágiles, empoderados, innovadores
* HACEMOS LO CORRECTO – Con seguridad, sustentabilidad e integridad


 Reconocemos que nuestro éxito depende de las diversas perspectivas que cada uno de nuestros colaboradores aporta a Bunge. Nos esforzamos por promover acciones que fomenten una cultura de pertenencia. A nivel global, apoyamos iniciativas como los Principios para el Empoderamiento de las Mujeres, de ONU Mujeres. Colaboramos con organizaciones como Disability:IN, un referente en la inclusión de personas con discapacidad y trabajamos continuamente en pro de nuestro compromiso de dejar un legado positivo en todas las comunidades en las que operamos.
   

  

 Si esto le suena bien, ¡únase a nosotros! Valoramos e invertimos en personas que creen en nuestro propósito y están entusiasmadas por vivirlo cada día: personas que están \#OrgullosasDeSerBunge.

 The Job Holder will manage the delivery, and the governance/compliance of the fu
data.jd_text:
Job description:
   

  

 Job Purpose
 
  
 



 The Job Holder is responsible for supervising the future finance activities outsourced by NOC and to participate to the development of the NOC Outsourcing Program.
 



 The Job Holder will manage the delivery, and the governance/compliance of the future activities outsourced. He/she will assist the Head of Business Services in the transformation road map and the new scope integration.
 



 He/she has direct responsibility for the transactions processed by the outsourced team in terms of delivery, compliance with NOC CMS and adherence to industry practices
 



  
 


 Key Accountabilities
 * Participation in the development of the NOC outsourcing program, for the finance activities
	+ Preparation phase: scope identification, target KPI, documentation required, CFT execution
	+ Transition phase: target organization, transfer of activity into the new Shared Service Center, business continuity
	+ Run phase: performance management with KPI/SLA, productivity increase (tools and process improvement), integration of new scopes, synergies with existing activities outsourced (End\-to\-End approach)
	+ Continuous Improvement: management of procurement scope extension (functional scope increase, new activities), transformation plan (standardization, automation, tools, etc.) to drive productivity and synergies objectives .
	+ Support the Head of Business Services as and when required



  
 


 Key Accountabilities
 * Management of outsourced Finance Activities
	+ Understanding the end\-to\-end process and particularities, supporting tools and technologies, requirements for team members performing this process
	+ Preparing training material and delivering training to the outsourcing team
	+ Driving process excellence and continuous improvements (efficiency, consistency and automation) in all processes and domain expertise to enhance internal customer satisfaction and efficiency
	+ Defining, reporting and analyzing KPIs and SLAs, root cause analysis of issues. Monitor and implement SLA.
	+ Focal point of the outsourcing team for the Finance entity


 Key Accountabilities Competencies Delegate Appropriately and Communicate Effectively Demonstrate Adaptability in Managing Complex Situations Demonstrate Learning Agility and Drive Innovation Develop Emotional Intelligence and Cultural Competence Develop Others and Institutionalise Knowledge Develop Talent for the Future NOC Sustainability Facilitate Collaboration and Sense of Community Improve Safety, Technical Proficiency and Results Lead By Example with NOC Values Set Purpose, Strategic Direction and Company Plan Strengthen Accountability and Continuous Improvement Think and Act in Stakeholder\-Centric Ways Education
 
 BSc Degree in Science or Commercial field or its equivalent
 



 Master’s Degree in Administration an added Value
 


 Certification Experience
 * Strong professional experience \> 10 years in the O\&G and the Supply Chain domain
* Deep knowledge of the “Source to Contract” and “Procure to Pay processes, interfaces with Finance, Compliance, Legal, Technical Entities, Planning and Logistics

data.title: Business Process Reengineering (BPR) Specialist
data.raw_snippet:
The incumbent will assist the Section Head \- Business Process Management \& Excellence in managing the design, and evaluation, of the business processes pertaining to bank\-wide functions for effectiveness, process quality and simplification.
 



 The incumbent will facilitate the respective stake
data.jd_text:
The incumbent will assist the Section Head \- Business Process Management \& Excellence in managing the design, and evaluation, of the business processes pertaining to bank\-wide functions for effectiveness, process quality and simplification.
 



 The incumbent will facilitate the respective stakeholders to critically review current processes and suggest to\-be process solutions to improve efficiency. The jobholder will ensure research support on account of best practices, Banking industry benchmarks, other customer experiences and technology to enable process re\-engineering for improved business process performance through continuous enhancement of all key business processes to align and achieve the bank goals and objectives.
 



  





**OPERATIONAL** 



* Update self on and analyze market conditions, best practices, banking industry benchmarks, other customer experiences and technology which may have considerable impact on the banking business processes practices and recommend appropriate business / process technical solutions to improve business processes efficacy.
* Assist the Section Head in the establishment and roll out of a standardized approach for process evaluation and continual business process performance improvement.
* Evaluate the business process re\-engineering / improvement suggestions outcomes to ensure compliance with the strategic goals and objectives of the Bank.
* Support in coordination efforts with the stakeholders to help improve the business processes within the bank wide functions.
* Conduct time and motion studies on demand in identification of acceptable business process performance levels and non\-performing and priority areas for eliminating delays, overlaps, and redundancies.
* Support in analysis of the elements / activities associated with the business processes to further the identification processes improvement and enhancement initiatives.
* Perform gap analysis on the as\-is and to\-be processes with focus on internal / external customer expected experience.
* Provide necessary business process management support in defining process re\-engineering recommendations and suggestions concepts and in formulating significant result indicators, and measurement criteria

data.title: Production Manager (PDM001)
data.raw_snippet:
**Foreground is partnering with a market\-leading frozen food manufacturer to appoint a results\-oriented Production Manager to lead day\-to\-day manufacturing operations and ensure plant performance meets both commercial and regulatory expectations.**
 This is a critical leadership role within a hi
data.jd_text:
**Foreground is partnering with a market\-leading frozen food manufacturer to appoint a results\-oriented Production Manager to lead day\-to\-day manufacturing operations and ensure plant performance meets both commercial and regulatory expectations.**
 This is a critical leadership role within a high\-throughput facility, requiring deep functional knowledge, team leadership capability, and operational foresight. The successful candidate will oversee production execution, performance governance, and quality adherence across multiple lines, while serving as a key enabler of operational stability and growth.
   

  

**Key Objectives**
* Own full accountability for manufacturing performance, leading a structured production organization across shifts and lines.
* Ensure uninterrupted output in alignment with demand plans, quality standards, and safety protocols.
* Build a robust performance culture across teams, driving frontline ownership and leadership depth.
* Champion process optimization through waste reduction, automation, and manufacturing excellence tools.


**Core Responsibilities**
**Production Oversight**
* Translate demand and production plans into optimized daily and weekly schedules with full utilization of manpower, equipment, and materials.
* Submit daily production performance reports with insights and corrective actions directly to executive leadership.
* Lead incident management, root cause analysis, and escalation routines for downtime, deviations, or critical risks.


**Leadership \& Culture**
* Manage a multi\-level production organization including supervisors, team leaders, and operators.
* Conduct regular coaching, performance appraisals, and structured learning interventions.
* Foster a strong safety, hygiene, and GMP culture with zero tolerance for non\-compliance.


**Quality \& Compliance**
* Guarantee strict compliance with HACCP, ISO 22000, and internal food safety systems.
* Partner with QA and QC teams to close gaps, implement preventive controls, and uphold product integrity across all lines.
* Oversee sanitation, allergen management, and production readiness audits.


**Optimization \& Innovation**
* Identify process inefficiencies and lead initiatives to improve yield, reduce scrap, and enhance line balance.
* Support automation projects, layout reengineering, and equipment upgrades in coordination with engineering and maintenance functions.
* Lead production readiness for new product launches and commercialization trials.


**Cross\-Functional Alignment**
* Interface with planning, supply chain, maintenance, quality, and commercial functions to ensure seamless flow across operations.
* Participate in S\&OP meetings, providing data\-driven input on capacity, constraints, and readiness.


**Candidate Profile**
* Bachelors degree in Food Technology, Industrial Engineering, or a related field.
* 7\+ years of progressive manufacturing experience in food or FMCG, with at least 3 years in a plant leadership role.
* Strong understanding of cold chain, frozen food, or meat/poultry manufacturing environments.
* Certified in or deeply familiar with HACCP, ISO 22000, GMP, and regulatory inspection standards.
* Operational command of ERP and real\-time production systems.
* Proven ability to lead teams in complex, fast\-paced production environments.

data.raw_snippet:
**About This Opportunity**
 Ericsson is looking for a Head of Integration Services Hub1 within Service Line (SL) Business and Operations Systems (BOS) as a key leadership role part of BOS Delivery Excellence, responsible for leading the service excellence. The role focuses on services business pre\-
data.jd_text:
**About This Opportunity**
 Ericsson is looking for a Head of Integration Services Hub1 within Service Line (SL) Business and Operations Systems (BOS) as a key leadership role part of BOS Delivery Excellence, responsible for leading the service excellence. The role focuses on services business pre\-sales and overlooks integrated delivery models setup including System Integration, Application Development \& Maintenance , and IT Managed Services.
   

  

 This role reports to the Head of SL BOS Delivery Excellence for MEMA and will be part of BOS Delivery Excellence Leadership team.
   

  

 What You Will Do:
   

  

* Lead BOS service excellence, managing team of senior services professionals.
* Accountable for services engagement and pre\-sales including target topline and profitability.
* Responsible for aligning with Solution Area on Services GTM and drive services offering build up , presales and delivery engagements for the EMEA region.
* Secure service delivery readiness through competence planning inline with business and portfolio evolution.
* Senior People Manager of own unit and a senior Leader across matrixed organization extending to solution line professionals in other CU BOS, BOS solution lines and SD/SDU units.
* Adopt, position and expand integrated service delivery offerings; with focus on customer value realization, delivery efficiency, and adapting to different commercial models.
* Champion delivery efficiency initiatives in collaboration with program management, CU BOS SL and SD/SDU.
* Set Individual Performance and Development goals for members with regular check\-ins.
* Responsible for team dimensioning; and Cost Center Responsible to deliver over\-Absorption target and required Utilization/Billability.
* Drive a Knowledge Sharing and Asset building culture across their community.
* Instill a culture of add\-on sales and customer value maximization.


 What You Will Bring:
   

  

* 12\+ years of experience in telecom industry with leadership track record in professional services including system integration, application development \& maintenance, and IT managed services.
* Deep understanding of BOS portfolio including products and services.
* University degree in ICT/Engineering. A graduate degree such as an MBA is a plus.
* Strong People Manager track record leading Senior Team members and leading Leaders.
* Deep Telecom knowledge including understanding of Telecom networks, OSS \& BSS components and familiarity with TmForum (eTOM, SID, TAM)
* Advanced experience with IT Systems and Integration
* OSS and BSS full stack integrations and surrounding ecosystems
* API management \& microservice architecture
* Cloud\-Native \& Platform transformation
* Data analytics, AI/ML applications in service operations
* In depth knowledge of different SDLC methodologies including Agile, Waterfall and DevOps approaches.
* Proven experience with MS IT and ADM related frameworks – ITIL, COBIT \& SAFe
* Demonstrated experience leading cross\-functional highly matrixed and globally distributed teams.
* Recommended certifications (external): ITIL, Lean Six Sigma, PMP
* Recommended certifications (internal): MSCOO, ICT PD JS8 GIAP certification
* Strong consultative, presentation, and communication skills
* Proven track record to deliver results within a time sensitive and high\-pressure environment.
* Highly proficient collaboration skills
* Solid ability to communicate effectively at executive levels.
* In\-depth knowledge of running Organizational and Solution Level Governance.
* Fluent in English; additional languages are a plus.


 Note: There are a total of 4 Head of Integration Services Hub vacancies with the same responsibility and skills requirements.

data.title: Vice President - Instrumentation & Control Systems
data.raw_snippet:
We are seeking a senior business leader to head our Instrumentation, Automation \& Control Systems division. This role carries full end\-to\-end responsibility for the business unit, including
 **P\&L ownership, commercial strategy, engineering capability, project execution, and customer satisfactio
data.jd_text:
We are seeking a senior business leader to head our Instrumentation, Automation \& Control Systems division. This role carries full end\-to\-end responsibility for the business unit, including
 **P\&L ownership, commercial strategy, engineering capability, project execution, and customer satisfaction** 
 .
 



 The Vice President will play a critical role in driving growth, operational excellence, and transforming the business into a high\-performing provider of integrated instrumentation, automation, and control system solutions across industrial and infrastructure sectors.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  





**Business \& P\&L Leadership** 



* Own full P\&L responsibility, driving revenue growth, profitability, and operational efficiency
* Develop and execute annual business plans, budgets, and financial targets
* Track financial KPIs and implement corrective actions as needed
* Provide regular performance and risk updates to executive leadership



**Commercial Strategy \& Market Development** 



* Lead tendering, pricing, proposals, and contract negotiations
* Ensure competitive, compliant, and profitable commercial offerings
* Identify and develop opportunities in instrumentation, automation, control systems, and smart industrial applications
* Build and strengthen relationships with utilities, industrial clients, EPC contractors, and consultants



**Project Delivery Excellence** 



* Oversee all projects from award through final handover
* Ensure delivery meets schedule, cost, quality, and safety targets
* Establish and maintain a robust PMO framework for planning, risk management, and reporting
* Improve resource utilization and reduce rework and field issues



**Engineering \& Systems Integration** 



* Build strong engineering capabilities across instrumentation, PLC/DCS, SCADA/RTU, and systems integration
* Define engineering standards, design guidelines, and quality control processes
* Strengthen turnkey and integrated solution delivery capabilities



**Customer \& Stakeholder Management** 



* Act as the senior escalation point for key customers and partners
* Drive customer satisfaction and conduct regular business reviews
* Ensure timely resolution of commercial or execution issues



**Organization \& Talent Development** 



* Design and optimize the organizational structure
* Lead, mentor, and develop senior managers across commercial, engineering, and operations
* Identify talent gaps and support recruitment, training, and capability development
* Foster a culture of accountability, safety, and continuous improvement



  





**Candidate Profile** 




  




* 15\+ years of experience in industrial instrumentation, automation, and control systems
* Proven P\&L leadership experience in a project\-based or engineering organization
* Strong commercial, contractual, and negotiation skills
* Deep technical knowledge of instrumentation, PLC/DCS, SCADA, and systems integration
* Demonstrated ability to lead large, multidisciplinary technical teams
* Excellent communication and stakeholder\-management capabilities

data.title: Factory Manager
data.raw_snippet:
Are you up to the challenge? Are you passionate about an amazing job vacancy in the state of Kuwait. If you are and have extensive factory management experience related to Meat/ Chicken and/ or Sea Food in particular, please apply immediately for this immediate hiring job vacancy.
 



**ABOUT THE J
data.jd_text:
Are you up to the challenge? Are you passionate about an amazing job vacancy in the state of Kuwait. If you are and have extensive factory management experience related to Meat/ Chicken and/ or Sea Food in particular, please apply immediately for this immediate hiring job vacancy.
 



**ABOUT THE JOB**




**Operations \& Production:** 



* Direct daily operations of the F\&B production facility, ensuring efficient use of materials, labor, and equipment.
* Develop and implement production schedules to meet targets.
* Oversee machinery, systems, and workflow changes to enhance productivity.
* Ensure focusing and achieving production targets and objectives.



**Quality \& Compliance:** 



* Implement and maintain rigorous quality control (QC) and quality assurance (QA) systems.
* Ensure strict adherence to all health, safety (HSE), and food safety regulations (e.g. HACCP, ISO 22000\).
* Manage inspection systems and production reporting procedures.



**Financial Management:** 



* Develop and manage departmental budgets, controlling costs (labor, materials).
* Analyse P\&Ls and identify opportunities to maximize revenue and profitability.



**Supply Chain \& Inventory:** 



* Plan, forecast, source, and manage inventory of raw materials and finished goods.
* Negotiate with vendors and manage supplier relationships.
* Reduce waste to the minimal and ensure reporting to management.



**Team Leadership \& Development:** 



* Recruit, train, schedule, and manage production, kitchen, and maintenance teams.
* Foster a positive, high\-performance culture focused on quality and efficiency.



**Strategy \& Improvement:** 



* Proactively seek new technologies and innovations to improve processes.
* Contribute to business development and new product initiatives.



  





**ABOUT YOU**



* \+12 years proven excellent experience in F\&B manufacturing and production management, especially in Meat, Chicken and/ or Sea Food; out of all, at least 8 years in a managerial related role.
* Bachelor’s degree in food science, food technology, factory management or related field
* Excellent experience in working with R\&D and a person who always think out of the box (new products manufacturing, new items creation, innovation of existing products and its enhancements…etc.).
* Results\-oriented, proactive, passionate about food, strong ethical standards.
* Leadership and excellent communication skills.
* Data \& budgeting analysis skills with strong knowledge of F\&B safety, hygienic and production practices besides possessing an excellent operational excellency in all aspects of the plant/ factory.



  





**ABOUT the COMPANY**



* In the local and regional markets for more than 30 years,
* One of the best in the State of Kuwait with a variety of F\&B products,
* Aim to be the pioneer in food industry in the coming 10 years.

data.title: Head of Research And Development
data.raw_snippet:
**Our client** 




 A well\-established organization operating within a highly regulated, process\-driven environment. The business is currently strengthening its quality and compliance framework as part of a broader transformation agenda. It maintains high standards of safety, governance, and inte
data.jd_text:
**Our client** 




 A well\-established organization operating within a highly regulated, process\-driven environment. The business is currently strengthening its quality and compliance framework as part of a broader transformation agenda. It maintains high standards of safety, governance, and international best practices.
 



  





**Your Role** 




 You will lead the R\&D and process development function within a complex manufacturing environment, driving innovation, process optimization, and scale\-up initiatives while ensuring strong alignment with production, regulatory, and quality standards.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Lead research and process development initiatives focused on improving yield, efficiency, and cost optimization within a fermentation\-driven manufacturing setup.
* Drive scale\-up activities from pilot to commercial production, ensuring seamless technology transfer and process robustness.
* Oversee pilot plant operations, including experimental design, validation, and process optimization trials.
* Collaborate closely with production, quality, and regulatory teams to ensure product integrity and compliance with global standards.
* Identify and implement new technologies and methodologies to enhance process performance and sustainability.
* Troubleshoot process inefficiencies and deviations, driving continuous improvement across manufacturing operations.
* Build and lead a high\-performing technical team across R\&D, process engineering, and pilot operations.
* Ensure adherence to environmental, safety, and regulatory requirements within a highly controlled production environment.



  





**Must Have** 



* Master’s or PhD in Biotechnology, Microbiology, Chemical Engineering, or a related field.
* 12–15 years of experience within pharmaceutical or API manufacturing, with strong exposure to fermentation\-based processes.
* Proven expertise in process development, scale\-up, and technology transfer within a manufacturing environment.
* Strong understanding of regulatory frameworks such as GMP, FDA, EMA, or equivalent.
* Hands\-on experience working closely with production and cross\-functional teams in a plant setting.
* Demonstrated leadership experience managing technical teams and driving performance.
* Exposure to environmental and sustainability aspects within industrial operations is preferred.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving capabilities with a structured, data\-driven approach.



  





**Next Steps** 




 Shortlisted candidates will be contacted within 5–7 working days for a detailed discussion about the role. Due to high application volumes, we will only respond to shortlisted profiles.

data.title: Chief Marketing Officer
data.raw_snippet:
**About Medetone**
 Medetone is a dynamic and fast\-growing online pharmacy that prioritises customer care and innovation in healthcare delivery. We are committed to providing customers a seamless, safe, and efficient service. We offer prescription medications, over\-the\-counter products, and perso
data.jd_text:
**About Medetone**
 Medetone is a dynamic and fast\-growing online pharmacy that prioritises customer care and innovation in healthcare delivery. We are committed to providing customers a seamless, safe, and efficient service. We offer prescription medications, over\-the\-counter products, and personalised healthcare services.
   

  

 Role Overview
   

  

 We're seeking an experienced and visionary Chief of Marketing Officer to join our senior leadership team on\-site in Dubai. Reporting directly to the CEO, the CMO will be a strategic partner. You'll have experience driving measurable business growth through OOH Marketing, PR campaigns, e\-commerce platforms, online pharmacy operations and digital channels aligning it with our rapid growth across our UK, Europe, US and Dubai pharmacies and have an ambition to lead in healthcare innovation.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Growth Strategy \& Leadership: Shape and implement a growth strategy aligned with business objectives, leading initiatives across customer acquisition, brand awareness (OOH \& PR), and revenue generation to drive scalable business growth
* Integrated Campaign Management: Oversee the development of multi\-channel campaigns, ensuring consistent messaging and coordination across digital and social platforms
* Partnerships \& Media Relations: Build and maintain relationships with media partners and key stakeholders to amplify brand reach and support PR objectives
* Brand Management \& Positioning: Oversee the brand strategy , ensuring consistent messaging and visual identity across all marketing channels to strengthen market perception


**Requirements**
 Requirements
   

  

* OOH \& PR Expertise: Demonstrated experience planning and executing out\-of\-home and public relations campaigns
* Team Leadership: Proven leadership of global performance marketing within a high\-growth ecommerce or pharmaceutical brand
* E\-Commerce Revenue Growth: Develop and execute a comprehensive e\-commerce growth strategy for online pharmacy platforms such as Shopify. Drive customer acquisition, retention, and lifetime value across digital channels
* Shopify \& Digital Platform Management: Lead the development and optimization of the company's Shopify ecosystem
* Adaptability: Thrives in a fast\-paced, evolving environment and is adept at navigating complex organisational landscapes with agility
* Creative \& Brand Awareness: Strong understanding of brand building, management, and campaign development


**Benefits**
 Why Work With Us?
   

  

 At Medetone, we are committed to creating a dynamic, innovative workplace where every team member has the opportunity to make a real impact. You'll be joining a growing company that's at the forefront of healthcare innovation, with the chance to contribute to exciting projects that are transforming patient care.
   

  

 What We Offer
   

  

* Competitive Executive Salary
* Performance\-Based Bonus Opportunities
* Access to Advanced Operational Tools and Technology
* Opportunities for Professional Growth and Development
* Global marketing ownership and high autonomy


 This is a unique opportunity for a strategic and results\-oriented operations professional to make a significant impact in a fast\-growing healthcare organisation. If you're ready to lead and drive operational excellence, we'd love to hear from you!

data.title: Chief Digital Marketing Officer
data.raw_snippet:
Role Overview
 



  





 We are seeking a commercially driven and data\-led Chief Digital Marketing Officer (CDMO) with deep experience in the telecommunications sector to lead digital growth, customer acquisition, and transformation across the Group.
 



 The CDMO will play a critical role in s
data.jd_text:
Role Overview
 



  





 We are seeking a commercially driven and data\-led Chief Digital Marketing Officer (CDMO) with deep experience in the telecommunications sector to lead digital growth, customer acquisition, and transformation across the Group.
 



 The CDMO will play a critical role in scaling digital sales channels, enhancing customer experience, and driving subscriber growth, ARPU, and retention across mobile, broadband, and converged offerings.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



  





 Digital Growth \& Commercial Strategy
 


* Define and execute a digital\-first growth strategy across mobile, broadband, fibre, and bundled products
* Drive online subscriber acquisition and digital revenue contribution across all markets
* Partner with Commercial, Product, and Technology teams to align pricing, packaging, and go\-to\-market strategies



 Performance Marketing \& Acquisition
 


* Own all digital acquisition channels (paid media, SEO/SEM, affiliates, programmatic, social)
* Optimize customer acquisition cost (CAC) while maximizing lifetime value (LTV)
* Lead data\-driven campaign execution with continuous testing, attribution modelling, and ROI optimisation



 Digital Sales \& Channels
 


* Scale and optimise direct\-to\-consumer digital channels (web, app, e\-commerce platforms)
* Increase digital penetration of sales and self\-service across all product lines
* Drive online conversion improvements through funnel optimisation and UX enhancements



 Customer Lifecycle \& Retention
 


* Lead CRM, lifecycle marketing, and personalization strategies to reduce churn and increase engagement
* Implement targeted campaigns for upsell, cross\-sell, and bundle adoption
* Utilize behavioural data and segmentation to improve retention and ARPU



 Telecom KPI Ownership
 


* Monitor and optimise key telecom metrics including:
* Subscriber growth \& net adds
* ARPU and revenue mix
* Churn and retention rates
* Digital sales penetration
* Conversion rates across digital funnels



 MarTech, Data \& Analytics
 


* Own and evolve the marketing technology stack (CRM, CDP, automation, analytics platforms)
* Build advanced analytics capabilities (customer insights, predictive modelling, segmentation)
* Leverage AI and automation to drive campaign performance and customer experience



 Brand, Content \& Digital Presence
 


* Lead digital brand strategy and execution across all channels
* Oversee content, social media, and digital communications aligned to commercial goals
* Ensure consistent brand positioning across markets and customer touchpoints



 Transformation \& Innovation
 


* Drive digital transformation initiatives across marketing and customer engagement
* Champion agile ways of working and experimentation culture
* Identify new digital revenue streams (VAS, fintech, content partnerships, etc.)



 Leadership \& Stakeholder Management
 


* Build and lead a high\-performing, multi\-market digital marketing team
* Manage external agencies, media partners, and technology vendors
* Collaborate with Technology, Data, and Customer Experience teams to deliver end\-to\-end digital excellence



 Key Requirements
 



 Experience \& Background
 


* Proven experience in a senior digital marketing leadership role within a telecommunications operator or digital telecom ecosystem
* Strong track record in driving digital subscriber growth and online revenue
* Experience managing large\-scale performance marketing budgets with clear ROI accountability



 Telecom Expertise
 


* Deep understanding of telecom products: mobile, broadband, fibre, enterprise solutions, and bundled offerings
* Strong grasp of telecom commercial levers including pricing, promotions, and distribution channels
* Experience working with high\-volume customer bases and subscription models



 Technical \& Digital Skills
 


* Expertise in performance marketing, SEO/SEM, paid media, and programmatic
* Strong knowledge of CRM, marketing automation, and customer data platforms (CDPs)
* Experience in conversion rate optimisation (CRO) and digital funnel management
* Familiarity with telecom digital ecosystems (apps, self\-care portals, e\-commerce journeys)



 Leadership \& Attributes
 


* Highly commercial, data\-driven, and results\-oriented
* Strategic thinker with strong execution capability
* Ability to operate in complex, multi\-market environments
* Strong stakeholder management and executive presence

data.jd_text:
**Chief Technology Officer (CTO) \| FinTech \| Dubai** 




  





 A fast\-scaling payments fintech is looking to appoint a Chief Technology Officer to lead its next phase of growth. This is a key leadership role, shaping the technology vision, scaling the platform, and building a high\-performing engineering organisation.
 



 This opportunity is open to both established CTOs and senior technology leaders ready to step into their first CTO role.
 



  





**The Role** 




 You will take full ownership of the technology function, working closely with the founders and leadership team to drive product innovation, platform scalability, and technical excellence.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Define and execute the overall technology strategy aligned with business goals
* Lead, scale, and mentor engineering and product teams
* Oversee architecture, platform performance, security, and reliability
* Drive the development of scalable payments infrastructure and integrations
* Collaborate with product, operations, and commercial teams to deliver impactful solutions
* Ensure compliance with regulatory and security standards across fintech/payments
* Build best\-in\-class engineering practices, processes, and culture



  





**Requirements** 



* Proven experience in a senior technology leadership role (CTO, VP Engineering, or similar)
* Strong background in fintech, payments, or financial services technology
* Experience building and scaling high\-availability, secure platforms
* Deep understanding of payments infrastructure, APIs, and integrations
* Strong leadership skills with experience managing and growing teams
* Ability to operate in a fast\-paced, scaling environment



  





**What’s on Offer** 



* Opportunity to shape and lead the technology vision of a high\-growth fintech
* High\-impact role with direct influence on business strategy
* Competitive salary



  





 Apply now!

data.jd_text:
My Client is a global leading crypto exchange.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 We are seeking an experienced and commercially minded Global Head of Marketing to lead
 



 and scale the company’s global marketing function during its next phase of growth.
 



 This role will own the end\-to\-end marketing strategy across brand, growth, communications,
 



 community, and regional execution—ensuring marketing serves as a key driver of user
 



 acquisition, engagement, and long\-term market leadership.
 



 Working closely with executive leadership and cross\-functional teams, the Global Head of
 



 Marketing will translate business priorities into impactful global campaigns, strong brand
 



 positioning, and measurable commercial outcomes across both retail and institutional
 



 audiences.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




 Global Marketing Strategy \& Growth
 


* Define and execute the global marketing strategy aligned with business expansion and commercial objectives.
* Drive user acquisition, engagement, retention, and platform growth through integrated marketing initiatives.
* Establish clear performance metrics linking marketing activities to trading activity, customer growth, and revenue impact.
* Identify market opportunities and develop scalable go\-to\-market strategies across regions and customer segments.



 Brand \& Market Positioning
 


* Own and evolve global brand positioning, ensuring clarity, credibility, and differentiation across markets.
* Lead global brand campaigns, major product launches, partnerships, and sponsorship initiatives.
* Maintain strong brand governance, including messaging frameworks, tone of voice, and visual consistency across regions.



 Performance \& Digital Marketing
 


* Oversee performance marketing and digital acquisition strategies across paid, owned, and earned channels.
* Optimize marketing effectiveness through data\-driven experimentation, attribution analysis, and funnel optimization.
* Drive scalable growth through online marketing, partnerships, affiliates, and ecosystem collaborations.



 Communications \& Reputation Management
 


* Lead global PR and communications strategy, including media engagement, executive visibility, and reputation management.
* Support strategic messaging during key industry developments and market cycles.•
* Ensure consistent external communications aligned with company values and regulatory expectations.



 Community \& Social Ecosystem
 


* Scale global community engagement and social media strategy to strengthen user loyalty and ecosystem influence.
* Enhance brand presence within global digital asset and technology communities.
* Foster authentic engagement across online and offline channels.



 Regional Marketing \& Go\-to\-Market Execution
 


* Partner with regional teams to localize global strategy across priority markets.
* Support successful market entry and expansion initiatives worldwide.
* Align marketing execution with regional commercial and regulatory requirements.



 Team Leadership \& Organizational Development
 


* Build, lead, and develop a high\-performing global marketing organization.
* Establish scalable operating models, processes, and performance standards.
* Foster a culture combining creativity, speed, accountability, and data\-driven decision making.



  





**Qualifications** 



* 12\+ years of marketing leadership experience within global technology, fintech, internet platform, or high\-growth environments.
* Proven track record leading integrated marketing functions across brand, growth, communications, and digital channels.
* Demonstrated success driving measurable business growth through marketing initiatives.
* Experience managing global or multi\-regional marketing organizations.
* Strong strategic thinking combined with hands\-on execution capability.
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills, with the ability to influence senior leadership.
* Exposure to cryptocurrency, digital assets, fintech, or trading platforms is a strong advantage; crypto\-native experience is highly preferred but not mandatory.

data.title: Executive Secretary to CEO/VP
data.raw_snippet: Our Group aspires to be a world\-class, professional global company with deep\-rooted business fundamentals. Our success is driven by hiring and developing the most efficient and dynamic people and implementing advanced information systems. We are currently seeking a highly professional and experien
data.jd_text:
Our Group aspires to be a world\-class, professional global company with deep\-rooted business fundamentals. Our success is driven by hiring and developing the most efficient and dynamic people and implementing advanced information systems. We are currently seeking a highly professional and experienced Executive Secretary to provide comprehensive, high\-level administrative support to our Chief Executive Officer (CEO) and Vice President (VP). The ideal candidate will be a proactive, organised, and discreet individual capable of managing a demanding workload in a fast\-paced environment. This role is critical to ensuring the smooth and efficient operation of our executive office.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Manage and maintain the complex and demanding schedules of the CEO and VP, including arranging appointments, meetings, and conferences.
* Coordinate all aspects of executive travel, including booking flights, accommodation, and ground transportation, and preparing detailed itineraries.
* Prepare and edit correspondence, communications, presentations, and other documents on behalf of the executives.
* Act as the primary point of contact between the executives and internal/external stakeholders, screening and directing phone calls and emails.
* Organise and attend meetings, ensuring the executives are well\-prepared; this includes taking minutes, distributing them, and following up on agreed action points.
* Handle confidential information with the utmost discretion and integrity.
* Manage executive expenses, process invoices, and assist with budget tracking for the executive office.
* Conduct research and compile data to prepare documents for review and presentation by executives.
* Maintain an efficient and organised filing system for both electronic and physical documents.


**Qualifications**
* Proven experience as an Executive Secretary, Executive Assistant, or in a similar senior administrative role, supporting C\-level executives.
* Exceptional organisational, planning, and time\-management skills with a proven ability to multitask and prioritise work.
* High proficiency in the complete Microsoft Office Suite (Outlook, Word, Excel, PowerPoint).
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English; fluency in Arabic is highly advantageous.
* A high degree of professionalism, discretion, and an understanding of the importance of confidentiality.
* The ability to work independently, remain calm under pressure, and meet tight deadlines.
* A proactive approach to problem\-solving with strong decision\-making capabilities.
* A bachelor's degree in Business Administration, Secretarial Studies, or a related field is preferred.


**Benefits**
* A competitive remuneration package.
* An opportunity to work in a dynamic and professional environment that supports career growth and development.
* Play an integral role within a forward\-thinking company that is a leader in its field.

data.title: Chief Technology Officer
data.raw_snippet:
**About Atos Group**
 Atos Group is a global leader in digital transformation with c. 67,000 employees and annual revenue of c. €10 billion, operating in 61 countries under two brands — Atos for services and Eviden for products. European number one in cybersecurity, cloud and high performance comput
data.jd_text:
**About Atos Group**
 Atos Group is a global leader in digital transformation with c. 67,000 employees and annual revenue of c. €10 billion, operating in 61 countries under two brands — Atos for services and Eviden for products. European number one in cybersecurity, cloud and high performance computing, Atos Group is committed to a secure and decarbonized future and provides tailored AI\-powered, end\-to\-end solutions for all industries. Atos Group is the brand under which Atos SE (Societas Europaea) operates. Atos SE is listed on Euronext Paris.
   

  

 The purpose of Atos Group is to help design the future of the information space. Its expertise and services support the development of knowledge, education and research in a multicultural approach and contribute to the development of scientific and technological excellence. Across the world, the Group enables its customers and employees, and members of societies at large to live, work and develop sustainably, in a safe and secure information space.
   

  

**Role Purpose**
 The CTO for the Middle East \& Turkey region is responsible for leading the regional technology strategy and owning the
 **end\-to\-end presales and solutioning function** 
 for all Atos portfolios. The role acts as the primary technology advisor to customers and internal teams, ensuring that all solutions are innovative, competitive, and fully aligned with business growth objectives.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Technology Strategy \& Innovation**
* Define and execute the technology vision for the MET region aligned with global CTO strategy.
* Drive adoption of Cloud, Data, AI/ML, Cybersecurity, and Digital Platforms.
* Translate regional market trends into relevant offerings and use cases.


**Presales**
* Lead the regional presales and solution architecture function across all business lines.
* Own solution development for major bids, RFPs, and digital transformation programs.
* Ensure quality, feasibility, and competitiveness of all technical proposals.
* Strengthen partnerships (Azure, AWS, Google, OEMs) to support winning solutions.


**Client Engagement**
* Serve as a trusted technology advisor to CIO/CTO\-level stakeholders.
* Support key accounts with solution roadmaps, architecture planning, and technology advisory.
* Represent Atos in CXO engagements, technology councils, and industry forums.


**Technical Governance \& Delivery Assurance**
* Provide architecture governance and technical oversight for large regional programs.
* Establish and enforce technology standards, patterns, and best practices.
* Act as final escalation point for critical solution or design issues.


**People \& Capability Development**
* Lead and develop a high\-performing team of architects and presales specialists.
* Build strong technical capability in Cloud, Data, Cyber, AI/ML, and industry domains.
* Strengthen certification frameworks and engineering excellence in the region.


**Required Experience**
* 15\+ years in senior technology leadership roles (CTO / Chief Architect / Technical Director).
* Deep expertise in Cloud, Data, Cybersecurity, AI/ML, and modern engineering practices.
* Strong experience running presales and large\-scale solution architecture functions.
* Proven engagement with senior stakeholders across Public Sector, BFSI, Energy, and Telecom.
* Strong commercial acumen and ability to influence at C\-level.


**Choose your future. Choose Atos.**

data.title: Chief Executive Officer
data.raw_snippet:
**Chief Executive Officer (CEO) \& General Manager Mudir Amali P A** 




**Company Overview** 




 Mudir Amali ("PA") is a pioneering technology start\-up based in Doha, Qatar. We offer a smart personal\-assistant platform that combines advanced artificial intelligence with a network of trained hu
data.jd_text:
**Chief Executive Officer (CEO) \& General Manager Mudir Amali P A** 




**Company Overview** 




 Mudir Amali ("PA") is a pioneering technology start\-up based in Doha, Qatar. We offer a smart personal\-assistant platform that combines advanced artificial intelligence with a network of trained human delegates to manage customers’ day\-to\-day tasks.
 



  





 Users interact with our service through natural\-language chat (via our App) and can request anything from document delivery and food \& coffee delivery to rides, shopping, luggage/cargo delivery, medicine delivery, security \& safety equipment, flowers \& chocolate, and other errands.
 



  





 The platform integrates modern AI to understand requests, assigns a real assistant to execute the task, and provides real\-time order tracking and fast execution.
 



  





 Our vision is to be the first choice for daily personal assistance, enabling users to reclaim their time and focus on what matters. Our mission is to connect users with reliable human assistants who provide diverse services and fast delivery to improve quality of life.
 



  





 Mudir Amali offers:
 


* 24/7 technical support
* Secure payment options (Visa, MasterCard, Apple Pay, bank transfer)
* Flexible subscription packages with discounts and VIP support



  





 We serve all major areas in Qatar, including Doha, Al Rayyan, Al Wakrah, Lusail, and The Pearl, and have tens of thousands of active users and 150\+ partners.
 



 🌐 https://www.mudiramali\-pa.com
 



  





  





**Role Summary** 




 We are seeking a
 **Chief Executive Officer (CEO) \& General Manager** 
 to lead Mudir Amali into its next phase of growth.
 



 The CEO will report to the board of directors and will have full P\&L responsibility. This role will shape strategy, oversee operations, lead product execution, manage AI\-driven systems and human operations, and drive expansion beyond Qatar.
 



  





 We are looking for a visionary leader with strong operational excellence, entrepreneurial mindset, and deep understanding of scaling technology\-enabled services in the Middle East.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Strategic Leadership** 



* Develop and execute long\-term strategy aligned with company vision
* Identify new markets, partnerships, and revenue streams
* Lead expansion across GCC and beyond
* Leverage AI insights and data for strategic decision\-making



**Operational Management** 



* Oversee daily operations of the AI\-powered platform
* Ensure fast execution, real\-time tracking, and high service quality
* Lead cross\-functional teams (product, engineering, logistics, support, marketing)
* Manage and optimize the human assistant network



**Technology \& Innovation** 



* Drive innovation in AI, Natural Language Processing (NLP), and automation
* Adopt emerging technologies (AI, predictive analytics, etc.)
* Ensure strong data security and compliance



**Financial \& Administrative Leadership** 



* Manage budgets, forecasts, and financial performance
* Optimize pricing and subscription strategies
* Lead fundraising, investor relations, and board reporting



**Partnerships \& Stakeholders** 



* Build relationships with corporate clients and government entities
* Expand B2B services and recurring operations
* Represent the company publicly and strategically



  





  





**Candidate Qualifications** 



* **Experience:** 
 15\+ years in executive leadership, operations, or general management
* **Tech Exposure:** 
 Experience with AI\-driven products, apps, or tech platforms
* **Operational Strength:** 
 Proven ability to scale operations across multiple services
* **Leadership:** 
 Strong track record building high\-performing teams
* **Strategy:** 
 Experience in market expansion and partnerships
* **Finance:** 
 Strong financial and analytical capabilities
* **Communication:** 
 Fluent Arabic \& English (Arabic is a MUST)
* **Education:** 
 Bachelor’s required; MBA preferred



  





  





**Benefits \& Opportunities** 



* Lead a
 **high\-impact, mission\-driven company**
* Work on
 **cutting\-edge AI and digital assistant technology**
* Scale a platform with
 **strong traction in the Middle East**
* Competitive compensation \+ incentives \+ potential equity
* Fast\-paced, creative, and ambitious environment



  





  





**How to Apply** 




 Apply directly on LinkedIn.
 



 Qualified candidates will be contacted.
 



  





 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
 



  





**فرصة عمل: الرئيس التنفيذي (CEO) والمدير العام – مدير أعمالي P A** 




**نبذة عن الشركة** 




 شركة
 **مدير أعمالي (PA)** 
 هي شركة تقنية ناشئة رائدة مقرها الدوحة، قطر. نقدم منصة مساعد شخصي ذكية تجمع بين
 **الذكاء الاصطناعي المتقدم** 
 وشبكة من المساعدين البشريين لتنفيذ المهام اليومية للعملاء.
 



 يمكن للمستخدمين التفاعل معنا عبر التطبيق أو واتساب باستخدام اللغة الطبيعية، وطلب خدمات مثل:
 



 توصيل المستندات، توصيل الطعام والقهوة، المشاوير، التسوق، نقل الأغراض، توصيل الأدوية، معدات السلامة، الهدايا، وغيرها من المهام اليومية.
 



  





 تعتمد المنصة على الذكاء الاصطناعي لفهم الطلبات، ثم تعيين مساعد حقيقي لتنفيذها، مع تتبع مباشر وسرعة في التنفيذ.
 



 رؤيتنا أن نكون الخيار الأول للمساعدة الشخصية اليومية، ونمكن المستخدمين من استعادة وقتهم والتركيز على ما يهمهم.
 



 مهمتنا هي ربط المستخدمين بمساعدين موثوقين يقدمون خدمات متنوعة بسرعة وكفاءة.
 



 نقدم:
 


* دعم فني 24/7
* وسائل دفع آمنة (بطاقات، Apple Pay، تحويل بنكي)
* اشتراكات مرنة مع مزايا VIP



 نغطي جميع مناطق قطر ولدينا عشرات الآلاف من المستخدمين وأكثر من 150 شريك.
 



 🌐 https://www.mudiramali\-pa.com
 



  





  





  





**ملخص الدور** 




 نبحث عن
 **رئيس تنفيذي (CEO) ومدير عام** 
 لقيادة الشركة في مرحلة النمو القادمة.
 



 سيكون المسؤول عن:
 


* وضع الاستراتيجية
* إدارة العمليات اليومية
* قيادة تطوير المنتج
* إدارة الأنظمة المعتمدة على الذكاء الاصطناعي
* التوسع داخل وخارج قطر



 نبحث عن قائد صاحب رؤية، يجمع بين الخبرة التشغيلية والعقلية الريادية.
 



  





  





**المسؤوليات الرئيسية** 




**القيادة الاستراتيجية** 



* وضع وتنفيذ استراتيجية طويلة المدى
* استكشاف أسواق وفرص جديدة
* قيادة التوسع في الخليج والمنطقة
* استخدام بيانات الذكاء الاصطناعي في اتخاذ القرار



**الإدارة التشغيلية** 



* إدارة العمليات اليومية للمنصة
* ضمان سرعة التنفيذ وجودة الخدمة
* قيادة الفرق المختلفة
* إدارة شبكة المساعدين



**التقنية والابتكار** 



* تطوير استخدام الذكاء الاصطناعي والتقنيات الحديثة
* تبني تقنيات جديدة لتحسين الأداء
* ضمان أمن البيانات والامتثال



**الإدارة المالية** 



* إدارة الميزانيات والتكاليف
* تطوير استراتيجيات التسعير والاشتراكات
* إدارة المستثمرين وجمع التمويل



**الشراكات** 



* بناء علاقات مع الشركات والجهات الحكومية
* تطوير خدمات B2B
* تمثيل الشركة أمام الشركاء والإعلام



  





  





**المؤهلات المطلوبة** 



* خبرة لا تقل عن
 **15 سنة** 
 في الإدارة أو القيادة التنفيذية
* خبرة في تطبيقات تقنية أو منتجات تعتمد على الذكاء الاصطناعي
* قدرة عالية على إدارة العمليات وتوسيعها
* مهارات قيادية قوية
* خبرة في التوسع وبناء الشراكات
* مهارات مالية وتحليلية ممتازة
* إتقان اللغة العربية واللغة الإنجليزية (اللغة العربية إلزامية)
* بكالوريوس كحد أدنى، ويفضل MBA



  





  





**المزايا** 



* قيادة شركة ذات تأثير حقيقي
* العمل على تقنيات حديثة ومتقدمة
* فرصة للنمو والتوسع في السوق
* راتب تنافسي \+ حوافز \+ إمكانية أسهم
* بيئة عمل سريعة ومبتكرة



  





  





**طريقة التقديم** 




 التقديم مباشرة عبر موقع LinkedIn
 



 سيتم التواصل مع المرشحين المؤهلين.
