data.jd_text:
****About the Client:****
 A global digital transformation and technology services firm with 20\+ years of experience, operating across 40\+ locations and a workforce of 50K\+. The company delivers AI\-led solutions, cloud services, data intelligence, and business process transformation to enterprise clients worldwide
   

  

**Job Summary**
 The Director \- Sales will drive revenue growth in Saudi Arabia by developing and executing strategic sales initiatives focused on cloud, digital engineering, cybersecurity, and automation services. The role requires strong local market expertise, enterprise sales experience, and established relationships across key industries.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Develop and execute sales strategy to achieve revenue and market share targets in KSA
* Identify and acquire new enterprise clients across Financial Services, Oil \& Gas, Government, and Travel sectors
* Own end\-to\-end sales cycle including lead generation, RFPs, proposal development, and deal closure
* Build and maintain strong C\-level relationships with key stakeholders
* Drive consultative selling for digital transformation, cloud, and cybersecurity solutions
* Track market trends, competitor activity, and emerging technologies
* Collaborate with pre\-sales and delivery teams for solution alignment


**Requirements**
* 12\-15 years of experience in B2B IT / Digital / Tech services sales
* Minimum 10\+ years experience in Saudi Arabia market
* Strong enterprise sales experience in IT services / digital transformation
* Proven track record of revenue generation and deal closures
* Strong network across target industries
* Fluent in English (Arabic preferred)
* Bachelor's degree (Business / Technology or related)
* Must\-Have Criteria
+ Transferable IQAMA
+ Attested degree certificate with apostille


**Benefits**
* Salary: SAR 30,000/month \+ Incentives
* 30 days Annual leave
* Medical insurance (self \+ family)
* Gratuity as per GOSI
* Visa support
* Annual air tickets (self \+ family)

data.title: AVP - Head of Customer Intelligence & Insights Activation
data.raw_snippet: The Customer Intelligence \& Insights is accountable for establishing and leading the enterprise\-wide customer intelligence capability for DIB. This role owns the definition, integration, and interpretation of customer intelligence across all customer touchpoints — digital, branch, contact centre,
data.jd_text:
The Customer Intelligence \& Insights is accountable for establishing and leading the enterprise\-wide customer intelligence capability for DIB. This role owns the definition, integration, and interpretation of customer intelligence across all customer touchpoints — digital, branch, contact centre, complaints, social, surveys, and external signals — transforming fragmented data into a single, actionable view of customer reality. The role goes beyond analytics execution to define how the bank understands customers, translating behavioural, attitudinal, and experiential signals into clear customer outcomes (e.g. acquisition quality, activation, attrition, retention, cross\-sell, loyalty) and driving insight\-led actions across Business, Digital, Operations, Service, and Transformation functions. This is a strategic yet highly action\-oriented leadership role, requiring strong judgement, enterprise influence, and the ability to connect insight to decision\-making at scale.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




  





 Enterprise Customer Intelligence Ownership
 



 • Own and define the enterprise Customer Intelligence Framework, setting how customer data is aggregated, synthesised, interpreted, and activated across the bank.
 



 • Integrate multiple sources of customer insight, including:
 



 o Voice of Customer (VOC), complaints, and contact centre interactions
 



 o Digital behaviour and transactional signals
 



 o Surveys, research, social listening, and external benchmarks
 



 • Establish a single, coherent view of customer reality, moving the organization away from siloed, channel\-specific analytics.
 



 • Oversee model development and rules for Next Best Action and Personalized Actions (propensity, eligibility, affordability, suitability) with Data Science and Risk.
 



 • Oversee predictive churn modeling and segmentation (save‑ability, value at risk, reason codes), with governance for drift monitoring and bias checks.
 



 • Supervise CLV modeling and calibration, including back‑testing, stability monitoring, and bias/fairness checks; chair model change control with Model Risk/Governance
 



 • Lead pricing and value‑proposition design for bundles, including benefit tiers, fee waivers, rewards, and thresholds; run A/B and multivariate tests to optimize take‑up and profitability
 



 • Establish experimentation at scale A/B test creatives, timing, channels, and incentives; optimize for incremental lift and CLV impact, not just click‑through.
 



  





 2\. Strategic Insight to Business Action
 



 • Translate customer intelligence into clear implications for customer outcomes, including:
 



 o Acquisition quality and onboarding effectiveness
 



 o Activation and usage behaviour
 



 o Attrition risk and early\-warning indicators
 



 o Retention, engagement, and cross\-sell opportunities
 



 • Drive insight\-led prioritisation for:
 



 o Segment and proposition strategy
 



 o Customer lifecycle design and activation
 



 o Journey redesign and service model improvements
 



 • Ensure insights are decision\-ready, outcome\-oriented, and tied to enterprise priorities.
 



 3\. Enterprise Influence \& Governance
 



 • Act as a trusted advisor to senior stakeholders across Business, Digital, Operations, Service, and Transformation.
 



 • Present customer intelligence and implications to senior management and governance forums, influencing prioritisation and investment decisions.
 



 • Embed customer intelligence into enterprise decision\-making, rather than post\-hoc reporting.
 



 4\. Intelligence Frameworks \& Advanced Analytics
 



 • Define standards for customer analytics and insight development, including:
 



 o Predictive and diagnostic modelling
 



 o Segmentation, personas, and value\-driver analysis
 



 o Root\-cause and systemic issue analysis
 



 • Guide the application of AI and advanced analytics to uncover patterns and risks while ensuring interpretability and business relevance.
 



 • Provide oversight in the architecture, development, and ongoing maintenance of CoCE‑specific data schemas and data marts, ensuring alignment with enterprise analytics and governance standards.
 



 • Partner closely with Data Engineering and SPBA teams to ensure data quality, availability, and responsible use.
 



 5\. Data Quality, Governance \& Compliance
 



 • Serve as the data steward for the CoCE team and work closely with the data governance team to ensure adherence to governance standards and compliance requirements.
 



 • Oversee the implementation of data‑quality controls, including validation checks, ongoing monitoring, and exception‑handling processes to ensure reliable and trusted data.
 



 • Ensure full compliance with DIB’s data‑security, privacy, and regulatory obligations, providing oversight and direction to uphold enterprise‑wide risk and control requirements.
 



 • Provide oversight for the continuous curation and maintenance of the CoCE report inventory, ensuring accuracy, completeness, and relevance for business and governance needs.
 



 6\. Leadership \& Capability Building
 



 • Lead, mentor, and develop the Customer Intelligence team, raising analytical maturity and business acumen.
 



 • Build enterprise data literacy and insight adoption, ensuring stakeholders understand and act on insights.
 



 • Oversee the continuous enhancement of dashboards, insight packs, and executive\-level intelligence outputs.
 



 7\. Risk, Ethics \& Governance
 



 • Ensure all analytics and insight activities comply with data privacy, regulatory, and ethical standards.
 



 • Establish governance around insight interpretation and usage to avoid misrepresentation or unintended customer harm.
 



  





**Education \& Work Experience:** 




  





 • Degree in Data Analytics, Business Intelligence, or related field; MBA preferred.
 



 • 10\-12\+ years of experience in customer analytics, customer insights, strategy, or customer\-led
 



 transformation
 



 • Demonstrated experience operating at enterprise or group level, not function\-specific analytics
 



 • Demonstrated Experience with report and dashboard development tools such as PowerBI, SAP
 



 Business Objects, Tableau, etc
 



 • Proven ability to translate customer insight into business and customer outcomes
 



 • Banking or financial services experience strongly preferred

data.jd_text:
**Head of Marketing– Tradeiators** 




  





**Role Overview** 



* Lead Tradeiators’ marketing and growth strategy.
* Scale global user acquisition and build a strong trader community.



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Manage and scale paid channels: Google Ads, Meta Ads, TikTok, Taboola, MGID.
* Optimize CAC, CPA, ROAS, and LTV.
* Manage marketing budgets and performance campaigns.
* Implement tracking and attribution (GA4, pixels, postbacks).
* Build and optimize the funnel: visitor → register → deposit → battle → repeat.
* Improve onboarding, conversion, activation, and retention.
* Manage social media and community (X, Instagram, TikTok, YouTube, Telegram/Discord).
* Expand affiliate and influencer partnerships.
* Strengthen brand positioning: “Trade against traders, not brokers.”
* Improve website messaging and landing page conversion.
* Provide weekly performance reports and growth plans.



  





**Requirements** 



* 6\+ years experience in performance marketing.
* Strong expertise in Google Ads and Meta Ads.
* Experience scaling paid traffic and managing acquisition funnels.
* Experience in trading, fintech, CFD, or gaming is a strong advantage.
* Experience managing large ad budgets ($100k\+ monthly) preferred.
* Strong analytical and data\-driven mindset.
* Comfortable working in a fast\-moving startup environment.



  





**KPIs (First 6 Months)** 



* Lower CPA
* Increase FTDs (First Time Deposits)
* Improve deposit conversion rates
* Increase battle participation
* Improve user retention
* Expand affiliate partnerships
* Grow social engagement and community activity



  





**How to Apply (Important)** 



* Along with your CV, please submit a 60\-second video answering:
* Who are you?
* Why are you interested in this role?
* What have you scaled?
 *(include budget and measurable results)*
* Why Tradeiators?



  





**Compensation Structure:** 




  





 1\. Base Salary: 22,000 AED
 



 2\. Performance Bonus tied to:
 


* Net revenue growth
* CAC reduction
* Active trader growth
* Retention improvements



 3\. Equity options in the company long term.
 



  





  





**Interested candidates, please submit your CV and a link to your self\-presentation video to yuliag@innohive.tech. CV\-only applications will not be considered**

data.title: Head of Marketing Research and Experience
data.raw_snippet:
**Role Summary**
 We're looking for a sharp, curious, and commercially minded Head of Marketing Research \& Customer Experience to join our leadership team. You'll own the insight engine that powers our marketing, product, and growth decisions while ensuring every touchpoint a customer has with us i
data.jd_text:
**Role Summary**
 We're looking for a sharp, curious, and commercially minded Head of Marketing Research \& Customer Experience to join our leadership team. You'll own the insight engine that powers our marketing, product, and growth decisions while ensuring every touchpoint a customer has with us is informed by real data, not gut instinct. This is a high\-impact role that sits at the intersection of research, analytics, customer strategy, and growth marketing. You'll be equal parts analyst, strategist, and storyteller \- able to translate complex data into clear actions that move the business forward.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Market \& Competitive Research**
* Lead our market intelligence function; tracking trends, competitor moves, and emerging opportunities in the fintech landscape.
* Commission and run both qual and quant research programs (surveys, focus groups, desk research, third\-party data).
* Provide leadership with regular, decision\-ready briefs on market dynamics and whitespace opportunities.
* Build and maintain a competitive intelligence framework that keeps us ahead of the curve.


**Customer Insights \& Brand Tracking**
* Own the growth VOC program end\-to\-end, designing listening posts across the customer lifecycle and turning feedback into insight
* Partner with Product, Marketing, and Commercial teams to ensure customer perspectives directly inform roadmap and GTM decisions.
* Develop and maintain rich customer personas and segmentation models that reflect how our customers actually behave.
* Own brand health tracking program with external partners and internal stakeholders


**CX Data \& Analytics**
* Work closely with our Data team to build dashboards and insight frameworks that track customer sentiment, behaviour, and experience metrics (NPS, CSAT, CES, etc.).
* Define and own the research tech stack; from survey tools to analytics platforms.
* Champion a data\-driven culture across the marketing function, raising the bar on how we measure and report on customer outcomes.
* Turn raw numbers into clear narratives for exec and board\-level audiences


**Leadership Attributes**
 Platform Thinking.
   

  

 Ability to optimize growth across a portfolio of services rather than a single product.
   

  

**Growth Orientation**
 Deep understanding of user acquisition, engagement, retention, and monetisation levers.
   

  

**Commercial Acumen**
 Strong instinct for identifying scalable revenue opportunities within large digital user bases.
   

  

**Data Fluency**
 Ability to translate analytics and experimentation into strategic decision\-making.
   

  

**Collaborative Leadership**
 Comfort working across product, marketing, data, and commercial teams to deliver platform\-wide growth
   

  

**Requirements**
* 8\+ years in marketing, consumer insights, or customer experience roles.
* At least 3 years in a leadership or management capacity.
* Proven track record in a tech, fintech, or connectivity services environment.
* Experience designing and running both quantitative (surveys, conjoint, segmentation) and qualitative (depth interviews, focus groups, ethnography, usability testing) research.
* Strong command of CX measurement frameworks (NPS, CSAT, CES) and journey mapping methodologies.
* Significant experience in managing marketing research with external partners and internal stakeholders.
* Preference for a multi role expertise including commercial, brand management and, digital marketing.
* Excellent analytical skills; comfortable with data, statistical methods, and research tools

data.title: Head of Performance Marketing | Forex / CFD Trading
data.raw_snippet:
**About the Opportunity** 




 Our client is a long\-established, globally regulated financial services group operating across FX, CFDs, commodities, indices, and digital assets. With a strong international footprint and a rapidly expanding user base, the organization is scaling its global marketin
data.jd_text:
**About the Opportunity** 




 Our client is a long\-established, globally regulated financial services group operating across FX, CFDs, commodities, indices, and digital assets. With a strong international footprint and a rapidly expanding user base, the organization is scaling its global marketing function to drive acquisition, retention, and revenue growth across multiple regulated markets.
 



 They are seeking a Head of Performance Marketing to lead and scale all paid acquisition efforts, optimize marketing ROI, and drive high\-quality trader acquisition across global markets.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Leading the global performance marketing strategy across all paid channels including Google, Meta, programmatic, affiliate networks, and emerging acquisition platforms, with a strong focus on trader acquisition and deposit\-driven growth
* Owning and optimizing customer acquisition funnels end\-to\-end, from first touchpoint through to funded accounts and trading activity, ensuring strong conversion and lifetime value
* Managing and scaling multi\-million dollar marketing budgets, ensuring efficient allocation across channels, geographies, and campaigns based on performance data and ROI metrics
* Driving data\-led decision\-making, leveraging analytics tools (e.g., GA4, AppsFlyer, Adjust, internal BI tools) to monitor CAC, CPA, ROAS, LTV, and cohort performance
* Collaborating closely with Product, CRM, Sales, and Dealing teams to align acquisition strategies with trading behavior, client segmentation, and retention initiatives
* Overseeing paid media execution and optimization, including campaign structure, audience targeting, bidding strategies, creatives, and landing page performance
* Building and managing high\-performing internal teams and external agencies, ensuring accountability, performance tracking, and continuous improvement
* Developing and executing A/B testing frameworks across creatives, landing pages, funnels, and messaging to improve conversion rates and reduce acquisition costs
* Ensuring compliance with regulatory and platform policies across all marketing activities, particularly in highly regulated financial services markets
* Identifying and scaling new acquisition channels and growth opportunities, including affiliates, influencers, partnerships, and alternative media sources
* Driving localization strategies across key markets to ensure campaigns are tailored to regional behaviors, languages, and regulatory environments



  





**Requirements** 



* Proven experience in a senior performance marketing leadership role within Forex, CFDs, online trading, or closely related financial services environments
* Strong understanding of trader acquisition funnels, including KYC onboarding, deposits, and trading activation metrics
* Demonstrated success managing large\-scale paid media budgets with clear ownership of ROI, CAC, and revenue impact
* Deep expertise in platforms such as Google Ads, Meta Ads, programmatic networks, and affiliate ecosystems
* Strong analytical mindset with hands\-on experience using performance tracking tools, attribution models, and data visualization platforms
* Experience working in regulated environments, with a clear understanding of compliance requirements across different jurisdictions
* Ability to translate complex data into clear, actionable insights for executive leadership
* Proven leadership experience managing cross\-functional teams and external partners
* Strong commercial awareness with a focus on revenue growth, cost efficiency, and scalability
* Experience in multi\-region / global campaigns, particularly across MENA, Europe, and Asia is highly preferred

data.title: Head of Clinical Applications
data.raw_snippet:
**Position Overview:** 




  





 The Head of Clinical Applications is a senior technical leadership role accountable for the end\-to\-end ownership, governance, and strategic evolution of the Oracle Health (Cerner) Millennium clinical platform, Revenue Cycle Management payment and its integrated
data.jd_text:
**Position Overview:** 




  





 The Head of Clinical Applications is a senior technical leadership role accountable for the end\-to\-end ownership, governance, and strategic evolution of the Oracle Health (Cerner) Millennium clinical platform, Revenue Cycle Management payment and its integrated application ecosystem. This includes Rhapsody, Synapse RIS, FiveFaces Patient Portal, AI clinical initiatives (eg Ambient Listening, Diagnostic AI) and all relevant clinical applications across the organisation.
 



  





 The role combines deep Millennium platform expertise with enterprise integration architecture capability, providing authoritative leadership across clinical application delivery, HL7/FHIR interoperability, ambient AI adoption, charging, patient billing and clinical data integrity.
 



 The Head of Clinical Applications guides multi\-disciplinary teams of analysts, engineers, and informatics specialists \- serving as the primary bridge between clinical requirements, integration architecture, and digital transformation strategy \- ensuring the organisation's clinical technology landscape is safe, high\-performing, and continuously advancing.
 



  





**Key Accountabilities:** 




  





**Clinical Application Ownership \& Cerner Millennium Platform Leadership** 



* Lead the end\-to\-end ownership, governance, and strategic roadmap for the Oracle Health (Cerner) Millennium platform, including all clinical and operational modules across inpatient, ambulatory, and perioperative workflows
* Serve as the organisation's principal subject matter expert on Cerner Millennium architecture, configuration standards, domain model, and release management \- providing authoritative technical guidance to clinical informatics, IT, and executive stakeholders
* Drive platform optimisation, build governance, and clinical content standardisation across all Millennium domains including PowerChart, FirstNet, SurgiNet, PharmNet, Revenue Cycle, and Results Review



  





**Integration Architecture \& Interoperability Strategy** 



* Architect and govern the end\-to\-end HL7 and FHIR integration landscape connecting Cerner Millennium to downstream clinical, operational, and analytics systems \- including PACS, LIS, MDI/BMDI, pharmacy inpatient and retail, RCM billing solutions and third\-party SaaS solutions
* Lead the design, implementation, and operational governance of the enterprise integration engine (Rhapsody/Mirth), establishing interface standards, message routing logic, and transformation frameworks
* Drive FHIR R4 adoption strategy including SMART on FHIR application enablement, clinical API governance, and interoperability roadmap aligned with regulatory requirements (DHA, MOH, NABIDH)



  





**Clinical Applications Team Leadership \& Capability Development** 



* Lead, mentor, and develop a multi\-disciplinary team of clinical application analysts, integration engineers, informatics specialists, and build configuration resources
* Establish team operating models, delivery frameworks, and competency standards that elevate the organisation's internal Millennium and integration capability



  





  





**Revenue Cycle Integration \& Clinically\-Driven Charging** 



* Oversee governance and optimisation of clinically\-driven charging workflows within Cerner Millennium, ensuring accurate charge capture is embedded at the point of care across inpatient, ambulatory, and procedural settings
* Lead the integration architecture between Millennium Revenue Cycle and downstream RCM platforms including patient billing, claims processing, and payer adjudication systems — ensuring clean, real\-time data flow that minimises revenue leakage and billing exceptions
* Partner with Finance, Clinical Coding, and RCM operational leads to align system configuration with coding standards (ICD\-10, CPT, DRG), pre\-authorisation workflows, and payer contract logic



  





**Digital Clinical Innovation \& Ambient AI** 



* Guide the evaluation, piloting, and enterprise deployment of emerging clinical technologies including ambient AI documentation, agentic clinical workflows, and AI\-assisted clinical decision support
* Oversee the integration of ambient intelligence tools with Cerner Millennium, including real\-time write\-back architectures, NLP\-to\-structured\-data pipelines, and clinician\-facing AI interfaces



  





  





**Clinical Informatics \& Analytics Enablement** 



* Partner with clinical and operational leadership to design and deliver Cerner\-native and downstream analytics capabilities including Millennium reporting, Oracle ADW/OAC integration, and SAP BusinessObjects clinical datasets
* Lead the PACS and diagnostic imaging platform integration strategy, ensuring seamless clinical workflow across radiology, cardiology, and allied health image management



  





**Stakeholder Engagement \& Clinical Partnership** 



* Serve as the primary technology interface for clinical department heads, nursing informatics leads, and medical directors \- translating clinical requirements into platform architecture and build decisions
* Represent clinical applications and integration at board, committee, and executive governance forums, providing clear articulation of platform health, roadmap, and risk


- 


  





**Vendor \& Contract Management** 



* Own the strategic relationship with Oracle Health, managing support escalations, product advisory engagement, and contract performance against SLAs
* Govern third\-party clinical application vendor relationships including integration engine, ambient AI, CDS, PACS, and specialty application suppliers



  





  





**Performance, Governance \& Risk Management** 



* Define and monitor KPIs for clinical application availability, integration pipeline health, Millennium platform performance, and service desk resolution quality
* Establish and chair clinical application governance committees, change advisory boards, and platform steering groups
* Implement risk frameworks for clinical application dependencies, integration failure modes, and Millennium upgrade readiness
* Report on platform health, programme delivery, and innovation pipeline to executive leadership and the Board of Directors



  





  





**Education \& Qualification, Experience, Training \& Knowledge** 




**Education** 



* Bachelor's degree in Health Informatics, Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related clinical or technical field; advanced degree (MBA, MSc Health Informatics) preferred
* 8\+ years of progressive experience in clinical applications management, healthcare IT, or health informatics \- with demonstrable depth in Oracle Health (Cerner) Millennium platform ownership
* 5\+ years in a senior leadership role with direct responsibility for clinical application teams, integration architecture, or health IT programme delivery



  





**Cerner Millennium \& Integration Expertise (Essential)** 



* Deep, hands\-on expertise across Cerner Millennium clinical and operational domains \- including PowerChart, FirstNet, SurgiNet, PharmNet, Revenue Cycle, and Results Review
* Proven experience as a Millennium integration architect or senior build lead, with direct accountability for HL7 interface design, domain model governance, and cross\-system integration
* Demonstrated experience with enterprise integration engines (Rhapsody, Mirth, Rhapsody/Mirth equivalents) including interface build, monitoring, and operational governance
* Strong understanding of FHIR R4, SMART on FHIR, and CDS Hooks frameworks within the Oracle Health ecosystem



  





**Clinical Informatics \& Analytics** 



* Understanding of clinical data standards (HL7 v2, FHIR R4, SNOMED CT, LOINC, ICD\-10\) and their application within Millennium and downstream analytics platforms
* Experience with clinical analytics platforms (Oracle ADW, OAC, SAP BusinessObjects, or equivalent) integrated with Millennium data feeds
* Knowledge of PACS and diagnostic imaging integration within the Millennium clinical workflow



  





**Regulatory \& Governance Knowledge** 



* Familiarity with UAE healthcare regulatory frameworks \- DHA, HAAD/DoH, MOH \- and their implications for clinical application governance and data exchange
* Understanding of NABIDH interoperability standards and their technical implementation within the Cerner ecosystem is highly desirable

data.title: Head of Growth (Marketing)
data.raw_snippet: We are currently partnering with a high\-growth, international business within the health and wellness space, looking to appoint a Marketing Director to lead and scale their global growth function. This is a pivotal hire for the business, with full ownership of subscriber growth across existing and
data.jd_text:
We are currently partnering with a high\-growth, international business within the health and wellness space, looking to appoint a Marketing Director to lead and scale their global growth function. This is a pivotal hire for the business, with full ownership of subscriber growth across existing and new markets, including upcoming expansion into the UK and UAE.
 



  





**The Opportunity** 




 The business has already built a strong foundation, with an established subscriber base, high retention rates, and a highly engaged community. However they are now looking for a senior individual to take full ownership of the acquisition and retention engine.
 



 This role will be responsible for building a scalable growth strategy that operates independently of founder\-led channels, with a clear focus on performance, international expansion.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Own the end\-to\-end growth funnel: awareness, acquisition, conversion, and retention
* Define and execute performance marketing strategy across key channels (Meta, Google, TikTok, Apple Search Ads)
* Set and manage budgets, CPA targets, and channel allocation across multiple markets
* Lead international market entry for the UK and UAE, including go\-to\-market strategy and execution
* Optimise conversion across the funnel, including landing pages, onboarding journeys, and pricing strategies
* Drive CRM and lifecycle marketing initiatives, including email and retention strategies
* Work closely with internal teams across performance marketing, SEO, and influencer marketing to align on growth objectives
* Analyse performance data and make informed, data\-driven decisions to improve key metrics including trial conversion, retention, and LTV



  





**The Profile** 



* 5\- 7\+ years’ experience in growth or performance marketing within a subscription\-based or recurring revenue business
* Proven track record of owning and delivering against subscriber growth targets or P\&L
* Strong hands\-on experience managing paid acquisition at scale across multiple channels
* Deep understanding of conversion optimisation, retention strategies, and customer lifecycle management
* Experience launching or scaling products in new markets
* Highly data\-driven, with experience using analytics and attribution tools
* Comfortable operating in a fast\-paced, founder\-led environment with high levels of ownership



  





**Additional Information** 



* Location: Dubai Full\-time office\-based
* Reporting directly into founders
* Small team, high ownership, and strong growth potential



  





 This is an opportunity for someone who is looking to take full ownership of a growth function within a scaling business, with the ability to make a direct and measurable impact on international expansion and overall revenue growth.
 



  





 If this aligns with your background, please feel free to get in touch directly.

 This is a senior leadership role responsible for building a high\-performing marketing engine across multiple channels — from acquisition to brand, from performance marketing to content an
data.jd_text:
We are looking for a Head of Marketing to lead and scale the global marketing function at MarketsVox.
   

  

 This is a senior leadership role responsible for building a high\-performing marketing engine across multiple channels — from acquisition to brand, from performance marketing to content and partnerships.
   

  

 You will work directly with leadership to define strategy, drive growth, and position MarketsVox as a leading player in the global trading industry.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Define and execute the global marketing strategy aligned with company growth objectives
* Lead and manage all core marketing directions:
+ Performance marketing (paid acquisition)
+ Affiliate \& partner marketing (IB / CPA)
+ Content \& SEO
+ Brand \& communication

* Build, structure, and scale the marketing team
* Drive client acquisition and activation across key regions (SEA, LATAM, Europe)
* Optimize marketing funnels and improve conversion rates (CPL → FTD → retention)
* Manage and allocate marketing budgets with clear ROI focus
* Collaborate closely with Sales, Product, and Partnerships teams
* Oversee brand positioning and ensure consistency across all channels
* Analyze performance data and continuously optimize campaigns
* Identify new growth channels and market opportunities


**Requirements**
* Proven experience as a Head of Marketing / Marketing Director / Growth Lead
* Strong background in performance marketing and acquisition
* Experience in Forex / CFD / fintech / iGaming / affiliate\-driven industries
* Deep understanding of CPA, RevShare, IB models
* Experience managing multi\-channel marketing teams
* Data\-driven mindset with strong analytical skills
* Ability to operate in a fast\-paced, high\-growth environment
* Fluent English

data.title: Senior Business Development Manager - Financial Services
data.raw_snippet:
Technology is our how. And people are our why. For over two decades, we have been harnessing technology to drive meaningful change.
   

  

  

  

 By combining world\-class engineering, industry expertise and a people\-centric mindset, we consult and partner with leading brands from various indus
data.jd_text:
Technology is our how. And people are our why. For over two decades, we have been harnessing technology to drive meaningful change.
   

  

  

  

 By combining world\-class engineering, industry expertise and a people\-centric mindset, we consult and partner with leading brands from various industries to create dynamic platforms and intelligent digital experiences that drive innovation and transform businesses.
   

  

  

  

 From prototype to real\-world impact \- be part of a global shift by doing work that matters.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 Endava is looking for a
 **Senior Business Development Manager with a strong track record selling IT Professional Services into Banking and Financial Services organisations across Saudi Arabia.**




 This role focuses on
 **winning new banking clients and developing strategic relationships with CIOs, CTOs, and digital transformation leaders across the Saudi banking ecosystem.**




 The successful candidate will bring an
 **established network within regional banks** 
 and experience closing
 **large\-scale digital engineering and transformation engagements** 
 .
   

  





 Based in
 **Riyadh** 
 , this role is primarily responsible for
 **new client acquisition across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia** 
 , while also supporting selected growth opportunities in the
 **United Arab Emirates** 
 .
   

  





 You will introduce Endava’s capabilities across
 **digital engineering, custom software development, cloud transformation, and data platforms** 
 , shaping strategic engagements that support banking clients as they modernise technology and deliver new digital capabilities.
   

  





 This is a
 **pure new business acquisition role** 
 focused on enterprise IT services sales. The position is an
 **individual contributor role with no people management responsibilities** 
 .
   

  





 Responsibilities
   

  





 Drive
 **new business acquisition across Banking and Financial Services organisations in Saudi Arabia**




 Build and leverage relationships with
 **CIOs, CTOs, Chief Digital Officers, Heads of Engineering, and Technology Transformation leaders within banks**




 Position Endava’s capabilities across:
   

  

  




* Digital engineering
* Custom software development
* Cloud transformation
* Data platforms and analytics
* Digital banking and payments solutions
* Identify opportunities aligned with major banking technology initiatives including:
* Core banking modernisation
* Digital banking platforms
* Payments and transaction systems
* Cloud migration and platform modernisation
* Data and AI programmes



 Own and execute the
 **end\-to\-end enterprise sales lifecycle** 
 , including:
   

  

  




* Strategic prospecting
* Opportunity qualification
* Solution shaping
* Proposal development
* Commercial negotiation
* Deal closure
* Shape and close
 **complex professional services engagements and multi\-year digital transformation programmes**
* Develop and maintain a
 **high\-quality sales pipeline aligned with ambitious revenue targets**
* Collaborate with
 **delivery leaders, solution architects, and consulting teams** 
 to develop tailored solutions for banking clients
* Represent Endava at
 **industry events, executive forums, and regional banking and technology conferences**
* Contribute to strengthening Endava’s
 **market presence within the Saudi banking and financial services ecosystem**



 Key Expertise Areas
   

  





 Successful candidates will typically have experience in several of the following areas:
   

  

  




* IT Professional Services Sales
* Digital Engineering Services
* Custom Software Development
* Cloud Transformation
* Core Banking Modernisation
* Payments Platforms
* Digital Banking Platforms
* Data \& AI Transformation
* Enterprise Technology Consulting
* Banking Technology Transformation



  

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

  

  




* **8–12\+ years of enterprise sales experience selling IT services, digital engineering, or technology consulting solutions**
* Proven success selling into
 **Banking, Financial Services, or Fintech organisations**
* Demonstrated track record of
 **new logo acquisition within enterprise technology services environments**
* Established network of
 **senior decision\-makers within banks across Saudi Arabia**
* Experience engaging with
 **CIO, CTO, Head of Engineering, Digital Transformation, and Technology Strategy leaders**
* Strong experience selling
 **large\-scale IT services engagements or digital transformation programmes ($3M–$10M\+)**
* Proven ability to
 **structure, negotiate, and close complex professional services engagements**
* Experience preparing and presenting
 **commercial proposals, business cases, and Statements of Work (SoWs)**
* Experience selling into regional banks such as
 **Al Rajhi Bank, Saudi National Bank (SNB), Riyad Bank, SABB, Alinma Bank, or similar financial institutions** 
 is highly desirable.



 Target Background
   

  





 We are particularly interested in candidates who have developed enterprise sales careers within global IT services or digital consulting organisations such as:
   

  

  




* Accenture
* EPAM
* Globant
* Thoughtworks
* Capgemini
* Cognizant
* IBM Consulting
* TCS
* Infosys
* Publicis Sapient
* Candidates who have built strong relationships across
 **banks and financial institutions in Saudi Arabia** 
 will be especially well positioned for success.
   

  





 Personal Attributes
* Highly self\-motivated and commercially driven
* Strong
 **hunter mentality** 
 with a passion for new client acquisition
* Excellent relationship\-building and stakeholder management skills
* Comfortable navigating
 **complex enterprise sales cycles**
* Confident engaging with
 **senior banking and technology executives**
* Able to operate independently in a fast\-paced, target\-driven environment
* Additional Requirements
   

  





 Travel is an integral part of this role. The successful candidate will be expected to travel across
 **Saudi Arabia, the UAE, and internationally** 
 as required.
   

  





 Candidates must hold a valid passport and be willing to travel during working hours as needed.


**Additional Information**

 Discover some of the global benefits that empower our people to become the best version of themselves:

data.title: Head of IT Applications
data.raw_snippet:
Egis is a global organisation with over 20,000 employees worldwide. With our head office based in Paris, we offer global career opportunities, as well as offer rewarding careers for our people locally.
   

  





 Egis is an organisation with a capacity to make meaningful industry and community ch
data.jd_text:
Egis is a global organisation with over 20,000 employees worldwide. With our head office based in Paris, we offer global career opportunities, as well as offer rewarding careers for our people locally.
   

  





 Egis is an organisation with a capacity to make meaningful industry and community change in the space of place\-making, sustainability and creating connected cities. Different to other engineering firms, Egis offers true end\-to\-end capability across the entire design\-to\-operation lifecycle, offering advisory, architecture, engineering, design, asset management and operations services.
   

  





 We are committed to creating great teams doing innovative work and would love
 **you** 
 to join us to
 **Impact the Future.**



**Job Description**

 We are seeking an experienced and strategic Head of IT Applications to lead our applications management function in Lusail, Qatar. In this pivotal leadership role, you will oversee the entire IT applications portfolio, driving digital transformation initiatives and ensuring alignment with organizational business objectives. You will manage a talented team of IT professionals while optimizing application performance, managing vendor relationships, and implementing innovative technology solutions that enhance operational efficiency across the organization.
   

  




* Develop and execute a comprehensive IT applications strategy that aligns with organizational goals and supports business growth initiatives
* Lead, mentor, and manage a team of applications professionals, fostering a culture of continuous improvement and technical excellence
* Oversee the full lifecycle of enterprise applications, including planning, implementation, maintenance, and optimization
* Analyze current application portfolio and identify opportunities for modernization, consolidation, and cost optimization
* Manage vendor relationships and negotiate contracts to ensure optimal service delivery and value for money
* Establish and enforce IT governance frameworks, policies, and standards for application development and deployment
* Direct digital transformation projects and ensure successful adoption of new technologies across the organization
* Monitor application performance metrics and implement improvements to enhance system reliability and user satisfaction
* Prepare and manage IT applications budget, ensuring efficient allocation of resources and cost control
* Collaborate with business stakeholders to understand requirements and translate them into effective technical solutions
* Stay current with emerging technologies and industry best practices to maintain competitive advantage


**Qualifications**

 \*\*Required Qualifications:\*\*
   

  




* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, or related field
* Minimum 10 years of experience in IT applications management and enterprise systems
* Minimum 5 years of progressive leadership experience managing IT teams and departments
* Proven expertise in enterprise application portfolio management and IT service delivery
* Strong knowledge of ERP systems, CRM platforms, and cloud\-based technologies
* Demonstrated experience with digital transformation initiatives and organizational change management
* Excellent analytical and problem\-solving skills with the ability to make data\-driven decisions
* Strong project management capabilities with experience delivering complex IT initiatives
* Exceptional communication and stakeholder management skills
* Proficiency in IT governance frameworks and best practices



 \*\*Preferred Qualifications:\*\*
   

  




* Project Management Professional (PMP) or ITIL certification
* Experience with IT financial management and budget optimization
* Knowledge of cybersecurity principles and application security best practices
* Familiarity with agile development methodologies and DevOps practices
* Experience in a multinational or global organization
* Background in business process optimization and systems integration

 The Head of Digital will lead the bank’s overall digital strategy and drive transformation across retail and corporate digital channels. This role is responsible for strengthening digital platforms, improving customer
data.jd_text:
**A leading bank in Doha is seeking to appoint a Head of Digital.** 




  





 The Head of Digital will lead the bank’s overall digital strategy and drive transformation across retail and corporate digital channels. This role is responsible for strengthening digital platforms, improving customer experience, and ensuring secure, innovative, and scalable digital banking solutions.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  




* Lead the bank’s digital transformation roadmap and key digital initiatives.
* Oversee mobile banking, online banking, and omnichannel platforms.
* Drive digital onboarding, e‑KYC, automation, and process simplification.
* Ensure digital solutions meet security, regulatory, and compliance standards.
* Introduce modern technologies, including API integrations, AI\-driven enhancements, and automation tools.
* Collaborate with IT, Operations, and Business Units to deliver impactful digital products.
* Manage vendor relationships and evaluate fintech partnerships.
* Monitor digital KPIs, adoption rates, and platform performance.



  





**Minimum Requirements** 



* 15–20 years of total experience, with strong banking industry exposure.
* Proven experience leading large\-scale digital programs in a financial institution.
* Strong knowledge of digital channels, cybersecurity basics, API/Integration frameworks, and customer experience design.
* Experience in managing cross\-functional teams and large stakeholders.
* Strong leadership, communication, and strategic decision\-making skills.
* Bachelor’s degree required; Master’s degree preferred.

data.jd_text:
**Summary** 




 The purpose of this role is to provide strategic advice to the Chief Communications Officer and to ensure the delivery of high quality, integrated marketing and communications services to HMC and its facilities. This includes marketing, market research, brand management, design, production, creative services, community engagement, events, and digital communications. The role provides guidance and leadership to the marketing team, subordinates, peers and internal clients, and leads a team dedicated to protecting and enhancing the reputation of the organization, acting as a responsible steward of the HMC brand.
 



  





 For this specific role, our primary focus is on strengthening HMC's media, digital media, and communications content capabilities within the Corporate Communications Department.
 



  





 Another key requirement for this position is the ability to represent Hamad Medical Corporation as an official media spokesperson when needed. The individual must be able to engage professionally with media outlets and digital platforms to enhance the organization’s visibility and public messaging. The Executive Director for Marketing is expected to play a vital role in strengthening HMC’s media presence, improving digital communication channels, and ensuring our services and achievements are effectively communicated to both local and international audiences.
 



  





**Education** 




 Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, OR Marketing OR Communications OR Media OR Public Relations plus Master’s Degree
 



  





**Experience** 




 12 years’ experience in Marketing out of which 5 years in Leadership capacity

data.title: Project Director
data.raw_snippet: Egis is an international player active in architecture, consulting, construction engineering and mobility services. We create and operate intelligent infrastructures and buildings that respond to the climate emergency and contribute to more balanced, sustainable and resilient territorial development
data.jd_text:
Egis is an international player active in architecture, consulting, construction engineering and mobility services. We create and operate intelligent infrastructures and buildings that respond to the climate emergency and contribute to more balanced, sustainable and resilient territorial development. Operating in 100 countries, Egis puts the expertise of its 19,500 employees at the service of its clients and develops cutting\-edge innovations accessible to all projects. Through its wide range of activities, Egis is a key player in the collective organisation of society and the living environment of citizens all over the world.
   

  





 With 3,500 employees across 8 countries in the Middle East, Egis has delivered over 700 complex development projects, stimulating economic growth and enhancing quality of life. Ranked among the top ten firms in the Middle East by Engineering News Record (ENR), Egis is committed to sustainable development. The Group’s operations in the Middle East are built on strategic acquisitions and a deep understanding of local market conditions. Egis’ long history of providing comprehensive engineering, consulting, and project management services makes it a trusted partner for regional governments, investors, and developers.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

**Project: High\-Speed Rail Line between Abu Dhabi and Dubai**
  

**Location: Dubai, United Arab Emirates**
  

**Contract Type: Design \& Build**



1. **1\. Position Overview**



 As part of a major Design \& Build contract for the delivery of a high\-speed rail line connecting Abu Dhabi and Dubai, we are seeking an experienced
 **Project Director – Design** 
 based in Dubai.
   

  





 The Project Director will lead and oversee the full design scope of the project, from preliminary and detailed design through to IFC issuance, ensuring full contractual compliance and alignment with construction requirements, schedule, and budget objectives.
   

  





**Key Responsibilities**




  

  





**Leadership \& Governance**



* Provide overall leadership and strategic direction for the design scope.
* Define and implement the design management strategy in line with contractual obligations.
* Establish and lead the integrated design organization (internal teams and external consultants).



  

  





**Contract \& Risk Management**



* Ensure full compliance of all deliverables with the Design \& Build contract requirements.
* Identify, anticipate, and manage technical and contractual risks related to design.
* Oversee variations, change management processes, and support claims strategy as needed.



  

  





**Technical Oversight**



* Supervise all design disciplines, including alignment, civil works, structures, viaducts, stations, rail systems, E\&M, and interfaces.
* Validate key technical decisions and ensure multidisciplinary consistency.
* Manage complex technical interfaces between systems and construction packages.



  

  





**Schedule \& Performance Management**



* Lead the design schedule in a highly constrained delivery environment.
* Ensure adherence to milestones, budget, and quality standards.
* Implement robust reporting and performance monitoring mechanisms.



  

  





**Client \& Stakeholder Management**



* Act as the primary point of contact for the Client on all design\-related matters.
* Participate in high\-level coordination meetings with authorities and key stakeholders.
* Represent the project at executive and institutional levels.



  

  





**Team Leadership**



* Lead and mentor discipline leads and design managers.
* Foster a high\-performance, collaborative, and multicultural team environment.
* Ensure strong coordination with construction and site\-based teams.


**Qualifications**
* Master’s degree in Civil Engineering, Railway Engineering, or related field.
* Additional qualifications in Project Management (e.g., MBA, PMP) are an advantage.



**Experience**



* Minimum 15 years of experience in large\-scale infrastructure projects.
* Proven experience in high\-speed rail or major railway projects.
* Demonstrated experience delivering projects under Design \& Build contracts.
* Prior experience in the Middle East is highly desirable.



**Technical Competencies**



* Strong expertise in multidisciplinary design management.
* In\-depth understanding of railway systems and infrastructure interfaces.
* Solid experience in risk management, planning, and complex project delivery.



**Leadership Skills**



* Strong leadership and decision\-making capabilities.
* Excellent communication and negotiation skills.
* Ability to operate effectively in a fast\-paced, high\-visibility international environment.



**Languages**



* Fluent English required.

data.raw_snippet:
We are currently seeking an experienced and talented
 **Project Director** 
 to join an award\-winning building and civil engineering company in Ireland.
 



  





 RIGHT TO WORK IN THE UNITED KINGDOM/IRELAND REQUIRED.
 



  





 Reporting to the Construction Director, the Project Director has
data.jd_text:
We are currently seeking an experienced and talented
 **Project Director** 
 to join an award\-winning building and civil engineering company in Ireland.
 



  





 RIGHT TO WORK IN THE UNITED KINGDOM/IRELAND REQUIRED.
 



  





 Reporting to the Construction Director, the Project Director has overall responsibility for the management and onsite construction of a major/complex contract with value in excess of €100m. The Project Director will be responsible for managing the companies interests, risk \& delivery strategy on the contract to guide the project to Commercial success.
 



  





**REPORTING TO:** 
 Construction Director
 



**LOCATION:** 
 Clondalkin, Dublin
 



**CONTRACT TYPE:** 
 Full\-Time, Permanent
 



  





**Role Responsibilities** 




  




* Provide overall leadership and direction for the delivery of the development from mobilisation to completion.
* Agree commencement date, and arrange for completion of the contract documents
* Ensure that all aspects of quality, the Environment and progress are in accordance with the contracted requirements
* Assist in the selection and vetting of major S/Cs and suppliers (including HSEQS vetting)
* Agree employee resource plan with the Construction Director
* Responsible for setting the design strategy and scope of novated services (If part of project scope)
* Manage S/C including S/C progress meetings and S/C pre\-order meetings
* Manage employee resources, including cover for site when staff are on annual leave or training
* Chair Internal Team Meetings/attend and chair Subcontractor meetings
* Manage Prelims in accordance with PEP and prepare applications for extension of time with SQS/QS
* Review constructability and identify methods of execution with commercial or programme advantage where possible
* Monitor and assist planning team on overall site progress against programme (PEP). Agree programmes with subcontractors and monitor progress with the SM
* Monitor cost, risk, administrative procedures and company correspondence
* Lead the project team, supply chain principals and clients, in the relentless strive for Zero Incidents, Zero Injuries and quality standards.
* Communicate with senior leadership and advise the contract team of any potential legal, IR, safety, environmental, technical or construction items as required
* Monitor interim accounts and payments with Commercial Manager, progress and profitability of the contract and report with the contract team at the monthly cost meetings.
* Monitor with Commercial Manager Final Account and Loss and Expense negotiations. Apply cost\-benefit analysis to all activities, estimates and forecasts overall costs.
* Co\-ordinate the production of the monthly CVR reports, with the commercial and Design manager and prepare/advise on forward strategy.
* Identify any potential issue which may lead to additional costs or delays and plan for recovery
* Ensure that internal control meetings are held at regular intervals
* Ensure procurement of all relevant certificates including Practical Completion, Partial Possession where applicable, Making Good Defects and Final Certificate
* Monitor post contract service during defects liability period \& retain responsibility for any matter in connection with the project after the issue of the final certificate
* Strategic Management of the client and any key stakeholders involved in the project, including communicating potential business development opportunities
* Ultimate management of the Project team \- mentor and develop staff and ensure competency of individuals carrying out delegated duties
* Ensures that the team is cohesive, communicates well together and operates as a single unit, in line with values.
* Mentor, appraise and measure performance of all direct reporting staff and drive actions/activities identified in the individual’s development plan



  





**The Candidate** 




**Qualifications \& Experience:** 



* 15 years’ experience in construction with similar contracting organisations
* In depth understanding of the market in Ireland, which the company operates, including an awareness of competitors and new initiatives
* Proven finance control/reporting ability
* Working knowledge of Construction techniques and Design and Build projects
* Familiarity with working on complex residential projects
* Proficient in planning and prioritising daily site tasks
* Commercially proficient with Public works Ireland form of contract
* Comprehensive knowledge and understanding of all the trades required on site, the codes of practice relating to them and the requirements for them, to be able to carry out required self\-delivery works
* Delivery focused and driver of performance
* Good Communication skills
* Strategic Risk Management
* Ability to hold people to account in terms of implementing Safety philosophy
* Academic and/or professional industry related management qualification
* Membership of an Industry related Professional Institution \- such as MCIOB or CEng MICE
* CVRs, PEP and Contract Management



  





**Skills \& Attributes:** 



* The ability to work as part of cross\-functional teams.
* Excellent communicator, with ability to convey complex information well.
* The ability to create and maintain good working relationships with colleagues and clients.
* Highly organised in relation to management of tasks and deadlines.
* Good attention to detail.
* Troubleshooting and problem\-solving skills.



  





**Additional information** 



* All candidates must have the Right to Work in the UK and in the Republic of Ireland at the time of application. Proof of this will be required for any candidate who is successful in the role.
* This role will at time to time, require working in other locations, including construction sites or at client offices. A degree of flexibility is therefore required.



  





**Benefits** 




 You will be offered the following employee benefits in addition to your market leading salary:
 


* 31 days Annual Leave
* Life Assurance Policy
* Pension Scheme
* Healthcare Cash Plan
* Company Sick Pay
* Company maternity / paternity pay
* Employee Assistance Programme
* Flexible Working Policy
* Wellbeing Events
* Company Occupational Health
* Social Events
* Team Development Days
* Ongoing Training \& Development
* Bespoke career pathways
* Support for Chartership Pathways
* State\-of\-the\-art office facilities
* On\-Site Car Parking
* Professional Membership Support
* Branded clothing

data.raw_snippet:
**Project Director – Data Center** 




 We are seeking a seasoned, strategic
 **Project Director** 
 to oversee the full lifecycle of our data center developments. In this role, you will lead projects from initial site selection and design through to construction, commissioning, and final handover.
data.jd_text:
**Project Director – Data Center** 




 We are seeking a seasoned, strategic
 **Project Director** 
 to oversee the full lifecycle of our data center developments. In this role, you will lead projects from initial site selection and design through to construction, commissioning, and final handover. As a senior leader, you will be responsible for ensuring that all projects are delivered on time, within budget, and in full compliance with regulatory, safety, and sustainability standards.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  




* **Project Leadership:** 
 Direct internal teams, consultants, contractors, and vendors while ensuring all project facets align with client goals.
* **Strategic Planning:** 
 Develop long\-term strategies and preconstruction plans designed to optimize schedules, costs, and operational performance.
* **Financial \& Risk Management:** 
 Define project baselines, manage budgets, monitor progress, and proactively identify and mitigate potential risks.
* **Technical Oversight:** 
 Oversee design and engineering specifications, permit acquisition, and quality assurance to meet rigorous technical standards.
* **Safety \& Compliance:** 
 Champion a proactive safety culture by integrating HSE protocols into every project phase and ensuring adherence to all legal and environmental requirements.
* **Stakeholder Relations:** 
 Maintain clear communication with stakeholders and lead contract negotiations and vendor management.



  





**Qualifications** 




  




* **Education:** 
 Full time BE/ B Tech in Civil or Mechanical or Electrical.
* **Industry Experience:** 
 15\+ years in engineering, procurement, and construction (EPC/CM) or working with Project management companies
* Should have handled hyperscale greenfield data centers. Data Center experience is must.
* **Leadership Track Record:** 
 Proven experience leading multiple medium\-to\-large complex data center projects.
* **Seniority:** 
 At least 5\+ years of experience in a senior leadership role.



  





**Why Join Us?** 




 You will be at the helm of mission\-critical hyperscale infrastructure projects, driving innovation in the data center space while leading high\-performing, multidisciplinary teams.

data.title: Programme Manager – Network & Infrastructure Transformation
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Title:** 




**Programme Manager – Network \& Infrastructure Transformation** 




 Job Type: Contractual
 



 Job location\-Dubai(Onsite)
 



**Role Purpose:** 




 The Programme Manager will lead the end\-to\-end delivery of enterprise network and infrastructure transformation initiative
data.jd_text:
**Job Title:** 




**Programme Manager – Network \& Infrastructure Transformation** 




 Job Type: Contractual
 



 Job location\-Dubai(Onsite)
 



**Role Purpose:** 




 The Programme Manager will lead the end\-to\-end delivery of enterprise network and infrastructure transformation initiatives. This is a hands\-on role responsible for planning, executing, and ensuring successful delivery of the programme with proper governance, structure, and control.
 



 The role requires close collaboration with internal teams (Infrastructure, Networks, Security, Architecture) and external partners to ensure all workstreams are aligned, tracked, and delivered on time with full visibility of progress, risks, and outcomes.
 



**Key Responsibilities:** 




**1\. Programme Delivery** 



* Own the complete programme lifecycle from planning to execution and transition to BAU (Business As Usual)
* Ensure delivery within scope, timelines, and expected outcomes



**2\. Programme Planning \& Execution** 



* Develop and maintain detailed programme plans
* Track milestones, deliverables, and overall progress
* Drive workstreams and ensure accountability across teams
* Maintain delivery momentum and pace



**3\. Governance \& Reporting** 



* Establish and manage programme governance (SteerCo, working groups, etc.)
* Track decisions, actions, and dependencies
* Provide regular executive updates and dashboards



**4\. Stakeholder Management** 



* Collaborate with Infrastructure, Networks, Security, Engineering, and Operations teams
* Align internal stakeholders and external partners on goals and delivery expectations



**5\. Risk \& Issue Management** 



* Identify, track, and resolve risks, issues, and blockers
* Ensure timely escalation and resolution



**6\. Change \& Delivery Control** 



* Enforce strong governance and change control processes
* Ensure scope control and avoid duplication or misalignment



**7\. Vendor \& Partner Management** 



* Manage delivery from vendors, partners, and service providers
* Ensure quality, accountability, and adherence to timelines



**8\. Financial \& Initiative Tracking** 



* Monitor programme investments (CapEx) and initiatives
* Ensure alignment with programme priorities and approvals



**9\. Quality Assurance** 



* Ensure all deliverables meet quality standards and programme objectives



**10\. Transition \& Value Realisation** 



* Support smooth transition into BAU
* Ensure expected outcomes like stability, scalability, and performance are achieved



**Key Requirements:** 



* 10\+ years of experience in programme management within network and infrastructure environments
* Strong experience managing large\-scale, complex transformation programmes
* Solid understanding of network technologies (LAN/WAN, Wi\-Fi, SD\-WAN, Firewalls, Cloud Networking)
* Experience with Cisco, Fortinet, or similar technologies is preferred
* Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS/Azure) and hybrid environments
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills
* Experience working with vendors and managed service providers
* Ability to manage risks, dependencies, and multiple workstreams effectively
* Strong governance, reporting, and delivery management experience

data.title: Tax & Legal Services - Connected Tax Compliance & Managed Services - Senior Manager / Director
data.raw_snippet:
**About Us**
 With offices in 152 countries and nearly 328,000 professionals, we are one of the world’s leading professional services networks, helping organisations and individuals create lasting value through Assurance, Tax and Advisory services. For over 40 years, we have contributed to the Middl
data.jd_text:
**About Us**
 With offices in 152 countries and nearly 328,000 professionals, we are one of the world’s leading professional services networks, helping organisations and individuals create lasting value through Assurance, Tax and Advisory services. For over 40 years, we have contributed to the Middle East’s transformation journey, partnering with governments and businesses to deliver sustainable solutions. Today, more than 12,000 of us across Bahrain, Egypt, Iraq, Jordan, Kuwait, Lebanon, Libya, Oman, Palestine, Qatar, Saudi Arabia and the UAE are shaping the region’s future.
   

  

**Line Of Service Overview**
 At PwC, our people in tax services focus on providing advice and guidance to clients on tax planning, compliance, and strategy. These individuals help businesses navigate complex tax regulations and optimise their tax positions.
   

  

**Business Unit Overview**
 In indirect tax at PwC, you will focus value\-added tax (VAT), goods and services tax (GST), sales tax and other indirect taxes. Your work will involve providing advice and guidance to clients on indirect tax planning, compliance, and strategy, helping businesses navigate complex indirect tax regulations and optimise their indirect tax positions.
   

  

**How You’ll Contribute**
* Support the Middle East CTC Leader in executing the regional CTC growth and GTM strategy.
* Lead pipeline growth, targeting, and winning of CTC and tax transformation opportunities.
* Lead client presentations, RfP responses and compose compelling proposals for tax pursuits to drive strategic wins.
* Act as a senior client\-facing advisor, leading end\-to\-end CTC/MS engagements.
* Deliver end\-to\-end CTC/MS and operating model transformation solutions.
* Provide tax technical expertise and leadership across tax compliance and transformation engagements.
* Oversee engagement delivery, quality, and client experience.
* Confidently articulate and present technology\-enabled compliance solutions to clients.
* Business development and Go\-to\-market execution.
* Lead, coach, and develop the core CTC/MS delivery team.


**What You’ll Bring**
* Senior Manager or Director\-level experience in professional services or a complex in\-house tax environment.
* Strong experience in tax transformation, Compliance/advisory, and operating model design.
* Solid tax technical background.
* Proven track record of winning client work, leading RfPs, and presenting to senior stakeholders.
* Proposal writing, RFP responses and pursuits.
* Strong understanding of tax technology, data, and ERP environments.
* Strong client relationship management, communication, and presentation skills.
* Collaborative leadership style with the ability to influence across teams and geographies.
* Commitment to developing people and building high\-performing teams.


**How You’ll Make a Difference**
 At PwC Midde East, we expect all our people to embody the skills and behaviours of The PwC Professional framework, helping us deliver on our strategy while growing and developing as leaders at every level.
   

  

**Why You’ll Love Working at PwC**
 At PwC Middle East, you’ll find more than just a job \- you’ll build a meaningful career, supported by rewards and benefits that help you thrive. We offer competitive pay, comprehensive benefits, and programs that promote well\-being, balance, and personal growth. You’ll have access to continuous learning, digital upskilling, and a collaborative environment that values innovation, mentorship, and diversity. Are you ready to make a difference by applying your unique perspective and talents? You can grow exponentially here. Discover more about
 **Life at PwC Middle East.**
