data.title: Group Chief Financial Officer
data.raw_snippet:
Role Overview
 



  





 We are seeking a commercially driven and strategically minded Group CFO with deep experience in the telecommunications sector, a proven track record in IPO execution, and fluency in Tamil and English.
 



 The successful candidate will lead the Group’s financial strategy
data.jd_text:
Role Overview
 



  





 We are seeking a commercially driven and strategically minded Group CFO with deep experience in the telecommunications sector, a proven track record in IPO execution, and fluency in Tamil and English.
 



 The successful candidate will lead the Group’s financial strategy, capital markets activities, and operational finance functions, playing a critical role in scaling the business and delivering shareholder value.
 



  





 We will welcome applications from overseas providing you are willing to relocate to Dubai.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



  





 Strategic Leadership
 


* Partner with the CEO and Board to define and execute the Group’s long\-term financial strategy
* Provide strategic insight on growth initiatives, market expansion, and M\&A opportunities
* Act as a key advisor on capital structure, funding strategy, and investor positioning



 IPO \& Capital Markets
 


* Lead end\-to\-end IPO readiness and execution (governance, reporting, advisors, roadshow, listing)
* Manage relationships with investment banks, legal advisors, auditors, and regulators
* Oversee post\-listing compliance, investor relations, and market communications



 Financial Management
 


* Full ownership of Group financial planning, budgeting, forecasting, and reporting
* Ensure robust financial controls, risk management, and governance frameworks
* Drive performance management across all business units and geographies



 Telecom Sector Expertise
 


* Provide financial oversight of telecom operations including CAPEX\-intensive infrastructure, spectrum investments, and network rollout
* Monitor key telecom KPIs (ARPU, churn, EBITDA margins, subscriber growth, etc.)
* Support commercial teams with pricing, bundling, and market competitiveness analysis



 Operational Excellence
 


* Optimize cost structures and improve profitability across the Group
* Lead digital transformation within finance (systems, automation, analytics)
* Build and develop a high\-performing, internationally diverse finance team



 Stakeholder Management
 


* Present financial performance and strategy to Board, investors, and external stakeholders
* Act as a key interface with regulators across relevant jurisdictions
* Support corporate governance and ESG initiatives



  





 Key Requirements
 



  





 Experience \& Qualifications
 


* Proven experience as a CFO or senior finance leader in a telecommunications or related infrastructure business
* Demonstrated success in leading or playing a key role in an IPO (essential)
* Strong understanding of global capital markets, debt/equity financing, and investor relations
* Experience managing multi\-entity, multi\-country financial operations



 Technical Expertise
 


* Deep knowledge of IFRS / international accounting standards
* Strong financial modelling, valuation, and capital allocation skills
* Experience with large\-scale CAPEX planning and ROI analysis



 Language Skills
 


* Fluency in Tamil and English (spoken and written) — essential



 Leadership \& Personal Attributes
 


* Strategic thinker with strong commercial acumen
* High level of integrity, governance, and professionalism
* Strong leadership presence with the ability to influence at Board level
* Hands\-on, results\-oriented, and capable of operating in a fast\-paced, high\-growth environment



 Preferred
 


* Experience in emerging markets or high\-growth telecom environments
* Prior exposure to private equity\-backed or pre\-IPO businesses
* International experience working across multiple jurisdictions

data.title: Network Director – Business Payments & Operations
data.raw_snippet:
**Network Director – Global Payments Infrastructure**
**About Thunes**
 Thunes is the Smart Superhighway for money movement around the world. Thunes’ proprietary Direct Global Network allows Members to make payments in real\-time in over 130 countries and more than 80 currencies.
   

  

 Thunes’ N
data.jd_text:
**Network Director – Global Payments Infrastructure**
**About Thunes**
 Thunes is the Smart Superhighway for money movement around the world. Thunes’ proprietary Direct Global Network allows Members to make payments in real\-time in over 130 countries and more than 80 currencies.
   

  

 Thunes’ Network connects directly to over 7 billion mobile wallets and bank accounts worldwide, via more than 350 different payment methods, such as GCash, M\-Pesa, Airtel, MTN, Orange, JazzCash, Easypaisa, AliPay, WeChat Pay and many more.
   

  

 Members of Thunes’ Direct Global Network include gig economy giants like Uber and Deliveroo, super\-apps like Grab and WeChat, MTOs, fintechs, PSPs and banks. Thunes’ Direct Global Network differentiates itself through its worldwide reach, in\-house Smart Treasury Management Platform and Fortress Compliance Infrastructure, ensuring Members of the Network receive unrivalled speed, control, visibility, protection and cost efficiencies when making real\-time payments globally.
   

  

 Headquartered in Singapore, Thunes has offices in 12 locations, including Barcelona, Beijing, Dubai, London, Manila, Nairobi, Paris, Riyadh, San Francisco, Sao Paulo and Shanghai. For more information, visit: https://www.thunes.com/
   

  

**Context of the role**
 We are looking for a Network Director to lead the development and management of global banking and payment scheme partnerships to strengthen our business payments offering. This role balances strategic expansion with the operational rigor required to deliver critical payments priorities. You will be responsible for driving cross\-functional collaboration and serving as the Network liaison between internal teams and external network partners.
   

  

**Network Strategy \& Development**
* Define \& Execute Roadmap: Deliver the global strategy for banking and payment scheme partnerships, expanding direct access to SEPA, Faster Payments, and emerging real\-time rails in close partnership with regional network teams.
* Scale Connectivity: Drive prioritisation and execution of infrastructure initiatives for virtual accounts, local clearing, and SWIFT integration to strengthen cross\-border payment corridors.


**Stakeholder Engagement \& Delivery**
* Business Payments Representation: Represent Network as a senior lead across all business payments strategic forums, ensuring network roadmap alignment with commercial ambitions.
* Cross\-Functional Orchestration: Partner with Product, Treasury, Legal \& Compliance, and Commercial teams to align network capabilities with customer needs and cross\-functional requirements.
* Reporting \& Governance: Own program governance and reporting, providing internal stakeholders with clear visibility into delivery progress, risks, and dependencies.


**Network Operations \& Excellence**
* Quality of Service (QoS): Define and monitor critical performance KPIs (latency, throughput, and success rates). Lead network performance optimization and remediation efforts.
* Outage Management: Lead impact analysis of network disruptions to identify priority areas. Manage critical communications with network partners, drive root cause analysis (RCA) processes, and implement systemic changes to prevent recurrence.
* Credit Terms Management: Partner with Treasury \& regional teams to identify key corridors to negotiate favorable credit terms and post\-funding arrangements with network partners.
* Cost \& Efficiency: Drive continuous improvements in FX competitiveness, settlement speed, and overall network unit costs.


**Professional Experience \& Qualifications**
* Experience: 9\+ years in financial services, payments, or fintech with deep expertise in global payments infrastructure. Leadership \& Execution: Exceptional project management and negotiation skills. Ability to lead multiple, high\-impact initiatives across cross\-functional teams.
* Strategic Problem Solving: A data\-driven mindset with a track record of solving complex cross\-border operational and commercial challenges.
* Operational Excellence: Skilled in managing network quality, outage responses, and liquidity/credit terms.
* Interpersonal: Strong stakeholder management, with the communication skills necessary to bridge technical and commercial objectives.
* Hands\-on approach: Whilst this is a senior position we expect the person taking this role to be willing to roll\-up their sleeves and get involved in the detail
* Fluency in English, both verbal and written

data.jd_text:
**About the Role:** 




 The Director People \& Culture \- Store Operations leads the People \& Culture business partnership function for restaurant operations across all brands and markets within Americana Restaurants.
 



 The role translates business priorities into scalable, consistent and high\-impact people strategies, policies, and operational practices that support a consistent and high\-performing workforce across the store network.
 



 Working closely with brand leadership and operational teams, the role ensures that people practices across workforce planning, employee relations, performance management, and engagement are implemented consistently and aligned with Americana’s values and strategic priorities.
 



 Through strong governance, data\-driven decision making, and execution rigor the Director ensures Human Capital initiatives translate into measurable improvements in workforce stability, leadership capability, employee experience, and operational performance.
 



 This role provides leadership and direction to the People \& Culture business partnership teams supporting restaurant operations across brands and markets, ensuring consistent standards, coordination, and execution of Human Capital priorities across a large, multi\-country workforce.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




**Operational People Strategy \& Business Partnership** 



* Partner with brand and operations leadership to translate business strategy into clear, actionable workforce and people priorities across the restaurant network.
* Provide strategic HR guidance to senior operations leaders on workforce planning, leadership capability, and organizational effectiveness.
* Align Human Capital initiatives with operational goals including growth, service excellence, and operational consistency.



**Human Capital Operations Governance** 



* Drive consistent implementation of people policies, processes, and initiatives across brands and countries.
* Ensure alignment between enterprise Human Capital strategy and local operational execution while balancing local market realities.



**Operational Workforce Strategy** 



* Lead workforce strategies that support restaurant network growth, labor productivity, and operational stability.
* Partner with Operations and Finance to align workforce planning with expansion plans, staffing models, and labor requirements.
* Ensure strong talent pipelines and succession depth for restaurant leadership roles across markets.



**Workforce Performance Management** 



* Monitor key workforce indicators including attrition, workforce stability, leadership readiness, and engagement across the restaurant network.
* Identify workforce trends and implement targeted, data\-backed actions that strengthen operational stability and employee experience.
* Ensure people priorities are reflected in operational reviews and leadership decision making.



**Employee Relations \& Workplace Environment** 



* Oversee employee relations practices across markets to ensure fair, consistent, and values\-aligned decision making.
* Ensure workplace issues are managed in line with company values, policies, and legal frameworks.
* Promote a culture of accountability, respect, and integrity across the operational workforce.



**People Analytics \& Workforce Insights** 



* Use people analytics to identify workforce trends, operational risks, and capability gaps across markets.
* Translate workforce data into actionable insights that support leadership decision making and operational planning.
* Strengthen workforce reporting and data quality to enable effective operational decision making.



**Execution Discipline \& Operational Coordination** 



* Ensure Human Capital initiatives are implemented consistently and effectively across markets.
* Coordinate the execution of enterprise people initiatives across brands and countries.
* Establish clear accountability and follow\-through for operational people actions and track impact of key initiatives.



**Operational Leadership Capability** 



* Partner with Talent and Learning teams to strengthen leadership capability across store operations.
* Identify leadership gaps that impact operational performance and employee engagement.
* Ensure development priorities for restaurant leadership roles align with business needs and future leadership pipeline requirements.



**Culture \& Values Alignment** 



* Champion the consistent application of Americana’s values across the operational workforce.
* Ensure people decisions reinforce the company’s culture and leadership expectations while strengthening a performance\-driven environment.
* Promote leadership behaviors that strengthen engagement, accountability, and team performance.



**Stakeholder Leadership** 



* Act as the senior People \& Culture partner to operational leadership across brands and markets.
* Build strong relationships with brand leaders, country leadership teams, and P\&C leaders.
* Influence leadership decisions through credible business insight and strong people expertise.



  





**Qualifications \& Experience:** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Psychology, or a related field.
* 15\+ years of progressive HR experience with significant experience in HR business partnership within large\-scale operational environments.
* Proven experience managing HR operations across high\-volume, geographically dispersed workforces.
* Experience working in international or multi\-country organizations.
* Strong expertise in employee relations, workforce planning, and HR governance.
* Experience using workforce data and analytics to inform people decisions and business strategy.



  





**Key Skills:** 



* Strategic HR business partnership
* HR operations governance and execution
* Workforce planning and organizational effectiveness
* Employee relations and workplace management
* Data\-driven decision making
* Stakeholder influence and leadership alignment
* Cross\-market coordination and operational leadership
* Strong execution discipline and problem solving

data.jd_text:
We are looking to hire a
 **Senior Director – HR Operations** 
 who will be responsible for leading and governing HR Operations, Employee Services, manpower governance, Emiratization compliance, outsourced workforce oversight, and workforce analytics for our client based in
 **Dubai** 
 , which is one of the largest organizations in the region.
 



  





 This is a permanent role within the organization.
 



  





 The role sits within the
 **Human Resources Department .** 




  





 We are looking for a Senior Director – HR Operations who will drive operational excellence, compliance, and governance across the full employee lifecycle. You should also possess strong expertise in UAE Labour Law, MOHRE and GPSSA compliance, manpower budgeting, outsourced workforce management, HR systems governance, and workforce analytics.
 



  





**Key responsibilities:** 



* Provide strategic direction and governance oversight for HR Operations and Employee Services.
* Establish and enforce operating models, process standards, and service level agreements (SLAs).
* Ensure compliance with UAE Labour Law, MOHRE, GPSSA, and internal governance frameworks.
* Oversee manpower governance, budget alignment, and Emiratization target tracking.Lead governance and performance oversight of outsourced workforce providers.
* Manage end\-to\-end employee lifecycle operations including onboarding, payroll inputs, HRIS management, leave administration, and exits.
* Oversee employment contracts, visa processing, medical insurance, and government registrations.
* Deliver executive\-level reporting on headcount, manpower utilization, and HR KPIs.
* Ensure HR data integrity, audit readiness, and operational compliance.
* Align subsidiary HR Operations with group HR standards and policies.
* Lead and develop the HR Operations team, fostering a service\-oriented and compliance\-driven culture.



  





**Knowledge, skills \& experience:** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, Organizational Development, or a related field.
* Professional certification such as SHRM\-SCP or CIPD Level 7 is an advantage.
* Minimum 10 years of HR experience, with at least 8 years in a senior leadership role managing HR Operations in a multi\-entity or government\-linked environment.
* Strong knowledge of UAE Labour Law, MOHRE, and GPSSA regulations.
* Proven experience in HR operational governance, manpower control, outsourced workforce management, and workforce analytics.
* Strong stakeholder management, leadership, and presentation skills.



  





**Availability:** 



* Preference will be given to candidates available immediately or with a maximum 30\-day notice period after accepting the offer.



  





 We are looking for a candidate who will be able to work in the
 **United Arab Emirates** 
 . Please apply with your resume and remember to provide us with your contact details.
 



  





 We will review your job application within 7 working days. Should your profile fit the requirements of the role, a consultant from Edari will be in touch with you to gain a deeper understanding of your profile, discuss the role in more detail, and outline the potential next steps.

-

data.jd_text:
**WELCOME TO BASF**
 We are the world's leading chemical company because we offer intelligent solutions for our customers and for a sustainable future. We link and develop people with diverse talents all over the world. For you, this means a variety of ways to advance. Not only your performance, but also your personality matter to us. At BASF, careers develop from opportunities.
   

  

 BASF’s regional division EMEA Europe, Middle East, Emerging Europe and Africa. BASF operates in more than 50 countries in the region. For BASF the EMEA region is our most important market.
   

  

**What You Can Expect**
* Executive \& Administrative Support Manage the MD’s schedule and priorities, organize leadership and teams’ meetings, prepare agendas and presentations, and document meeting minutes while tracking key action items.
* Office Coordination \& Business Reporting


 Support coordination of regional office activities and prepare internal reports, dashboards, quarterly reviews.
   

  

* Communication \& Stakeholder Management


 Manage professional communications on behalf of the MD, including coordination with headquarters, regional offices, customers, distributors, and key partners. Support preparation of executive correspondence and business updates.
   

  

* Meetings, Events \& Executive Logistics


 Organize management meetings, customer visits, distributor engagements, and business events. Coordinate travel arrangements and logistics for the MD, visiting executives, and leadership activities.
   

  

* Governance, Compliance \& Risk Coordination


 Support the MD in coordinating governance and compliance activities, including monitoring adherence to local laws and corporate guidelines, maintaining documentation related to organizational structure and delegated authorities, supporting risk management processes, audits, incident or crisis management coordination, and ensuring follow\-up with responsible departments on regulatory, EHSQ, trade compliance, and contractual matters.
   

  

* Cross\-Functional \& Operational Coordination


 Liaise with internal departments (sales, marketing, finance, HR, supply chain, and legal) to follow up on MD priorities, including business reporting support, employee\-related matters, and ensuring timely execution of key operational and regulatory actions.
   

  

* In the lead with BASF Saudi Arabia LLC Co. and other entities' PA's in the region to keep the job profile of PA's fit and adjusted to the increasing complexity and changing requirements of the Middle East organisation.
* Apply BASF Group guidelines and principles.


**What You Offer**
**Education**
* Bachelor in Administration
* Commercial training


**Professional Experience**
* Excellent writing and presentation skills in English (Arabic beneficial)
* Expert in Microsoft Office applications
* Experience in managing a similar role is a must.


**Diversity is our greatest strength!**
 Become a part of our winning formula for success and develop the future with us \- in a global team that embraces inclusion and equal opportunities irrespective of gender, age, origin, sexual orientation, disability or belief.

data.title: Executive Assistant to Chief Executive Officer
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose:** 




  





 To provide high\-level administrative, operational, and organizational support to the CEO while managing the smooth day\-to\-day operations of the office. The role requires exceptional coordination skills, discretion, and the ability to handle confidential information
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose:** 




  





 To provide high\-level administrative, operational, and organizational support to the CEO while managing the smooth day\-to\-day operations of the office. The role requires exceptional coordination skills, discretion, and the ability to handle confidential information efficiently.
 



  





**Job Duties \& Responsibilities:** 




  




* Act as the primary point of contact between the CEO and internal/external stakeholders.
* Manage the CEO’s calendar, appointments, travel arrangements, and meetings.
* Prepare and edit correspondence, reports, presentations, and other documents on behalf of the CEO.
* Assist in prioritizing tasks, managing deadlines, and following up on pending matters.
* Attend meetings, take minutes, and ensure timely follow\-up on action items.
* Maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive information with the utmost discretion.
* Oversee general office operations, ensuring a professional, organized, and efficient work environment.
* Manage office supplies, vendors, service providers, and facility maintenance.
* Supervise administrative staff and ensure alignment with company standards.
* Support HR functions such as onboarding, attendance tracking, and internal communication.
* Implement and maintain office policies and procedures.
* Coordinate internal events, team meetings, and company communications.
* Draft and review professional correspondence and announcements.
* Facilitate communication between departments and the CEO’s office.
* Liaise with external partners, clients, and government or business contacts when needed.



  





**Qualifications and Skills:** 




  




* Bachelor’s degree in Business Administration, Management, or a related field.
* 3–4 years of relevant experience, preferably supporting senior executives or managing office operations.
* Strong organizational and multitasking abilities.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
* Proficiency in MS Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook).
* Professional demeanor, proactive attitude, and high attention to detail.
* Ability to work under pressure and handle confidential matters discreetly

**The AI\-powered OS** 
**for beauty,**
**wellness**

**About Fresha**
 Fresha is the AI\-powered operating system for the global beauty, wellness and self\-care industry, connecting and powering everything from salons and barbers to spas, medspas, fitness studios and health pract
data.jd_text:
**The AI\-powered OS** 
**for beauty,**
**wellness** 
**and self\-care**
**About Fresha**
 Fresha is the AI\-powered operating system for the global beauty, wellness and self\-care industry, connecting and powering everything from salons and barbers to spas, medspas, fitness studios and health practices.
   

  

 Trusted by millions of consumers and businesses worldwide. Fresha is used by 140,000\+ businesses and 450,000\+ stylists and professionals worldwide, processing over 1 billion appointments to date.
   

  

 The company is headquartered in London, United Kingdom, with 15 global offices located across North America, EMEA and APAC.
   

  

 Fresha allows consumers to discover, book and pay for beauty and wellness appointments with local businesses via its marketplace, while beauty and wellness businesses and professionals use an all\-in\-one platform to manage their entire operations with an intuitive business software and financial technology solutions.
   

  

 Fresha’s ecosystem gives merchants everything they need to run their business seamlessly by facilitating appointment bookings, point\-of\-sale, customer records management, marketing automation, loyalty, beauty products inventory and team management.
   

  

 The consumer marketplace unlocks revenue potential for partner businesses by leveraging the power of online bookings and automated marketing through mobile apps and advanced integrations with major tech brands including Instagram, Facebook and Google.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We’re looking for an outstanding General Manager to take full ownership of our MEA business which is one of the most exciting and commercially important regions at Fresha. This is a senior leadership role where you’ll be trusted to shape strategy, drive performance and lead a growing team to new levels of success.
   

  

 You’ll report directly to the CEO and work closely with senior leaders across the company. From setting the commercial vision to executing day\-to\-day operations, you’ll be at the centre of it all \- accountable for delivering results and building a high\-performing, highly motivated team.
   

  

 This is a role for someone who thrives on both strategy and execution. You’ll bring structure, pace and clarity, create a culture built on ownership and high standards, and lead with energy, purpose and visibility. If you’re ready to take on a true leadership challenge in a fast\-scaling tech business, this is your opportunity.
   

  

**Sales Leadership and Culture Building**
* Lead a high\-performing MEA Business Development and Account Management team
* Build an elite sales culture grounded in ownership, accountability and performance
* Establish clear team rituals that drive motivation and consistency


**Team Structuring and Scaling**
* Design and scale the MEA commercial team structure, including hiring and managing through managers
* Implement performance frameworks, operating rhythms, and clear accountability measures
* Create conditions for others to lead and grow, rather than relying solely on ICs


**Commercial Strategy and Execution**
* Define and execute the go\-to\-market strategy for the MEA, aligned with company priorities
* Act on market feedback and business performance to adjust plans and identify opportunities
* Own the sales funnel from prospecting through activation and retention, using tools like HubSpot to manage forecasting and pipeline


**Stakeholder Management and Influence**
* Act as the voice of the MEA region within the business, ensuring local context is well understood
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to shape campaigns, products and initiatives that drive partner success
* Communicate with clarity, challenge constructively and lead through authenticity


**Hands\-On Leadership**
* Lead from the front: join calls, support negotiations, and coach team members through challenges
* Set a tone of urgency, high standards, and practical support — visible, approachable and grounded in action
* Celebrate wins, course\-correct when needed, and hold the team to high expectations


**What We're Looking For**
* Senior leadership experience within a SaaS, marketplace or technology business
* Proven track record of managing and scaling commercial teams, including managing through managers
* Experience leading sales and account management functions in SMB\-focused environments
* Skilled at using performance data to guide decisions, track progress and motivate teams
* Structured and strategic, with the ability to balance long\-term planning and near\-term delivery
* Clear and direct communicator who leads with purpose and clarity
* Comfortable being hands\-on — from coaching teams to joining partner calls when needed
* Embraces a “work hard, play hard” environment with high expectations and strong team spirit


**Interview Process**
* Screen Call \- Video\-call with Talent Team (30 \- 45 mins)
* 1st Stage \- Video\-call with VP of Revenue Operations (45 mins)
* 2nd Stage \- Video\-call presentation with Leadership team (90 mins)
* Final Stage \- Video Call with C\-Suite


 We aim to complete the entire interview process and deliver feedback within 4 weeks
   

  

 Every job application received is reviewed manually by our talent team. While we strive to assess applications within 7 days, the sheer volume of talented individuals expressing interest may occasionally extend this timeframe
   

  

**Inclusive workforce**
 At Fresha, we are creating a culture where individuals of all backgrounds feel comfortable.
   

  

 We want all Fresha people to feel included and truly empowered to contribute fully to our vision and goals. Everyone who applies will receive fair consideration for employment.
   

  

 We do not discriminate based on race, colour, religion, sex, sexual orientation, age, marital status, gender identity, national origin, disability, or any other applicable legally protected characteristics in the location in which the candidate is applying.
   

  

 If you have any accessibility requirements that would make you more comfortable during the interview process and/or once you join, please let us know so that we can support you.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

data.raw_snippet:
**Job Purpose:**




 The Senior Conference Producer will be involved in the development and execution of their own events, to ensure each Strategic and Technical agenda meets dmg’s market leading global standards.
 



  





 Working as part of the global dmg Education team, which comprises of co
data.jd_text:
**Job Purpose:**




 The Senior Conference Producer will be involved in the development and execution of their own events, to ensure each Strategic and Technical agenda meets dmg’s market leading global standards.
 



  





 Working as part of the global dmg Education team, which comprises of conferences, exhibitions and online products, you will be involved in all aspects of the strategy and execution of your conferences, including support on commercial structure, identifying sponsors, partners, potential hosts, as well as programme creation and development, on\-site management and speaker liaison to ensure the successful smooth running of the conferences, and that exceptional service is delivered to our customers and clients.
 



  





 This role is key to the success of the growth and development of our business, it is heavily focussed on year\-round content and the programme development of our global conferences but also covers other areas of conference management. Working alongside commercial, marketing, PR, data \& digital, operations teams, you will report directly to the VP for Asia, working on a major new business launch that will become an international large\-scale event.
 



  





 This is an exciting and highly varied role that will demand intellectual autonomy, creativity and an ability to think beyond the standard commercial conference ‘conveyor belt’ production cycle. The primary aim will be to help dmg create a long\-term reputation for excellence in the Asian Education market, driving forwards our ambitions to be the most respected provider of Education conferences in the world.
 



  





**Key Accountabilities:**




**Conference Production and Content Strategy**



* Support and manage the strategic conference, from research through to onsite delivery.
* Conduct in\-depth research with senior global public and private sector stakeholders to create compelling programmes at the highest level of commercial viability for both sponsorship and delegate sales.
* Source, qualify and liaise with the Conference Chair/s, Knowledge Partners and Steering Committee members to determine a strategic plan for conference themes, topics, session chairs, and optimum speakers.
* Recruit highly esteemed leading experts, industry representatives, regulators, government representatives, and other relevant speakers to the programme faculty.
* Manage the technical call for papers process, creating topics and managing the execution and delivery of targets with technical committee members and internal teams.
* Work closely with the Marketing team to develop digital content\-marketing campaign ideas.
* Support the VP with content strategy.
* Work with the Event Director to target key industry stakeholders, including Ministers, IOCs, IECs, NOCs, Global Leaders, to positively influence them regarding the value / positioning of our events.
* Assist in the development of effective mailing lists by contacting people both inside and outside the company who have access to the names of potential delegates, and ensure such information is communicated to the marketing team.



**Conference Project Management**



* Establish key relationships with partners and industry stakeholders, develop content strategies in accordance which our partners’ objectives.
* Develop current and prospective customer insights and relationships as part of the overall account management strategy for each event.
* Key account management and customer relationship development, to grow and establish each event as a leading brand.
* Use your industry expertise, industry relationships and Steering Committees to shape our marketing content messaging, brand marketing \& positioning and generate press releases.
* Maintain close links with management to ensure that they are constantly aware of the status of events through weekly reports.



**Product Delivery and Management**



* Conduct telephone and in\-person research with potential attendees within the target market for each event to develop programme agendas.
* Join sales calls and meetings with existing and potential clients to commercially contribute to the growth of the portfolio and find new market opportunities for speakers, moderators, partners.
* Recruit highly esteemed leading experts, industry representatives, regulators, government representatives, and other relevant speakers to your programme faculty.
* Assist in the maintenance of constant, correct and timely liaison with speakers throughout the duration of the event \- onsite conference fulfilment.
* Research and provide strategic information required to market/promote each conference.
* Assist with queries from potential delegates and assist in adopting positive actions to help sell delegate places and sponsorship.
* Work closely with the operations team to ensure delivery of a first\-class onsite conference experience for attendees.



**dmg Asia Portfolio Support**



* Ensure content and associated narrative alignment between Asia’s portfolio and dmg’s flagship events.
* Create a playbook for managing the technical call for papers process across the portfolio, creating topics and managing the execution and delivery of targets with technical committee members and internal teams.
* Prepare speaker liaison playbook to ensure all speaker preparation and requirements are taken care of.
* Work closely with the operations team to ensure delivery of a first\-class onsite conference experience for attendees for all shows.
* Attend conferences to promote Asia’s portfolio, gather market intelligence, as well as network with potential speakers and delegates to establish and maintain relationships pre\- and post\- conference.



**Job Context:**




**Relationships \- Internal:** 




 • Will report to the senior management on day\-to\-day issues.
 



 • Senior management – contact with VP and Event Director to ensure content strategies are fully integrated and all respective staff are aware of processes.
 



 • All internal functions Commercial, Data \& Digital, Marketing \& PR, HR, Finance and Operations.
 



**Relationships \- External:** 




 • Education value chain.
 



 • Event hosts when applicable.
 



 • Senior individuals/C\-suite professionals on Governing Bodies.
 



 • Associations \- Industry and Sector specific.
 



 • Knowledge Partners.
 



 • Steering Committees.
 



 • International government representatives.
 



 • Trade ambassadors.
 



**Qualifications, Experience, \& Skills:**




  





 • Passionate, dedicated, and knowledgeable about developing smart, profitable, and industry\-leading conferences and with a proven and comprehensive experience of applying efficient and effective processes to your own successful conference portfolio.
 



 • You will demonstrate the ability to simultaneously manage a portfolio of international event products.
 



 • You will show how you are able to create leading\-edge marketing and sales campaigns.
 



**Skills and Behavioural Competencies**




 • Minimum 5 \- 7 years conference production experience.
 



 • Excellent networking and information gathering abilities.
 



 • Engaging, professional and diplomatic demeanour.
 



 • Comfortable conducting regular phone calls and meetings with a range of senior industry figures.
 



 • Strong teamwork skills to ensure the efficient running of content team.
 



 • Self\-disciplined and able to work both independently and as part of a team.
 



 • Problem solver with the ability to break down complex concepts, make logical comparisons, and identify underlying patterns and connections.
 



 • Agile learner with the ability to develop in\-depth technical knowledge on diverse topics and an understanding of key commercial drivers underlying your products.
 



 • Resilient, with a strong desire to succeed.
 



 • Experience in the Education industry is a strong asset.
 



 You should be open to international travel, as required by the job role.
 



**dmg events is an equal opportunity employer. If you have not had feedback from us within 14 days, please consider your application as unsuccessful for this round.**

Creatio is a global vendor of an AI\-native platform to automate workflows and CRM with no\-code and a maximum degree of freedom. Our platform combines an AI\-first architecture, composable no\-code tools, and enterprise\-grade governance to help organizations build and scale faster.
   

  

 We’re
data.jd_text:
Creatio is a global vendor of an AI\-native platform to automate workflows and CRM with no\-code and a maximum degree of freedom. Our platform combines an AI\-first architecture, composable no\-code tools, and enterprise\-grade governance to help organizations build and scale faster.
   

  

 We’re proud to be recognized by top industry analysts as a Leader and Strong Performer in multiple Gartner and Forrester reports.
   

  

 In 2025, Creatio was named to Inc.’s Best Workplaces list, recognizing our commitment to employee wellbeing and a strong workplace culture.
   

  

 For the role of
 **Enterprise Account Executive (KSA)** 
 , we are seeking an experienced field sales professional to help us scale the number of Enterprises that use the Creatio platform. Candidates must have experience building and developing a territory to high performance within an innovative SaaS technology provider. Successful candidates will help to build a portfolio of business within the top target enterprises in their territory. Successful candidates will need to drive their own activity and build a funnel while being supported by the broader Creatio organization of diverse and executive, product, and technical teams.
   

  

 The role is based in
 **Riyadh (KSA)** 
 and will report to the Regional Sales Director MEA (based in Dubai).
   

  

 Our targets are ambitious, and we are seeking engaging, collaborative, successful Enterprise Account Executives who have the skills, experience, and track record to make an immediate impact. We’re fast\-paced, innovative, and collaborative. We pursue excellence in everything and have a lot of fun along the way.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Deliver against revenue targets and all key performance metrics.
* Generate new business opportunities on an assigned territory, manage pipeline, opportunities, forecasting, and other items related to a normal outside sales function.
* Manage the end\-to\-end enterprise sales process and resource to create and execute winning solution sales strategies.
* Establish relationships with VP/C\-level buyers (Business and IT).
* Develop and orchestrate sales presentations and product demonstrations.
* Focus on new logo acquisition and manage relationships with the existing accounts to identify opportunities for cross and up\-sales.
* Ability to work with all customer functions including executive\-level personnel, various customer stakeholders, architecture, operations, design, vendor management, innovation, sourcing, and customer procurement.


**Desired Skills And Experience**
* Minimum 5 years of experience working within enterprise SaaS platform sales to large enterprises
* Proven track record of meeting quarterly and annual targets
* Deep understanding of executive\-level Enterprise and/or Global Account sales and methodologies
* Superb written and verbal communications and organizational skills
* 4\-year degree required, with technical curiosity and desire to learn
* Experience with CRM/BPM software space is strongly preferred
* Fluency in English and native Arabic


**What You Should Expect From Us**
* The award\-winning product (a Leader in Gartner Quadrants) to be proud of.
* Focus on making our clients successful (NPS score – 42%).
* Dedicated leadership with open doors.
* Steady stream of inbound leads (though we expect you to generate your own leads as well).
* Collaborative environment where everybody is happy to help.
* A remote\-first hybrid model: while giving plenty of space for concentration and personal working habits, we encourage regular meetings in one of our five hubs worldwide.
* Culture of genuine care, ownership, dedication, and high standards (learn more here).
* A vibrant corporate life: enjoy the opportunity to explore your teammates' cultures in online and offline events, participate in sports competitions, enjoy art master classes, and create your new favorite memories at our parties.
* Creatio offers all team members competitive pay.
* Paid leave options for life\-qualifying events, sicknesses, etc.

data.title: Dealer Manager - Commercial Interiors
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Title**
 Dealer Manager \- Commercial Interiors
   

  

**Position Overview**
*Shaw Contract is a global design leader in commercial flooring for some of the world’s most creative and innovative environments. Our vast, sustainable product offerings can be found in diverse markets such as work
data.jd_text:
**Job Title**
 Dealer Manager \- Commercial Interiors
   

  

**Position Overview**
*Shaw Contract is a global design leader in commercial flooring for some of the world’s most creative and innovative environments. Our vast, sustainable product offerings can be found in diverse markets such as workplace, healthcare, hospitality, education, and multi\-family dwellings; supporting the spaces in which we work, learn, live, play, and heal.*
 As an
 **Account Manager for our Dealer Channel** 
 , you energize and grow the Shaw Contract business by leading and enabling our dealer partners across the region. You are the strategic link between Shaw and the dealer sales teams—coaching, training, and collaborating to unlock market opportunities and consistently exceed sales targets. You work hands\-on with dealer sales forces, architects, designers, and end users, translating the Shaw Contract innovative flooring solutions into winning commercial projects. From shaping dealer strategies and evaluating performance, to supporting key bids and strengthening long\-term partnerships, you play a pivotal role in driving sustainable growth. This is a high\-impact, field\-based role for a commercial sales leader based in Dubai who thrives on relationship building, strategic thinking, and turning ambition into results—while representing the values, quality, and leadership of Shaw Contract.
   

  

 Our candidate will ideally reside in Dubai to cover the UAE , Turkey, and Sub Saharan country markets.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead, motivate, and develop dealer partner sales teams to achieve and exceed regional revenue targets.
* Build strategic selling plans that maximize dealer performance and expand Shaw Contract’s presence in priority markets.
* Serve as a trusted advisor to dealer principals and sales leaders, providing insight, guidance, and joint business planning.
* Engage regularly with dealers, end users, designers, architects, and contractors to identify business opportunities and strengthen Shaw’s market position.
* Conduct ongoing market assessments to understand competitive conditions, customer needs, and emerging trends.
* Represent Shaw Contract at key industry events, trade fairs, and customer engagements to elevate brand visibility and influence.
* Assess dealer competencies—including sales, internal support, and technical specialists—to identify development needs.
* Deliver product training, selling techniques, and competitive positioning to enhance dealer expertise, in partnership with Shaw Learning Academy.
* Coach dealer sales teams to improve selling effectiveness, pipeline management, and account execution.
* Maintain consistent communication with dealers, acting as a primary point of contact for commercial and administrative support.
* Coordinate closely with internal teams—including logistics, customer service, samples, and marketing—to ensure seamless order flow and customer satisfaction.
* Prepare and manage quotations, resolve dealer inquiries and complaints, and maintain accurate documentation.
* Conduct dealer business reviews, set performance goals, and monitor progress in partnership with the Regional Vice President.
* Travel extensively within the region (up to 60% overnight) to support dealers, meet customers, and strengthen market relationships.
* Host and entertain key stakeholders—including dealer teams, end users, and designers—at industry events, client meetings, and business meals.
* If you'd like to learn more, you can reach out to the Regional Sales VP on LinkedIn, Lars Huppertz.


**Requirements**
* 3–5 years of professional experience, ideally in commercial interiors, building products, or other B2B design‑related industries.
* Ability and willingness to travel throughout the assigned territory, including overnight travel up to 60%.
* Valid driver’s license and passport.
* Proficiency with standard office technology, including PC, tablet, and mobile applications.


**Preferred Experience**
* Proven B2B outside sales experience within commercial interiors or commercial building materials.
* Experience selling through flooring dealers or flooring contractors in the Middle East \& Africa region.
* Strong communication, presentation, and relationship‑building skills with the ability to influence a wide range of stakeholders.


**Safety and Security Requirements:** 
  

  

 Job offer will be contingent on the applicants ability to obtain work authorization in Dubai and to pass the mandatory background check.
   

  

 Be aware of and abide by the laws of the UAE and any other countries visited on company business such as the UK. Use caution when lifting samples to prevent pulling/straining a back muscle. Use all equipment as directed by the manufacturer. Abide by all Corporate Safety Rules \& Regulations.
   

  

 This description is not intended to include all details of the work functions inherent in this position.  Responsibilities of any position may change without prior notice due to company direction or business conditions.
   

  

**Competencies:** 
  

  

 Build Trusting Relationships
   

  

 Influence Others
   

  

 Execute Action Plan
   

  

 Build Customer Satisfaction
   

  

 \#shawcontract
   

  

 \#ShawIND
   

  

**Work Shift**
 Shaw Industries is an equal opportunity employer as to all protected groups, including protected veterans and individuals with disabilities.

data.raw_snippet:
Technology is our how. And people are our why. For over two decades, we have been harnessing technology to drive meaningful change.
   

  

  

  

 By combining world\-class engineering, industry expertise and a people\-centric mindset, we consult and partner with leading brands from various indus
data.jd_text:
Technology is our how. And people are our why. For over two decades, we have been harnessing technology to drive meaningful change.
   

  

  

  

 By combining world\-class engineering, industry expertise and a people\-centric mindset, we consult and partner with leading brands from various industries to create dynamic platforms and intelligent digital experiences that drive innovation and transform businesses.
   

  

  

  

 From prototype to real\-world impact \- be part of a global shift by doing work that matters.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 This role is based in Riyadh, with a primary focus on driving new business growth across the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and additional responsibility for selected opportunities in the United Arab Emirates.
   

  





 The Commercial discipline at Endava is responsible for accelerating growth by acquiring new strategic clients, expanding market presence, and acting as trusted advisors to senior business and technology leaders. This function combines deep industry understanding with strong expertise in IT Professional Services, Custom Software Engineering, and Digital Transformation, enabling Endava to support organisations undertaking large\-scale technology and business change.
   

  





 As a Senior Business Development Manager, you will be accountable for new logo acquisition across KSA, while also supporting targeted business development initiatives in the UAE. You will introduce organisations to Endava’s digital engineering, data, cloud, and transformation capabilities, owning the full sales lifecycle from initial engagement through to deal closure.
   

  





 This is a pure individual contributor role with no people management responsibilities.
   

  





**Responsibilities:**



* Act as a trusted advisor to senior business and technology stakeholders, selling IT Professional Services and Custom Software\-led Digital Transformation solutions.
* Lead new business acquisition in the Saudi market, with a strong emphasis on large enterprise and strategic accounts.
* Support selected new business opportunities in the UAE, as required by regional growth priorities.
* Own and execute the end\-to\-end sales lifecycle, from prospecting and qualification through deal shaping, negotiation, and closure.
* Proactively identify opportunities through direct prospecting, cold outreach, networking, referrals, and market intelligence.
* Build and maintain a strong, high\-quality pipeline aligned to ambitious revenue targets.
* Structure, negotiate, and close complex, multi\-stream professional services engagements.
* Consistently achieve and exceed annual sales and revenue objectives.
* Apply deep understanding of digital transformation, enterprise technology, and regional market dynamics to engage credibly with VP, C\-level, and senior technology leaders.
* Grow and manage your personal book of business, maximising earnings through an uncapped commission model.
* Represent Endava at KSA\-focused and regional industry events, conferences, panels, and executive workshops.
* Actively contribute to strengthening Endava’s brand and presence across Saudi Arabia and the wider GCC.


**Qualifications**
* 8–10\+ years of proven new business development experience selling IT Professional Services, Custom Software Solutions, and/or Digital Transformation services.
* Demonstrable sales experience in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, with a strong understanding of Saudi client expectations, procurement models, and relationship\-led selling.
* Experience selling into the UAE market is highly desirable.
* Strong background in Financial Services (Banking, Financial Services, and Insurance), with a clear understanding of industry\-specific technology challenges and trends.
* An existing warm network of senior decision\-makers in KSA, particularly within Financial Services.
* Strong hunter mentality with proven experience in:
   

	+ Prospecting and cold calling
	+ Opportunity qualification and deal shaping
	+ Executive\-level presentations
	+ Commercial negotiation and deal closure
* Consistent track record of delivering $5M\+ annual quota within professional services or digital consulting environments.
* Experience preparing and presenting commercial proposals, business cases, and Statements of Work (SoWs).
* Proven ability to engage, influence, and sell to VP, C\-suite, and senior technology stakeholders.



**Personal Attributes**



* Highly self\-motivated, performance\-driven, and comfortable operating independently.
* Commercially sharp with strong relationship\-building and stakeholder management skills.
* Comfortable navigating complex sales cycles in a fast\-paced, target\-driven environment.



**Additional Requirements:**



* Travel is an integral part of a this role and the individual will need to travel locally, within country, and internationally as needed to perform the role (they should have a valid passport and be prepared to travel during working hours as needed by the company).


**Additional Information**

 Discover some of the global benefits that empower our people to become the best version of themselves:
   

  

  




* **Finance:**
 Competitive salary package, share plan, company performance bonuses, value\-based recognition awards, referral bonus;
* **Career Development** 
 :
   

 Career coaching, global career opportunities, non\-linear career paths, internal development programmes for management and technical leadership;
* **Learning Opportunities:**
 Complex projects, rotations, internal tech communities, training, certifications, coaching, online learning platforms subscriptions, pass\-it\-on sessions, workshops, conferences;
* **Work\-Life Balance:**
 Hybrid work and flexible working hours, employee assistance programme;
* **Health:**
 Global internal wellbeing programme, access to wellbeing apps;
* **Community:**
 Global internal tech communities, hobby clubs and interest groups, inclusion and diversity programmes, events and celebrations.



 At Endava, we’re committed to creating an open, inclusive, and respectful environment where everyone feels safe, valued, and empowered to be their best. We welcome applications from people of all backgrounds, experiences, and perspectives—because we know that inclusive teams help us deliver smarter, more innovative solutions for our customers. Hiring decisions are based on merit, skills, qualifications, and potential. If you need adjustments or support during the recruitment process, please let us know.

data.title: Executive Search Partner
data.raw_snippet:
**This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an Executive Search Partner in Saudi Arabia.**
 This role is a hands\-on, high\-impact position responsible for leading end\-to\-end executive search processes for senior and C\-suite roles across glo
data.jd_text:
**This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an Executive Search Partner in Saudi Arabia.**
 This role is a hands\-on, high\-impact position responsible for leading end\-to\-end executive search processes for senior and C\-suite roles across global markets. You will partner closely with hiring managers, building talent pipelines, conducting structured interviews, and guiding the full candidate lifecycle from sourcing to offer negotiation. The position requires a strategic mindset to map markets, engage passive candidates, and drive diversity\-aware sourcing practices. You will leverage analytics and KPIs to continuously improve hiring outcomes and candidate experience. Operating in a fully remote environment, you will contribute to shaping the organization’s leadership teams while maintaining employer branding and compliance across regions. This role combines deep recruitment expertise, cross\-cultural collaboration, and global market knowledge, offering exposure to diverse industries and talent pools.
   

  

**Accountabilities**
* Run full\-cycle executive searches for senior and executive positions, including search strategy, candidate sourcing, interviews, offer negotiation, and closure.
* Build and maintain talent pipelines, market maps, and networks for core functions and products.
* Source passive candidates through LinkedIn, referrals, events, and targeted outreach, ensuring consistent employer brand messaging.
* Conduct structured interviews and scorecards, advising hiring managers on assessment and calibration.
* Negotiate offers, manage candidate closing, and benchmark compensation effectively.
* Track, report, and optimize recruiting KPIs and candidate experience metrics in partnership with People Analytics.
* Coach hiring managers on best practices, diversity\-aware hiring, and process compliance (GDPR/local laws).


**Requirements**
* 5\-7 years of hands\-on executive search experience in\-house or with retained search firms.
* Proven success placing mid\-senior to executive\-level candidates (Director, VP, C\-suite, or equivalent).
* Experience recruiting for technology\-driven or high\-growth industries (SaaS, FinTech, Consumer Tech, Marketplace, or related sectors).
* Knowledge of global markets with experience recruiting across EMEA and understanding CIS technology landscapes.
* Strong communication, negotiation, and relationship\-building skills.
* Ability to operate independently in a remote environment while managing multiple priorities.
* Familiarity with ATS systems, structured interview processes, and recruitment compliance frameworks.


**Benefits**
* Fully remote opportunity with flexible work arrangements.
* 28 days of vacation per year, plus 7 wellness days.
* Bonuses up to $5,000 for successful candidate referrals.
* 50% coverage for professional training, conferences, and international meetings.
* Corporate discounts for language courses and professional development.
* Health benefits reimbursement up to $1,000 per year if corporate insurance is unavailable.
* Support for home or coworking workplace setup (desk, chair, internet, etc.) with reimbursement up to $1,000 every three years.
* Internal gamified recognition system for bonuses, merchandise, and team\-building activities.


 Why Apply Through Jobgether?
   

  

 We use an AI\-powered matching process to ensure your application is reviewed quickly, objectively, and fairly against the role's core requirements. Our system identifies the top\-fitting candidates, and this shortlist is then shared directly with the hiring company. The final decision and next steps (interviews, assessments) are managed by their internal team.
   

  

 We appreciate your interest and wish you the best!
   

  

 Why Apply Through Jobgether?
   

  

 Data Privacy Notice: By submitting your application, you acknowledge that Jobgether will process your personal data to evaluate your candidacy and share relevant information with the hiring employer. This processing is based on legitimate interest and pre\-contractual measures under applicable data protection laws (including GDPR). You may exercise your rights (access, rectification, erasure, objection) at any time.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

**Job Description**
 We are currently seeking at Al Jaddaf Rotana Complex \- Al Jaddaf Rotana Suite Hotel, Arabian Park, Edge by Rotana \& Park Apartments, Edge by Rotana for\-
   

  

 Passionate and dynamic Sales \& Marketing professionals who pride themselves on their ability to deliver extraord
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 We are currently seeking at Al Jaddaf Rotana Complex \- Al Jaddaf Rotana Suite Hotel, Arabian Park, Edge by Rotana \& Park Apartments, Edge by Rotana for\-
   

  

 Passionate and dynamic Sales \& Marketing professionals who pride themselves on their ability to deliver extraordinary levels of customer service and provide creative solutions to our guests.
   

  

**Position Summary**
 The Complex Director of Sales \& Marketing is the commercial leader responsible for driving the hotel’s performance across all revenue\-generating area and lead the hotel’s sales, marketing, PR, digital, loyalty, and distribution strategy. Maintaining a strong collaborative relationship with hotel senior leadership team and Corporate Office to ensure alignment with Rotana’s commercial vision. In conjunction with the General Manager, the Director of Sales \& Marketing plays a pivotal role in shaping strategic direction, achieving overall business goals, and upholding the brand’s integrity, values, standards, and image within the marketplace.
   

  

 The role will demonstrate a profound understanding of the hospitality industry, market trends, and competitive dynamics, and will lead a high\-performing team of professionals in sales, events sales, and marketing communications to achieve exceptional results and exceed customer expectations.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Strategic Planning
* Develop and implement short and long\-term strategic plans aligned with Rotana’s commercial strategy to achieve the hotel’s revenue and profitability targets
* Identify and seize business opportunities by conducting market research, analyzing trends, and monitoring competitor activity
* Set pricing strategies and sales targets to optimize revenue generation
* Actively use Rotana’s sales tools and resources to deepen the understanding of customer patterns and assist in developing relevant products and packages
* Develop and implement sales strategies to optimize occupancy and rate across all market segments.
* Identify and pursue new business opportunities and build relationships with key clients and industry partners
* Monitor and report on sales performance against targets and develop action plans to address any gaps
* Monitor and evaluate the effectiveness of marketing initiatives and adjust strategies as needed
* Sales Management


**Corporate \& Government Account**
* Leverage Rotana’s strong corporate network across GCC, Levant, and Africa.
* Drive penetration of key UAE/GCC government and semi\-government accounts.


**Leisure \& Travel Trade**
* Maximize production from regional tour operators, OTAs, and DMCs with a strong focus on GCC feeder markets.
* Negotiate tactical leisure packages during seasonal peaks (Eid, summer, school holidays).


**MICE \& Groups**
* Position the hotel as a preferred destination for corporate meetings, weddings, and social events.
* Collaborate with Rotana’s Regional and Global Sales Offices for international MICE business.
* Marketing \& Communications
* Design and implement a yearly marketing plan tailored to rooms segmentation and food \& beverage, aligning with revenue targets and guest satisfaction metrics.
* Implement data\-driven strategies to increase direct bookings and optimize guest engagement throughout the customer journey
* Conduct market research and competitive analysis to identify trends and set the hotel apart in the luxury segment
* Collaborate with third\-party vendors, travel partners, and luxury brands to expand the hotel’s reach.
* Shape and articulate the hotel’s unique brand narrative across all channels\- press releases, social media, digital campaigns, and guest communications.
* Plan and execute photoshoots aligned with campaign objectives, including overseeing creative direction, and ensuring all visual assets authentically reflect the brand’s identity and strategic goals.


**Rotana Brand Alignment**
* Ensure the hotel follows Rotana corporate brand guidelines across all campaigns, visuals, and communication.
* Implement Rotana\-driven campaigns (e.g., Rotana Escapes) locally with strong ROI tracking.


**Digital Marketing**
* Optimize hotel website content and booking engine (via Rotana.com) to increase direct contribution.
* Manage PPC, SEO, and paid social campaigns through Rotana’s centralized digital platforms.


**Social Media \& Content**
* Build local content calendars tailored to UAE/GCC audiences
* Articulate the hotel’s unique brand narrative across all channels


**Public Relations**
* Build, nurture, and leverage strong relationships with local, national, and international media, influencers, and key opinion leaders to secure positive coverage and manage press inquiries with professionalism.
* Work with Rotana’s PR agency partners to secure media coverage and influencer collaborations.
* Integrate CSR initiatives into the hotel’s communications plan, highlighting sustainability programs, community outreach, charitable partnerships, and employee volunteerism.


**F\&B Marketing**
* Position the hotel’s restaurants and lounges as destinations for both residents and in\-house guests.
* Create tactical promotions with measurable ROI (e.g., brunches, business lunches, seasonal campaigns).
* Loyalty \& CRM (Rotana Rewards)
* Implement data\-driven strategies to increase direct bookings and optimize guest engagement throughout the customer journey
* Increase penetration of Rotana Rewards members across rooms and F\&B.
* Monitor guest feedback to improve NPS and loyalty.
* Distribution \& Channel Optimization


**Direct Contribution**
* Increase Rotana.com and mobile app bookings to reduce reliance on OTAs.
* Ensure “Book Direct” benefits (discounts, F\&B credits, upgrades) are communicated clearly.


**OTA Management**
* Maintain rate parity across channels.


**GDS \& Corporate RFPs**
* Ensure strong presence in GDS channels to support corporate production.
* Manage RFP submissions via Lanyon and other platforms in collaboration with Rotana’s Sales Offices.
* Continuous Improvement\-
* Stay informed about industry trends, best practices, and emerging technologies.
* Identify opportunities for process improvement and implement innovative solutions to drive efficiency and enhance the guest experience.
* Continuously evaluate the effectiveness of marketing and sales strategies and adjust as needed to achieve business goals.
* Leadership
* Build, manage, motivate, and empower a high\-performing team to achieve business objectives
* Provide clear direction, set expectations, and delegate responsibilities effectively
* Foster a collaborative and inclusive work environment that encourages innovation and continuous improvement
* Conduct performance evaluations, provide constructive feedback, and support the professional development of team members
* Qualifications \& Experience
* Bachelor’s degree and above (in Hospitality, Business, or Marketing)
* Passion for hospitality industry and customer centric mindset
* A minimum of 5\-8 years of experience in sales \& marketing, with at least 2\-3 years in a leadership role
* Advance business capability, include strategic thinking and planning, business acumen, leadership management, influence and communication skill, adaptability and resilience
* Fluency in English; Arabic is an advantage.


**Skills**
**Education, Qualifications \& Experiences**
 You should be holding a bachelor degree in sales with previous relevant work experiences. You must be a computer literate with effective and outstanding communication skills, both verbal and written.
   

  

**Knowledge \& Competencies**
 The ideal candidate will be dynamic and a ‘finisher’ with an eye for detail and the ability to drive through solutions. You are having a strong commercial orientation with broad business understanding and skills, equipped with a sharp intellect in order to focus on key issues with an attention to details and accuracy of information while possessing following additional competencies\-
   

  

 Understanding the Business
   

  

 Influencing Outcomes
   

  

 Planning for Business
   

  

 Team Building
   

  

 Valuing Diversity
   

  

 Leading People
   

  

 Adaptability
   

  

 Drive for Results
   

  

 Customer Focus
   

  

 Managing Operations

 At Smart Bricks, we make residential real estate buying easier and smarter with our industry\-leading technology. Our platform uses advanced AI technology to help buyers find the best deals quickly and with less effort, and ultimately give them the confidence they need to make better b
data.jd_text:
**About Us**
 At Smart Bricks, we make residential real estate buying easier and smarter with our industry\-leading technology. Our platform uses advanced AI technology to help buyers find the best deals quickly and with less effort, and ultimately give them the confidence they need to make better buying decisions.
   

  

 We're the only PropTech to be backed by some of the world's biggest names in tech and real estate, the likes of NVIDIA, Google, Microsoft, and experts from Zillow, Airbnb, and OpenAI.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We are seeking a marketing director to lead our growth marketing, brand strategy, and customer acquisition efforts. This role requires a visionary leader with a strategic mindset and hands\-on expertise in digital marketing, brand positioning, and growth hacking.
   

  

 The CMO will play a critical role in scaling Smart Bricks by driving our go\-to\-market strategy, building a world\-class marketing team, and leveraging AI\-powered insights to achieve exponential growth and brand leadership.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Marketing Strategy \& Leadership
* Develop and implement a comprehensive marketing strateg yto drive brand awareness, customer acquisition, and revenue growth.
* Build and lead ahigh\-performing marketing team, fostering a culture of innovation and data\-driven decision\-making.
* Digital Growth \& Performance Marketing
* Design and execute growth marketing campaigns across digital channels, optimizing customer acquisition and conversion rates.
* Utilize data analytics and A/B testing to continuously improve campaign performance and lower customer acquisition costs (CAC).
* Brand Positioning \& Communication
* Craft a compelling brand strategy to establish Smart Bricks as a leader in PropTech and real estate investing.
* Lead public relations and communication efforts to enhance brand credibility and customer engagement.
* Customer Insights \& Data Analytics
* Leverage AI\-powered insights to understand customer behavior and personalize marketing efforts.
* Utilize advanced analytics tools to track KPIs, measure ROI, and optimize marketing campaigns.
* Strategic Partnerships \& Collaborations
* Establish strategic partnerships with media platforms, influencers, and industry leaders to expand brand reach.
* Collaborate with product, sales, and tech teams to create integrated marketing campaigns and drive product adoption.


**Qualifications \& Skills**
* 10\+ years of experience in digital marketing, growth marketing, or brand strategy, with at least 5 years in a leadership role.
* Proven success in scaling digital customer acquisition in high\-growth tech or PropTech startups.
* Deep expertise in performance marketing, SEO/SEM, social media strategy, and content marketing.
* Strong understanding of brand positioning, storytelling, and communication strategy.
* Data\-driven mindset with proficiency in analytics tools (Google Analytics, HubSpot, etc.).
* Exceptional leadership, strategic thinking, and communication skills.


**Why Join Us?**
* Competitive salary and an attractive commission structure.
* Equity compensation – you'll have a stake in the company's success.
* Opportunity to build and lead the marketing strategy for a high\-growth PropTech startup.
* Join a fast\-growing, innovative startup environment backed by global leaders in tech and real estate.
* Flexible working arrangements and a focus on work\-life balance.
* Professional growth opportunities backed by a supportive and collaborative environment.


 If you're a visionary marketing leader ready to drive growth and shape the brand of a disruptive PropTech, we'd love to connect!

 Responsible for leading the execution of the global practice strategy for a region. This leader is accountable for growing the regional practice, developing new business, leveraging industry relationships, establishing strong relationships in the community and cultivating the culture of HKS within the region.

* Exercises skills of persuasion and negotiation on critical issues
