* Strong organizational skills and the ability to work on multiple projects at the same time
* Ability to work closely with design leaders to promote an inter\-disciplinary design approach and philosophy, and to facilitate its advancement across the firm
* Ability to manage team with diplomatic and collaborative leadership style which puts value on relationships and collaboration, both internal and external
* Ability to communicate in a clear, concise and professional manner both verbally and in writing
* Ability to problem solve and apply innovative solutions
* Ability to collaborate and encourage collaboration in a team environment
* Ability to effectively meet deadlines at expected quality
* Travel will be required


 If you currently work for HKS, please submit your application via the Internal Careers Portal.

data.title: Senior Director of Global Procurement (Direct & Indirect)
data.raw_snippet:
**Who We Are:** 
 At Huda Beauty, our Vision is to lead in creating a democratized beauty industry where power is given back to people to define, create, and enjoy beauty for themselves! Launched by award\-winning beauty powerhouse Huda Kattan in 2013, Huda Beauty is one of the world's fastest growi
data.jd_text:
**Who We Are:** 
 At Huda Beauty, our Vision is to lead in creating a democratized beauty industry where power is given back to people to define, create, and enjoy beauty for themselves! Launched by award\-winning beauty powerhouse Huda Kattan in 2013, Huda Beauty is one of the world's fastest growing beauty brands. As a company, we are fuelled by purpose and not profit, this allows us to approach things differently so that we can create products, content, and a community like no other. A lot has changed since our launch in 2013, but something that will forever remain at the core of Huda Beauty is our focus on business excellence and our unwavering passion for kindness!
   

  

**Summary:** 
 The
 **Senior Director Global Procurement** 
 leads the end\-to\-end procurement strategy across both Direct and Indirect categories within Huda Beauty's global organization.
   

  

 In a context where the company does not operate owned manufacturing facilities, the role oversees the sourcing and management of components, including primary and secondary packaging, as well as strategic partnerships with tier\-1 and tier\-2 contract manufacturers and fillers responsible for product filling and assembly.
   

  

 On the Indirect Procurement side, the role manages complex and fast\-evolving spend categories linked to brand development, global distribution, and digital operations, including logistics and freight, marketing and creative services, IT and digital solutions, CAPEX\-related sourcing, and professional services.
   

  

 The position operates at the intersection of industrial performance, cost structure optimization, supply security, and brand excellence, ensuring that procurement fully supports Huda Beauty's growth, innovation, and quality ambitions.
   

  

**Direct Procurement**
* Packaging (primary and secondary)
* Contract manufacturing / subcontracting (where applicable)
* Components, Formula and Raw Materials (where applicable)
* Fill \& Assembly partners (CM tier\-1 1 \& tier\-2\)
* Tooling and industrial investments


**Indirect Procurement**
* Logistics and freight
* Marketing and agency services
* IT, digital, and software services
* CAPEX\-related sourcing
* Professional and consulting services
* Travel and corporate services


**Essential Duties and Responsibilities** 
 :
   

  

**Strategy \& Governance**
* Define and execute the global procurement strategy aligned with business objectives
* Establish scalable governance, policies, and decision frameworks
* Lead procurement transformation and maturity roadmap


**Organizational Leadership**
* Design and develop the procurement organization and talent pipeline
* Lead, coach, and develop team members
* Drive succession planning and capability development


**Value Creation \& Performance**
* Own procurement budget governance, long\-term cost structure, and financial performance in partnership with Finance
* Own procurement performance (cost, service, risk, innovation)
* Drive strategic sourcing, value analysis, and long\-term partnerships
* Ensure contract coverage and compliance


**Supplier \& Risk Management**
* Lead strategic supplier partnerships
* Oversee risk mitigation, dual sourcing, and contingency planning
* Manage geopolitical, regulatory, and capacity risks


**Digital \& Process Excellence**
* Lead digitalization and reporting roadmap
* Implement data\-driven performance management


**Executive \& Cross\-Functional Leadership**
* Act as procurement representative at advanced level
* Partner with Finance, Operations, Legal, R\&D, Marketing and Supply Chain
* Lead annual procurement planning, budget cycles, and multi\-year cost optimization roadmap


**Requirements**
* Master's degree in Business, Supply Chain, or equivalent
* 12\-15\+ years of progressive experience in global procurement / supply chain
* Proven experience in beauty, FMCG, or contract manufacturing
* Strong executive presence and change leadership
* Expertise in strategic sourcing, contracting, and digital tools
* High emotional intelligence and strong people leadership
* Comfortable operating in ambiguity and fast\-growth environments


**Benefits**
* Monthly "Self\-Love Days" \- at company discretion
* Premium Medical/Dental/Vision coverage for employee plus dependents
* Monthly coaching sessions with our in\-house Success Coach
* Employee discounts on all Huda Beauty products
* Quarterly product gifting


*Huda Beauty is committed to building diverse and inclusive teams and upholding an equal employment workplace that is free from discrimination. We hire stellar individuals regardless of their race, color, ancestry, religion, gender identity, national origin, sexual orientation, age, marital status, medical conditions, disability, or veteran status. If you need reasonable accommodations at any point in the application or interview process, please let us know.*

data.title: Finance Director
data.raw_snippet: Drayton are thrilled to be partnering with a high growth, international ecommerce business in the appointment of a Finance Director. This role will be critical in shaping financial strategy, building scalable financial operations, and supporting the business through its exciting next phase of growth
data.jd_text:
Drayton are thrilled to be partnering with a high growth, international ecommerce business in the appointment of a Finance Director. This role will be critical in shaping financial strategy, building scalable financial operations, and supporting the business through its exciting next phase of growth across multiple markets.
 



  





 In this role, responsibilities will include:
 


* Leading the overall financial strategy, planning and management of the business across brands and regions
* Partnering closely with the CEO, COO and senior leadership team to support growth, expansion and investment decisions
* Owning budgeting, forecasting and long term financial planning processes
* Delivering timely management reporting, financial analysis and commercial insight
* Overseeing accounting, financial reporting, audits, tax and statutory compliance across international operations
* Managing cashflow, treasury, banking relationships and funding arrangements
* Supporting ecommerce, operations and commercial teams with financial analysis across pricing, sourcing and inventory
* Building and leading a high performing finance team across multiple geographies



  





 Requirements for this role include:
 


* Fully qualified accountant status such as ACA, ACCA or CIMA
* Significant senior finance leadership experience within direct to consumer ecommerce businesses.
* Proven experience operating in high growth or entrepreneurial environments
* Strong technical finance capability across accounting, reporting and financial planning
* A commercially astute individual with a hands on and pragmatic approach



  





 The ideal profile will:
 


* Be a commercially driven finance leader who enjoys operating at both strategic and hands on levels
* Be comfortable building structure and scalable processes in a fast paced environment
* Demonstrate strong leadership, communication and stakeholder management skills
* Thrive in dynamic, evolving businesses with pace and ambition

data.jd_text:

data.jd_text:
We’re Hiring: HR Director (PR \& Marketing Agency Experience Required)
 



  





 We are looking for an experienced HR Director to lead and elevate the people function within a fast\-growing, government\-aligned communications group operating across PR, media, and strategic advisory.
 



  





 This is not a traditional HR role — we are looking for someone who understands the pace, pressure, and structure of PR \& marketing agencies, and can build a high\-performance culture aligned with business outcomes.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities:
 



 • Lead the full HR function across multiple departments (Editorial, Media Relations, AI, Business Development, Admin)
 



 • Build and enforce performance\-driven HR systems (KPIs, timesheets, accountability frameworks)
 



 • Oversee recruitment strategy, especially for senior hires within PR, media, and communications
 



 • Design and implement organizational structures aligned with business growth
 



 • Manage employee relations with a firm, fair, and business\-oriented approach
 



 • Partner closely with leadership on workforce planning and strategic decisions
 



 • Ensure compliance with UAE labor laws and internal governance standards
 



 • Drive culture focused on speed, ownership, and delivery
 



  





 Requirements:
 



 • Minimum 5\+ years of HR experience, with at least 2 years in a leadership role
 



 • MUST have experience in PR agencies, marketing agencies, or media organizations
 



 • Strong understanding of agency workflows, client servicing environments, and fast turnaround operations
 



 • Proven track record in building HR systems from scratch or restructuring teams
 



 • Experience working with government entities or high\-profile clients is a strong plus
 


* Strong personality — able to enforce discipline, not just manage HR processes

data.title: Head of Gulf
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
**About us**
 With over 200 brands sold in nearly 180 countries, we’re the world’s leading premium drinks company. Bring your passion and use your curiosity as you explore, collaborate, and innovate to build brands consumers love. Together with passionate people from all over the
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
**About us**
 With over 200 brands sold in nearly 180 countries, we’re the world’s leading premium drinks company. Bring your passion and use your curiosity as you explore, collaborate, and innovate to build brands consumers love. Together with passionate people from all over the world, you’ll test new ideas, learn and grow, and unlock a brighter, more exciting future.
   

  

 Join us to create a career worth celebrating.
   

  

**About The Function**
 Our Sales team love building relationships, connecting with customers to sell our much\-loved brands in new and vibrant markets where they can thrive. They help sell our iconic brands across 180 countries every year.
   

  

 We’re operating across different markets, channels, and areas of expertise. Using your curiosity and passion, you’ll make the most of consumer insight and digital platforms, reaching new customers, markets, and celebrations to help us achieve our growth potential. We’ll support your learning and growth as you develop your career with us and work with people across our business to realise your fullest potential
   

  

**Market Context and Role Scope**
 The Middle East and North Africa (MENA) is one of the most complex, volatile and opportunity\-rich regions globally, characterised by rapid growth, regulatory sensitivity and significant diversity across markets. The region spans 17 countries, including sanctioned and dry markets, and serves a population of approximately 500 million people with highly diverse cultural, religious and socio\-economic profiles. With around 95% of the population Muslim, the beverage alcohol industry operates in a uniquely sensitive environment where reputation, compliance and stakeholder management are critical to sustainable success.
   

  

 The total beverage alcohol landscape in MENA is shaped by frequent shifts in political, cultural and religious dynamics, resulting in evolving government legislation, changing consumer behaviour and continual Route to Market complexity. Success in the region requires sophisticated RTM design, strong distributor partnerships and the ability to adapt at pace to changing regulatory and market conditions.
   

  

 At the same time, MENA is undergoing a structural transformation. Governments are accelerating diversification agendas most notably through Saudi Vision 2030 and UAE Vision 2030 to reposition the region as a global hub for tourism, hospitality and luxury experiences. This evolution creates significant long\-term growth opportunities for Diageo, particularly across on\-trade, travel retail, luxury, local bottling, non\-alcoholic beverages and emerging alternative channels.
   

  

 Within this context, MENA represents a strategically critical growth engine for Diageo, encompassing developed, emerging and frontier markets, primarily operating through distributor\-led models. The Commercial Director – MENA leads across this breadth and complexity, shaping differentiated market and channel strategies, unlocking growth through premiumisation and innovation, and ensuring Diageo wins responsibly and sustainably across on\-trade, B2B, travel retail and increasingly omni\-channel and e\-commerce routes to market.
   

  

 Within MENA, the Gulf remains the biggest region in terms of NSV mainly driven by the UAE. The region will be driving the growth of MENA in the next 5 years.
   

  

 UAE being the biggest market in the region, it showcases a mix of 4 channels:
   

  

* Very advanced On\-trade where the biggest global groups are operating in Dubai.
* Fast\-growing retail channel which is yet untapped for Diageo although it doubled year on year
* E\-commerce with Spirits now being sold online.
* FTZ Middle East, a strong yet volatile channel that needs close control on pricing and stock movement.


**Purpose of the role**
 The Head of Gulf is a key member of the Commercial Team and reports to the MENA Commercial Director. This highly strategic role will be responsible for driving value market share and best practices in well\-established markets like UAE and build and develop new RTC in markets like Saudi Arabia. The role leads and inspires an international team of 6 FTEs and extended team of Diageo’s distributors in the region.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Lead the development and implementation of the market strategy to optimize growth opportunities, market share win and profit enhancement.
* Create value by locking strategic pricing and trade terms across the value chain and by achieving the triple Win for Diageo, Distributor and Customer.
* Develop an omnichannel strategy ensuring a cohesive consumer experience across all channels (e\-com, on trade and off trade).
* Lead the relationship with key and relevant stakeholders (external and internal), especially distributors while keeping a sustainable, mutually profitable and strong partnership.
* Lead the negotiation with distributors while securing access to depletions and relevant market data to increase action plan and strategies efficiency.
* Lead the RTC agenda by assessing the right distributor model for the right business (Alc and Non Alc)
* Build a strong launch plan for Saudi Non\-Alc Business which will help define opportunity size and build the right RTC to cater market demand.
* Unlock regional deals for Diageo MENA while leveraging on on\-trade groups operating in different MENA countries.
* Overlook relationship with key customers within the region while ensuring strong JUBP and tailor\-made approach based on customer specificity.
* Build, lead and coach a strong team that will enable us to enhance our effective presence in the market.


**Experience / Skills Required**
* 12\-15 years of successful experience in commercial function, with at least six years in a senior role in


 matrixed environments with FMCG blue chip multinationals
   

  

* Experience in leading a big and successful in\-market RTC Change.
* Essential commercial insight and experience. Preferable if gained through cross\-functional working. Demonstrates numerical and financial skills.
* Proven ability to persuade, influence and build credibility with all levels and all functions.
* Strong Analytical, persuasive selling, negotiation and decision\-making skills.
* Experience in planning and orchestrating available limited resources to achieve ambitious growth targets.
* Excellent coaching and relationship building skills. Demonstrates a track record as a valued coach and peer in the business.
* Has held commercial roles with full P\&L accountability.
* Track record in building and executing effective commercial strategy in a competitive environment while ensuring strong brand presence and leadership.


**Diversity statement**
 Our purpose is to celebrate life, every day, everywhere. And creating an inclusive culture, where everyone feels valued and that they can belong, is a crucial part of this.
   

  

 We embrace diversity in the broadest possible sense. This means that you’ll be welcomed and celebrated for who you are just by being you. You’ll be part of and help build and champion an inclusive culture that celebrates people of different gender, ethnicity, ability, age, sexual orientation, social class, educational backgrounds, experiences, mindsets, and more.
   

  

 Our ambition is to create the best performing, most trusted and respected consumer products companies in the world. Join us and help transform our business as we take our brands to the next level and build new ones as part of shaping the next generation of celebrations for consumers around the world.
   

  

 Feel inspired? Then this may be the opportunity for you. If you require a reasonable adjustment, please ensure that you capture this information when you submit your application.
   

  

**Worker Type**
 Regular
   

  

**Primary Location:**
 Dubai
   

  

**Additional Locations :**
**Job Posting Start Date**
 2026\-03\-30

data.title: Director of Marketing
data.raw_snippet:
**Role Overview** 




  





 The Director of Marketing at the Free Zones Authority of Ajman is responsible for leading the overall marketing strategy, driving business growth, strengthening brand positioning, and ensuring the effective execution of all marketing initiatives across the Authority.
data.jd_text:
**Role Overview** 




  





 The Director of Marketing at the Free Zones Authority of Ajman is responsible for leading the overall marketing strategy, driving business growth, strengthening brand positioning, and ensuring the effective execution of all marketing initiatives across the Authority.
 



 The role plays a critical part in attracting investors, supporting economic growth, and positioning Ajman Free Zones as a leading destination for businesses at both local and international levels.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




  





**1\. Marketing Strategy \& Leadership** 



* Define and lead the organization’s marketing vision, strategy, and long\-term roadmap aligned with corporate objectives
* Translate strategic goals into actionable marketing plans, initiatives, and performance targets
* Ensure alignment between Marketing, Sales, and Operations to drive business outcomes
* Act as a strategic advisor to leadership on market trends, risks, and growth opportunities



  





**2\. Demand Generation \& Revenue Growth** 



* Build and scale a sustainable demand generation engine across digital and offline channels
* Drive customer acquisition, lead generation, and revenue contribution through targeted campaigns
* Optimize the full marketing funnel (Awareness → Conversion → Retention)
* Continuously improve lead quality, conversion rates, and cost efficiency (CPA \& CAC)



  





**3\. Brand Strategy \& Market Positioning** 



* Develop and manage a strong, differentiated brand positioning in the UAE market
* Define brand messaging, tone of voice, and communication frameworks
* Ensure consistency across all marketing channels and customer touchpoints
* Monitor and enhance brand awareness, reputation, and market perception



  





**4\. Digital Marketing \& Performance Optimization** 



* Oversee all digital channels including SEO, SEM, paid media, social media, and email marketing
* Optimize website performance, user experience, and conversion rate (CRO)
* Implement data tracking systems and analytics tools to measure performance
* Drive continuous improvement through A/B testing and performance optimization



  





**5\. Market Research \& Strategic Insights** 



* Lead market research initiatives to understand customer behavior, needs, and segmentation
* Analyze competitor strategies, pricing models, and service offerings
* Translate insights into actionable recommendations for service development and positioning
* Identify new market opportunities and growth segments



  





**6\. Content Strategy \& Communications** 



* Develop and execute a comprehensive content strategy aligned with the customer journey
* Oversee production of high\-quality content across all platforms
* Ensure all messaging reflects the company’s value proposition and competitive advantage
* Manage content distribution to maximize reach and engagement



  





**7\. Public Relations \& Strategic Partnerships** 



* Lead PR strategy including media relations, press releases, and reputation management
* Build and maintain partnerships with business councils, chambers, and industry stakeholders
* Drive initiatives that enhance brand credibility and visibility
* Represent the organization in key external engagements when required



  





**8\. Events \& Activation Marketing** 



* Plan and execute events, exhibitions, webinars, and roadshows
* Use events as a key channel for lead generation and brand awareness
* Measure event performance based on leads, engagement, and ROI
* Ensure effective coordination with Sales for lead conversion



  





**9\. Marketing Operations \& Technology** 



* Implement and manage CRM systems and marketing automation platforms
* Ensure accurate lead tracking, reporting, and attribution
* Develop dashboards to monitor marketing performance across channels
* Optimize internal processes for efficiency and scalability



  





**10\. Team Leadership \& Organizational Development** 



* Build and lead a high\-performing marketing team across all functions
* Define roles, responsibilities, and performance expectations
* Develop team capabilities through coaching and structured development plans
* Foster a culture of innovation, accountability, and collaboration



  





**11\. Budget Management \& Financial Performance** 



* Develop and manage the annual marketing budget
* Allocate resources based on performance and strategic priorities
* Monitor marketing spend and ensure cost efficiency and ROI optimization
* Provide financial insights and recommendations to leadership



  





**12\. Performance Management \& Reporting** 



* Establish clear KPIs and performance measurement frameworks
* Track performance across all campaigns and channels
* Prepare monthly and quarterly reports for executive leadership
* Provide data\-driven insights and recommendations for improvement



  





**13\. Innovation \& Continuous Improvement** 



* Stay updated on latest marketing trends, tools, and technologies
* Test and implement new growth strategies and channels
* Introduce global best practices into marketing processes
* Drive a data\-driven and experimentation\-focused culture



  





**Qualifications** 



* Bachelor’s degree in marketing, Business, or related field (MBA preferred)
* 10–15\+ years of experience in marketing, including senior leadership roles
* Proven success in B2B / services / Free Zone / government environments
* Strong expertise in digital marketing, brand strategy, and growth
* Experience with CRM and marketing automation tools
* Excellent leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills



  





**Core Competencies** 



* Strategic Leadership \& Vision
* Commercial \& Growth Mindset
* Brand \& Market Positioning
* Digital Marketing Excellence
* Market Intelligence \& Analysis
* Stakeholder \& Partnership Management
* Team Leadership \& Development
* Financial Acumen \& ROI Optimization
* Data\-Driven Decision Making

data.title: Cluster Director of Revenue
data.raw_snippet:
**Company Description**
 Avani\+ Palm View Dubai Hotel \& Suites is a stylish urban resort located at the entrance of Palm Jumeirah, offering easy access to Dubai Media City, Dubai Marina, and transport links such as the Dubai Tram and Palm Monorail. The property features 247 spacious studios and ap
data.jd_text:
**Company Description**
 Avani\+ Palm View Dubai Hotel \& Suites is a stylish urban resort located at the entrance of Palm Jumeirah, offering easy access to Dubai Media City, Dubai Marina, and transport links such as the Dubai Tram and Palm Monorail. The property features 247 spacious studios and apartments, each equipped with kitchens and laundry facilities, making it ideal for families and long stays. Guests can enjoy an infinity pool overlooking the Arabian Gulf, a fully equipped AvaniFit gym, versatile meeting facilities, and dining options including Seven Seeds, The Pantry, and Aqua pool bar.
   

  

 La Suite Dubai Hotel \& Apartments, situated along Sheikh Zayed Road within Sidra Tower, caters perfectly to both business and leisure travelers with its prime location near Media and Internet City. The property offers 265 rooms, apartments, and penthouses across the upper floors, many with balconies and sweeping views of the city and coastline. Facilities include two outdoor pools, a 24/7 gym with yoga room, a luxurious spa, tennis court, and dining venues such as Aqua Café and Serai Lounge. With flexible meeting spaces for up to 200 guests and convenient shuttle services, La Suite combines modern living with resort\-style amenities in the heart of Dubai.
   

  

**Job Description**
 The Cluster Director of Revenue is responsible for leading the revenue strategy for multiple hotels based in Dubai. This role oversees all revenue\-generating functions—including pricing, forecasting, distribution, market analysis, and demand optimization—to maximize total revenue and profitability across both properties. The ideal candidate is a strategic thinker with deep analytical expertise, strong commercial acumen, and proven success in luxury or upscale hospitality markets.
   

  

* Develop and implement revenue strategies that optimize RevPAR, GOPPAR, and total hotel revenue across both properties.
* Create accurate short\-term and long\-term forecasts for rooms, F\&B, and ancillary revenue streams.
* Conduct weekly and monthly performance reviews, adjusting strategies in response to market conditions.
* Lead revenue meetings with property leadership, presenting insights and actionable recommendations.
* Monitor local, regional, and global market trends, including competitor pricing, demand shifts, and travel patterns.
* Conduct segmentation and channel mix analysis to evaluate revenue opportunities.
* Identify emerging demand periods, group displacement impacts, and business opportunities.
* Develop dynamic pricing strategies to maximize occupancy, ADR, and total yield.
* Ensure optimal inventory management across all distribution channels (direct, OTA, GDS, corporate, wholesale).
* Oversee rate loading, parity, and system accuracy across both properties.
* Evaluate and approve group and corporate rate proposals, RFPs, and long\-stay opportunities.
* Maintain optimal visibility, competitiveness, and positioning across all online and offline channels.
* Collaborate with digital marketing and e\-commerce teams to enhance conversion, website performance, and digital demand generation.
* Monitor OTA performance, commission costs, and distribution efficiency.
* Lead, mentor, and develop the cluster revenue team, ensuring high performance and productivity.
* Work closely with Sales, Marketing, Reservations, and Operations to drive alignment with the overall commercial strategy.
* Provide training and tools to ensure cross\-departmental understanding of revenue management principles.
* Oversee property RMS, PMS, CRS, channel manager, and related revenue systems.
* Ensure data accuracy and integrity across all systems.
* Produce weekly, monthly, and ad\-hoc reports to support executive decision\-making.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in hospitality, Business, Finance, or related field; Master’s degree preferred.
* Minimum 3\-5 years revenue management experience in upscale or luxury hotels; cluster or multi\-property experience required.
* Strong command of RMS, PMS, CRS, channel management systems; expertise with STR, Rate360, and BI tools.
* Excellent analytical, numerical, and commercial decision\-making skills.
* Strong communication, leadership, and stakeholder\-management abilities.
* Knowledge of the Dubai hospitality market and GCC travel dynamics is highly preferred.

 multinational technology organisation is looking for a

 who

**Responsibilities** 



* Partner closely with executive leadership to align HR initiatives with commercial priorities.
* Provide expert guidance on organisational structure, workforce optimisation, and people\-related risks.
* Drive long\-term workforce planning to enable sustainable growth and scalability.
* Design and implement succession pipelines and leadership development frameworks.
* Establish frameworks that promote accountability, performance excellence, and continuous improvement.
* Oversee employee engagement initiatives and monitor key people metrics to enhance retention and satisfaction.
* Introduce structured learning programs to enhance both technical and leadership capabilities.
* Develop and maintain competitive compensation frameworks aligned with market benchmarks.
* Ensure full compliance with applicable labour laws and regulatory requirements across jurisdictions.
* Oversee HR policies, systems, and operational processes to ensure efficiency and consistency.
* Utilise data and analytics to support informed decision\-making and workforce insights.
* Lead and support organisational change initiatives, including restructuring and digital transformation programs.
* Work with business leaders to manage change effectively and minimise disruption.



  





**Requirements** 



* Over 15\+ years of progressive experience in HR positions, managing a team.
* You MUST have extensive experience in HR, including a significant period in a senior leadership capacity.
* Experience working for multinationals, Tech/IT is desirable.
* Ideally have experience working in a matrix reporting structure.
* Strong expertise in modern HR practices, organisational design, and talent management.
* Demonstrated ability to lead geographically dispersed and culturally diverse teams.
* Arabic speaker

data.title: Sector Director- Mission Critical (Data Centre Focus)
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 Strategic Leadership Overview:
   

  

 Lead WSP’s Middle East Mission Critical Sector as the Sector Director, with a primary focus on Data Centres while owning the strategy and growth across a broader portfolio of mission\-critical sub\-sectors. In this highly visible leadersh
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 Strategic Leadership Overview:
   

  

 Lead WSP’s Middle East Mission Critical Sector as the Sector Director, with a primary focus on Data Centres while owning the strategy and growth across a broader portfolio of mission\-critical sub\-sectors. In this highly visible leadership role, you will define the regional vision for Mission Critical, shape sub\-sector strategies, and expand WSP’s market presence in the rapidly evolving mission\-critical infrastructure landscape.
   

  

 Your leadership will directly influence growth performance, strengthen strategic client relationships, and elevate WSP’s Mission Critical portfolio — establishing repeatable, high\-performance solutions across data centres and adjacent mission\-critical environments where uptime, resilience, speed\-to\-commissioning, and operational continuity are paramount.
   

  

 You will oversee the delivery of high\-quality consulting services, lead strategic initiatives, ensure exceptional client satisfaction, and achieve key Profit \& Loss (P\&L) performance targets.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Vision \& Strategy:
   

  

* Define and execute the regional strategy for mission\-critical data centres, aligning with WSP’s global vision and Middle East priorities.
* Own the Mission Critical sector architecture and sub\-sector strategies (with data centres as the primary focus), including value proposition, priority accounts, partner strategy, capability roadmap, and a repeatable go\-to\-market plan for each sub\-sector. Establish clear scorecards and governance to track pipeline, conversion, margin, delivery performance, and sector maturity.


 Cross\-Business Collaboration:
   

  

* Champion collaboration across Advisory, Engineering, Sustainability, and Digital practices to deliver integrated solutions that maximize value for clients.


 Market Expansion:
   

  

* Position WSP as the partner of choice for hyperscale, colocation, and enterprise data centre clients, while advancing regional and multi\-sector priorities across the Mission Critical portfolio.


 Client Engagement:
   

  

* Strengthen relationships with key clients and stakeholders, ensuring exceptional satisfaction and trust in WSP’s delivery capabilities.


 Operational Excellence:
   

  

* Oversee the delivery of high\-quality consulting and engineering services, ensuring projects meet mission\-critical standards for resilience, efficiency, and sustainability across data centres specifically.


 P\&L Accountability:
   

  

* Drive financial performance by achieving key Profit \& Loss (P\&L) targets, optimizing resource allocation, and ensuring sustainable growth.


 Business Development:
   

  

* Lead strategic initiatives to expand WSP’s footprint in the Middle East data centre market, securing new opportunities and partnerships.


 Quality, Safety \& Operations (QSO):
   

  

* Uphold WSP’s commitment to quality, safety, and operational excellence, setting the tone for industry\-leading standards in mission\-critical delivery.


 Leadership \& Team Management
   

  

* Lead, inspire, and manage a diverse team of technical and strategic consultants and subject matter experts. Foster a collaborative, innovative, and inclusive culture centered on growth, technical excellence, strategic advisory services and accountability across business lines and global regions.


 Emerging Technologies \& Future\-Ready Solutions:
   

  

* Drive innovation and future\-ready solutions across mission\-critical data centres, leveraging advanced technologies, sustainable practices, and integrated digital strategies to ensure resilience, efficiency, and long‑term market leadership in the Middle East


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Architecture, or a closely related technical discipline ( Mechanical, Electrical, ICT/Telecoms, Fire \& Life Safety, or similar)
* Master’s degree in engineering management, Business Administration, Data Centre Engineering, or a relevant technical field (preferred
* 15\+ years of experience in mission\-critical/data centre projects, with at least 5 years in a leadership role.
* Strong understanding of: Data centre MEP/HVAC systems, Electrical redundancy / Tier levels, Uptime Institute standards, Cooling and energy optimisation strategies, Commissioning processes \& operational readiness, Mission‑critical resilience and risk engineering
* Experience working within Middle East regulatory frameworks (UAE/KSA at minimum).
* Proven track record in business development, client management, and P\&L ownership.
* Strong technical understanding of data centre design, construction, and operations.
* Experience leading senior technical experts, sector teams, or multi\-disciplinary delivery teams.


**Core Leadership Capabilities**
* Exceptional leadership, communication, and stakeholder management skills.
* Strong commercial acumen and experience with P\&L or division\-level budget ownership.
* Ability to manage multiple large\-scale, complex projects simultaneously under aggressive timelines.
* Deep understanding of data center\-specific design considerations, including redundancy factors and industry regulatory frameworks.
* Evidence of building culture, driving accountability, and setting governance structures.

data.jd_text:
**JOB TITLE**
**Public Policy Associate Director**
**Job Location:** 
 Riyadh
   

  

**Reports To:** 
 Corporate Affairs Director
   

  

**About Astrazeneca**
 AstraZeneca is a global, science\-led, patient\-focused biopharmaceutical company that focuses on the discovery, development, and commercialisation of prescription medicines for some of the world’s most serious diseases. But we’re more than one of the world’s leading pharmaceutical companies.
   

  

**Site Description**
***AstraZeneca is experiencing a significant transformation in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, driven by a commitment to advancing healthcare, innovation, and sustainable growth. Building on our global legacy, AZ KSA is rapidly evolving its operations to better serve patients, collaborate with healthcare stakeholders, and contribute to the ambitious goals outlined in the Saudi Vision 2030\. We are investing in talent, digital solutions, and new ways of working; all designed to enhance our impact on patient outcomes and reinforce our leadership in therapeutic areas. This dynamic environment calls for visionary, agile professionals who thrive in change and are motivated to help shape the future of healthcare in KSA.***
**Role Summary**
 The
 **Public Policy Associate Director** 
 is responsible for shaping, executing, and advancing AstraZeneca’s policy and advocacy strategy in support of the business unit’s portfolio and objectives. Reporting to the Gulf Corporate Affairs Director, this leadership role focuses on analyzing and influencing the external policy environment, identifying opportunities and risks, and guiding the organization’s engagement with critical stakeholders. The position works cross\-functionally with commercial, medical, regulatory, and government affairs colleagues to support patient access, drive business priorities, and ensure alignment with AstraZeneca’s mission and values.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Develop and maintain a deep understanding of the policy landscape affecting AstraZeneca’s disease products, anticipating emerging trends and regulatory changes.
* Monitor relevant legislation, regulations, and advocacy activities to ensure compliance and proactively address potential risks to the business unit’s interests.
* Lead the design, implementation, and evaluation of public policy and advocacy projects that advance therapeutic access, reimbursement, and innovation for the respective therapy area(s).
* Assess and grow internal policy shaping capabilities, with a particular focus on ensuring alignment between national priorities and our therapy area\-specific objectives.
* Ensuring KSA policy strategies are aligned with AstraZeneca’s global policy framework and contribute to broader corporate affairs strategy and must wins.
* Build and sustain relationships with key external stakeholders, including policymakers, senior government officials, patient advocacy groups, medical societies, NGOs, and industry associations.
* Serve as a strategic advisor to cross\-functional teams, ensuring alignment between policy priorities and business goals. Act as a subject matter expert for policy\-related input into brand plans, regulatory submissions, market access, and lifecycle management.
* Develop impactful policy position statements, white papers, briefings, and other communication materials for internal and external audiences.
* Track and report key policy and advocacy outcomes, supporting continuous improvement in strategy and execution.


**Essential For The Role**
* Bachelor’s degree in Public Health, Pharmacy, Life Sciences, or a related discipline required; Master’s degree in Public Policy, Health Economics, or a relevant field strongly preferred.
* Minimum of 3 years’ experience in healthcare policy, government affairs, or advocacy roles, with proven success in the pharmaceutical, biotech, or healthcare sector.
* Experience influencing public policy at national and/or international levels, including shaping legislative frameworks.
* Strong knowledge of regulatory and reimbursement environments relevant to AstraZeneca’s therapy areas.
* Familiarity with market access, pricing, and reimbursement challenges in innovative therapeutics.
* Exceptional analytical, interpersonal, and communication skills. Demonstrated ability to manage complex projects and lead cross\-functional initiatives.
* Strategic thinker, results\-oriented, and adept at navigating ambiguous and evolving policy environments.
* Ability to represent AstraZeneca externally with credibility and impact.
* High agility in stakeholder management and consensus\-building across diverse groups.


**Why AstraZeneca?**
 At AstraZeneca we’re dedicated to being a Great Place to Work. Where you are empowered to push the boundaries of science and unleash your entrepreneurial spirit. There’s no better place to make a difference to medicine, patients, and society. An inclusive culture that champions diversity and collaboration, and always committed to lifelong learning, growth, and development. We’re on an exciting journey to pioneer the future of healthcare.
   

  

**So, what’s next?**
* Are you already imagining yourself joining our team? Good, because we can’t wait to hear from you.
* Are you ready to bring new ideas and fresh thinking to the table? Brilliant! We have one seat available, and we hope it’s yours.


**Where can I find out more?**
 Our Social Media, Follow AstraZeneca on LinkedIn
   

  

 Follow AstraZeneca on Facebook
   

  

 Follow AstraZeneca on Instagram
   

  

**Date Posted**
 03\-Apr\-2026
   

  

**Closing Date**
 14\-Apr\-2026
   

  

 AstraZeneca embraces diversity and equality of opportunity. We are committed to building an inclusive and diverse team representing all backgrounds, with as wide a range of perspectives as possible, and harnessing industry\-leading skills. We believe that the more inclusive we are, the better our work will be. We welcome and consider applications to join our team from all qualified candidates, regardless of their characteristics. We comply with all applicable laws and regulations on non\-discrimination in employment (and recruitment), as well as work authorization and employment eligibility verification requirements.

data.jd_text:
**Location \-** 
 Al Khobar/Riyadh
   

  

**Role Overview**
 The KSA Buildings \& Infrastructure (B\&I) Director is responsible for leading, growing, and elevating Bureau Veritas’ B\&I portfolio across the region. This strategic leadership role oversees the full product line performance—shaping the long‑term vision, delivering the annual P\&L, and ensuring excellence across all operations.
   

  

 The Director drives topline and gross margin delivery in close partnership with regional leadership, steering commercial strategy, optimizing delivery models, and ensuring high‑quality, efficient, and client‑centric execution. The role leads multidisciplinary teams across
 **Asset Management, Infrastructure Technical Inspections, Project \& Program Management, Environmental Services, and Commissioning** 
 , ensuring cohesive, high‑value solutions for clients.
   

  

 The Director also strengthens BV’s market presence across major sectors including
 **Hospitality, Entertainment, Tourism, Mega Projects, Developers, Contractors, Government Authorities, Urban Development, Smart Cities, Transportation Infrastructure, and Aviation** 
 , building trusted relationships and expanding BV’s impact on safe, sustainable, and resilient built environments.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Develop and implement the regional B\&I growth strategy aligned with regional and global Product Line priorities.
* Drive portfolio expansion, commercial performance, and market penetration across all B\&I service domains.
* Lead the annual budgeting cycle and manage end‑to‑end P\&L accountability for revenue, sales, and gross margin.
* Ensure delivery quality in line with BV’s Operational Excellence standards and performance KPIs.
* Oversee regional commercial activities and support major pursuits, tenders, and key account development.
* Build and maintain strategic relationships with key customers across priority sectors.
* Lead operational governance through structured meetings, reviews, and performance follow‑up.
* Coach and develop teams, drive a high‑performance culture, and lead recruitment and performance assessments.
* Collaborate with Product Line and Area leadership to build a strong B\&I talent pipeline.
* Uphold BV’s Core Values, Code of Ethics, and the 3 Absolutes.
* Ensure rigorous compliance with BV procedures for technical governance, risk, and quality.


**Core Competencies**
**Leadership \& Strategy**
* Strategic thinker with strong decision‑making, accountability, and change‑leadership capability.
* Effective people leader who empowers teams and navigates matrix environments with ease.


**Commercial \& Client Excellence**
* Strong commercial acumen and ability to drive growth across diverse B\&I markets, including Transportation Infrastructure and Aviation.
* Skilled at long‑term client relationship development and key account management.


**Operational Excellence**
* Proven ability to ensure consistent quality, compliance, and operational performance.
* Experience managing complex, multi‑disciplinary programs.


**Technical \& Market Insight**
* Solid understanding of B\&I service lines including inspections, commissioning, and asset management.
* Strong knowledge of regional standards, regulations, and industry dynamics across built‑environment and infrastructure sectors.


**Personal Attributes**
* High integrity, resilient, client‑centric, with strong communication and stakeholder influence.

data.jd_text:
We are Lenovo. We do what we say. We own what we do. We WOW our customers.
   

  

 Lenovo is a US$69 billion revenue global technology powerhouse, ranked \#196 in the Fortune Global 500, and serving millions of customers every day in 180 markets. Focused on a bold vision to deliver Smarter Technology for All, Lenovo has built on its success as the world’s largest PC company with a full\-stack portfolio of AI\-enabled, AI\-ready, and AI\-optimized devices (PCs, workstations, smartphones, tablets), infrastructure (server, storage, edge, high performance computing and software defined infrastructure), software, solutions, and services. Lenovo’s continued investment in world\-changing innovation is building a more equitable, trustworthy, and smarter future for everyone, everywhere. Lenovo is listed on the Hong Kong stock exchange under Lenovo Group Limited (HKSE: 992\) (ADR: LNVGY).
   

  

 This transformation together with Lenovo’s world\-changing innovation is building a more inclusive, trustworthy, and smarter future for everyone, everywhere. To find out more visit www.lenovo.com, and read about the latest news via our StoryHub.
   

  

**Role Summary**
 The META Industry Marketing Manager is responsible for driving industry\-led marketing strategy, programs, and flagship events across the META region, with a primary focus on Saudi Arabia (70%) and a regional enablement remit (30%) across the Middle East and Africa.
   

  

 This role sits at the intersection of industry expertise, event strategy, account\-based marketing, and stakeholder orchestration within a complex matrix organization. The role requires strong execution discipline, budget ownership, and the ability to operate at both strategic and hands\-on levels, often under tight timelines.
   

  

 The role reports to the MEA KSA Marketing Director and takes business direction from the KSA General Manager.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Own and drive industry marketing strategy for priority verticals across META, with a strong focus on KSA and alignment with national priorities.
* Translate industry insights, customer challenges, and market trends into compelling narratives, content themes, and campaign direction.
* Provide industry marketing guidance to MEA markets outside KSA to ensure consistency and relevance.
* Lead the strategy and execution of industry\-focused events, including flagship events, CxO forums, roundtables, and third\-party platforms.
* Design and execute Account\-Based Marketing (ABM) programs with Sales, targeting strategic accounts and priority industries.
* Ensure events and ABM programs align with clear business objectives, pipeline contribution, and customer engagement outcomes.
* Act as a trusted marketing partner to META leadership, KSA stakeholders, sales teams, and industry leaders.
* Manage industry marketing budgets, ensuring efficient allocation, strong ROI focus, and compliance with internal processes and governance.
* Deliver high\-quality marketing programs in fast\-paced environments while balancing strategic thinking with operational rigor and continuous optimization.


**Key Requirements**
* 8\+ years of experience in B2B or enterprise marketing, ideally with exposure to industry or vertical marketing.
* Proven experience leading event strategy and execution, ABM programs, and executive\-level customer engagement.
* Strong stakeholder management experience within a regional or global matrix organization.
* Experience managing complex budgets and navigating corporate governance and compliance processes.
* Strong understanding of the Saudi market and broader regional business dynamics is highly preferred.
* Highly process\-driven and detail\-oriented, with the ability to manage multiple priorities under tight timelines.
* Fluency in both Arabic and English is mandatory.


*We are an Equal Opportunity Employer and do not discriminate against any employee or applicant for employment because of race, color, sex, age, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, status as a veteran, and basis of disability or any federal, state, or local protected class.*

data.title: Technical Director - Urban Planning
data.raw_snippet:
**Overview**
 AtkinsRéalis are seeking an expert\-level Technical Director for the Strategic Planning department in Riyadh to play a pivotal leadership role in shaping the Kingdom's spatial and infrastructural future. This position is responsible for setting the strategic vision and technical direct
data.jd_text:
**Overview**
 AtkinsRéalis are seeking an expert\-level Technical Director for the Strategic Planning department in Riyadh to play a pivotal leadership role in shaping the Kingdom's spatial and infrastructural future. This position is responsible for setting the strategic vision and technical direction of planning and urban development initiatives, ensuring they align with Riyadh's'and Saudi Arabia's long\-term growth objectives and the broader goals of Saudi Vision 2030\. The director will oversee projects of major importance and very high profile which integrate land use planning, transportation systems, environmental sustainability, and smart city technologies into cohesive, forward\-thinking urban frameworks.
   

  

 We are looking for a seasoned professional with exceptional presentation skills, proven ability to manage complex stakeholder relationships—including challenging clients—and a strong track record of bringing multidisciplinary teams together to deliver transformative outcomes. Due to the high profile of projects, we are seeking individuals with more than 20\+ years of experience and extraordinary leadership capabilities.
   

  

 Your role
   

  

* Lead the technical direction and strategic planning of very high\-profile urban development projects across Riyadh and KSA.
* Manage multidisciplinary teams including planners, architects, engineers, and GIS specialists, fostering collaboration and alignment.
* Oversee the design, review, and approval of regional and local plans, metropolitan land, zoning regulations, and land use strategies.
* Collaborate with government agencies, private developers, and international consultants to ensure alignment with national and regional planning frameworks.
* Ensure compliance with local regulations, environmental standards, and international best practices.
* Provide expert guidance on infrastructure integration, mobility planning, smart city technologies, and public realm enhancements.
* Represent the department in public forums, stakeholder meetings, and policy discussions with confidence and clarity.
* Act as a unifying force across teams and stakeholders, ensuring seamless coordination and delivery of strategic objectives.
* As a senior leader, the Technical Director will manage multidisciplinary teams and coordinate with government agencies, private sector stakeholders, and international consultants. They will be instrumental in guiding the preparation and implementation of local and regional plans, strategy plans, city plans and visions, structure plans, zoning regulations, and guidelines.
* The role demands a deep understanding of urban dynamics, regulatory environments, and the socio\-economic factors influencing urbanization in the Gulf region, particularly within the context of rapid development and modernization.
* Beyond technical oversight, the Director will serve as a key advisor and public representative of the Strategic Planning department. They will champion innovation, advocate for sustainable and inclusive urban policies, and ensure that all planning efforts are grounded in data\-driven analysis and global best practices. This role requires a balance of visionary thinking, operational excellence, and the ability to navigate complex stakeholder landscapes to deliver transformative urban outcomes.
* You will be part of our tight\-knit strategic planning team which covers the MENA region and beyond. We work in very close collaboration with other departments and sectors and pride ourselves on the inclusive and collaborative environment.


**About You**
* Master's degree in Regional and Urban Planning.
* Minimum 20 years of experience in urban planning, with at least 5 years in a senior leadership role.
* Extensive experience in planning and delivering major strategic plans at the national, regional, and local (city) levels—including comprehensive plans, regional strategies, structure plans, and long‑range spatial frameworks.
* Proven track record of managing large\-scale urban and regional development projects.
* Strong understanding of Saudi Vision 2030 and its implications for urban growth.
* Exceptional presentation and communication skills, with experience handling high\-stakes and challenging client interactions.
* Demonstrated ability to unite diverse teams and drive collaboration toward shared goals.
* Fluency in English required; Arabic proficiency is a plus.


 Rewards \& benefits
   

  

 Explore the rewards and benefits that help you thrive – at every stage of your life and your career.
   

  

**This Includes**
* Tax\-free salary.
* Life insurance coverage.
* Medical insurance.
* Annual leave balance.
* Company gratuity scheme.
* Discretionary bonus program.
* Annual flight contribution.
* Transportation \& housing allowances.
* Employee Wellbeing Program: 24/7 access to specialists in finance, legal matters, family care, personal health, fitness, and nutrition.


 Seize every opportunity to sharpen your skills, expand your expertise, and be recognized for the impact you make.
   

  

**About AtkinsRéalis**
 We're AtkinsRéalis, a world\-class engineering services and nuclear organization. We connect people, data and technology to transform the world's'infrastructure and energy systems. Together, with our industry partners and clients, and our global team of consultants, designers, engineers and project managers, we can change the world. We're committed to leading our clients across our various end markets to engineer a better future for our planet and its people.
   

  

 Find out more.

 Salesforce is the \#1 AI CRM, where humans with agents drive customer success together. Here, ambition meets action. Tech meets trust. And innovation isn’t a buzzword — it’s a way of life.  Ready to level\-up your career at the company leading workforce transformation in the agentic era? You’re in the right place! Agentforce is the future of AI, and you are the future of Salesforce.

Our employees are empowered to push their bold ideas forward, and we are united by a shared passion for using data to do the extraordinary for each other and the world.
   

  

**Partner Account Senior Manager**
 Salesforce is seeking a Partner Account Senior Manager to join our Saudi Arabia Partner team. This role is ideal for someone with experience in building and expanding strategic partnerships to drive mutual business growth. Reporting to the Senior Director of Partner Alliances, you will play a key role in executing our go\-to\-market strategy and cultivating strong, collaborative relationships with a portfolio of partners.

* Ability to engage with and influence key partner stakeholders and executive

 Familiarity with the data management landscape and it's relevance to AI strategies, including areas such as Data Governance, Master Data Management, Data Security, and Information Lifecycle Management.
   

  

 Unleash Your Potential
   

  

 When you join Salesforce, you’ll be limitless in all areas of your life. Our benefits and resources support you to find balance and
 *be your best* 
 , and our AI agents accelerate your impact so you can
 *do your best* 
 . Together, we’ll bring the power of Agentforce to organizations of all sizes and deliver amazing experiences that customers love. Apply today to not only shape the future — but to redefine what’s possible — for yourself, for AI, and the world.
   

  

 Accommodations
   

  

 If you need a reasonable accommodation during the application or the recruiting process, please submit a request via this Accommodations Request Form.
   

  

 Please note that Salesforce uses artificial intelligence (AI) tools to help our recruiters assess and evaluate candidates’ resumes and qualifications throughout the recruiting process. Humans will always make any candidate selection and hiring decisions. Please see our Candidate Privacy Statement for more information about how we use your personal data and your rights, including with regard to use of AI tools and opt out options.
   

  

 Posting Statement
   

  

 Salesforce is an equal opportunity employer and maintains a policy of non\-discrimination with all employees and applicants for employment. What does that mean exactly? It means that at Salesforce, we believe in equality for all. And we believe we can lead the path to equality in part by creating a workplace that’s inclusive, and free from discrimination. Know your rights: workplace discrimination is illegal. Any employee or potential employee will be assessed on the basis of merit, competence and qualifications – without regard to race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression or identity, transgender status, age, disability, veteran or marital status, political viewpoint, or other classifications protected by law. This policy applies to current and prospective employees, no matter where they are in their Salesforce employment journey. It also applies to recruiting, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, assessment of job performance, discipline, termination, and everything in between. Recruiting, hiring, and promotion decisions at Salesforce are fair and based on merit.
