data.jd_text:
**KEY RESPONSIBILITIES** 



* Directs, coaches, supports, supervises, and evaluates (with the Sous Chef) all direct reports.
* Must have excellent food knowledge and a full understanding of culinary terms.
* Must be able to read, understand, follow, and prepare company recipes by maintaining the quality and consistency in taste according to the instructions provided by the corporate office.
* Must be proficient in completing tasks, work efficiently and productively.
* Must be able to work in any section of a kitchen.
* Coordinate and supervise all team members assigned to their section, assign and delegate tasks accordingly.
* Undertake recipe reviews daily. Maintain recipe folders in immaculate condition.
* Responsible for follow\-through on any request within the area of responsibility received from the direct supervisor or manager on duty; this may include show plates, food samples and random food tastings.
* Control production levels and recommend ideas for improvements and better cost controlling.
* Prepare daily electronic food requisitions needed for his section production and countercheck deliveries for its accuracy; Report any discrepancies to his immediate supervisor.
* Must be able to oversee any main section (Sauce, Entremetier, Fish, Roast, Outlet CDP, Tournant and Cold Kitchen) and its entire food production.
* Maintain and ensure that Public Health are followed according to company standards and expectation (referring to US, Anvisa, Shipsan, Canadian, Australian etc.) and always followed within his section.
* Ensures that the HACCP program is carried out correctly.
* Maintains their assigned area in preparation for announced or unannounced United States Public Health type inspection either done by the Food \& Beverage Director or the actual inspectors.
* Reports for duty at assigned times, follows their supervisor’s instructions, and ensures that personal appearance, uniform, and personal hygiene are in accordance with the company’s rules and regulations.



  





**QUALIFICATIONS AND EDUCATION** 



* A minimum of 5 years in an upscale hotel, resort, cruise ship or convention banqueting service and at least 2 years as Chef Tournant (shipboard experience preferred).
* A culinary school degree is required.
* Very strong management skills in a multicultural and dynamic environment.
* Very strong communication, problem solving, decision making, and interpersonal skills.
* Superior customer service, teambuilding, and conflict resolution skills.
* Knowledge of the principles and processes for providing personalized services including needs assessment techniques, quality service standards, alternative delivery systems, and guest satisfaction evaluation techniques.
* Strong planning, coaching, organizing, staffing, controlling, and evaluating skills.
* Intermediate computer software skills required.
* Possess a good understanding of basic accounting principles such as numbering flow, “Debits/Credits”, adjusting entries and corrections.
* Ability to write reports and business correspondence and to establish a good rapport with the ship’s Senior Officers and the corporate office.

data.raw_snippet:
**JOB PURPOSE:** 




 The role is primarily responsible for executing the GTx strategy of Oman, working with FAB CEO in Oman and FAB Head of coverage Oman in leading developments and sales, structuring GTx solutions, managing and growing of trade and cash business for FAB across Oman local clients
data.jd_text:
**JOB PURPOSE:** 




 The role is primarily responsible for executing the GTx strategy of Oman, working with FAB CEO in Oman and FAB Head of coverage Oman in leading developments and sales, structuring GTx solutions, managing and growing of trade and cash business for FAB across Oman local clients in\-country, outbound and inbound business originating from our network.
 


* The job is critical in channeling and executing GTx HO strategy into Oman.
* The role is based in Muscat (Oman)



  





**KEY ACCOUNTABILITIES:** 



* Setting and executing the strategy for the business, assess the market opportunities and challenges, and overall parameters of the business, in line with Head of GTx GCC ex UAE and Head of GTx International



  





**Job Context:** 




**Specific Accountability** 




 As Executive Director Head of GTx Oman, you will be responsible for:
 



  




* Actively engage with clients together with the Head of coverage, Oman and Oman Coverage team to build GTx business for the Bank in the country. A strong drive for GTx Sales, understanding of the GTx Products and clients in Oman.



  




* Delivery of specific revenue targets returns on risk adjusted assets and equity consistent with the Bank’s acceptable risk parameters. Keeping the management aware of performance gaps with suggestions to rectify and improve performance and deepen client relationship



  




* Structuring, executing and implementing workable and innovative solutions that meet customer needs. Providing technical expertise to relationship managers and facilitating client discussions. Lead structuring of bespoke GTx Solutions and ensure high\-quality customer experience through consultative approach



  




* Establishing strong stakeholder relationships and work with colleagues and partners across the network to build a strong GTx Franchise in Oman. Work closely with Cash Management and Trade Finance Product Management team in UAE to finalize related documentation/ structures/ rollout new products/ solutions/policies. Provide Oman country / competition feedback to review Bank’s product offering in Oman and potential up\-tiering of the product suite.



  




* Working closely with Coverage teams in\-country and network to develop markets, clients, and products based on detailed Client Account Plan for growing GTx business and maximizing market share. Partnering with coverage teams to develop quality credit proposals supporting structuring of existing and new facilities



  




* Ensuring transactions, facilities and implementation are being executed in a timely manner. Working closely with Compliance, Finance, Implementation, Operations, etc. for client on\-boarding and smooth execution of transactions



  




* Identifying and managing fraud, regulatory and compliance risks in the transactions when developing solutions for clients. Proactively managing transactional risk in an efficient and profitable manner.



  




* Identifying opportunities for continuous improvement of products, systems, processes, and practices while considering client needs, market developments and trends. Actively participate in opportunities to update product skills, understand market trends and competitor behaviors



  




* Understanding and complying with regulations and internal policies i.e. Credit/ Compliance/ Operational Risks, etc.



  





**FRAMEWORKS, BOUNDARIES, \& DECISION\-MAKING AUTHORITY:** 



* Strong Client network with focus to grow business for the bank in the country. Strong origination capability coupled with excellent customer service \& negotiation skills
* Strong technical knowledge in GTx products including Cash Management, Channels and Trade Finance
* Self\-starter who can handle all enquiries independently and able to effectively interact with customer to resolve enquiries.
* Strong interpersonal skills as well as a team player with strong influential skill that can motivate other team members to achieve the business objective. Ability to work in Matrix environment
* Self\-confident and performance driven. Ability to work under pressure and with a strong delivery focus.
* Ability to articulate, formulate and deliver high quality client presentation
* Understanding of operations processes and procedures, and related risk in trade transactions
* Familiar with the regulatory environment concerning financial industry in country
* Strong written and spoken English (Arabic is a plus)



  





**QUALIFICATIONS \& EXPERIENCE:** 




**Minimum Qualification:** 
 Degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Commerce or equivalent discipline
 



**Minimum Experience: 15\+** 
 years Transaction Banking experience.
 



**Omani National**

data.title: Associate Creative Director - Exhibitions
data.raw_snippet:
**Position: Associate Creative Director \- Exhibitions** 




 Location: Dubai, United Arab Emirates
 



  





 WHO IS DXB LIVE?
 



  





 DXB LIVE is the Experiential Marketing and Event Services Agency of Dubai World Trade Centre, a full\-spectrum powerhouse for event management, production
data.jd_text:
**Position: Associate Creative Director \- Exhibitions** 




 Location: Dubai, United Arab Emirates
 



  





 WHO IS DXB LIVE?
 



  





 DXB LIVE is the Experiential Marketing and Event Services Agency of Dubai World Trade Centre, a full\-spectrum powerhouse for event management, production and delivery. With creative vision, technical excellence and operational precision, DXB LIVE brings to life a wide range of world\-class events, from exhibitions and conferences to national celebrations, international festivals, immersive brand activations and exclusive, high\-end weddings.
 



  





 Our in\-house capabilities span design, build, technology and logistics allowing us to execute at scale and deliver exceptional experiences across every format. As we expand our global footprint, we continue to forge strong alliances with leading international event organizations, positioning DXB LIVE among the world’s premier event service providers.
 



  





 EMPOWERING PEOPLE, INSPIRING TALENT: TOGETHER, WE MAKE
 **AMAZING** 
 HAPPEN!
 



  





 WHAT’S THE ROLE?
 



  





 We are seeking a highly experienced Associate Creative Director – Exhibitions (ACD) to join DXB LIVE and lead the creative vision for our exhibition design projects. You will work closely with the Creative Director and AVP – Creative Design, taking ownership of the creative vision, concept development and delivery of exhibition projects that align with client objectives and DXB LIVE’s strategic creative direction.
 



  





 In this role, you will lead by example setting creative standards, challenging thinking and fostering a culture of innovation and excellence. You will manage multiple projects simultaneously, stay ahead of global exhibition design trends and contribute to shaping the future direction of DXB LIVE’s exhibition design capabilities.
 



  





 WHAT DOES THE ROLE INVOLVE?
 



  




* Lead the creative output for assigned exhibition projects, ensuring proposals are high\-quality, on brief and aligned with the overall creative strategy. The creative narrative, storytelling and experiential journey are equally important as structure and form.
* Support the Creative Director (CD), AVP – Creative Design and the DXB LIVE Creative Design Studio across all business opportunities in exhibitions.
* Collaborate with the CD, AVP – Creative Design, Creative Strategist, senior commercial and client development teams, designers and freelancers to fully understand briefs, target audiences and creative direction.
* Guide, mentor and inspire the design team, emphasizing the importance of their contributions to each project.
* Facilitate effective teamwork through creative brainstorming sessions and collaborative concept development.
* Develop project timeframes in coordination with the Traffic Controller and CD, ensuring sufficient time for high\-quality delivery.
* Introduce design trends, standards and changes to the studio, supporting continuous improvement.
* Conduct research on international and MENA\-region design trends, techniques, and innovations in graphics, structures, environmental and experiential design.
* Stay updated on digital, technology and experiential activation trends to enhance exhibition concepts.
* Attend events and activities that inspire creativity and broaden design perspectives.
* Monitor and report on research and development outcomes, recommending best practices and areas for studio growth.
* Assist in identifying team gaps and contribute to the long\-term development and evolution of the design studio.
* Undertake other duties as required by the CD/AVP – Creative Design, while handling confidential information with discretion and professionalism.



  





 WHAT DO WE OFFER?
 



  




* A senior creative leadership role within one of the region’s most dynamic experiential and exhibitions organisations.
* Competitive salary and comprehensive benefits package.
* Exposure to high‑profile, large‑scale international exhibitions and landmark events.
* Opportunities for professional growth within a collaborative, innovation‑driven creative environment.



  





 WHAT YOU NEED:
 



  




* Bachelor’s degree in Design or a related discipline.
* Minimum of 10 years’ experience in a creative agency environment, with proven excellence in exhibition stand Design or experiential design.
* Strong leadership skills, with experience managing and mentoring a creative team.
* Highly creative, organized, and detail\-oriented, with excellent time management.
* Exceptional professionalism and strong verbal, written, listening, and public speaking skills.
* Relevant work experience in the GCC region is required.
* Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite is essential; knowledge of 3ds Max or other 3D software is an advantage.



  





**Disclaimer** 




  





 The duties and responsibilities described are not a comprehensive list and may change, or additional tasks within the scope of work may be assigned at any time with or without prior notice, as necessitated by business demands.

data.title: Head of Streamer Relations (MEA & CIS)

data.jd_text:
**About us:**
 ARRISE sets the benchmark for service delivery and excellence in the iGaming industry. Playing a key role in the success of its clients, which include Pragmatic Play, a brand relied upon by the world’s biggest online casinos for its cutting\-edge products, ARRISE helps to deliver exceptional gaming experiences to millions of players worldwide.
   

  

 Our global team of over 10,000 talented and driven professionals are shaping the future of iGaming. Headquartered in Gibraltar, we have offices spanning Canada, India, the Isle of Man, Latvia, Malta, Romania, Serbia, Bulgaria, and the UAE, and more exciting destinations on the horizon.
   

  

 At ARRISE, we take pride in creating growth opportunities at all levels, constantly investing in our people while welcoming new colleagues and forging strategic partnerships that open new opportunities for success.
   

  

 To achieve this, we bet on ourselves. We know that success is a collective effort, and our team is driven by ambition, collaboration, and a shared commitment to grow and succeed—while embracing every step of the journey.
   

  

 Be part of the future of iGaming with 10,000 ARRISERS! See a job that excites you? Apply now, and our friendly recruitment team will connect with you soon. Your journey starts here!
   

  

**About the role:**
 This senior leadership role will oversee the regional Streamer Relationship team— comprising of Team Leaders and Streamer Relations Managers — while also personally managing relationships with a portfolio of our most valuable, high\-impact streamers.
   

  

 You will help define and then execute the regional streamer strategy and supporting incentivization plan, ensuring our slot games achieve exceptional visibility, engagement, and advocacy across major streaming platforms.
   

  

**What you'll be doing:**
* With the help of senior management, define and lead the regional streamer strategy, aligning with commercial marketing goals to maximise exposure and engagement across key markets.
* Develop and implement scalable streamer incentivization programes, campaign frameworks, and retention strategies.
* Directly manage relationships with a portfolio of the company's highest\-value streamers, offering bespoke support and strategic alignment.
* Lead and support Streamer Relations Manager Team Leaders, and Streamer Relations Managers ensuring they are high\-performing, motivated, and aligned with global objectives.
* Oversee KPIs for streamer activity, ensuring accountability and performance tracking across all teams.
* Collaborate cross\-functionally with Product, Marketing and Compliance to ensure seamless integration of streamer activity with broader initiatives.
* Collaborate with the Commercial Marketing Director on managing the global streamer strategy budget, ensuring effective allocation of resources to maximise return on investment.
* Monitor industry trends, platform developments, and competitor strategies to maintain thought leadership and innovation within the team.
* Provide regular reporting and insights to the Commercial Marketing Director, including performance analysis, strategic proposals, and risk/opportunity assessments.
* Champion a culture of excellence, collaboration, and creativity across the Streamer Relations function in the region.


**What we ask of you:**
* Extensive experience in influencer/creator partnerships, streamer relations, or community management, ideally within iGaming, gaming, entertainment, or streaming industries.
* Strong understanding of streaming platforms such as Twitch, YouTube, and Kick, with deep knowledge of creator ecosystems and streaming trends.
* Proficiency in written and spoken English; knowledge of Arabic, Russian or Turkish language is a plus.
* Proven experience managing high\-value streamer or influencer partnerships and building long\-term strategic relationships.
* Demonstrated leadership experience managing or mentoring partnership, influencer, or marketing teams.
* Strong organisational and strategic planning skills, with experience leading campaigns, incentive programs, and large\-scale creator collaborations.
* Analytical and data\-driven mindset, with experience tracking performance, engagement metrics, and ROI across influencer or streamer programs.
* Ability to collaborate cross\-functionally with Marketing, Product, Commercial, and Compliance teams to drive aligned initiatives.
* Excellent stakeholder management, negotiation, and communication skills with senior internal and external partners.
* Passion for gaming, streaming, and digital communities, with awareness of industry trends and competitor activity.
* Flexibility to occasionally work outside regular hours to align with global streamer schedules and key events.
* Willingness to travel for industry events, conferences, and key creator activations.


**What we offer in return:**
* A detailed company training on highest standards.
* A chance to work in friendly and supportive culture.
* Tremendous growth opportunities in a large fast moving international company.
* Grow with ARRISE \| Learning Hub—personalized learning, gamified growth, and endless career development at your fingertips.
* Private health insurance

data.jd_text:
**Overview**
* There is an internal slated candidate being considered for this position. However, all qualified candidates are encouraged to apply.


 Lipton Ice Tea is the global No.1 RTD tea brand with over $3Bn in global turnover.
   

  

 AMESA is a priority growth cluster, with a current business of \~$80Mn and an ambition to double the business by 2028, driven by consumer shifts away from sugary carbonated drinks towards healthier alternatives and a clear JTBD to recruit new consumer \& develop the RTD tea category, by establishing Lipton Ice tea as a “Better for you beverage” vs other sugary drinks.
   

  

 Even within the Pepsico system, Lipton Ice tea is aligned as a priority to expend the portfolio.
   

  

 What makes the opportunity exciting?
   

  

 Ice Tea is a nascent category (\<2% of LRB) in AMESA, offering significant headroom for recruitment\-led growth anchored on rapid acceleration of health and better\-for\-you consumer trends
 - Growing consumer shift from carbonated beverages to healthier alternatives

- Globally this region has strong Lipton brand equity from Hot Tea (\+60% market share) provides a unique advantage, as the brand enjoys strong affinity and brand love.

- Lipton has an established GTM, with Pepsi bottling system, being small, it needs a disruptive and entrepreneurial approach to growth

 The Brand Manager based in Dubai, plays a critical role in governing and deploying the brand growth agenda across region’s multi\-market, multi\-bottler ecosystem (17\+ bottlers)and leading brand activations to drive performance.
   

  

 Specifically, this includes:
   

  

* Accountable for regional brand Seed strategy deployment and execution leadership across AMESA
* Support the Marketing Managers on developing integrated brand communication for the region
* Own regional A\&M budget tracking and governance across AMESA
* Project leadership and ownership of regional brand activation initiatives \& innovation deployment
* Develop \& deploy E\-com \& AFH (Away from home) channel activation and communication programs
* Packaging Development \& implementation of 2D changes across markets
* Business Performance Tracking \& Continuous Optimization


**Responsibilities**
 The role works in close partnership with the AMESA Marketing Director and with regional marketing managers, regional Insights and country franchise managers to drive implementation of the marketing plans.
   

  

 Specific activities include:
   

  

* Regional Brand Seed Strategy Deployment
* Deploy the Lipton Ice Tea Seed Strategy across AMESA, ensuring brand consistency with local relevance in line with the JTBT
* Translate strategy into clear, executable briefs and toolkits and act as the regional brand guardian.
* Lead the white\-space agenda by advancing the seed strategy with clearly defined Job\-to\-Be\-Done (JTBD) to recruit new consumers, accelerate RTD tea category development and scale the business by leveraging best practices from priority cluster geographies.
* Support the Marketing Managers on developing integrated brand plans \& communication for the region
* Partner with Marketing Managers on integrated brand communication, from planning to in\-market rollout.
* Co\-own the Annual Operating Plan (AOP) \& JBP (Joint Business Planning) with Marketing Managers end\-to\-end, from planning, cross\-functional alignment, deployment and in\-year sharpening by systematically integrating learnings from prior years.
* Enable leading\-edge digital and creator deployment and drive speed to market through cross functional coordination.
* Drive post\-launch evaluations across key initiatives, synthesizing performance, insights and gaps into holistic, actionable learnings for the broader business.
* Own A\&M Governance \& Budget tracking Quarterly
* Own regional A\&M tracking and governance across AMESA.
* Partner with marketing managers to prioritise spends and track phasing, flagging risks and deviations early.
* Project leadership and ownership of regional brand activation initiatives \& innovation deployment
* Lead regional innovation and activation deployment, from adaptation to launch execution.
* Develop activation toolkits and best\-practice playbooks for consistent market rollout.
* Develop and deploy brand activation plans aligned to AOP calendars, leading sampling and on\-ground consumer engagement and scaling impact through structured learning transfer across the cluster and continuous process optimization.
* Develop \& deploy E\-com \& AFH (Away from home) channel activation and communication programs
* Lead development and deployment of E\-commerce and AFH strategies across AMESA
* Work closely with franchise team to build channel\-specific propositions and activation models
* Build channel\-specific activation models and unlock new consumption occasions.
* Digital, Social \& Creator Ecosystem deployment
* Own regional social media deployment and creator strategy for Lipton Ice Tea.
* Ensure high\-quality, locally relevant, performance\-driven content through market and agency partnerships.
* Bring forth the best practices with key learnings across markets and create a tracking dashboard liaising with the agencies.
* Packaging Development \& implementation of 2D changes across markets
* Lead end\-to\-end management of 2D packaging changes across AMESA.
* Act as regional interface across Global, R\&D, Supply Chain, Legal, and markets to ensure on\-time delivery.
* Drive alignments \& implement plans with Bottling partners (19\+ Bottlers)
* Leading discussions with Bottling team, to ensure alignment and deployment of POSM toolkits across markets
* Drive alignment through strong influence, clarity of direction and structured engagement
* Performance Tracking \& Continuous Optimization
* Market Penetration: Monitor market penetration, brand performance and campaign impact in middle east markets, ensuring continuous growth.
* Business performance snapshot: Own business performance snapshots through monthly deep dives on the top 3\-4 markets in the cluster, analysing the 6Ps, identifying efficiency gaps and defining clear, action oriented interventions to improve market performance.
* Best Practices: Build and share best practices to scale white space market success across other priority regions.


**Qualifications**
 Person Profile
   

  

 Business \& Functional Skills
   

  

* Strategic Marketing Expertise: Proven track record in executing strategic marketing plans that drive growth in new and underdeveloped markets.
* Business Acumen: A strategic thinker with a deep understanding of the 3 C’s (Consumer, Customer, Competition), trends, practices, information, and insights impacting the business, enabling sound decisions to be made.
* Execution Excellence: Balance of strategic vision and hands\-on execution support, ensuring marketing initiatives drive business impact.
* Demonstrated capability in budget management, innovation deployment, packaging execution and digital marketing.
* Data\-Driven: Consumer and data savvy – everything we do is led by insights and data. You must be obsessed with it!
* Cross\-Functional Collaboration: Skillful at navigating a complex, matrix organization to drive clarity, alignment, and accountability across global, regional, and local teams.
* Strong influencing and people management skills \- ability to engage/motivate colleagues and stakeholders and lead projects independently


 Key Competencies
   

  

* Exceptional project leadership management with experience leading agile teams in a fast\-paced environment and managing multiple, competing priorities simultaneously.
* Active listener \- considering the perspective of others, activating the right plan based on holistic understanding of the business challenge and business needs.
* Curious connector \- ability to connect the dots across people, projects and partners, creating new opportunities for innovative collaboration that enables successful activation of digital brand strategies.
* Commercially minded \- able to identify opportunities and deliver business results through digital
* Team\-worker \- proactive networking across a complex organizational hierarchy
* Resilient and influential \- thriving on challenge, bringing colleagues along on the journey
* Strong communicator \- Superior verbal and written communications skills with extreme attention to detail
* Tenacity and sense of urgency \- the ability to make things happen quickly with large, less nimble partners and/or teams. Ability to perform in ambiguity and uncertainty


 Main interactions:
   

  

* Reporting into the Marketing Director
* Supporting Marketing Managers
* Pepsi Inter /Pepsi Bottlers \& Marketing teams
* Regional Leadership Team (brand agenda and innovation)
* Lead Creative Agency and other agencies for digital, adaptation, activation etc.
* Regional R\&D, Franchise, Supply chain \& cross functional stakeholders

data.title: Design Director – Airport
data.raw_snippet:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for a Design Director\- Airport to join our team in Dammam, Eastern Province, KSA.
   

  

 Reporting to the Project Director, the Design Director leads all airport design management activities across disciplines, ensuring technical ex
data.jd_text:
**Job Description**
 WSP in the Middle East is currently hiring for a Design Director\- Airport to join our team in Dammam, Eastern Province, KSA.
   

  

 Reporting to the Project Director, the Design Director leads all airport design management activities across disciplines, ensuring technical excellence and full compliance with programme requirements. The role provides strategic oversight of design quality, innovation, design integration, and design‑related risk mitigation. The Design Director will coordinate multidisciplinary design teams, manage design progress, and ensure seamless integration of design deliverables with construction, operational, and stakeholder needs. They also serve as the primary interface for resolving complex technical issues across the project.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Design Leadership \& Oversight**
* Lead and manage all design activities across architectural, structural, airside, landside, MEP, and specialist disciplines.
* Drive technical excellence, consistency, and alignment with WSP design standards and aviation best practices.
* Ensure design deliverables fully align with project objectives, scope, and regulatory requirements.


**Multidisciplinary Design Management**
* Coordinate and supervise multidisciplinary design teams, ensuring timely progress of all design packages.
* Oversee integration of design outputs with procurement, construction, commissioning, and airport operational needs.
* Review and validate technical submissions, drawings, specifications, and design reports.


**Stakeholder \& Client Coordination**
* Act as the main technical interface with the client, authorities, airport operators, and key stakeholders.
* Facilitate design workshops, technical meetings, and design reviews to resolve issues and align expectations.
* Provide clear, authoritative guidance on design matters to support informed decision ‑ making.


**Quality, Safety \& Compliance**
* Champion design quality, innovation, sustainability, and compliance with local and international aviation codes.
* Implement quality assurance processes aligned with WSP global design standards.
* Ensure design solutions meet safety, regulatory, and operational requirements throughout the project lifecycle.


**Risk \& Change Management**
* Identify design risks early, propose mitigation strategies, and manage design ‑ related changes effectively.
* Support the Project Director in managing scope, change orders, and design ‑ related commercial impacts.


**Team Leadership \& Collaboration**
* Mentor and guide design managers, discipline leads, and wider technical teams.
* Promote a collaborative environment across WSP offices in KSA, UAE, India, and other regions.
* Ensure resource planning and performance management support project delivery demands.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in architecture or engineering (Master’s degree preferred).
* 15–20\+ years’ experience in airport or major infrastructure design delivery.
* Strong background leading multidisciplinary design teams in PMC or consultancy environments.
* Experience with airport terminal design, airside/landside infrastructure, or large ‑ scale aviation modernisation projects (KSA experience advantageous).


**Technical Competencies**
* Expert understanding of aviation design standards, ICAO codes, NFPA, and relevant regulatory frameworks.
* Strong design integration and coordination capability across disciplines.
* Skilled in design review, technical validation, and risk ‑ based decision ‑ making.


**Behavioural Competencies**
* Strong leadership presence with excellent communication and stakeholder engagement skills.
* Solution ‑ driven, proactive, and resilient under pressure.
* Ability to influence senior stakeholders on technical and strategic matters.

data.raw_snippet:

**Role Summary**
 The Manager \- Data Analytics is responsible for supporting on developing and executing our Analytics Delivery and Insights roadmap, in close collaboration with our product owners, da
data.jd_text:
**JOB TITLE**
 Manager \- Analytics Engagement \| MAF Retail \| Corporate Head Office UAE
   

  

**Role Summary**
 The Manager \- Data Analytics is responsible for supporting on developing and executing our Analytics Delivery and Insights roadmap, in close collaboration with our product owners, data scientists and data engineers who are spearheading the Advanced Analytics transformation across Majid Al Futtaim. The role holder is also responsible for leading a team of data analysts to drive actionable insights and deliver impactful solutions to the business.
   

  

**ROLE PROFILE**
* Lead end\-to\-end analytics initiatives, ensuring high\-quality, consistent, and timely delivery of actionable recommendations
* Own the analytical data lifecycle, establishing robust data pipelines, governance, and quality controls to ensure reliable, analysis\-ready data
* Define and oversee KPIs, performance metrics, dashboards, and reporting frameworks for stakeholders across leadership levels
* Drive development and automation of predictive models, segmentations, and advanced analytics solutions to address evolving business needs
* Collaborate with product owners, data scientists, data engineers, and business teams and other key stakeholders as their business partner, to define and develop framework and methodologies to measure and track impact of analytics use\-cases
* Develop presentations on advanced analytics and performance in key areas of the business and communicate results across the organisation
* Perform regular audit of various processes and databases for the Retail Analytics Unit in order to identify gaps and risks, and propose corrective actions
* Responsible for the preparation of business presentations and reports related to Retail Analytics for various stakeholders, on periodic and ad hoc basis as and when required


**Requirements**
* Bachelor’s Degree in a computer science / engineering / math or related technical discipline
* 7\+ years in a managerial Data Analytics role in an international environment; creating and building complex analyses and evaluation tools for assessing/tracking performance
* 2\+ years in the retail/FMCG business is preferred
* Experience in Azure, Azure Data Factory, Databrick, SQL, Python, and PowerBI


**What We Offer**
* At Majid Al Futtaim, we’re on a mission to create great moments, to spread happiness, to build, experiences that stay in our memories for a lifetime. We’re proud to say that over the past 27 years, we have built a reputation as a regional market leader in what we do. Join us!
* Work in a friendly environment, where everyone shares positive vibes and excited about our future.
* Work with over 45,000 diverse and talented colleagues, all guided by our Leadership Model.

data.title: Senior Manager - Compensation & Benefits
data.raw_snippet:
**Company Description**
 Present in over 100 countries and employing nearly 80,000 professionals, Publicis Groupe is the third largest communications group in the world. Publicis Groupe is listed on the Euronext Paris \[FR0000130577] and is part of the CAC 40 index. Active across the entire value ch
data.jd_text:
**Company Description**
 Present in over 100 countries and employing nearly 80,000 professionals, Publicis Groupe is the third largest communications group in the world. Publicis Groupe is listed on the Euronext Paris \[FR0000130577] and is part of the CAC 40 index. Active across the entire value chain, Publicis Groupe offers its major clients a transversal, unified and fluid model allowing them access to all the Groupe’s tools and expertise around the world through the mantra The Power of One.
   

  

**Overview**
 The focus of the C\&B lead is to be the thought leader on C\&B vertical for the Talent team and Publicis Groupe at large. The C\&B lead will enable the Groupe to attract, retain, develop and leverage talent by ensuring that our talent base is rewarded in a motivating, competitive manner. By sharing leading total reward concepts and best practices, it is the responsibility of the C\&B lead to provide guidance that ensures that individuals are compensated appropriately while the Groupe financial commitments are met. They will participate in aspects of planning, managing and delivery of Compensation \& Benefits plans for the Groupe. They should be able to play a role of a strategic partner and administrative \& employee champion in this function to be able to contribute to the success of the operations and control. This will include identifying, evaluating, advising and implementing initiatives. Contributes and partners in design, development, review and management of the Benefits strategy to achieve external competitiveness as well as to proactively maintain benefits cost for the organization. Directs and manages the assessment of best practices and creation of benefits strategies and solutions based on business requirements and in collaboration with HR business partners and representatives from the business. Monitors internal compliance with reporting, data protection and privacy issues and manages activities in relation to the review of existing and proposed statutory requirements governing the existing total reward frameworks, policies and procedures and recommends appropriate courses of action. Works in close collaboration with Talent verticals, mainly HRBP operational excellence, and Resources (HR shared service center on operational excellence) on benefits processes, practices and procedures. Works in close collaboration with the Groupe CFO/Finance team to budget for the benefit expenses (commit), gets better benefits at optimal costs, shares month on month benefits utilization and spend analysis with Finance leads, Talent Vertical leads and markets’ HR Business Partners. Updates the leadership team on the market trend and develops programs to support the business unit objectives, which include evaluating, establishing and aligning internal benefit processes and policies. Develops management systems and monitoring mechanism to govern the compliance and effective implementation of the Benefits programs, systems and processes within business units and to provide guidance. Contributes and participates in the global or local activities to design and develop HR information system for HR database to ensure an efficient system. Main Tasks: Strategic \& Impact responsibilities \& Tasks: Ownership of Publicis Groupe compensation philosophy \& principles fostering a total reward approach. Lead and take ownership on Publicis Groupe Middle East \& Turkey compensation reviews for the Groupe across its 3 cycles per year. Lead and take ownership on Publicis Groupe Middle East \& Turkey bonus reviews for the Groupe Q1 of every year. Ownership and collaboration on linking reward to performance in form of recommendations, reviewing proposals and challenging. Developing and creating new C\&B framework tools supporting the business leaders in their C\&B feedback and recommendation. Develop and administer salary programs to ensure equitable and competitive salaries for all people. Programs may include base pay administration, payroll, incentive plans, salary range structures, bonus/award plans, and executive compensation. Conduct market research and analysis of total compensation for Publics Groupe ME and Turkey. Works with Head of Talent Transformation and CTO to analyze market data and make recommendations aligned to the business need. Monitor the competitive marketplace to ensure awareness of our competitive pay levels, best practices, trends, and new developments. Analyze such data and make recommendations to Groupe leadership as appropriate. Establish and maintain salary ranges by performing annual benchmarking. Manage merit and promotion raise process. Manage bonus programs (Global bonus, Local Bonus Plan, LTIP, Spot Bonus, etc.) Create and steward salary plan tool to be used by Talent verticals in compensation management. Manage HR Systems data integrity, transaction processing, and payroll handoff. Manage Talent practice budget. Participate in salary \& benefit surveys. Implement benefits plans and programs. Stay abreast of existing and proposed statutory requirements governing compensation and benefits administration, market practices on compensation \& benefits activities and recommending appropriate course of action. Communicate plans and programs Publicis Groupe Talents and key stakeholders \& provide information to make informed individual and business decisions, relating to compensation and benefit matters. Coach \& lead team members on specific areas of domain expertise. Your Skills \& Experience: Detailed knowledge of market practice reward \& benefits strategy, design, administration and delivery. Knowledge \& understanding of corporate HR policies \& procedures. Pay benchmarking strategies and techniques. Benefits design, administration and delivery.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Bachelor's degree is a must and a master’s degree is a plus. At least 7\-10 years of experience in C\&B and HR benefits processes. Meaningful experience in ME compensation planning and design, administration, compliance and communication. A strong record of accomplishment of meeting or beating revenue goals and set KPIs. A strong network of senior level industry professional and experts. Demonstrated success at building industry leading intellectual capital, processes, and ideas. Thorough understanding of all aspects of selling, designing, performing, and delivering large complex projects. Strong leadership abilities and the ability to teach and mentor direct reports. Project management skills with ability to co\-ordinate multiple projects of different scales simultaneously. Self\-starter and self\-motivated with ability to work independently. Ability to communicate across all levels of clients (from executive to C\-level) and all levels of the agency/client. Deep level of understanding of the functioning of the diversified services units and know when to tap on them. Strong organizational skills and attention to detail. Exceptional problem\-solving skills and constant positivity upholder. Proven ability to build close client and inter\-agency relationships. Strategic thinker – able to challenge the client’s brief to provide the right solution. Ability to work under pressure and tight timelines. Strong understanding of technology and media to be able to operationalize the business. Understanding of content within the user journey and how personalization and automation enables and powers that process. Understands media and data analytics and its impact on the business. Ability to transform data into meaningful insights and business KPIs and vice versa.
